> _The top strategist for Ron DeSantis' super PAC privately told donors that Vivek Ramaswamy posed a threat to the Florida governor - and bragged that the super PAC was behind an avalanche of opposition research targeting the rival candidate._
> - Politico 9/3/23

Fellow American - The DC Establishment is worried.

The chief strategist for the Ron DeSantis Super PAC was caught on tape privately telling donors that not only do I pose a "threat," but he is releasing "dirt" on me.

These games are why people are fed up with career politicians and their advisors. That's why I am running a different type of campaign.

Unlike my opponents, I don't have a Super PAC spending millions of dollars. This campaign is run from the bottom-up. **[It's run by the generosity of people like you giving $1, $5, $50, or even $100 at a time.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=9c47873abd594a0ea52f212dfa8f47b8&_e=N9opqw1u9zf-pPd4EmTfwGSIRT4rMfuobeAJn8KxieoRxX3cd1pwf_HqE1iZY81TkpOmSCsUuYoaGUyJiiozZD2US3v9Fz4lFGGzsGrF6mAV1QvbnnGw92W2k-JJg1Ozqxp3ReFTcy3gEzuUy_sQwD-TSsp67jVql0LCEJCeZcAPcZMgEIkhbgjYoTUpUdNZQhfi6F4DcB3xylBKLRCY-nX0fTQI6yiqY4c9BwwVvRrcvei1valEYVkcKJgdmWEBH2Gbeh4LuoYkp5QcbfbBhMXu7wZ2NzsJJKf2ZbOv8z8hq-eAG96nXdn4M_IDsiuibpixXF4KiDlS8J-Sx3i-EiHlbkHSBmqMpvkYbCc7uRkN1wCWa-PtitL4T8oIUfkgwFz7-19PrAxHvBvfdWXKUMlRKfPQ9PW7q2QRRR09ftc%3D)**

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[ ** STAND WITH VIVEK ➞ **](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=9c47873abd594a0ea52f212dfa8f47b8&_e=N9opqw1u9zf-pPd4EmTfwGSIRT4rMfuobeAJn8KxieoRxX3cd1pwf_HqE1iZY81TkpOmSCsUuYoaGUyJiiozZD2US3v9Fz4lFGGzsGrF6mAV1QvbnnGw92W2k-JJg1Ozqxp3ReFTcy3gEzuUy_sQwD-TSsp67jVql0LCEJCeZcAPcZMgEIkhbgjYoTUpUdNZQhfi6F4DcB3xylBKLRCY-nX0fTQI6yiqY4c9BwwVvRrcvei1valEYVkcKJgdmWEBoVsn-AAY7WCJQocQXKqVgrAf-mk9JtZ1zV0EcueptwWVsoKbHuOqDusfRgBEQZa-QMp_NyP8Fg5nkagFA-JWMsjr8bFj3Dmpj7Uy2l06IwqcY8DWvSC3Jq9z1keJ950MhbNFV-CyYA5q5ytzKr5O7XEe-f4qpPKl9QAb_TBrrxI%3D)

---
| |
---
| **John Duarte re-signs Howard Jarvis
Taxpayers Association Pledge**
---
| FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE
September 7, 2023
---
CONTACT: [Duane Dichiara](mailto:ddichiara@axiomstrategies.com?subject=%5BDuarte%5D)
(916) 997-4784
---
| | **(Modesto, CA)** — Today, (R-13) Congressman John Duarte re-committed to the Howard Jarvis Taxpayers Association’s “Stand Up for Taxpayers Pledge.” By re-signing the pledge, John Duarte commits to supporting Proposition 13, California’s system of citizen access to the initiative process, and protecting citizens’ right to vote on tax increases.

John Duarte released the following statement regarding the HJTA pledge.

“Central Valley families are hurting from tax hikes, high inflation, and expensive gas and grocery prices. Leaders in Washington must focus on protecting the financial security of working families. I will continue to fight to make prices more affordable and to lower the cost of living for all Californians."

John Duarte will stand up against any attempt to raise taxes and will always put Central Valley families first. John Duarte has also signed Americans for Tax Reform’s “Taxpayer Protection Pledge.”
###

body:
With the fall season starting, we wanted to take a minute to reflect and get your input to plan ahead for Wesley’s campaign. Peter — with the fall season starting, we wanted to take a minute to reflect and get your input to plan ahead for Wesley’s campaign.

Since we launched, we’ve seen amazing support from Missourians of all walks of life and reached goals beyond our wildest expectations. As we move into the fall months, we want to keep our momentum going. **That’s why Wesley asked us to reach out and get your opinion on the direction of his campaign and where YOUR priorities lie.**

[**Will you take Wesley's Fall Survey to let him know what your top priorities and concerns are? subject: Anti-choice politicians are lying to Ohioans.

body:
We're here to set the record straight, team:
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69379253/425958958/-438463598?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkYzU1MTc3My1kZDRkLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmViNzMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=AJoPqcgXwavN1dhmU2AbR0tDMyPW5M-5376rfE0qcuQ=) | Anti-choice extremists are using deceptive tactics to distort the truth about Ohio's reproductive freedom amendment, team.

They're trying to mislead Ohio voters in order to insert government into our personal decisions and take away our fundamental right to bodily autonomy. _But Ohioans deserve the truth, not propaganda from anti-choice politicians._

Let's set the record straight: **The reproductive freedom amendment on the November ballot is about protecting access to abortion and keeping the government out of personal, family decisions.** It's about putting Ohioans in control of our OWN lives, not letting politicians dictate what's best for our families.

That's why Ohio Democrats are fighting tooth and nail to protect access to reproductive healthcare. We are proud to stand with the majority of Ohioans who believe a woman has the right to make her own healthcare decisions — including the right to safe and legal abortion care. **We refuse to let extremists like Frank LaRose get away with lying to Ohioans for political purposes, but we need your help to fight back.**

clean_body: We're here to set the record straight, team: = | Anti-choice extremists are using deceptive tactics to distort the truth about Ohio's reproductive freedom amendment, team. They're trying to mislead Ohio voters in order to insert government into our personal decisions and take away our fundamental right to bodily autonomy. But Ohioans deserve the truth, not propaganda from anti-choice politicians. Let's set the record straight: The reproductive freedom amendment on the November ballot is about protecting access to abortion and keeping the government out of personal, family decisions. It's about putting Ohioans in control of our OWN lives, not letting politicians dictate what's best for our families. That's why Ohio Democrats are fighting tooth and nail to protect access to reproductive healthcare. We are proud to stand with the majority of Ohioans who believe a woman has the right to make her own healthcare decisions — including the right to safe and legal abortion care. We refuse to let extremists like Frank LaRose get away with lying to Ohioans for political purposes, but we need your help to fight back. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- = | | = | | = ---|---|---|---|--- Thank you, Liz Walters Chair Ohio Democratic Party A reproductive rights initiative is on the Ohio ballot this November. Can Ohio Democrats count on you to chip in $5, $10, or whatever you can to help fuel our fight to enshrine reproductive rights into our state constitution? → | = | 697 East Broad Street Suite 101 Columbus, Ohio 43215 | Paid for by the Ohio Democratic Party and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. | Click here to from the Ohio Democratic Party's email list.

Winners must be 18 or older (or of majority under applicable law) and meet other requirements as described in the Official Rules. Promotion subject to Official Rules and additional restrictions on eligibility may apply. Visit for full details and Official Rules. Sponsor: Trump Save America, PO Box 13570, Arlington, VA 22219. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution. Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved. In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics. | | | ---|---|--- | Paid for by Vivek 2024 Contributions to Vivek 2024 are not deductible as charitable contributions for Federal income tax purposes. Funds received in response to this solicitation are subject to federal contribution limits. Contributions from corporations, labor unions, foreign nationals without green cards, and federal government contractors are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for individuals whose contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle.

Patrick's community depends on natural resources, which shapes his approach to conservation and rural economic development.

His life experience, deep knowledge of land management, and thoughtful leadership make him uniquely qualified to lead this department.

**I'm proud to endorse Patrick because he's the most qualified person and will make an outstanding Commissioner of Public Lands.** I’m excited about the historic nature of his candidacy, as he would be the first-ever Native American elected statewide in the Pacific Northwest.

clean_body: As the current Washington Commissioner of Public Lands, I am excited to endorse Patrick DePoe to be our state’s next Lands Commissioner. | = | Peter, As the current Washington Commissioner of Public Lands, I am excited to endorse Patrick DePoe to be our state’s next Lands Commissioner. = | = Patrick's community depends on natural resources, which shapes his approach to conservation and rural economic development. His life experience, deep knowledge of land management, and thoughtful leadership make him uniquely qualified to lead this department. I'm proud to endorse Patrick because he's the most qualified person and will make an outstanding Commissioner of Public Lands. I’m excited about the historic nature of his candidacy, as he would be the first-ever Native American elected statewide in the Pacific Northwest. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Hilary Franz * | | = Paid for by Friends of Hilary Franz (D) Friends of Hilary Franz (D) PO Box 9100 Seattle, WA 98109 United States Email is a critical way for our campaign to stay in touch with you. name: Gloria Johnson
subject: I’m taking on Marsha Blackburn for the future of Tennessee.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52460?t=6&akid=10307%2E878179%2EIcMjVD) [_Friend, I’m a teacher, a Tennessee state legislator, and a proud member of the Tennessee Three. I’m announcing my run for US Senate. I need your support in this fight—contribute $10 right now to become a Founding Donor by splitting a donation between my campaign and VPP._](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52460?t=7&akid=10307%2E878179%2EIcMjVD) I’m in this race because Tennesseans deserve better.

That was made crystal clear earlier this year, in the wake of the horrific Nashville school shooting. Thousands of Tennesseans descended on the state Capitol to demand action on gun violence prevention, but the GOP majority refused to give them a voice.

So two of my colleagues and I stood up to join their historic protest.

I knew it was against the rules. I knew it would piss the GOP leadership off. _But I couldn’t let the Covenant families, young people, and parents from across the state stand alone._

The Republican majority took quick action, but not on gun violence. Both my colleagues, Representatives Justin J. Pearson and Justin Jones, were expelled. I was spared by a single vote. _Then the GOP majority passed a new law to increase access to guns._

**MAGA Republicans in Nashville and Washington don’t give a damn about us.** They don’t give a damn about using power to save lives or help the people who elected them into office. They only care about their big campaign donors and special interest lobbyists.

But one thing has changed – the people are on our side, and they are standing up to demand action and make the change we need. There’s a movement afoot in Tennessee.

**I’m standing tall to take on Senator Marsha Blackburn now because Tennessee deserves better.** Period.

Marsha has failed us in her five years in office. She’s voted against everything from pandemic relief to ensuring equal pay for women. She’s supported tax breaks for corporations while opposing laws to keep life-saving drug prices down. She’s a danger to reproductive rights, cruel to LGBTQ+ folks, and she refuses to fight for our right to vote.

She’s also taken over a million dollars from the NRA while refusing to take action on the most basic, commonsense legislation to protect our children from the threat of gun violence. We have a senator who stands with bullies, and I have a reputation for standing up to bullies.

**Marsha Blackburn has shown us who she works for, and it’s not us.** She’s had five years and nothing is getting done. Tennesseans deserve someone who will stand up to corrupt special interests and fight for lower costs so that every family can build a good life. It’s time we do something about it. [_From day one, I’ve been fighting for Tennesseans. But I need your help to get our campaign off the ground and make it to the Senate. Make a Founding Donation to help me defeat the GOP and deliver for our state! Click here to split a donation between VPP and me._](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52460?t=8&akid=10307%2E878179%2EIcMjVD) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Gloria Johnson and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52461?t=9&akid=10307%2E878179%2EIcMjVD)
---

[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52463?t=11&akid=10307%2E878179%2EIcMjVD)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52464?t=12&akid=10307%2E878179%2EIcMjVD)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52465?t=13&akid=10307%2E878179%2EIcMjVD)
With you,

Gloria
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=10307%2E878179%2EIcMjVD). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=10307%2E878179%2EIcMjVD).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=10307%2E878179%2EIcMjVD) to request fewer emails. clean_body: | I’m in this race because Tennesseans deserve better. That was made crystal clear earlier this year, in the wake of the horrific Nashville school shooting. Thousands of Tennesseans descended on the state Capitol to demand action on gun violence prevention, but the GOP majority refused to give them a voice. So two of my colleagues and I stood up to join their historic protest. I knew it was against the rules. I knew it would piss the GOP leadership off. But I couldn’t let the Covenant families, young people, and parents from across the state stand alone. The Republican majority took quick action, but not on gun violence. Both my colleagues, Representatives Justin J. Pearson and Justin Jones, were expelled. I was spared by a single vote. Then the GOP majority passed a new law to increase access to guns. MAGA Republicans in Nashville and Washington don’t give a damn about us. They don’t give a damn about using power to save lives or help the people who elected them into office. They only care about their big campaign donors and special interest lobbyists. But one thing has changed – the people are on our side, and they are standing up to demand action and make the change we need. There’s a movement afoot in Tennessee. I’m standing tall to take on Senator Marsha Blackburn now because Tennessee deserves better. Period. Marsha has failed us in her five years in office. She’s voted against everything from pandemic relief to ensuring equal pay for women. She’s supported tax breaks for corporations while opposing laws to keep life-saving drug prices down. She’s a danger to reproductive rights, cruel to LGBTQ+ folks, and she refuses to fight for our right to vote. She’s also taken over a million dollars from the NRA while refusing to take action on the most basic, commonsense legislation to protect our children from the threat of gun violence. We have a senator who stands with bullies, and I have a reputation for standing up to bullies. Marsha Blackburn has shown us who she works for, and it’s not us. She’s had five years and nothing is getting done. Tennesseans deserve someone who will stand up to corrupt special interests and fight for lower costs so that every family can build a good life. It’s time we do something about it. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Gloria Johnson and VPP will go through immediately: | With you, Gloria | | Paid for by VPP (www.protectvoting.org) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104 The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps. **More than 143,000 people have made an average contribution of $48 to my opponent’s Senate campaign**

Fellow Conservative,

In just seven months, my opponent, Democrat Jon Tester, raised more than $7 million from both small-dollar donors (**donations under $200**) and major donors (**donations over $200**).

The real kicker is that only two other Democrats raised more - President Joe Biden and California Senate candidate Adam Schiff.

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=4ddbaaea3b7b46cba95a29bc29478863&_e=oZSWtTE8p9F3khQeg9bSRf_2VW_Y7Y416Gg9rB83V3bb60ew_MkXD_TMP0z2S3dPDkkP0FzRNeaFHgqLf_L0f_EutQkJVBMrw85pVlkJuVaUZukFYHqNrz4a4qfZKd_tYSH70ftfiB-jUAJTWl0wZjD4YetT9g3Pvii7yWbzSjBlhWCqL2nn8Dt0HV0Yu5EP7xp9zB7ADE7ufqPOQQWnM8HKkZ0DXwQ680_zwiJsWvP8AM10yIM03HsRYbV_tZ80vngqldgYvL9uZoI8ncayPhSFsoFSq2E-6vSoU1mSg23S-a-xP1TuavjbpFflXzQjvIG-MJXR8wihMjxwavP6CPw-2TS9E1g5kXyuR6bmolXQM5nO05eWEb4ZhKvB1ZT42fn5A29f0vl8rJsQr5rvq6aaQoe2uRoV8FrXZyNlmm0%3D)
**143,000 Americans donated to Tester’s campaign from Jan 1 - July 31st, with an average gift of $48. After 16 years in the national spotlight + making friends with ultra-wealthy lobbyists, his fundraising success shouldn’t come as a surprise. But it does.

** [**HELP ME CATCH UP ->
**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=4ddbaaea3b7b46cba95a29bc29478863&_e=oZSWtTE8p9F3khQeg9bSRf_2VW_Y7Y416Gg9rB83V3bb60ew_MkXD_TMP0z2S3dPDkkP0FzRNeaFHgqLf_L0f_EutQkJVBMrw85pVlkJuVaUZukFYHqNrz4a4qfZKd_tYSH70ftfiB-jUAJTWl0wZjD4YetT9g3Pvii7yWbzSjBlhWCqL2nn8Dt0HV0Yu5EP7xp9zB7ADE7ufqPOQQWnM8HKkZ0DXwQ680_zwiJsWvP8AM10yIM03HsRYbV_tZ80SBkH-4zF59qhv2RqRWXZwqnbQzH7UfQSbmfKFMnVAH1ecLRn4td1FdGxv2kPuw04puR1mAzJOti5ygEEbdO_M-4nIN5d1AUd2AhoJonlkOhr2n_T7qQtOWldgP3qylsIL2yJB4ouTknps3lCCcpBxnMg27G3_ytX1-Wi79xOkDk%3D)
It may surprise you to learn that my campaign has only raised a fraction of amount Tester has. I know that we’re not going to be raising as much as he has for some time since I’m still working to build out my profile, however, if our pace doesn’t pick up soon,**I’m concerned we’ll never catch up.**

I’m not going to ask you to pitch in $48 today **(Tester’s average donation this year**) because I know that’s a lot of money. But **[would you consider chipping in $12, one fourth of his 2023 average donation?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=4ddbaaea3b7b46cba95a29bc29478863&_e=oZSWtTE8p9F3khQeg9bSRf_2VW_Y7Y416Gg9rB83V3bb60ew_MkXD_TMP0z2S3dPDkkP0FzRNeaFHgqLf_L0f_EutQkJVBMrw85pVlkJuVaUZukFYHqNrz4a4qfZKd_tYSH70ftfiB-jUAJTWl0wZjD4YetT9g3Pvii7yWbzSjBlhWCqL2nn8Dt0HV0Yu5EP7xp9zB7ADE7ufqPOQQWnM8HKkZ0DXwQ680_zwiJsWvP8AM10yIM03HsRYbV_tZ809iV5-Ct0Br5B_3kQgTYzEGZKazaKMuEAcNHuInwu7dKQPPXKvrXvYYDw7qOztOHdblRqKohdC6Ye9VPfBjgyYrU4FvOiE2A5lq22WYPQGYE2ELbOxsm169Sjh_AyK84sUTaVj5CS0CBL0Oyh9M2ksxln3P0thKgn8md2HSOTP2s%3D) **

The real kicker is that only two other Democrats raised more - President Joe Biden and California Senate candidate Adam Schiff. 143,000 Americans donated to Tester’s campaign from Jan 1 - July 31st, with an average gift of $48. After 16 years in the national spotlight + making friends with ultra-wealthy lobbyists, his fundraising success shouldn’t come as a surprise. But it does. It may surprise you to learn that my campaign has only raised a fraction of amount Tester has. I know that we’re not going to be raising as much as he has for some time since I’m still working to build out my profile, however, if our pace doesn’t pick up soon,I’m concerned we’ll never catch up. name: =?utf-8?Q?Greater=20New=20Haven=20Green=20Party?=
subject: Folk Fest, Sept Meeting, Parade, and March
body:
4 big events coming up!

** Four big GNHGP Events coming up:
------------------------------------------------------------

** Saturday 9th: CT Folk Fest & Green Expo
------------------------------------------------------------

** Wednesday 13th: GNHGP September meeting
------------------------------------------------------------

** Saturday 16th: GNHGP in the Guilford Parade
------------------------------------------------------------

** Sunday 17th: END FOSSIL FUELS event NYC!
------------------------------------------------------------

** Saturday the 9th:
CT Folk Fest & Green Expo (https://www.ctfolk.org) : Wear your Green Party T-shirt! We will be handing out GNGHP postcards, recruiting new members, and just hanging out - come socialize! Enjoy the music, the environmental themed expo, and the general good vibes! Text Justin at 860-227-2258 when you arrive.
------------------------------------------------------------

https://guilfordlandtrust.org/articles/annual-meeting-june-11th-at-400/?fbclid=IwAR315Xl44jS-Q_5sfjJCdgJq_jAADV4KLUMhjKenkbcGg6FpXa4MC8NC2N4

** Our next Chapter meeting will be September 13, Wednesday, 7PM.

CLICK HERE TO REGISTER. (https://us02web.zoom.us/meeting/register/tZYodequrTsoHNI96Gzl7REnCMwT2GOP_zey)
------------------------------------------------------------
https://guilfordlandtrust.org/articles/annual-meeting-june-11th-at-400/?fbclid=IwAR315Xl44jS-Q_5sfjJCdgJq_jAADV4KLUMhjKenkbcGg6FpXa4MC8NC2N4

** SEPT 16, Sat 9 AM.
THE GUILFORD PARADE! (https://guilfordfairparade.com)
We will march as a group behind our GNGHP banner, and hand out more of those GNGHP postcards! Stay afterwards for the Guilford Fair.
------------------------------------------------------------

https://guilfordlandtrust.org/articles/annual-meeting-june-11th-at-400/?fbclid=IwAR315Xl44jS-Q_5sfjJCdgJq_jAADV4KLUMhjKenkbcGg6FpXa4MC8NC2N4

** September 17
MARCH TO END FOSSIL FUELS! (https://www.gp.org/end_fossil_fuels_march)
NEW YORK CITY. A GPUS and GPCT- endorsed event!
Join the Green Party Contingent!
------------------------------------------------------------

** Signup to march with the Green Party HERE (https://bit.ly/GPEndFossilFuels) . To travel together to NYC, meet at Union Station a 9AM.
Contact Justin at 860-227-2258.
------------------------------------------------------------

** Past Events
------------------------------------------------------------

** The Green Party of the United States Annual National Meeting was fantastic - catch everything you missed by clicking HERE (https://www.youtube.com/@GreenPartyVideos/videos)
I particularly recommend the keynote address by Peter Kalmus, climate scientist.
------------------------------------------------------------

** We are the Party of People, Planet, and Peace!
------------------------------------------------------------

** The need for an independent left party is clear. We are an ecosocialist peace party who fight for social, economic, electoral, and environmental justice. Come to our meetings and events to meet us and get involved!
------------------------------------------------------------
The Greater New Haven Green Party is a chapter
of the Green Party of Connecticut!
Find our chapter Bylaws HERE (https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1RdZ-DjmwN76_XrktMoS83csmQ4zukzDZ?usp=share_link) .
Read minutes of our past meetings HERE (https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1QeCwDL4ybnWA2GIhE2ka7_6s2PFjsYo-?usp=sharing) .
Follow us on Facebook HERE (https://www.facebook.com/GreaterNewHavenGreenParty) .
Follow us on Twitter HERE (https://twitter.com/nhvGreens) .

============================================================
Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can ** update your preferences (https://justin4all.us10.list-manage.com/profile?u=9d3bf03d4d24177d79cb656ca&id=18b5d036be&e=91a3f04de5&c=d9d37d4629)
or ** unsubscribe from this list (https://justin4all.us10.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=9d3bf03d4d24177d79cb656ca&id=18b5d036be&e=91a3f04de5&c=d9d37d4629)
.

body:

**The Truth About
The Coming Crisis** This might be your only warning... According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite the severity of the situation, the mainstream media has chosen to remain silent. And our own government has ignored the dire warnings of industry experts. Experts like a fourth-generation American farmer who warns of the impending crisis: **"Food shortages are coming."** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Well, no need to worry anymore... When you secure your own food stockpile, you will have the peace of mind and security knowing that when a crisis hits... name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: What are your thoughts?
body:
There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried

|
---
| | | [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zq4as1136cmjfn44u59l7app51su9rkln0772138_rp22sh2s8i66p71chhmeoj5clh2bs)
---
| Fellow American,

There is a very concerning trend occurring in our country that has me worried for Americans who hold to biblical & faith-based values. [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zuh7fu9i4ncp3cpgtkai64o8rpv37j1h0bfhfss8_rp22sh2s8i66p71chhmeoj5clh2bs) After the _Respect for Marriage Act_ was passed by a bi-partisan effort and signed into law, I am fearful that legal persecution will only intensify against Americans holding to faith-based values and who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

[**Are you concerned that America is abandoning a basic tenet of our founding -_Religious Liberty?_**](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zb1mc3ra6pmckrjifs6dn397utnvomqgk31rgvl8_rp22sh2s8i66p71chhmeoj5clh2bs)

In addition to the passing of the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , numerous examples over the past decade have concerned me: KENNEDY v. BREMERTON SCHOOL DISTRICT, MASTERPIECE CAKESHOP v. COLORADO CIVIL RIGHTS COMMISSION, and 303 CREATIVE v. ELENIS are just a few examples of legal persecution against Americans holding to faith-based values who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith.

Furthermore, an amendment to the _Respect for Marriage Act_ , brought forth by Senator Mike Lee, prohibiting the Federal Government from retaliating against schools, businesses, and organizations because of their religious beliefs about same-sex marriage failed.

**This has the potential to only intensify legal persecution against individuals, businesses, churches, and nonprofits holding to faith-based values. **

The American Cornerstone Institute is a non-profit that I founded to preserve and promote the cornerstones that laid the foundation for the greatest nation the world has ever seen: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Whether it is a football coach losing his job for praying at midfield after a game, or a baker being sued for not wanting to bake a cake that violates his religious values, **are you concerned as I am with the increase in legal persecution against Americans who wish to conduct their lives according to their faith?**

Please share your thoughts in this quick 2-minute survey concerning religious liberty in America.

**[https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zi0vsf5iaok68phq55ev5pqme8vgluhaosvto3e8_rp22sh2s8i66p71chhmeoj5clh2bs)**

Thank you for your consideration.

Regards,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman American Cornerstone Institute
---
---
| |
---
---
Your donation to ACI helps us to focus on our mission of promoting and preserving individual and religious liberty, helping our country’s most vulnerable find new hope, and developing methods to decrease the federal government’s role in society and to improve efficiency to best serve ALL our nation’s citizens.
---
|
---
| _Copyright © 2023 American Cornerstone Institute, All rights reserved._

---

body:

**The Truth About
The Coming Crisis** This might be your only warning... According to official reports, dangerous global events have reached America, putting the entire nation in harm's way. Despite the severity of the situation, the mainstream media has chosen to remain silent. And our own government has ignored the dire warnings of industry experts. Experts like a fourth-generation American farmer who warns of the impending crisis: **"Food shortages are coming."** Imagine the panic of seeing empty grocery store shelves, not for a few days, but for several weeks or even months. The loss will be beyond what you can imagine. As a result of this crisis, survival food is more important than ever. If you don't take action or if you stockpile the wrong foods, you could be setting your family up to go hungry in a time of crisis. It sounds harsh, but the truth is too many people with good intentions are making critical mistakes with their survival food. Well, no need to worry anymore... name: American Action News
subject: Victor Davis Hanson: Victory and the Savior Generals
body:
I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions.

| | | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z57nmq07mjn0el0bgb386q6vkt00vj9m2hj7g2s8_rp22sh2s8i66p71chhmeoj5cth2bs)
---
---
| | Dear Friend, [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zedvpa6g03pjh91frc5np0qrkerva9cmt0bk074o_rp22sh2s8i66p71chhmeoj5cth2bs)
Throughout pivotal moments in history, we have witnessed the remarkable transformation of seemingly lost causes, orchestrated by the savior generals--visionary leaders displaying unparalleled expertise.

Today, I'm pleased to share with you a free resource that will ignite your curiosity and challenge your perceptions. Esteemed historian and Hoover Senior Fellow, **Victor Davis Hanson** , has authored a groundbreaking eBook--_Victory and the Savior Generals_ --a captivating exploration into the minds of these exceptional leaders.

You can secure your free copy today by clicking on this exclusive link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ziaj09vi7g8k9b7qnlaj18789lp4n94ndfpka12g_rp22sh2s8i66p71chhmeoj5cth2bs)**

Inside its digital pages, you'll embark on a journey that uncovers the defining traits of these savior generals. Their ingenuity, contrarian spirit, and unwavering courage breathed new life into seemingly lost causes. Their profound understanding of conflict, rejection of complacency, adaptability to change, and alignment with societal values contributed to their monumental successes.

This is your opportunity to unravel the secrets of history's most influential leaders, unlocking invaluable lessons that resonate even in the present day.

Claim your complimentary copy of _Victory and the Savior Generals_ now through this secure link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/victory-and-the-savior-generals](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfv550m997jhaj7k6hj865fvcnmdp7ta3vt7oui0_rp22sh2s8i66p71chhmeoj5cth2bs)**

Wishing you a wonderful journey through the pages of history!

Greg

Greg Stamps | Online Development
Hoover Institution | Stanford University

---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover’s work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._

I hope you've been having a fantastic Friday. I wanted to share some exciting updates from this past week. While I typically prefer not to draw too much attention to myself, my 22nd birthday was this past Wednesday, as you might have noticed from my Mom's recent post! ⬇️ https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=9cdcdf164d4696e5a4e7b82c2e427a55c947e1bfa2882fb09132dad0ed85cb8b927f803afc1e075e9e8b6cadd0fe443ec7ff821c65e24173452c76f6c18fe4c5 However, the best birthday gift in the world came the next morning, when I woke up to some incredible news... My Mom experienced a MAJOR surge in the polls that shows she’s decisively beating Biden, and here's the most exciting part—she's the ONLY candidate out there who can say that! Her message is striking a chord with the American people, and we now have the numbers to back up what we’re feeling on the ground. Each day, my Mom is tirelessly engaging with voters and putting in her all to ensure her message reaches as many people as possible. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=9cdcdf164d4696e5a4e7b82c2e427a55c947e1bfa2882fb09132dad0ed85cb8b927f803afc1e075e9e8b6cadd0fe443ec7ff821c65e24173452c76f6c18fe4c5 But here’s the thing, we can’t do it alone. Your support is what makes this all possible. Your participation in $5 Friday has been instrumental in getting us to this point, https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=9cdcdf164d4696e5a4e7b82c2e427a55c947e1bfa2882fb09132dad0ed85cb8b927f803afc1e075e9e8b6cadd0fe443ec7ff821c65e24173452c76f6c18fe4c5 and your support today is what will propel us even further. Will you chip in a donation today? https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=9cdcdf164d4696e5908083866ace841fd434f886949003e96475a7348aec656aceea3d7833e5c92e4cffb017a2fee81fb6747e7fe9b49d3aed25f374df3d62be CONTRIBUTE $5 NOW We can't thank you enough for everything you do. This week was a massive win for our entire movement—one that's been underestimated time and time again. I can't wait to see what the next week holds in store! Wishing you a fantastic weekend ahead! My best, Nalin Haley https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=9cdcdf164d4696e5c18d074bc51dcad5676a8a172fd0c62873ae6d1998a04cc96e5de186cf351e66e61a641c08e8f162c459578e3cd9a22859fe189cdddb39a3 https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=9cdcdf164d4696e5c18d074bc51dcad5676a8a172fd0c62873ae6d1998a04cc96e5de186cf351e66e61a641c08e8f162c459578e3cd9a22859fe189cdddb39a3 GET YOUR SHIRT https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=9cdcdf164d4696e53ddd27911c238140ec1bf0f0023af5d03e782768ee6e143d81d734cbee493124504bf527a6181f644acbd137cd14cc0afb12caec795aa276 https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=9cdcdf164d4696e53ddd27911c238140ec1bf0f0023af5d03e782768ee6e143d81d734cbee493124504bf527a6181f644acbd137cd14cc0afb12caec795aa276 VOLUNTEER More About Nikki Haley https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=9cdcdf164d4696e5bc8238d7aa4b1c12ad45233a0a9e41c24616220ac90e6006c5dfd77f9d2604094cec2cba03699372f61aff8e9662b6b9a37fc6927d685d4c My name is Nikki Haley. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I’m running for President of the United States. I’m running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago – an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I’m running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something – that we do love this country. I’m running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I’m doing this for my son who’s a senior in college and shouldn’t have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn’t believe in just to get an A. I’m running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I’m running for President because we have a country to save! I’ve seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden’s leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a “jobs governor” because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I’ve done it before. And I’ll do it as your next President. My Mom experienced a MAJOR surge in the polls that shows she’s decisively beating Biden, and here's the most exciting part—she's the ONLY candidate out there who can say that! Her message is striking a chord with the American people, and we now have the numbers to back up what we’re feeling on the ground. I’m running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something – that we do love this country. I’m running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I’m doing this for my son who’s a senior in college and shouldn’t have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn’t believe in just to get an A. I’m running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I’m running for President because we have a country to save! I’ve seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden’s leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a “jobs governor” because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. subject: They're afraid to say it

body:
There are SERIOUS questions about Election integrity.

| |

Every country club Republican is afraid to say it, but I will:
**There are __SERIOUS__ questions about Election integrity. **
They'll call me a liar. They'll probably even try to _censor_ this email.

So what happens today will decide everything.

My name is Eli Crane - you might not know me, but I'm a Navy SEAL, a businessman, a husband, a father, and a humble servant of God.

I'm also the Pro-Trump, Pro-America conservative who represents AZ-02 - the biggest race on the map.

The Democrats hate me & want me silenced. Hell, many of the Republicans want me silenced too. **_The Establishment and anti-Trump haters will do ANYTHING to destroy me. There is no time left._**

They have all the power & resources they need, and that's why I'm humbly swallowing my pride to ask you for help today.

**[Will you stand with me and chip in just a few bucks by midnight?](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0inimjc3mc1sae4hsb0t3g8bosm6tp9tkskdosg_rp22sh2s8i66p71chjm0o74c5h2bs "Will you stand with me and chip in just a few bucks by midnight?")**

name: Ret. SEAL Eli Crane
subject: They're afraid to say it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Crane For Congress
body:
There are SERIOUS questions about Election integrity.

| |
---
| | | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmf8phmq0sge61g28bqi8sv6qumpublkep6phsb0_rp22sh2s8i66p71chjm0o72c5h2bs)
---

Every country club Republican is afraid to say it, but I will:
**There are __SERIOUS__ questions about Election integrity. **
They'll call me a liar. They'll probably even try to _censor_ this email.

So what happens today will decide everything.

My name is Eli Crane - you might not know me, but I'm a Navy SEAL, a businessman, a husband, a father, and a humble servant of God.

I'm also the Pro-Trump, Pro-America conservative who represents AZ-02 - the biggest race on the map.

The Democrats hate me & want me silenced. Hell, many of the Republicans want me silenced too. **_The Establishment and anti-Trump haters will do ANYTHING to destroy me. There is no time left._**

They have all the power & resources they need, and that's why I'm humbly swallowing my pride to ask you for help today.

**[Will you stand with me and chip in just a few bucks by midnight?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zdo71u93mo0r2om9384lj38nantjgstucc2eb7u0_rp22sh2s8i66p71chjm0o72c5h2bs "Will you stand with me and chip in just a few bucks by midnight?")**

---
| | [STAND WITH A PRO-TRUMP WARRIOR](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7gjag0shl3ili2pudn9djctt9au3780vmth6328_rp22sh2s8i66p71chjm0o72c5h2bs)
---

Look, I'm a Navy SEAL. I've been on 5 war-time deployments - I'm the last guy who normally asks for help, but if this text message doesn't work, it's over.

**[So, from the bottom of my heart - will you help out a Navy SEAL stand up to the radical Left& establishment?](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zmlrk781mgst2jcolgfe8deec0ddfo8frfmj0lro_rp22sh2s8i66p71chjm0o72c5h2bs "So, from the bottom of my heart - will you help out a Navy SEAL stand up to the radical Left & establishment?")**

Thank you for standing up for what's right.

God bless you. - Eli
---
|
---
| | Paid for by Crane For Congress
---

name: ICYMI News
subject: Embrace Lifelong Learning with A Free Course on The Roman Republic
body:
The great figures of Rome show us the virtues necessary to secure a republic

| | This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zsfvcl26ch9jsopqk0030431cfee1viho0dv70e8_rp22sh2s8i66p71chjm0o72c5h2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

As the new school year begins, it's a great time for people of all ages to learn something new and exciting. We're all called to improve our minds whether we're returning to school this Fall or past our days sitting in a classroom.

At Hillsdale College we believe that a good education is essential to happiness and a free society, so we are making free online courses on the most important subjects. Our free online course, "The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic," offers you an opportunity to discover the remarkable story of Rome while enabling you to cultivate your curiosity and engage in lifelong learning.

[](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z57sm51uh0l660e0fvqlohntsvfo39652rtubo2o_rp22sh2s8i66p71chjm0o72c5h2bs)
The great figures of Rome show us the virtues necessary to secure a republic, and also the pitfalls that can lead to its collapse. Study Roman leaders such as Romulus, Cato, Cicero, and Caesar in order to learn from their great triumphs and failures.

I hope you enjoy the course. [You can start your course on Rome here >>](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zn933kajjsi3pbld4urmrlnrn1o7ea8d1v02p6a0_rp22sh2s8i66p71chjm0o72c5h2bs)

Warm regards,

Kyle Murnen '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College ** **
---
| |
---

ICYMI News

name: 1600 Daily
subject: American jobs or affordable goods?
body:
In today's rapidly changing world, the topic of globalization has sparked heated debates

| | | [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z9itlf3qjt5on9c6tlrhillnhsjubvlht66bae6g_rp22sh2s8i66p71chjm0o72c5h2bs)
---
---
| | Dear Friend,
In today's rapidly changing world, the topic of globalization has sparked heated debates. But to truly understand its impact, we must explore both the costs and the remarkable benefits it brings.
That's why I'm thrilled to introduce you to _Globalization And Its Discontents_ , a captivating eBook from Hoover Institution fellow David Henderson. And I want to make sure you get your free copy right here: **[https://resources.hoover.org/globalization-and-its-discontents](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkdm6hqo0u6kcg5qppb2h8ro2hfo5p5bcqnpha88_rp22sh2s8i66p71chjm0o72c5h2bs)**

This book takes you on a journey through the complexities of globalization, revealing insights that are often overlooked. You'll discover the main costs of globalization--such as potential job losses for workers in specific industries due to competition from imports. You'll also delve into the many benefits that are transforming our world--from accessing higher quality products at lower costs to fostering a more peaceful global landscape.

Globalization is a critical topic that affects us all, and understanding its implications is more important than ever. With this eBook, you'll gain data-based insights, expert analysis, and a deeper understanding of the role globalization plays in shaping our lives.

Please be sure to get your free copy of _Globalization And Its Discontents_ today using this link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/globalization-and-its-discontents](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zfjr6gho2c5nnpdi8le9ufh9v17a8k4f6ni810k8_rp22sh2s8i66p71chjm0o72c5h2bs)**

America needs you in the conversation, friend, so I wanted to make sure you have the knowledge you need to navigate the ongoing discussions around globalization.

All my best,
Greg

Greg Stamps | Online Development
Hoover Institution | Stanford University

---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover 's work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._

Hoover Institution 434 Galvez Mall Stanford University Stanford CA USA 94305

name: Greater Georgia
subject: RSVP Deadline: Private Movie Screening with Greater Georgia
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Greater Georgia Action, Inc
body:
Join us for a FREE showing of Sound of Freedom
| | | | Good morning,
Last month, Greater Georgia held a private screening of Sound of Freedom - and by popular demand, we're hosting a second, FREE private screening on September 12th.
If you were unable to attend the first event, we invite you to join us next week. This is a powerful movie that we're encouraging every Georgian to see - especially in light of our state's leading role in the fight to end human trafficking.
To attend, please reserve your tickets by Friday, September 8th. Tickets, along with food and beverage, will be provided free of charge.
Please note that tickets are extremely limited and will be allocated on a first-come, first-serve basis.

name: Marsha Blackburn
subject: Breaking news about my NEW socialist opponent…
body:
Will you step up when I need you the most?

| |
---
| | | **BREAKING: SOCIALIST DEMOCRAT ANNOUNCES CHALLENGE TO MARSHA BLACKBURN IN HIGH-PROFILE SENATE RACE**
Y'all - this is Marsha Blackburn.

I'm rushing to you with urgent news: a socialist Democrat just launched her Senate campaign against me. _She 's a well-connected, Bernie Sanders-style socialist, and I hate to say it, but she's buddies with all the fat cats in Liberal circles. _

Because of what you and I believe in and what I've done in the Senate, I've become a top target for the Radical Left.

By all accounts, this will be one of the most important races in the country, and I desperately need your support. _**[Now that I OFFICIALLY have a socialist opponent with deep, DEEP pockets, I'm humbly asking you to donate to my campaign.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkcjkqsj2l4bh3v0v9cfssug4vtg13aato93ap1g_rp22sh2s8i66p71chjm4or1c1h2bs "Now that I OFFICIALLY have a socialist opponent with deep, DEEP pockets, I’m humbly asking you to donate to my campaign. ")**_

---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zhh3akcg9cadolspvs2q7lc2k9seq1ln4tlv0hh8_rp22sh2s8i66p71chjm4or1c1h2bs "I'm asking you directly to make a meaningful donation to defeat her.")
---
| | [DONATE NOW ->](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zf1e862alou2nbh8rp81uu1an9ah9bi9q8evr4vg_rp22sh2s8i66p71chjm4or1c1h2bs "DONATE NOW →")
---

The choice is quite clear:

I exposed the Left's woke gender agenda by asking Justice Ketanji Brown Jackson to define a WOMAN. I took on Joe Biden's vaccine mandate AND WON. I'm fighting to build Trump's Wall. I helped pressure Vanderbilt to END child sex change surgeries. I partnered with Riley Gaines to help SAVE women's sports. And I'm a strong Conservative Christian.

My new opponent is as woke as they come. She JUST attended a Bernie Sanders rally in Nashville. She canvassed for Barack Obama. She endorsed Elizabeth Warren for president. And she was the mastermind behind the anti-gun riot that shut down our state legislature.

**National Democrats will do ANYTHING to get her across the finish line and replace me in the U.S. Senate. **

_**[That's why your help is essential to hold them off. I'm reaching out to every Conservative I possibly can for support because this race means everything.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zu059bom06h2alua1h0msugpd15rp7a771v7mb1g_rp22sh2s8i66p71chjm4or1c1h2bs "That’s why your help is essential to hold them off. I’m reaching out to every Conservative I possibly can for support because this race means everything.")**_

If my Socialist opponent wins, our path to winning back the Senate will vanish, AND the Democrats will gain a loyal footsoldier in their battle to destroy America as we know it.

You have the power to make a REAL difference in this race.

_Will you step up when I need you the most? _

God bless you & God bless America,

Marsha

name: Jaiden (Gadsden Flag)
subject: I was kicked out of school. Here’s what’s next…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Libertas Institute
body:
I’m guessing you saw me in the news last week.

[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22234%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cuwbFrimUs6wXdpSK7FNIQ&sysid=1 "Tuttle Twins")

Dear Friend,

I’m guessing you saw me in the news last week. I’m the 12-year-old boy who was kicked out of class in my school in Colorado because I had a “Don’t tread on me” Gadsden flag patch on my backpack.

The vice principal claimed that it was tied to slavery. (Totally false!) And they wouldn’t let me come back to class until I removed the patch.

You might not know why this story got so many views -- over 40 million so far!

After I was kicked out of class, I talked with my mom about what to do. I remembered in one of the Tuttle Twins books how the kids got the media involved to fight against some corruption in the government.

[The Tuttle Twins helped me stand up for what I believe in. I want to help them ship their pro-American history books to schools and families. Can you chip in $25 or more today?](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22245%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=xsCAj9P97sLxl3d%2fgxB8uA&sysid=1)

[Support Tuttle Twins >>](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22246%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=GghE6I2wXKiGvn71hQMFHA&sysid=1)

I asked my mom if we could drive over to the local TV station. She agreed, so I went up and rang the doorbell of their office. Here I am:

[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22234%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cuwbFrimUs6wXdpSK7FNIQ&sysid=1)

Nobody would speak with me. I felt defeated -- this was a story that needed to be told! My 1st amendment rights were being violated. Why didn’t other people care?

Then, my mom decided to reach out to Connor Boyack that night. He’s the author of the Tuttle Twins books -- and I’m a huge fan. Connor agreed to share the video my mom had recorded of the vice principal, and now it seems like everyone has seen it!

I’m definitely a little more popular at school now, haha. Lots of other kids are now putting Gadsden flag stickers on their lockers.

I was interviewed by a lot of people afterward. When I talked with Ben Shapiro, he asked me why I knew so much about politics and American history. Here’s what I told him:

_“I give it mainly to Connor Boyack with his Tuttle Twins books. I read those growing up, and that really, really helped me. And now I have a good understanding of America and all sorts of key concepts.”_

[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22234%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cuwbFrimUs6wXdpSK7FNIQ&sysid=1)

I’m so happy that Connor shared my story. But what’s next?

Well, one day, I want to run for governor of Colorado. I have to be 30 years old, so that will be in the future.

There is something I can do in the meantime. I can use this attention for good. I can pay it forward. I can get other kids to learn the same things I’ve learned so when the time comes up, they can stand up for themselves, too.

Connor, my mom, and I have been talking over the past few days about what we can do to use this moment for good. And this email is one of the ideas -- we can use my story to encourage people like you to help us.

**So here is what we are doing:**

Connor and his team have some new American history books that teach the ideas of freedom and the founding fathers. They’re so much better than the textbooks we have to use in school that don’t really teach history with any kind of depth.

**I want more kids to be able to read these history books. So we are launching a fundraiser to raise $25,000 this week, and we will use the money to ship history books to schools across the country -- with a heavy focus on my state, Colorado.** 😀

[Will you stand up with me and help me? I’m super excited by this. Please donate here -- every $25 donation covers the cost of the book and shipping to a library or classroom.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22247%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=DgSY9tOd5fYwA%2fgTdIcroA&sysid=1)

[Donate $25 = 1 Book Distributed >>](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22248%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Am85Ve93QpWTQgj6kYavOA&sysid=1)

[Donate $50 = 2 Books Distributed >>](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22249%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SR%2fg0S06q6IYuOZ8LfoQ%2fA&sysid=1)

[Donate $100 = 4 Books Distributed >>](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22240%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=J05DmvdMYOhWiz2TuHoV5w&sysid=1)

[Donate $200 = 8 Books Distributed >>](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22241%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MzRjB6W5bVHccNSnUesOfA&sysid=1)

[Donate $500 = 20 Books Distributed >>](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22242%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=grVib4ZbTg2II2frhbyVqw&sysid=1)

[Donate $1,000 = 40 Books Distributed >>](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22243%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Mb0Sq7rOaIq3gEThHVtzsw&sysid=1)

**What’s super cool about this is Connor has a big donor who is passionate about this, and they agreed to double everyone’s donations!** So, let’s say you want to sponsor 5 books for students. That means you’ll actually do 10 books when your donation is matched!

I knew how to act when my school tried to shut me down because I’d been learning these ideas for years. Because of the Tuttle Twins, I know what my rights are and how to stand up for them. People like Connor and you have been part of my story, and I’m grateful.

Now, we have to use this moment for good, and I hope you’ll stand with me to make a difference. So many other kids need to learn what I have. It’s education -- real, true, good education -- that will make sure other kids don’t get tread on, too:

[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22234%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cuwbFrimUs6wXdpSK7FNIQ&sysid=1)

Let’s use this momentum to find more Jaidens -- and get them learning today! I’m pumped to work with the author of my favorite books to help even more kids learn what I have.

[So please support our project today! Donate here:](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22244%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=lUgTQyflUOy1%2bBYw0wBNcg&sysid=1)

[Donate $25 = 1 Book Distributed >>](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22248%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Am85Ve93QpWTQgj6kYavOA&sysid=1)

[Donate $50 = 2 Books Distributed >>](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22249%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=SR%2fg0S06q6IYuOZ8LfoQ%2fA&sysid=1)

[Donate $100 = 4 Books Distributed >>](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22240%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=J05DmvdMYOhWiz2TuHoV5w&sysid=1)

[Donate $200 = 8 Books Distributed >>](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22241%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=MzRjB6W5bVHccNSnUesOfA&sysid=1)

[Donate $500 = 20 Books Distributed >>](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22242%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=grVib4ZbTg2II2frhbyVqw&sysid=1)

[Donate $1,000 = 40 Books Distributed >>](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22243%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Mb0Sq7rOaIq3gEThHVtzsw&sysid=1)

I’m just a 12-year-old kid. I have to focus on my school work and my family, but this is a great opportunity for me to make a difference while I get ready for my gubernatorial campaign 18 years from now.

I hope you can support us! In the meantime, stay free and stay strong!

Jaiden (Gadsden Flag)

Paid for by Libertas Institute

Your America News
---
_Your America News • 625 First Street #183 • Alexandria, VA 22314_
[Unsubscribe](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/OptOut.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c920805%7c8353%7c7%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c0&wdmdk=ZGamXIABCWMgf9myatKm3Q&sysid=1)
_[**unsubscribe**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22355%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=n9YO%2fSyU9o%2fTLyYD3u3oMA&sysid=1)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c22356%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=S%2bsS6UR8TgADgH77PpGxUg&sysid=1)_

I’m pumped to work with the author of my favorite books to help even more kids learn what I have. I’m just a 12-year-old kid. I have to focus on my school work and my family, but this is a great opportunity for me to make a difference while I get ready for my gubernatorial campaign 18 years from now. I hope you can support us! In the meantime, stay free and stay strong! Jaiden (Gadsden Flag) Paid for by Libertas Institute Your America News Your America News • 625 First Street #183 • Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Matt Hoskins
subject: The Post-McConnell Senate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY SENATE CONSERVATIVES FUND AND NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
Fellow Conservative:

Senator Mitch McConnell (R-KY) had another scary episode during a recent press conference in Kentucky.It's the second event of this kind within weeks and has many asking whether it's time for the Senate Republican Leader to step down.

Senator Mitch McConnell in Covington, KY.

One thing is becoming clear: the Mitch McConnell era is quickly coming to an end.The big question is what kind of Senate will exist when he is gone.Will it be more of the same where the leadership plots ways to undermine our principles and "crush" our candidates?Or will new
leadership rise up that represents the voters and truly fights for less government and more freedom for all Americans?It is up to us to determine the answer.Rather than leaving the outcome to chance, we must lock arms and work harder than ever to elect principled leaders who have proven their
willingness to fight for our values.Please take action now and support the Senate Conservatives Fund and our priority candidates before the end of the month.

SCF will pay all process fees and transfer 100% of your candidate contributions directly to their campaigns.

We have been working with grassroots conservatives for years to stop Mitch McConnell Republicans from destroying our country, and now our efforts are needed more than ever.Together, we can shape the Post-McConnell Senate into something that makes a lasting impact on the lives
of Americans.Thank you for considering this urgent request and for doing so much to help build a conservative Senate.

Sincerely,

Matt Hoskins
Senior Advisor
Senate Conservatives Fund

P.S. We are trying to raise $100,000 for our candidates in September. Check our progress and chip in to help us reach our goal!

 

END OF THE MONTH
COUNTDOWN

 

 

DONATE

Senate Conservatives Fund300 Independence Ave SEWashington, DC 20003

 

Senate Conservatives Fund is a grassroots organization that promotes conservative policies and helps elect conservative candidates to the U.S. Senate. SCF was founded by former Senator Jim DeMint to help the grassroots change Washington.

Contributions to the Senate Conservatives Fund are not deductible as charitable contributions. Contributions from corporations or foreign nationals lacking permanent resident status are not permitted. Federal law requires us to report the name, mailing address, occupation and
employer for each individual whose contributions aggregate in excess of $200 in a calendar year. Not paid for at taxpayer expense.

name: The Federalist Wire
subject: Trump just obliterated a reporter for asking this moronic question
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

DAILY NEWS | September 08, 2023

Trump just
obliterated a reporter for asking this moronic question

Former President Trump has
always had a low tolerance for stupidity. The media knows that
better than anyone.

And Trump just obliterated a
reporter for asking this moronic question.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

This Democrat Congressman
said three words that sent Biden into convulsions

Biden's Democrat
Party is getting sick of him. Now they're looking to make a
change.
➞ Continue Reading

Kamala Harris made this
revealing statement that has Joe Biden sweating bullets

Joe Biden has been
one of the worst presidents in U.S. history. But if Vice
President Harris takes over, she could easily earn that spot.
➞ Continue Reading

This interview caused AOC
to land on her face in humiliating fashion

Alexandria
Ocasio-Cortez is one of the country's least respected
politicians. She shows everyone why that's the case, anytime she
speaks in public.
➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

DISCLAIMER
Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

name: Nikki Haley
subject: Can I ask an important question?
body:
I’m headed to New Hampshire on Tuesday for back-to-back events

| |
---
| | |
---
| | | Friend,

I’m headed to New Hampshire on **Tuesday** for back-to-back events, **[and I need you on my side more than ever.>>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c676964%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=uXAHhDvAgiU%2fHYJLuTfXxQ&sysid=1 "and I need you on my side
more than ever. >>")**

So, I have an important question to ask you.

**[If you have even $7 or more to spare, can you rush a donation to help fuel my fight?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c676975%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=1wx7ZRDaBd13Nq9WWvGENQ&sysid=1 "If you have even $7 or
more to spare, can you rush a donation to help fuel my fight? ")**

---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c676976%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WlmJI4%2bkZWH26cntyOgibg&sysid=1)
---
| | [RUSH IN A DONATION](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c676977%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=gRm9wzbYezTqyI14ib5aOg&sysid=1)
---
As you know, we’re building a strong grassroots infrastructure in early voting states so we can win and get our country back on track.

Every time I travel to New Hampshire, it’s another opportunity to talk with voters, get my message out, and continue to build momentum throughout the state.

**BUT, traveling and putting on events isn’t cheap.** My team and I make sure we spend every dollar wisely. That means taking a lot of Spirit and JetBlue flights, putting on events at local venues, and stopping into mom and pop shops to meet with voters.

**[With such little time before my next New Hampshire event, I could really use your help to cover some of this week’s costs. Will you pitch in just $7?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c676978%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pOrNpgqZOeefHWetMd5QNQ&sysid=1 "With such little time
before my next New Hampshire event, I could really use your help to cover some of
this week’s costs. Will you pitch in just $7? ")**

Here are just some of the things your donation will help us do in New Hampshire:
* **Cover transportations costs**
* **Help cover lodging expenses **
* **Rent sound equipment for town halls**
* **Rent chairs for town hall guests**

---
| | [HELP FUEL MY FIGHT](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c676979%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ugGLWIn4GnRUW54O292ouw&sysid=1)
---
It’s so important that I continue to travel to battleground states like New Hampshire so we reach every American with our conservative message. _**We’re putting in the hard work and laying the groundwork for victory. **_

**[Will you please step up ASAP to help me fuel my campaign and save the future of America?](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c676970%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=4t4hJMOjzA1261ONKORUTw&sysid=1 "Will you please step up
ASAP to help me fuel my campaign and save the future of America?")**

My very best,

---
| [](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c676976%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WlmJI4%2bkZWH26cntyOgibg&sysid=1)
---
Nikki Haley

---
| Paid for by Team Stand for America, a joint fundraising committee authorized and composed of Nikki Haley for President, Stand for America PAC and SFA Fund Inc.

[www.TeamStandForAmerica.com](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c676971%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=J99e9Ps2RW1Cfp7mmyP%2bfA&sysid=1)

name: ConservativeFWD on behalf of Hillsdale College
subject: The Divine Comedy
body:
And now, the course about this timeless masterpiece is available
[View this message in your browser](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zodbk7d971phepgci89u2qvcuv0lunudgl2acdp0_rp22sh2s8i66p71chjm1o34cth238h5e8he485he5o7csn7kuij79hnmer7acjjegon9crl6crn2ct66uqrf91ieoob9crl6uie5sj2u9pr2pjm6lhb2c3leaoj0s3jcaq77dj4mooj9dllmlp72sjl65jb2pb0c4r6cppnq9o74oj6e2p6cs74mdhm0tr4coob5ddkcur62phhe2p6co70mlhm1o5l64oracdle8iv0)
|
*Sponsored Message* | | [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2z24d424ttnernidmnf1s9pehtteom9c1rrf15pl0_rp22sh2s8i66p71chjm1o34cth2bs)
---
| | Dear fellow citizen, Over 700 years ago, Dante Alighieri was exiled from his beloved Florence. Stripped of his property, he spent the rest of his life as a guest in foreign places. While in exile, Dante wrote one of the greatest epic poems, _The Divine Comedy_. Taking an imaginary journey through the three realms of the afterlife--Inferno, Purgatory, and Paradise--he encounters old enemies and cherished friends, crooked politicians and great statesmen, infamous sinners, and holy saints. The result is a profound education in character, as the poet learns how to order his soul to lead a free and happy life. And _The Divine Comedy_ is a delight to read. **This is why Hillsdale College has produced an online course, "Dante's _Divine Comedy,_ " about this monumental work of literature. **
---
| | And now, the course about this timeless masterpiece is available on DVD for your home library, Bible study, or book club. You can receive the DVD of **" Dante's _Divine Comedy_ " **in a handsome box set for a gift of $100 or more in support of Hillsdale and its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty, like free online courses. We**** produce our free online courses, as we do all of our work, without accepting ONE PENNY of government funding--not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. Our work is entirely dependent on the support of friends like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.
---
| [](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zfofcqjr0vimo6kd6tiuc1fn0nmqi2bp80e5n8sg_rp22sh2s8i66p71chjm1o34cth2bs)
---
| | With your tax-deductible gift today, we can enroll tens of thousands of Americans in online courses, as well as reach and teach increasing millions for liberty. Please support Hillsdale's educational outreach on behalf of liberty and receive your DVD of **" Dante's _Divine Comedy_ " **by giving your best tax-deductible gift of $100 or more today using this secure link: **[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/dvd-dante-divine-comedy-course](https://e.conservativefwd.com/rd/9z2zrk7jmcaolv1sfgiac2q2phtitiubqhmo363drp8_rp22sh2s8i66p71chjm1o34cth2bs)** We are deeply grateful for your friendship and support. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844
---

# FRIday, SEPT. 8, 2023
---|---
**Good morning!** On this day in 1930, the 3M company sold the first roll of its newly invented Scotch tape to a business client. Today, the company sells enough of the tape every year to circle the globe 165 times.

Today is Feel Good Friday in our _Rotator_ section, bringing you news of a woman racing to save her neighbor's child and of two young meteorologists happy to wed in a lightning storm.
