## Poll Shows Haley With Biggest Lead Over Biden
A new CNN poll showed only one Republican candidate solidly beating President Biden past the margin of error in a head-to-head matchup: [Nikki Haley, with 49% support](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL2u2zAMhZ9G3hgwtK9_Bg9dvN2uHQNapiIWihRYbIy8feGgYxfiDB_Ij-fX9-2bNWm-_-SHzBbKjb3pS244wQjU3qjZ5iBC0jYyX_upuw7dVzs0ce7pKr4nGSkwruvgw-pRuB8Rse02bnQmpBYnHHH66rvhMuIW1lHWiWgKIt51KJta2S-_i2aLEtK7vGS_-PJo0hzNntW1PxwtjpbjOC5_KlvZ-H0CjpZqZX87WrIc1dHyLElN_RkliTct-cynhKMFp3MM56ZYIHIFiwKrVAMfOXuBEmAVNs13WHWTDHpoBs3AEN_PYlFMPSd4sPkIh1r8x72KyV7Bx1KqQOQkp9WAw9h37RU_R5t93p6HpqS1H1yH9wdr-jxq_639bwAAAP__ZJWE3Q) compared to Biden's 43%. The poll showed Biden in a statistical tie with the other GOP contenders, though Donald Trump, Mike Pence, Tim Scott, and Chris Christie all topped Biden by a point or two.

The poll had other bad news for Biden, whose [overall approval rating is down to 39%](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1uxCAQhJ8Gd5zWa_xDQZHG3aVNaWFYjk0wWDa50719dEmbbqSRZvR9H9flajlxvr3bjUwNZbGu8p0W0HKS2C3YeBOIkLqGTDto1Y6q78YmGhe87tveKQjYTlMAN4L2foTOAzpUDRsE7EDDBLof1HiZwId1olUj6kDkhALyXMtx-Syca6SQnuVOx8WVrUkm1rqfonsTOAuca6TIKb06gXMsG2V6nAJnZ7fd8i0LnFWr2wFBruwpy3pYTqeMNtFT7iW9MGUm9yVt9n_hwTXKUiMd8qD9e03sbH6NNofx-4NT4nMYhYLbZvn3u6n_WvoJAAD__waUaj0) just a year ahead of the election. It was 45% in the same poll at the beginning of the year.
## Mayor: Migrant Influx 'Will Destroy New York'
New York City Mayor Eric Adams sounded his most apocalyptic note on immigration yet, telling city officials that the migrant crisis "will destroy New York." ([See Video](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0DFztCAQgOFfgx0Ot6JCQfE1dve1KR2E9W4TFAd2zvjvM5c69dO8837c57unRPvjv9_Q8ZpnH5heOCsrjYRuhia6FRGwa9DdBqtvo-67sXk6sOqmlO7tqE0PEJdlMF1A9OMyGPS-IQcKOmWVUbYf9NgaFdfF4GIB7IoYhFYYiXNpPzPt_MQ1XfmFpQ15a5J7Mh9VdP8ETAKm8zzbNX_veNa3C5iOnIgpVAHT5q9cJBYK0ke_VXkUjBS4yo0exe8sQ6FKVZ6UkoxYueRL7njKK5cvGYivprh4vJnqMAqtHpun9FvCf375CQAA__8z42fI)) The next day, schools in Long Island City had to turn away migrant kids as [21,000 children tried to jam](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLGO6yAURL8GOiJ8IQYKite4y2u3tAhc4rvCJjJsdv33K6feZoo50ox0Pm7zLVCh7fE_rOh7rnOInV44SyesADUDTz4jAiqOfhidHoy-KsMXb3GI2Wg9GoVXFcLoAibnnI13UFoPnDxIUNJJK9111OZiZcp3i3cH4DJiZFpiol73y2elrS-Yy1FfuF9iXXnxS-_PxtQ_BhODaTuetfUTMZjOYQaTdGeYN41NZNpbFykcombR4lJrEQ2xCdpy-fo525Uee9h6YzDx3afnN5VCbTRMy8caqLyv-58ifgMAAP__2kNeYg) into already packed classrooms. The children were excited, but frustrated teachers lashed out at school officials for a lack of planning. Adams has openly criticized other Democrats, including NY Gov. Kathy Hochul and President Biden, for not stepping up. In a recent Gallup Poll, [only 31% of Americans](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDFvwyAUhH8N3ojwAxs8MHTxlq4dLRwe9qswIENS5d9X7tztdCed7r6v-3J3FCltn-5A20Je3KPRCxcxccNBLtB5GxABZYe2HyfVazVI3e0WjddK66EPGkCvJnjdD8GpXg4ohiA7siBAikkYMQ2j0jcjfFgNrhPAFBAfTAn01PJ5-86U2o4hvvMLz9sjH120e2ulMvnBYGYwp3fJtV0Rg_kqZjALc-mRwZxTfHPZc1fKmV_Ic-AreUyV7y756-Bl0XHQdrpGOXGq9YmVby7GZ-Elx8hg7k7ryw_FSHXUTIntcBT_5rR_4fwGAAD__2XEZYc) approved of Biden's immigration policy.
## It's Back! NFL Kicks Off Its 2023 Season
The 2023 NFL season opened in Kansas City last night, and the first weekend of games arrives Sunday. Here's a guide to the upcoming season, starting with the [full schedule of all 272 games.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskLFuwyAURb_G3rDIAxsYGLp4S9eOFoZHTIQhNcRO_r5y1bHLka50hqP7dZ2uJsSQbp9mRV19noytYceJKiIJsAlapz0iIGtRXwbFL4L3TLSLZhyYBMWF47IHKXvbO4o444CDEtS2QQMFRhWVVPUDF52kzs8SZwWgPKJtOEUXat66ew6pLujjO--4dTavbdRLrY_SsI8GxgbG4zi68shbDemW8Cin1MD4LA2MyceTePwNUuyC7hmRnAXEmYqF1LCe3IldTEoYT3d-vfe34uH-Hf1WzSsM1eKeRbtp9zhCjKEMouH0tpoQf7Pqvyf9BAAA__-cgGpK) As the season began, the Kansas City Chiefs had the best odds for winning the Super Bowl, at 6-1, followed by the Philadelphia Eagles at 7.5-1. [See the odds for your team here.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0LFyhCAUQNGvwQ4HHipQUKSh27QpHZTHSoLiCLvM_n1mU6c-zZ37dZtvLqZ43D_djqaGPLu1xifOTFNFQczQeRMQAUWHhk964HIYhew24zQT48KZ0DBxKSSqMKpRaQ7jOvngu2iAgWCaKabHaZC9Yj4sChcNoAPiSgaGPtZ89d85HnXDkF75iVe_5r1LZqv1LER8ELAEbGutx3IebyRg182lHwK21Hy9CNiZgI2egBWKMc6VfNvjxIsuuSWavS-0xYPWXF2iZd3QPxJSV0t3GX-2mFIskyQDu-8upr-E-u-Q3wAAAP__bwVgtg) Lastly, streaming platforms are playing a larger role this year. More games will be exclusively streamed than ever before, including one playoff game set for the Peacock channel only. [Here's a guide to the streaming schedule.](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskDFvwyAQhX8N3mxdDsfAwNCFLV07WhiO-CqMo0Di9t9XqTp2ecvTe5_0fVzmi-fM5fruN7It7bMPjZ80g-l1j3LGLtpEhCQ7sqfJjCc1nqXqVhsoeKDRa-mDBFBeR0AEtUzyPBmiji0CSjCgwZynUQ0aYlo0LQbRJKIgRqDIbb8PnzuXtlLK3_uT7kPYty7btbVbFfJNoBPojuMYQimvTqB7PQt0YF6hBLrlUblQrQJdSbl_Mh1crn0NK8VHpv5vwCXS17C2LXd3G28H58x1UmKE6-Y5_5Lbvx5-AgAA__9gLF0z)

The poll had other bad news for Biden, whose just a year ahead of the election. It was 45% in the same poll at the beginning of the year. name: Dr. Ben Carson
subject: How do you uphold your religious liberty in today's climate?
body:
I'm reaching out today about an important issue that's close to my heart

|
---
| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b765c0712508431984a925b71dc764f0&_e=5KgSlwARN3KJ05R6mDZyiVLL9wGsZMKb8_VG5MvdvIET93VTyVB5cw-c7OyU9uUVx_sve1_05V_IIszsEWXbu70SpicXSimzDzEvsptJlF2MWU-XIo98kGtp_cfv33b_lz8kxaia8HeGxZwDYfTSSV0JwZE2qfurghG-n8DkqLLWEEkcZlh4kIi-TQGKn0sqesmEdkPQXe5UJbA1csM0h6Cw7OWh_UATZ6bDgiKP7Nm0cWQLjYz-f7xIcQmJ4BUXswqgDAHEQO54CmZ_FBuGPrxtjAqcbcshWQGs3kKnOcxc3G6EszQ4qSa4q6hYg_P324PlugK3dMdy6bCIO1-z_QlAAwURhH_iLSqdzrSmtVd0rQCKZU35yNM45nS6Gqh6ieLstJte3TQZ6Nkhyn-LGvGsQvnyEJxjPDjb55ciido%3D)
---
| Dear Fellow Patriot,

I hope this message finds you well. I'm reaching out today about an important issue that's close to my heart and, I believe, relevant to all of us.

In the current climate, our religious liberty, a foundational tenet of our nation, faces an increasing number of challenges. These are especially concerning for those of us who hold to biblical and faith-based values. [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b765c0712508431984a925b71dc764f0&_e=5KgSlwARN3KJ05R6mDZyiVLL9wGsZMKb8_VG5MvdvIET93VTyVB5cw-c7OyU9uUVx_sve1_05V_IIszsEWXbu70SpicXSimzDzEvsptJlF2MWU-XIo98kGtp_cfv33b_lz8kxaia8HeGxZwDYfTSSV0JwZE2qfurghG-n8DkqLLWEEkcZlh4kIi-TQGKn0sqesmEdkPQXe5UJbA1csM0h6Cw7OWh_UATZ6bDgiKP7Nm0cWQLjYz-f7xIcQmJ4BUXswqgDAHEQO54CmZ_FBuGPqf7f6w9nMz6hu_6OFxOfB3Y1gf7p4rLRWYkbncR9zwIcOKY9_SACv0ubl4xlPPaoe4tcIG3Oh7LN0O4TxJt9oCTpPXfYfOtvPSBWV0dz3UF49gKxin7o6FfSmRgrDVbvoYr2zp7e5_JLAdn3Pd2wN8%3D)
With societal shifts and new legal precedents, including the recently passed Respect for Marriage Act, the ability to practice and express our faith openly may face unprecedented threats.

These changes may allow the federal government to exert pressure on schools, businesses, and organizations that adhere to their religious beliefs. I fear this might lead to intensified legal persecution against those wishing to live according to their faith.

As engaged citizens, it's crucial we understand this situation and its potential impact on our religious freedom.

Please take a moment to share your insights by completing this 2-minute survey: [https://offers.americancornerstone.org/religious-liberty-survey/.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b765c0712508431984a925b71dc764f0&_e=5KgSlwARN3KJ05R6mDZyiVLL9wGsZMKb8_VG5MvdvIET93VTyVB5cw-c7OyU9uUVx_sve1_05V_IIszsEWXbu70SpicXSimzDzEvsptJlF2MWU-XIo98kGtp_cfv33b_lz8kxaia8HeGxZwDYfTSSV0JwZE2qfurghG-n8DkqLLWEEkcZlh4kIi-TQGKn0sqesmEdkPQXe5UJbA1csM0h6Cw7OWh_UATZ6bDgiKP7Nm0cWQLjYz-f7xIcQmJ4BUXswqgDAHEQO54CmZ_FBuGPgOSRPEfSnLVRzLoh2wNtLEizWLKb3U7ilOLObL1kyXQpn4kFC8VSCMD5nugojN5moRvSqYaQeMMRvtWPSmQOl9-DCCsQEXWlD0l2qjMMj77qh3GeWfJToaxXrujOIkbESyKiXEZnG6QhRUvMdDSnl8%3D)

Your contribution will guide our efforts to alert fellow Americans of the threats to our religious liberty and defend our First Amendment rights.

Let's uphold the integrity of our Constitution and protect the pillars that make our nation great: Faith, Liberty, Community, and Life.

Thank you for your attention to this matter.

Yours sincerely,

Dr. Ben Carson
Founder & Chairman
American Cornerstone Institute

name: Full Mag News
subject: Big Pharma and the federal government
body:
In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators.

This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b98580d74b5e456583bfa742b866241d&_e=VJEfWTSLTpj7TV0FvsOxoXIg-JJGLvRsS3f0g8zmsCFbelKwtsGuEOH_v80ajYxZ_zXBVlWYrPx2nrszbZjDTqtUDGTInzor6G9ES8Nl9LUgl9QXWl6nOLyjo_zpxMrM1n9YmGdY_0a2IDyE60kLvodCuPCagoLwzdAynufhDN9I8GkHYnmJnOg7BjujSbYTlfHRc-w9UWMTvNLnvY1S78Pca0Dmf5KW3gntBMr4hxnwaIWO5ZZ4M02S7WJ4yjQpjgRlBj-JmxvcHPg7dufhT2tRsr7QOxYftSzDHGwGoO0GeiGIBnamDm92lGWMoyDm2fx4rwBCvGYF5T1CKtxfXx_J97_vym9gNEXl-Nki2zUdHudzc8oDtDH1e5mQQs7b)
---
| | Dear Friend,

In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators.

The pharmaceutical industry is one of the most notable and most troubling.

Last year alone, "Big Pharma" spent over $373 million on lobbying--much more than any other industry.

While the Constitution certainly protects the rights to free speech and to petition the government, it was never intended to grant the special privileges that are characteristic of today's bureaucratic, administrative state.

In addition, Big Pharma's reputation has come under attack in the wake of America's opioid epidemic--since 1999, more than 600,000 people have died from opioid overdoses in the U.S. and Canada alone--and the COVID pandemic.

Given these current controversies, we decided to host a conference to consider the rise of Big Pharma, its role in the declining state of American health, and ideas for reform.

**The result is a free online video series that reveals the truth about Big Pharma.**

When you watch this free video series, you'll learn about the collaboration between the federal government and pharmaceutical companies, the content of the "Pfizer documents," and the origins of Big Pharma and the opioid epidemic.

You'll also gain valuable insights into Anthony Fauci and the public health establishment from Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.

**You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/big-pharma-cca/](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=b98580d74b5e456583bfa742b866241d&_e=VJEfWTSLTpj7TV0FvsOxoXIg-JJGLvRsS3f0g8zmsCFbelKwtsGuEOH_v80ajYxZ_zXBVlWYrPx2nrszbZjDTqtUDGTInzor6G9ES8Nl9LUgl9QXWl6nOLyjo_zpxMrM1n9YmGdY_0a2IDyE60kLvodCuPCagoLwzdAynufhDN9I8GkHYnmJnOg7BjujSbYTlfHRc-w9UWMTvNLnvY1S78Pca0Dmf5KW3gntBMr4hxlJVnBQSl82SPX535a-T7SHKtqgnnWNYXjN3PJSC6kz63ofEXDfYpIDEIUv2oA1ZK-nadxwzR4r_2gQDstw-pICIABXKcn-wZ6tuEjQGOjIQjVPmNnJSKQJKsdk5DTbO0vNFRTgzQN4KxPuOGBRcSfU)**

We filmed the series at a recent Center for Constructive Alternatives conference on the Hillsdale campus. You will not have to watch for long to discover why it was one of our most popular and well-attended events.

**Please use the secure link above to receive your Big Pharma video series. When you complete the form, we will email you the series so you can watch it immediately.**

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844**

body:
There are SERIOUS questions about Election integrity.

| |

| | | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d05502bd22cc42609cdcae87a79d40e1&_e=jVFslaxU5zx7m1A1_V2EO-v8iFmtQfzJspXwC92El7sLKpJQ2pEaC3YXoYJc6kRl6neanNJEn8Pkx9uWg7E8DZpdf71kb2rYbndZT_EijXokjmVm5fpXPHytXFtsfQhMZfRnMLAIXJQZHiZRY2jOh7BKTT6FSaQcWkcJk51r0B0tlDMS_eNIqEv8MV8RBYz2uWp5QfbA4j_-VVMHZsrWdKD2L-29tDLT8MlE6nxJXyw2vf8l84mGv2wj2NojuR3f69YHoWANumWQafmpqGnK59oXOoSyHDTLjH-ZZbC9x7y20EkHs-0DHCqt5d3ip_FzWVsV9w4trHvahl_hnS-_CZYxLF0M_um6A6Tg5CW1m2FwNlNFXqtd0csORbuh31Tolz1Bqa9AQEsMAbmLc3A67g%3D%3D)

Every country club Republican is afraid to say it, but I will:
**There are __SERIOUS__ questions about Election integrity. **
They'll call me a liar. They'll probably even try to _censor_ this email.

So what happens today will decide everything.

My name is Eli Crane - you might not know me, but I'm a Navy SEAL, a businessman, a husband, a father, and a humble servant of God.

I'm also the Pro-Trump, Pro-America conservative who represents AZ-02 - the biggest race on the map.

The Democrats hate me & want me silenced. Hell, many of the Republicans want me silenced too. **_The Establishment and anti-Trump haters will do ANYTHING to destroy me. There is no time left._**

They have all the power & resources they need, and that's why I'm humbly swallowing my pride to ask you for help today.

They have all the power & resources they need, and that's why I'm humbly swallowing my pride to ask you for help today. "Will you stand with me and chip in just a few bucks by midnight?" | | Look, I'm a Navy SEAL. I've been on 5 war-time deployments - I'm the last guy who normally asks for help, but if this text message doesn't work, it's over. "So, from the bottom of my heart - will you help out a Navy SEAL stand up to the radical Left & establishment?" Thank you for standing up for what's right. God bless you. - Eli | | Paid for by Crane For Congress Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. Every country club Republican is afraid to say it, but I will:
**There are __SERIOUS__ questions about Election integrity. **
They'll call me a liar. They'll probably even try to _censor_ this email.

So what happens today will decide everything.

My name is Eli Crane - you might not know me, but I'm a Navy SEAL, a businessman, a husband, a father, and a humble servant of God.

I'm also the Pro-Trump, Pro-America conservative who represents AZ-02 - the biggest race on the map.

The Democrats hate me & want me silenced. Hell, many of the Republicans want me silenced too. **_The Establishment and anti-Trump haters will do ANYTHING to destroy me. There is no time left._**

They have all the power & resources they need, and that's why I'm humbly swallowing my pride to ask you for help today.

**[Will you stand with me and chip in just a few bucks by midnight?](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=00b829e9290c4d378f7276fc9ff7ac47&_e=ucqlQ_N-oNij0pUvora_wAqejYsQSK24MKsrHs9to6Kjy4bCWaIDg57Ksk6Vx8NWvLJUt1re8Boq0gb0D35P42YLaqZFJtNp7JDQZO0xKsgdByI79PbOw3mz_VP949zU9OqHokxh93sy4Gpor2PaLK03LCNcJSp4PIJT7If3RKCgguuT-DtB-ziv9txauiZliWw6CGcZ2UnrH3f3NxUHhcVnLXPSik7HQyP-95dN4Oa207pXcsSKEAdnI7-V39tML0NoLznYpOVuYJo1d6Ado9JscCrCXvNfC_Vm5CIuvlstZJ2_yVmXg7qWbCnTowVPfaq2CwI-cDDbQ9ReBpsvz6shfoWJj8IFI1MpdgOhpKt4CcRS62Sa13JtICAF-bMT1chuH89I1vIAKwAw7Gs9HQ%3D%3D "Will you stand with me and chip in just a few bucks by midnight?")**

**[So, from the bottom of my heart - will you help out a Navy SEAL stand up to the radical Left& establishment?](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=00b829e9290c4d378f7276fc9ff7ac47&_e=ucqlQ_N-oNij0pUvora_wAqejYsQSK24MKsrHs9to6Kjy4bCWaIDg57Ksk6Vx8NWvLJUt1re8Boq0gb0D35P42YLaqZFJtNp7JDQZO0xKsgdByI79PbOw3mz_VP949zU9OqHokxh93sy4Gpor2PaLK03LCNcJSp4PIJT7If3RKCgguuT-DtB-ziv9txauiZliWw6CGcZ2UnrH3f3NxUHhcVnLXPSik7HQyP-95dN4Oa207pXcsSKEAdnI7-V39tMVrpUN07S71Y8S01DRyP41rQ7zPFwS48dnkW2AJEQF-SpKVyqKbwH5UU4jofgdHwpGF8TqdkWW63sSBoAYaD-aR0k5TxoNIi9nIq7Q3hjPRhm_ucdJgEiVmekd2yKPSzP3J84t0tHVVLIF-OSuQF6Ow%3D%3D "So, from the bottom of my heart - will you help out a Navy SEAL stand up to the radical Left & establishment?")**

body:

you on the Democrats' plan to PUMMEL the airwaves and SILENCE
conservative voices.

Please access the memo within the next HOUR using
the encrypted portal my team has set up:

ACCESS THE ENCRYPTED PORTAL

1 click.
The plan to END Biden's Border Crisis is 1 click away... All I
ask for is your written endorsement. Will you make just 1 click?

ENDORSE THE GOP BORDER PACKAGE

This is

bearing some bad news:

We're
going to have to cancel our advertising buys unless we see a
massive surge of grassroots support.

According

name: David Hogg via Blue Amp Action
subject: Peter, unless we band together and fight back, nothing is going to change.
body:
This is the biggest thing I’ve ever been a part of.
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc33ee8b6-251d-4039-96d1-e1c57630d225/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | Hey, Peter, it’s David Hogg, gun safety advocate and co-founder of March For Our Lives. The GOP and conservative special interest groups have been playing a 50-year chess game to elect far-right extremists to every level of government to manipulate our country and attack our rights and freedoms. They are willing to let children be slaughtered at school and watch our planet burn for personal gain. But badass young people have a habit of being underestimated, from March For Our Lives to the Sunrise Movement to the Movement for Black Lives. And when we demonstrate our collective power, we scare the shit out of Republicans. That’s why with an incredible team, we launched Leaders We Deserve — a grassroots organization dedicated to electing young leaders to Congress, and especially our State Legislatures, across the country to help defeat the far-right’s agenda and advance a progressive vision for the future. [We can’t do this without you by our side. Will you become a Founding Donor by splitting a donation between Leaders We Deserve and Blue Amp Action today?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T3561cb05-d536-4314-a7c3-0fe3e2ac592a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [CHIP IN NOW!](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc42d166d-71d6-4932-97d2-c0c3278f93ea/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | I’ll be blunt: There is no shortage of people who want us to fail. And unless we band together and fight back, nothing is going to change. It’s part of why despite making up 45% of the electorate, Gen Z and Millennials only hold 21% of State Legislature seats. Special interest groups, far-right extremists, and those hoarding the power are so determined to maintain the status quo that they will spend millions to keep Gen Z candidates from winning. They think that they can continue to manipulate the system to keep us out of elected office. Let’s prove them wrong, Peter. [That’s why I’m personally asking: Will you become a Founding Donor to Leaders We Deserve by splitting a donation with Blue Amp Action today?](https://default.salsalabs.org/T821eac8b-7acd-43e1-aefa-84f33eeef69a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Let’s do this, David Hogg Co-founder, Leaders We Deserve
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5f9fcf3a-76c8-4aed-b296-3342d1bcc4fe/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---
|
---
| | Follow Us | [](https://twitter.com/intent/follow?screen_name=cliffschecter)| [](https://linkedin.com/in/cliffschecter-0873a448/)
---|---
| **Blue Amp Strategies**
1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com
---

name: Ret. SEAL Eli Crane
subject: They're afraid to say it

body:

| | | | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ac52ff1e209d44138b13d0e17cbb19ec&_e=eUtG5MnHVevawA_8_ka2j2emHnWp2pQpaBizKBQBaH0WsXUGTGocdFniyE7cZT1S5D1N4BTEqnkuzBGocynxQ5CfAW0DcPYt2XtXDxUNYOTP54n1siYMyMzJL36GDjZh9f1sLIvC9pD9iYIxk2UtN4WAJsix4eGSKcfQAw4EXBqpP-iyTe1HcBRue4fjfzt0XK2dfhSGt94YOEOBNB6_aBBQqH2cwGvUUssfZjn__NTi3tZb42Ee2t77BKRWp_j4p13pIQVA7-pLJDeQCjkXojRaMdg4Xf1T97iqnC_Ia2qFfzAhgtlHB76IhEuWAWHwNLT9FMdN0a_gc91HwbTjci9n0jeideavq-kSTmQCuw8YHeCYiWCddKoxtRAOZcJmj6Y4mJdOYz3Rjyxl3SgDaQ%3D%3D)

Every country club Republican is afraid to say it, but I will:
**There are __SERIOUS__ questions about Election integrity. **
They'll call me a liar. They'll probably even try to _censor_ this email.

So what happens today will decide everything.

My name is Eli Crane - you might not know me, but I'm a Navy SEAL, a businessman, a husband, a father, and a humble servant of God.

I'm also the Pro-Trump, Pro-America conservative who represents AZ-02 - the biggest race on the map.

The Democrats hate me & want me silenced. Hell, many of the Republicans want me silenced too. **_The Establishment and anti-Trump haters will do ANYTHING to destroy me. There is no time left._**

They have all the power & resources they need, and that's why I'm humbly swallowing my pride to ask you for help today.

**[Will you stand with me and chip in just a few bucks by midnight?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ac52ff1e209d44138b13d0e17cbb19ec&_e=eUtG5MnHVevawA_8_ka2j2emHnWp2pQpaBizKBQBaH0WsXUGTGocdFniyE7cZT1S5D1N4BTEqnkuzBGocynxQ5CfAW0DcPYt2XtXDxUNYOTP54n1siYMyMzJL36GDjZh9f1sLIvC9pD9iYIxk2UtN4WAJsix4eGSKcfQAw4EXBqpP-iyTe1HcBRue4fjfzt0XK2dfhSGt94YOEOBNB6_aBBQqH2cwGvUUssfZjn__NTi3tZb42Ee2t77BKRWp_j4JQAbWjrrD6Bd4KIj89K66RlhdBMpnkQDLSPJPg8hHK-f13pNXMLbylIfP81IsyHzl2j9jdx282Rrg5tKyM8PdjUyKkQaEcaWT93WuRnouopyS8cHJ51vFTklrYo0X4h0GbBQKThTppKChoGgivDoPw%3D%3D "Will you stand with me and chip in just a few bucks by midnight?")**

| | [STAND WITH A PRO-TRUMP WARRIOR](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ac52ff1e209d44138b13d0e17cbb19ec&_e=eUtG5MnHVevawA_8_ka2j2emHnWp2pQpaBizKBQBaH0WsXUGTGocdFniyE7cZT1S5D1N4BTEqnkuzBGocynxQ5CfAW0DcPYt2XtXDxUNYOTP54n1siYMyMzJL36GDjZh9f1sLIvC9pD9iYIxk2UtN4WAJsix4eGSKcfQAw4EXBqpP-iyTe1HcBRue4fjfzt0XK2dfhSGt94YOEOBNB6_aBBQqH2cwGvUUssfZjn__NTi3tZb42Ee2t77BKRWp_j4KKdtk84FNfltej9gTiKWk2nDr7cExI5-c6tg5Wmm92_x7y2I06xX4sVR4lcLRzBY5LFnuFdsBVLAGcO00jWeHQ3y76bPX-kVukdNWSDMzN4wXYJalwdMp5XYvt8ki9FX8CXMGgD8XjX4cxC7z_P1-Q%3D%3D)
---

Look, I'm a Navy SEAL. I've been on 5 war-time deployments - I'm the last guy who normally asks for help, but if this text message doesn't work, it's over.

**[So, from the bottom of my heart - will you help out a Navy SEAL stand up to the radical Left& establishment?](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ac52ff1e209d44138b13d0e17cbb19ec&_e=eUtG5MnHVevawA_8_ka2j2emHnWp2pQpaBizKBQBaH0WsXUGTGocdFniyE7cZT1S5D1N4BTEqnkuzBGocynxQ5CfAW0DcPYt2XtXDxUNYOTP54n1siYMyMzJL36GDjZh9f1sLIvC9pD9iYIxk2UtN4WAJsix4eGSKcfQAw4EXBqpP-iyTe1HcBRue4fjfzt0XK2dfhSGt94YOEOBNB6_aBBQqH2cwGvUUssfZjn__NTi3tZb42Ee2t77BKRWp_j43KjcN2ComGpj5dXgbRJCheWJ7xD4CX4sTznkHRDGcJfnLPfOTu1E3ZiVNbPTYlH9qjWZhDrxWj_vdeG6lxatPx1Cvh6HhTKYEUajLDvhnpO1Nm8VZ1YUt0TU3m_Ij4lLMhw1awoiH9qMW5a5zZd8Cw%3D%3D "So, from the bottom of my heart - will you help out a Navy SEAL stand up to the radical Left & establishment?")**

Thank you for standing up for what's right.

God bless you. - Eli

name: Freedom Nation Today
subject: American jobs or affordable goods?
body:
In today's rapidly changing world, the topic of globalization has sparked heated debates

| | | [](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=902994ea6a4d46fba871b3a0b092dbfb&_e=55fHaKChMzjSRemXYUhmCVzIqDGIL7Y0uhO2xpW2OkxnZ5X9OT0Ar_ncALLfmmV3YF6C5MOofFxzoypjBIunbXI6xhDJlgfOr3bhbQuaWbl7Z4JcpH1jM-KdOYL61jFof_NKV-QuYtdyhI2Nl_PpGVVTBpBGM3aTfWhrCuZth_ZcRV2BNFynzBDHmLjCNPr4QGv9hEkCGRoU5Zfl0_Vl5ppNwOhlCSh7rV_oVVrG2qtn1lSJK3BtTWirE50Bopo9Aj34GlSPN7pHUHGN4EivUjKJN00E_6SPwp53G3GEly5NvNfvh20Lov5ho3YoZav1spHa_AhoUHBhYOBIWvidax2YDmhMg6PMUJ82G2at9GE_gW5JCZsFr21cFFml14jUxVz2ZDFwFh_1L0rtf3OYuw%3D%3D)

| | Dear Friend,
In today's rapidly changing world, the topic of globalization has sparked heated debates. But to truly understand its impact, we must explore both the costs and the remarkable benefits it brings.
That's why I'm thrilled to introduce you to _Globalization And Its Discontents_ , a captivating eBook from Hoover Institution fellow David Henderson. And I want to make sure you get your free copy right here: **[https://resources.hoover.org/globalization-and-its-discontents](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=902994ea6a4d46fba871b3a0b092dbfb&_e=55fHaKChMzjSRemXYUhmCVzIqDGIL7Y0uhO2xpW2OkxnZ5X9OT0Ar_ncALLfmmV3YF6C5MOofFxzoypjBIunbXI6xhDJlgfOr3bhbQuaWbl7Z4JcpH1jM-KdOYL61jFof_NKV-QuYtdyhI2Nl_PpGVVTBpBGM3aTfWhrCuZth_ZcRV2BNFynzBDHmLjCNPr4QGv9hEkCGRoU5Zfl0_Vl5ppNwOhlCSh7rV_oVVrG2qtn1lSJK3BtTWirE50Bopo9-ygJIYoE06VFP-d6om_PLZLhK5Q8bsUNUywkkj_r1KM8b-gtb4bOAsNRo8C_oFreNqU8p4m5btaWPro2uO-jgIX-k4ugQRmgTcL_eDH1hUTpCtg8jrdml8cGQHrGkrJUz9hJmR8mdzOBHtaL_A3Kag%3D%3D)**

This book takes you on a journey through the complexities of globalization, revealing insights that are often overlooked. You'll discover the main costs of globalization--such as potential job losses for workers in specific industries due to competition from imports. You'll also delve into the many benefits that are transforming our world--from accessing higher quality products at lower costs to fostering a more peaceful global landscape.

Globalization is a critical topic that affects us all, and understanding its implications is more important than ever. With this eBook, you'll gain data-based insights, expert analysis, and a deeper understanding of the role globalization plays in shaping our lives.

Please be sure to get your free copy of _Globalization And Its Discontents_ today using this link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/globalization-and-its-discontents](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=902994ea6a4d46fba871b3a0b092dbfb&_e=55fHaKChMzjSRemXYUhmCVzIqDGIL7Y0uhO2xpW2OkxnZ5X9OT0Ar_ncALLfmmV3YF6C5MOofFxzoypjBIunbXI6xhDJlgfOr3bhbQuaWbl7Z4JcpH1jM-KdOYL61jFof_NKV-QuYtdyhI2Nl_PpGVVTBpBGM3aTfWhrCuZth_ZcRV2BNFynzBDHmLjCNPr4QGv9hEkCGRoU5Zfl0_Vl5ppNwOhlCSh7rV_oVVrG2qtn1lSJK3BtTWirE50Bopo9dfBLqrTby2mTUt-OWBny9Ovoxk3BHJ1fhfI9CyqvHMeW9X3-lwZok23b86Hp6pVmywddFOOEmOJrpd5oCeqa66U2n9tj6VkPPfE3mCF5wDGFfitRpvFVlN65jQItj93hc3ZicaJ6V3YXC5xOhdjPQg%3D%3D)**

America needs you in the conversation, friend, so I wanted to make sure you have the knowledge you need to navigate the ongoing discussions around globalization.

All my best,
Greg

Greg Stamps | Online Development
Hoover Institution | Stanford University

name: Friends of the Earth
subject: A mother grizzly was just killed and her cub is now an orphan
body:
| | | | | [](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/e_s17_main_cobrandedemail_c3)
---|---|---

| | **Dear Friend,** | **Just one week until hunting season is in full swing. Help protect grizzlies and the planet before it’s too late: Donate $27 today! ** _If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1973386?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1973387?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1973388?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1973389?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Just two weeks ago, a mama grizzly bear was GUNNED DOWN in Montana. **Her cub is now an orphan.** And it will likely starve or freeze to death without her. Not to mention, hunting season starts **next week.** That means the helpless, orphaned cub may even get caught in the crossfire of trophy hunters. [**Don’t let another grizzly cub face the same fate. Donate $27 today and help protect grizzly bears and the planet before another grizzly dies.**](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1973390?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
With hunting season around the corner, this may not be the last we hear of preventable grizzly deaths. While grizzlies are protected under the Endangered Species Act, black bears aren’t so lucky. Trophy hunters are tracking down and targeting them across the country. They **trap them with painful metal clamps.** They release hunting dogs to **track and terrorize bears** before they are murdered.
And now, trophy hunters and private interests are chomping at the bit to remove protections for grizzly bears. That would let them kill more bears and take over their lands. All to turn a profit. With _**only 2,000 grizzlies remaining**_ in the lower 48 states, we’re running out of time to save them. But it isn’t too late yet. Thanks to generous supporters like you, we still have a chance to make real change. Change that would help protect grizzlies and the lands they call home. But we’re up against the powerful trophy hunting lobby. And if we don’t act soon, we could lose grizzlies forever.
[](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1973391?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
**Vulnerable grizzlies are in serious trouble this hunting season. Donate $27 now to help protect them and the planet!**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1973386?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1973387?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1973388?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1973389?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
Grizzly bears once numbered 50,000 in the continental U.S. But human impact decimated their population. **Hunting, trapping, and habitat loss put grizzlies at serious risk.** That’s why they received protections under the Endangered Species Act.
But even with protections, grizzlies are still struggling to survive. Their habitat is shrinking. Their food sources are increasingly hard to find. And climate change is driving them closer to the brink. As a result, _**fewer and fewer cubs are surviving to reach adulthood.**_ And adult bears are dying at alarming rates, too.
Soon, _things could get even worse for grizzlies._ States in the northern Rockies are working to remove ESA protections for these threatened animals. If they succeed, there will be devastating consequences. Trophy hunters could be allowed to kill grizzlies indiscriminately, and with no consequences. And once grizzlies are driven out of their lands, Big Polluters will swoop in. They have hopes to open these lands up for mining, logging, and other planet-harming practices.
As if that wasn’t enough, removing protections for grizzlies will make them vulnerable to some of the most gruesome hunting practices we’ve seen. Just last year, Idaho Fish and Game found a female grizzly with **12 bullets** in her. **She was shot an estimated 40 times.** No animal deserves this fate, Friend. But without protections, more and more grizzlies could be staring down the barrel of a trophy hunter’s gun.
**Protect bears and the planet from greedy interests before the loss is too great. Rush your $27 donation now!**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1973386?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $50 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1973387?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate $100 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1973388?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
[Donate another amount](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1973389?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)
---
We can’t afford for grizzlies to lose their protections. What you may not know is that _grizzlies help keep our planet healthy!_ These intelligent animals keep prey populations in check. That allows other plant and animal species to thrive. What’s more, grizzlies roam far and wide, enriching soils and transporting vital nutrients as they go. But it doesn’t end there -- scientists are continuously discovering more and more ways grizzlies play an important part in their ecosystems.
That’s why we have to protect these bears at all costs. And that means protecting the Endangered Species Act. These vital laws don’t just protect bears, though. They provide critical protection for America’s iconic animal species. They’re also some of our most effective safeguards in the fight to protect our public lands and curb catastrophic climate change.
Yet, trophy hunters and Big Polluters think it’s more important to kill for fun and put our planet in danger. All for the sake of profit. **Plain and simple, the inhumane treatment of bears and their cubs can’t continue.** One bullet doesn’t just kill a mother bear. It means her cubs will be left to die as well. And if bears are wiped out, their lands will be ravaged for profit, too.
I need you in this fight if bears and the planet are going to stand a chance. Your membership support to Friends of the Earth today will allow us to take a stand against private interests who want to hunt down vulnerable species like bears, wreak havoc on their environments, and are contributing to ecological destruction on our planet. Join the fight for our planet and precious bears before they are hunted to extinction, and make your $27 membership contribution today!
**Bear cubs may soon be left to starve or freeze to death. Protect them and our planet and donate $27 today!**
_If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
[Donate $27 immediately](https://us.engagingnetworks.app/page/email/click/10012/1973386?email=RepJ2ZGQKX6xm5Aey7FwClESkN1MQhKC&campid=UI6tX83ZqbKZkArzVWMSmA==)

clean_body: | | | | | ---|---|--- | | Dear Friend, | Just one week until hunting season is in full swing. Help protect grizzlies and the planet before it’s too late: Donate $27 today! If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | == == == == Just two weeks ago, a mama grizzly bear was GUNNED DOWN in Montana. Her cub is now an orphan. And it will likely starve or freeze to death without her. Not to mention, hunting season starts next week. That means the helpless, orphaned cub may even get caught in the crossfire of trophy hunters. == With hunting season around the corner, this may not be the last we hear of preventable grizzly deaths. While grizzlies are protected under the Endangered Species Act, black bears aren’t so lucky. Trophy hunters are tracking down and targeting them across the country. They trap them with painful metal clamps. They release hunting dogs to track and terrorize bears before they are murdered. And now, trophy hunters and private interests are chomping at the bit to remove protections for grizzly bears. That would let them kill more bears and take over their lands. All to turn a profit. With only 2,000 grizzlies remaining in the lower 48 states, we’re running out of time to save them. But it isn’t too late yet. Thanks to generous supporters like you, we still have a chance to make real change. Change that would help protect grizzlies and the lands they call home. But we’re up against the powerful trophy hunting lobby. And if we don’t act soon, we could lose grizzlies forever. == Vulnerable grizzlies are in serious trouble this hunting season. Donate $27 now to help protect them and the planet! If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: == == == == Grizzly bears once numbered 50,000 in the continental U.S. But human impact decimated their population. Hunting, trapping, and habitat loss put grizzlies at serious risk. That’s why they received protections under the Endangered Species Act. But even with protections, grizzlies are still struggling to survive. Their habitat is shrinking. Their food sources are increasingly hard to find. And climate change is driving them closer to the brink. As a result, fewer and fewer cubs are surviving to reach adulthood. And adult bears are dying at alarming rates, too. Soon, things could get even worse for grizzlies. States in the northern Rockies are working to remove ESA protections for these threatened animals. If they succeed, there will be devastating consequences. Trophy hunters could be allowed to kill grizzlies indiscriminately, and with no consequences. And once grizzlies are driven out of their lands, Big Polluters will swoop in. They have hopes to open these lands up for mining, logging, and other planet-harming practices. As if that wasn’t enough, removing protections for grizzlies will make them vulnerable to some of the most gruesome hunting practices we’ve seen. Just last year, Idaho Fish and Game found a female grizzly with 12 bullets in her. She was shot an estimated 40 times. No animal deserves this fate, Friend. But without protections, more and more grizzlies could be staring down the barrel of a trophy hunter’s gun. Protect bears and the planet from greedy interests before the loss is too great. Rush your $27 donation now! If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: == == == == We can’t afford for grizzlies to lose their protections. What you may not know is that grizzlies help keep our planet healthy! These intelligent animals keep prey populations in check. That allows other plant and animal species to thrive. What’s more, grizzlies roam far and wide, enriching soils and transporting vital nutrients as they go. But it doesn’t end there -- scientists are continuously discovering more and more ways grizzlies play an important part in their ecosystems. That’s why we have to protect these bears at all costs. And that means protecting the Endangered Species Act. These vital laws don’t just protect bears, though. They provide critical protection for America’s iconic animal species. They’re also some of our most effective safeguards in the fight to protect our public lands and curb catastrophic climate change. Yet, trophy hunters and Big Polluters think it’s more important to kill for fun and put our planet in danger. All for the sake of profit. Plain and simple, the inhumane treatment of bears and their cubs can’t continue. One bullet doesn’t just kill a mother bear. It means her cubs will be left to die as well. And if bears are wiped out, their lands will be ravaged for profit, too. I need you in this fight if bears and the planet are going to stand a chance. Your membership support to Friends of the Earth today will allow us to take a stand against private interests who want to hunt down vulnerable species like bears, wreak havoc on their environments, and are contributing to ecological destruction on our planet. Join the fight for our planet and precious bears before they are hunted to extinction, and make your $27 membership contribution today! Bear cubs may soon be left to starve or freeze to death. Protect them and our planet and donate $27 today! If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: == == == == Standing with you, Raena Garcia Senior fossil fuels and lands campaigner, Friends of the Earth | Contact Us: Friends of the Earth U.S. Washington, D.C. | Berkeley, CA 1-877-843-8687

body:
TheFederalistWire.com

DAILY NEWS | September 08, 2023

This Republican
candidate has come to blows with Donald Trump
The second Republican
primary debate is still upcoming. But that hasn't stopped
candidates from throwing punches.

And this Republican candidate has
come to blows with Donald Trump.

Trump just obliterated a
reporter for asking this moronic question

Former President
Trump has always had a low tolerance for stupidity. The media
knows that better than anyone.
➞ Continue Reading

This Democrat Congressman
said three words that sent Biden into convulsions

Biden's Democrat
Party is getting sick of him. Now they're looking to make a
change.
➞ Continue Reading

Kamala Harris made this
revealing statement that has Joe Biden sweating bullets

Joe Biden has been
one of the worst presidents in U.S. history. But if Vice
President Harris takes over, she could easily earn that spot.
➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested

name: GOP Presidential
subject: The Pivotal Moments that ended the Cold War
body:
Inside, you’ll learn the truth about what happened under an actual socialist regime

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z97i3nca8b533iobn73a43nvf7v9i781c1aictpg_rp22sh2s8i66p71chgeeo36cjh2bs)
---
---
| | Dear Friend,
Picture the night of November 9, 1989, when East Germans triumphantly surged into West Germany as the Berlin Wall fell. It marked the dawn of the Cold War's end and unequivocal proof of communist rule's failure in East Germany.
Fast forward three decades, and we witness calls for socialism, especially among youth, both in the U.S. and around the globe--just as we did in the period of unrest a century ago.

However, it is crucial to grasp the lessons history has relentlessly taught us--socialism, time and again, meets brutal failure. If we don't learn from history, we are doomed to repeat its mistakes.

That's why we published an eBook that delves deep into the realities of socialism during the Cold War in Germany. Allow me to offer you a FREE copy of _Leaving Socialism Behind: A Lesson From German History_ through this secure link: **[https://resources.hoover.org/leaving-socialism-behind/](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zq85371g5puk7lo7nsbftfcio8ma9kluc3luent0_rp22sh2s8i66p71chgeeo36cjh2bs)**

Friend, this eBook by Hoover Institution senior fellow Russell Berman holds incredible significance for our present society.

Inside, you'll learn the truth about what happened under an actual socialist regime and how the inhabitants of East Germany constantly sought refuge in capitalist West Germany--and were only stopped because of the construction of the Berlin Wall.

You'll discover the essence of socialism--an agenda of repression, not poverty alleviation. The eBook introduces you to Rosa Luxemburg, a socialist activist, who criticized Russian socialism for silencing the people's voice, foreseeing a future of dictatorship, assassinations, and prisoner executions.

You can get your free copy of this eBook here: **[https://resources.hoover.org/leaving-socialism-behind/](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkbh8q6ocmroe6lmge3s7i3r79hu520qkvoj7a10_rp22sh2s8i66p71chgeeo36cjh2bs)**

I think you'll find it enriches your understanding in light of the debates in our current society.

Greg

Greg Stamps | Online Development
Hoover Institution | Stanford University

---
_With its eminent scholars and world-renowned Library and Archives, the Hoover Institution is a non-partisan, data-driven policy research organization that seeks to improve the human condition by advancing ideas that promote economic prosperity, national security, and democratic governance. Over more than one hundred years, Hoover’s work has directly led to policies that have produced greater freedom, democracy, and opportunity in the United States and around the world._

Hoover Institution 434 Galvez Mall Stanford University Stanford CA USA 94305
---

GOP Presidential
---

subject: The importance of showing up
body:
They're masking kids again | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/drscottjensen/showing-up?e=9828080a05)
---
| |
---
| | Peter,

It's happening again: [masking our kids in schools](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=c4a1b06c51&e=9828080a05) and [playing God](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=3566551385&e=9828080a05) with their lives. Big Tech, Big Pharma and Big Government are coalescing to try what they did in 2020 again. In fact, I just had yet another factual video on Asymptomatic Spread [removed on TikTok](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=46d97d01da&e=9828080a05) for "misinformation."

Do you see what's happening? Are you equipped? Are you educated on what they might try again and how to defend your family? Do you feel like you have the tools to proclaim your parental rights?

You need to come to the [Global Health Freedom Summit](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=075ce33b96&e=9828080a05) on September 30th, even it's just online attendance. I'm serious about this. Use my new coupon code: [FIRESALE](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=a0ca6a41df&e=9828080a05) and get 30% off tickets. You can see the front-line advocates of health freedom by clicking the flyer below. Given the times we're now in again, you won't want to miss [this:](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=958580f4dd&e=9828080a05)
---
| [ ](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=e22c3420a6&e=9828080a05)
---
| This rapidly-evolving rhetoric around another pandemic is why I think it is so important you attend the [Global Health Freedom Summi](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=03292df3ad&e=9828080a05)[t](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=3a9b30aa72&e=9828080a05) on September 30th. You can get your seat [here](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=ac9a735599&e=9828080a05) and use my coupon code FIRESALE for 30% off [tickets](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=c1dc229762&e=9828080a05) in person or virtually.

It's time to come together, be unified with a spirit of "Never Again", and push back effectively against these forces who are leading the fear mongering.

[See you at the Summit.](https://drscottjensen.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=b954d633401c69368c934973f&id=2e86abe5a9&e=9828080a05)

In Freedom,

Dr. Scott Jensen
Minnesota Family Doctor

name: Kevin McCarthy
subject: Uncovering the truth
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCarthy for Congress
body:
This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy.

| |
---
| | | This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy. When my Republican colleagues and I asked for your vote last fall, we made a Commitment to America of exactly what we would get done for you if entrusted with the majority.

The House is now spearheading the commitment to hold Joe Biden and his cronies accountable to you, and let me tell you - the Biden family corruption our investigations have uncovered in just a few short months is _**damning**_.

**But here 's the thing:**

When the Clintons went after Trump...
When Adam Schiff and Nancy Pelosi went after Trump...
When Merrick Garland and the FBI went after Trump...
And when Alvin Bragg went after Trump...

**They ALL had the media, Hollywood, Big Tech, and D.C. bureaucrats to peddle their LIES.**

Now, all those forces are converging all their resources to SHUT DOWN what my colleagues and I are uncovering about their puppet in the White House. Which is why I'm coming to you today, Friend. I need your help to keep the pressure on Joe Biden and fend off the attempts to undermine our investigations. **[Can my colleagues and I count on you?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z40fsh048tnr90ovvs7fogst0oqqaogbjp6ef258_rp22sh2s8i66p71chgeeo36cph2bs "Can my colleagues and I count on you?")**

---

---
Democrats' dark money dollars are pouring in to distract voters and undermine our investigations. If we don't see some immediate backup from our grassroots supporters, I fear Joe Biden and his cronies will get off scot-free with their sketchy schemes. **[PLEASE: Support our efforts for accountability today:](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z04pb1dnaqkvqlmbanbtt1p7gi5khku7ovo2i1s8_rp22sh2s8i66p71chgeeo36cph2bs "PLEASE: Support our efforts for accountability today:")**

---
| | [HOLD JOE BIDEN ACCOUNTABLE](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z09skj35m4de71cj4iko4akpm0dbej84nime4v40_rp22sh2s8i66p71chgeeo36cph2bs "HOLD JOE BIDEN ACCOUNTABLE")
---
Thank you for your time and support,

Kevin McCarthy

---

1 click. The plan to END Biden's Border Crisis is 1 click away... All I ask for is your written endorsement. **[Will you make just 1 click?](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zm3b8ll1fd3vhudtqen8edh0licmr5j582akq9dg_rp22sh2s8i66p71chgeeo36cph2bs "Will you make just 1 click?")**

---

This is Speaker of the House Kevin McCarthy. Unfortunately, I come bearing some bad news:

**We 're going to have to cancel our advertising buys unless we see a massive surge of grassroots support.**

_According to my team, if we can manage a $30,000 surge by midnight tonight - we can manage to keep our candidates on air through the end of the month._

**[I'm humbly asking you to help ENSURE our candidates' ads can remain up on the airwaves:](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z99hu28ctg16vuk49ob5t0ockbb7k5cbbo5hn2uo_rp22sh2s8i66p71chgeeo36cph2bs "I’m humbly asking you to help ENSURE our candidates’ ads can remain up on the airwaves:")**

Voters across the nation called on us to put a stop to Biden's ridiculous anti-America agenda - **but if we miss our critical fundraising goal, we are going to FAIL.**

I'm only sending this **HAIL MARY** to the most loyal patriots because I know you won't let us down.

**[This is your last chance to help House Republicans make it to the end zone._It's game over without you._](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zvhep0n0oc7ma9anjjf3p9oiiudv8s1hrc5k75ag_rp22sh2s8i66p71chgeeo36cph2bs "This is your last chance to help House Republicans make it to the end zone. name: American Briefing
subject: Who Would Replace McConnell As GOP Senate Leader?
body:
Potential Successors Emerge

Potential Successors Emerge

name: Trump News HQ
subject: Embrace Lifelong Learning with A Free Course on The Roman Republic
body:
The great figures of Rome show us the virtues necessary to secure a republic

| | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhlftktq7r69703in4anu3b0vj9kd9ire3ue4g9g_rp22sh2s8i66p71chgeeo36cph2bs)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

As the new school year begins, it's a great time for people of all ages to learn something new and exciting. We're all called to improve our minds whether we're returning to school this Fall or past our days sitting in a classroom.

At Hillsdale College we believe that a good education is essential to happiness and a free society, so we are making free online courses on the most important subjects. Our free online course, "The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic," offers you an opportunity to discover the remarkable story of Rome while enabling you to cultivate your curiosity and engage in lifelong learning.

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zf0fsqk7fu37f71mg2uu3itcfkq9aj1v38cl8gbo_rp22sh2s8i66p71chgeeo36cph2bs)
The great figures of Rome show us the virtues necessary to secure a republic, and also the pitfalls that can lead to its collapse. Study Roman leaders such as Romulus, Cato, Cicero, and Caesar in order to learn from their great triumphs and failures.

I hope you enjoy the course. [You can start your course on Rome here >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zrndqqrjv7gfvma6j4ss9oup51r2gr9s9ocog1f8_rp22sh2s8i66p71chgeeo36cph2bs)

Warm regards,

Kyle Murnen '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College ** **
---
| |
---

name: Ret. SEAL Eli Crane
subject: They're afraid to say it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Crane For Congress
body:
There are SERIOUS questions about Election integrity.

| |
---
| | | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d3cb45c74822474bbd9f67db40596fa9&_e=8Z-FIXPPcqlJUDwQ74AucXZsC1rFpOVGfZ6LhJxIO4-WW9yzi5tbKxPx-yelX1r-mDHGO2HTdMy0jd0gxt1Fv1U-1RyTLOmV-FiQ4sUlPFThEHJOxjdiUKmdxcZ0GguFU0pyVsBmkkz0PV_2ZcIQmTXy-SnQCvCbkU2T11Ti700DNsi-QOmfK1zBisHE62GbRkoaZPf45MfWlzfWUauZxV0nW6ybc6XbharjUvEHK2OaXDPHxexsnRSCzHN6Da5rYpmRtYkfF6V0dbnBDRAGyNmpt4bmM9qTfHhDJIvg8DPYy7ZvGBWd_BnkpxTg4DofLj4gCaW9i49nGlnD2HycDjiocRzXo3XGhbreB2LxZV0RRQVOU7IWZ2ka1xjYhUadv7QhgYdP0bK2i4SoicyC3Q%3D%3D)
---

Every country club Republican is afraid to say it, but I will:
**There are __SERIOUS__ questions about Election integrity. **
They'll call me a liar. They'll probably even try to _censor_ this email.

So what happens today will decide everything.

My name is Eli Crane - you might not know me, but I'm a Navy SEAL, a businessman, a husband, a father, and a humble servant of God.

I'm also the Pro-Trump, Pro-America conservative who represents AZ-02 - the biggest race on the map.

The Democrats hate me & want me silenced. Hell, many of the Republicans want me silenced too. **_The Establishment and anti-Trump haters will do ANYTHING to destroy me. There is no time left._**

They have all the power & resources they need, and that's why I'm humbly swallowing my pride to ask you for help today.

**[Will you stand with me and chip in just a few bucks by midnight?](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d3cb45c74822474bbd9f67db40596fa9&_e=8Z-FIXPPcqlJUDwQ74AucXZsC1rFpOVGfZ6LhJxIO4-WW9yzi5tbKxPx-yelX1r-mDHGO2HTdMy0jd0gxt1Fv1U-1RyTLOmV-FiQ4sUlPFThEHJOxjdiUKmdxcZ0GguFU0pyVsBmkkz0PV_2ZcIQmTXy-SnQCvCbkU2T11Ti700DNsi-QOmfK1zBisHE62GbRkoaZPf45MfWlzfWUauZxV0nW6ybc6XbharjUvEHK2OaXDPHxexsnRSCzHN6Da5r-YW-8MWCwKJQkKEghq8tBhez9r0u7vF327l9LP32FBYAVrF4-FuyHkDCUYE8lMuan58CKIRuSu6FduujQBG5Ui3I3zf8E0ZxxCzBEJw_oBbK8bz78p-M9aralQLOSE7OIYOe4G8JQHTQ0F6fFqa6bQ%3D%3D "Will you stand with me and chip in just a few bucks by midnight?")**

---
| | [STAND WITH A PRO-TRUMP WARRIOR](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d3cb45c74822474bbd9f67db40596fa9&_e=8Z-FIXPPcqlJUDwQ74AucXZsC1rFpOVGfZ6LhJxIO4-WW9yzi5tbKxPx-yelX1r-mDHGO2HTdMy0jd0gxt1Fv1U-1RyTLOmV-FiQ4sUlPFThEHJOxjdiUKmdxcZ0GguFU0pyVsBmkkz0PV_2ZcIQmTXy-SnQCvCbkU2T11Ti700DNsi-QOmfK1zBisHE62GbRkoaZPf45MfWlzfWUauZxV0nW6ybc6XbharjUvEHK2OaXDPHxexsnRSCzHN6Da5ryHJSSgha3HikcmYjMt3vkWB25mwfnbYqDhrbkOA0dD_qU5fcpYkcH36Wyv4SmBpQUHE1tNCAnZMx1s7ItoGd65pcK4I-yq5LinZUeeAKEIgCPKTSWi8sRA8mC8HDkLv-f1e5VppKhBguDp7r4Njfdg%3D%3D)
---

Look, I'm a Navy SEAL. I've been on 5 war-time deployments - I'm the last guy who normally asks for help, but if this text message doesn't work, it's over.

**[So, from the bottom of my heart - will you help out a Navy SEAL stand up to the radical Left& establishment?](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=d3cb45c74822474bbd9f67db40596fa9&_e=8Z-FIXPPcqlJUDwQ74AucXZsC1rFpOVGfZ6LhJxIO4-WW9yzi5tbKxPx-yelX1r-mDHGO2HTdMy0jd0gxt1Fv1U-1RyTLOmV-FiQ4sUlPFThEHJOxjdiUKmdxcZ0GguFU0pyVsBmkkz0PV_2ZcIQmTXy-SnQCvCbkU2T11Ti700DNsi-QOmfK1zBisHE62GbRkoaZPf45MfWlzfWUauZxV0nW6ybc6XbharjUvEHK2OaXDPHxexsnRSCzHN6Da5r8TDt5c9sYfJ7ujOY4AkqU3vMXT4UYemuw6_xalkFJn1h4qWah9HrYXf-TyV413hR33KbibY-nWP-pJ7QuQ1ad4YfTHKFi2V1BedSgmxI0rpd0TKU1RChxgbxod7qyCS6kc0aTqoemuyTApB07Z9zBA%3D%3D "So, from the bottom of my heart - will you help out a Navy SEAL stand up to the radical Left & establishment?")**

Thank you for standing up for what's right.

God bless you. - Eli

name: Majorie Dannenfelser
subject: We desperately need your voice!
body:
Will you join me in standing up for the rights of unborn children?

| [ ](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zgkdrtdblmhju3v079g2fk674oigav96oiu4bbhg_rp22sh2s8i66p71chge1o74cth2bs)
---
Pro-Life Advocate,

I'm writing to you today as a passionate protector of vulnerable women and the unborn. I know that you share my belief that every human life is precious and should be protected.

I've been a pro-life activist for over 20 years, and I've seen firsthand the devastating effects of abortion on women, children, and families. I've met women who have had abortions and dealt with the pain and regret as they navigate a deeply felt loss in their lives. I've met children who were born after their mothers were denied an abortion and who are now thriving. And I've met families who have been torn apart by abortion.

I know that you're also aware of the recent Supreme Court decision to overturn Roe v. Wade. This is a historic victory for the pro-life movement, but this was just the beginning of the fight. **_We still have a long way to go to ensure that all unborn babies and their mothers are protected from abortion._**

The first step is for pro-life Americans to come together and state what we believe and what we will do in order to protect the unborn. [Will you join me in standing up for the rights of unborn children?](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zcm7clv74j8pj6g3c9333vuon26ljibva0609f4g_rp22sh2s8i66p71chge1o74cth2bs)

When you sign the pledge, you'll be joining a growing movement of pro-life Americans who are working to make a difference. You'll also be receiving regular updates from SBA Pro-Life America about the latest pro-life news and events.

[SIGN THE PLEDGE »](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zo0urhu0isap14a6j8ff3mjdhqrbotqqj57gj6l8_rp22sh2s8i66p71chge1o74cth2bs)
| **I know that you care about the unborn, the protections for mothers and their babies and I know that you want to make a difference. I hope you'll join me in signing the SBA Pro-Life America Pledge to Stand Up for the Unborn. Together, we can build a pro-life America where every child is welcomed and valued.**
---
For LIFE,

Marjorie Dannenfelser
President, Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America

Susan B. Anthony Pro-Life America
2776 S. Arlington Mill Dr.
PO Box 803
Arlington, VA, 22206

American Briefing
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zuj0r5agr3s3hmdp12dcvcfcubb7c53mroa0ap9g_rp22sh2s8i66p71chge1o74cth238h5e8he485he5o75pt7kuo72ttle5pq8ddl69qbcd1jm8p79d9j6iprect66uqrf9bjmpqn4djm69qb4d9nkvijbo9getqb3cdkmppmeo0n6mq39cdjkorrbcp4mni68or6c9jmcoh5u)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://e.americanbriefing.com/rd/9z2zavrbjgoqaadqne4h53chkif9cfogr52icpouuho_rp22sh2s8i66p71chge1o74cth2bs)_

subject: C.S. Lewis’s Profound Insights
body:
The great figures of Rome show us the virtues necessary to secure a republic

| | This sponsored message from Reclaiming American Freedom is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=676b7fd222814e8fba2e4eb73a9efdd0&_e=ez0PuJOqEn-5FOXPIlrVdbfTUmSHMOJdOMs_dFCBvsAumktkv5Z3nG63vZPMRVcQ9EXqf9fC_k4TQRRBefmcx1KAqzPskQaBN8MyoPR8YZAayNuGcUG1eaPnjYoWl9WnHijzna2utZwD8phEpSAbDUIQfBJiqgu5QjcUoShzpVVqjiCD6Hxzj4kIE9kVTJUZJ2nkVcPqi21bkgplGkA3zCqTfwhgOGDy_yt4gV4BzUuLL_oDHa0LXJQPJuTOXxIMyTUbiDUVcVsjEweOuaPE8G6BW7VVnyhFIGmVszULw1ElYhfhfg_ZKCux4Xku0SYPCGu3XJJHbEE9mAwCT8zkCPbT645JFsaUlEHIZ89YiytSd2Y3EJD6MNBBEMifNhzzLL0MXjdYP2Uut3WMnN-VupymIjfy0Z7Ko-zb_AZgfTUAxt_iKeOphsam-5lktT2u)
---
| | Dear Fellow American,

As the new school year begins, it's a great time for people of all ages to learn something new and exciting. We're all called to improve our minds whether we're returning to school this Fall or past our days sitting in a classroom.

At Hillsdale College we believe that a good education is essential to happiness and a free society, so we are making free online courses on the most important subjects. Our free online course, "The Rise and Fall of the Roman Republic," offers you an opportunity to discover the remarkable story of Rome while enabling you to cultivate your curiosity and engage in lifelong learning.

[](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=676b7fd222814e8fba2e4eb73a9efdd0&_e=ez0PuJOqEn-5FOXPIlrVdbfTUmSHMOJdOMs_dFCBvsAumktkv5Z3nG63vZPMRVcQ9EXqf9fC_k4TQRRBefmcx1KAqzPskQaBN8MyoPR8YZAayNuGcUG1eaPnjYoWl9WnHijzna2utZwD8phEpSAbDUIQfBJiqgu5QjcUoShzpVVqjiCD6Hxzj4kIE9kVTJUZJ2nkVcPqi21bkgplGkA3zCqTfwhgOGDy_yt4gV4BzUuLL_oDHa0LXJQPJuTOXxIMyTUbiDUVcVsjEweOuaPE8G6BW7VVnyhFIGmVszULw1GTMljdUE48eblQDv3jlrmA0IgnczCGBNYpZicuigANH_JKxNvI63xiAUlc7kAEnblSh5fIYQuhbjkVcr4h7lArSIOIzrjnezC8cJwTMIxLYfV9YY2Qx5yfCcI0p0ePlY1Bfo3M_XfbrfI3oo2j97GI)
The great figures of Rome show us the virtues necessary to secure a republic, and also the pitfalls that can lead to its collapse. Study Roman leaders such as Romulus, Cato, Cicero, and Caesar in order to learn from their great triumphs and failures.

I hope you enjoy the course. [You can start your course on Rome here >>](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=676b7fd222814e8fba2e4eb73a9efdd0&_e=ez0PuJOqEn-5FOXPIlrVdbfTUmSHMOJdOMs_dFCBvsAumktkv5Z3nG63vZPMRVcQ9EXqf9fC_k4TQRRBefmcx1KAqzPskQaBN8MyoPR8YZAayNuGcUG1eaPnjYoWl9WnHijzna2utZwD8phEpSAbDUIQfBJiqgu5QjcUoShzpVVqjiCD6Hxzj4kIE9kVTJUZJ2nkVcPqi21bkgplGkA3zCqTfwhgOGDy_yt4gV4BzUuLL_oDHa0LXJQPJuTOXxIMyTUbiDUVcVsjEweOuaPE8G6BW7VVnyhFIGmVszULw1HULsstEcvF8vsiDBGNMVDAms1IYIGOmWxoJElAq0jtKJihqZNi6A-hSDOMqOyhY2_YgvQk15FR0nynXcsqUJ36bUvZAty8g-p3Aod6E-_H1-fwxSgS9wU_R1vXnVgTQpvI0NLtVdo0ge6KQDS4L9z1)

Warm regards,

Kyle Murnen '09
Director of Online Learning
Hillsdale College ** **

name: Diane Sare
subject: Symposium: Lyndon LaRouche--Right Then, Right Now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sare for Senate
body:
| | [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20230908_symposium&n=1)
---
Friend Today is the 101st birthday of the late American statesman, and eight-time U.S. presidential candidate Lyndon LaRouche. While leading Russian Economist and Minister of the Eurasian Economic Union Sergei Glazyev has publicly acknowledged the influence of LaRouche's ideas in shaping the conditions for a new, more just international economic order to emerge, as we see coming from the recent BRICS Summit in South Africa, most Americans have only a dim recollection of Lyndon LaRouche, if they are familiar with the name at all. That was the intent of the decades-long political witch hunt against him, leading to his and several of his associates' lengthy prison sentences, and the government's illegal shut down of LaRouche's publications in the 1980's. The LaRouche case, as former U.S. Attorney General Ramsey Clark warned, set a precedent for the political targetting of any leader whose policies stood in the way of a criminal "one world order." That includes what is being done to today to former President Donald Trump. Americans should be able to participate in a robust debate of policies and ideas, and choose or reject our leadership in free and fair elections. It is not for the FBI to determine who is allowed to be a candidate. Tonight we will hear from Mr. LaRouche in his own words, so that you can get to know a little bit more about the man, and understand why they worked so hard to silence him, and why his ideas are just what the nation and the world need today.
### [NY Symposium, Friday, September 7 8:00 pm: Lyndon LaRouche: Right Then, Right Now](https://www.sareforsenate.com/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5kzAmKH8bpB2VwkAKiJXpA8A&e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20230908_symposium&n=2)
[](https://www.sareforsenate.com/r?u=jalJvum2JQxpPvfjGmN5kzAmKH8bpB2VwkAKiJXpA8A&e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20230908_symposium&n=3) | [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/donate?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20230908_symposium&n=4 "DONATE") [DONATE](https://www.sareforsenate.com/donate?e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20230908_symposium&n=4)
---
Please also join me on Saturday morning for the [Schiller Institute Conference](https://www.sareforsenate.com/r?u=ZrH-O2pW3WMJEwldQSi0k-fM5MosNIoZ65Lhwt3VoYyTWQDOTIgviTv-kx8595IuDUkAl50vOzF3o8JaGwlixQ&e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20230908_symposium&n=5) on why the United States should be celebrating the BRICS, as opposed to trying to provoke nuclear war with Russia and China. It starts at 9:00 am.
\--Diane
* * *
[](https://www.sareforsenate.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6hhYeg6uqrmVjcmfPLFdm4zVmvb8S7HE8Z_RlHQCC7m4&e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20230908_symposium&n=6) | [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8Tst9BOlZ9OlCCK74nOWoOKg&e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20230908_symposium&n=7) | [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y2TAV1jfx9D-rSZxIUaL162PHBHURBc1qsFUGlrBqSav&e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20230908_symposium&n=8) | [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/r?u=h1LOxbVy26ImgEbXJVo-ZZXVyx336ZlBfOdYcb7kM01j94uPh32frcmIhKSp55_4&e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20230908_symposium&n=9) | [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/r?u=w5XKTZ0h8dEcNEoc_HghfJi8wVgkxoBFeO9SbtDkrsOsB53pTkfNsNzYoZI4W0Bq&e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20230908_symposium&n=10) | [](https://www.sareforsenate.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNyyQszqhD4wGTfakbeHue5PWHQ_UvD5z0w5lHezUkTQJ&e=bd1d687cdeff164927fc1e159dca3e71&utm_source=sareforsenate&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=20230908_symposium&n=11)

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

name: Judicial Watch Action
subject: NEW Episode of Chris Farrell's On Watch Podcast feat. Dr. Robert Malone!
body: Dr. Robert Malone is an internationally recognized scientist/physician and the original inventor of mRNA vaccination as a technology, DNA vaccination, and multiple non-viral DNA and RNA/mRNA platform delivery technologies. He has approximately 100 scientific publications with over 13,000 citations of his work and has served as chairperson on HHS and DoD committees. During the COVID-19 pandemic, he served as a non-voting member on the NIH ACTIV TX-Clinical working group committee which was tasked with managing clinical research for a variety of drug and antibody treatments for COVID-19. clean_body: Dr. Robert Malone is an internationally recognized scientist/physician and the original inventor of mRNA vaccination as a technology, DNA vaccination, and multiple non-viral DNA and RNA/mRNA platform delivery technologies. He has approximately 100 scientific publications with over 13,000 citations of his work and has served as chairperson on HHS and DoD committees. During the COVID-19 pandemic, he served as a non-voting member on the NIH ACTIV TX-Clinical working group committee which was tasked with managing clinical research for a variety of drug and antibody treatments for COVID-19. [Action] CHRIS FARRELL'S ON WATCH PODCAST Dr. Robert Malone Re: New COVID Variants & More! [] Substack: [] Dr. Robert Malone is an internationally recognized scientist/physician and the original inventor of mRNA vaccination as a technology, DNA vaccination, and multiple non-viral DNA and RNA/mRNA platform delivery technologies. He has approximately 100 scientific publications with over 13,000 citations of his work and has served as chairperson on HHS and DoD committees. During the COVID-19 pandemic, he served as a non-voting member on the NIH ACTIV TX-Clinical working group committee which was tasked with managing clinical research for a variety of drug and antibody treatments for COVID-19. name: Jim Marchant
subject: Jacky Rosen’s talking points:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Marchant for US Senate
body:
“I’m busy working on our economy.”
| | | | [](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HH3uBojrkKuM6wOBmfT29wFTyzqVIi2ftTwEIliehPUKioGs-gekRSupuOPjsxMBlJRkNOcsqrL50n8XGPyxHYuqLc1FULWpI9anj5hLASYK-RsRj0C3P-qgfwJEoLbCU9OqD7LQ6XcxId3ZB2Yg9Q==&c=X3qVkx2cGIIAh6jwICoD_526VFOO5GOyE1Tq28CZoperdUUxte6XNQ==&ch=QLnD3dAi0k78VAG0BTQ5lVI_RhmhbBraVW_MM-uoeBcoh4j3lGZkmQ==)
---
| Peter,
---
An incredible test of politicians these days is whether they're willing to admit how much the Big Government spending on radical agendas has wrecked our economy.
While 60% of Americans are living paycheck to paycheck, Jacky Rosen is still proud that she helped pass the Inflation Expansion Act despite its trillions of dollars in government spending on a Radical Green New Energy agenda.
---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HH3uBojrkKuM6wOBmfT29wFTyzqVIi2ftTwEIliehPUKioGs-gekRdIgcVGV-b9RZU281tMlS_yyeXBRr8bNjn80853h8tpQOVGL7UrgEXsWAXaL6ACiXhuzseCIBgH_9q7hUAa1N2btxgdZ1pkJIol8OIMP_YxEvEALSWIPeHd90Eg17xK9wkbq2ctdY_ODs-UM4wGP-Jjn2YL7x4uSaS-Ez_zMqS61-zKAX8HNSqg=&c=X3qVkx2cGIIAh6jwICoD_526VFOO5GOyE1Tq28CZoperdUUxte6XNQ==&ch=QLnD3dAi0k78VAG0BTQ5lVI_RhmhbBraVW_MM-uoeBcoh4j3lGZkmQ==)
---
The Radical Left and Biden Admin's war on energy have driven up gas prices and utility bills, but Jacky is tone deaf to how Nevadans feel about it.

---
[](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001HH3uBojrkKuM6wOBmfT29wFTyzqVIi2ftTwEIliehPUKioGs-gekRdIgcVGV-b9RZU281tMlS_yyeXBRr8bNjn80853h8tpQOVGL7UrgEXsWAXaL6ACiXhuzseCIBgH_9q7hUAa1N2btxgdZ1pkJIol8OIMP_YxEvEALSWIPeHd90Eg17xK9wkbq2ctdY_ODs-UM4wGP-Jjn2YL7x4uSaS-Ez_zMqS61-zKAX8HNSqg=&c=X3qVkx2cGIIAh6jwICoD_526VFOO5GOyE1Tq28CZoperdUUxte6XNQ==&ch=QLnD3dAi0k78VAG0BTQ5lVI_RhmhbBraVW_MM-uoeBcoh4j3lGZkmQ==)
---
During President Trump's first term, our nation reached energy independence for the first time in almost 40 years. Now our petroleum reserves are dangerously low and we've become dependent on foreign oil while an unrealistic transition to 'clean energy' is worsening our economic struggle.
Jacky says the "GOP field focuses on promoting election lies" while she's "busy working on jobs, working on our economy." Could the woman be more out of touch?

body:
Hello Friends,

Climate Hawks Vote, an awesome environmental advocacy organization, is currently taking votes for who to endorse in the CA-30 race.

As you know, Laura has been an environmental leader and champion for CA. We know she is going to do outstanding work in Congress to fight climate change, protect our environment, and create a more sustainable nation.

Today we have a chance to help her get there! **Can you help vote today for Laura to be endorsed by Climate Hawks Vote?**

All you have to do is click this link and vote for Laura. There will be a donation page after, but you do not have to donate.

**LINK TO VOTE:**<https://secure.everyaction.com/IxNqakwWUkmaYMHywyygIQ2>

Thank you for your ongoing support of Laura! Taking just a few moments to vote will be a big help to her today.

Sincerely,
Blake Dellinger
Political Director
Laura Friedman for Congress

body:
Tell It Like It Is PAC Launches First Radio Ad | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/56a5a4a5b8bd/what-they-are-saying-about-chris-christie-13560072?e=d0a9afa930)
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
**FOR IMMEDIATE RELEASE:**
September 8, 2023
Contact: [press@tellitlikeitispac.com](mailto:press@tellitlikeitispac.com?subject=null&body=null)
**Tell It Like It Is PAC Launches First Radio Ad
** _Spot Highlights Christie’s Record As A Fighter Who Gets Results_
**ARLINGTON, VA —** Today, Tell It Like It Is PAC released its first radio ad highlighting Governor Chris Christie’s willingness to fight to deliver real results. Entitled “Stand Up,” the :60 second spot is part of a five-figure buy that will air statewide across New Hampshire.
The ad features Governor Christie talking about his tenure as a conservative governor in deep blue New Jersey.
“There is a difference between fighting to get something done and fighting just for the sake of fighting,” states Christie. Facing a Democratic legislature, Governor Christie took on the teachers’ union, expanded school choice, instituted spending caps and got the Democratic legislature to reform the pension system.
Too many politicians fight just for the sake of earning headlines or cable news coverage. Governor Chris Christie fights to improve the lives of constituents and deliver results - he’s fought and won in New Jersey, and he’ll fight and win as President of the United States of America.
**“Stand Up”**
[](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=2ffb616daf&e=d0a9afa930)
**TRANSCRIPT FOR “STAND UP” (RADIO:60):**

**Voice Over:** _Governor Chris Christie on why he’s running for president:_
**Chris Christie:** _No one ever, ever has questioned whether I’m a fighter._
_Whether I’m willing to stand up for the things we believe in._
_There’s a difference between fighting to get something done and fighting just for the sake of fighting._
_I fought the teachers’ union in New Jersey and brought more charter schools and more renaissance schools to my state than any governor in the state’s history._
_I stood up and fought against those forces in my state who thought you couldn’t cut spending and you couldn’t cut taxes, and we did it –and we did it with a Democratic legislature._
_We reformed the pension system with Democratic help._
_This is about having someone who knows how to use the levers of power and the bully pulpit to be able to get results._
_I am the guy who can bring results._
_I’ve done it before in one of the bluest states in thiscountry and I will do it again when I am President of the United States._
_No one is ever going to think that Chris Christie isn’t afighter._
**Voice Over:** _Tell It Like It Is PAC paid for and isresponsible for the content of this advertisement. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Tellitlikeitispac.com_
_-###-_
| [DONATE](https://tellitlikeitispac.us10.list-manage.com/track/click?u=104ed976cff8130153157fdb8&id=e6e6afc279&e=d0a9afa930)

name: Team Gallego
subject: Ashamed
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Complete, total, 100% honesty from Team Gallego today.
#

Peter,
Complete, total, 100% honesty from Team Gallego today.
On September 30th, we’re going to file our numbers with the FEC. Whether we hit our goals or not, those numbers are going public.
And if they went out today, we’d be ashamed.
We had a huge launch — a historic first day raise. Our first few months were huge, too. But lately, we haven’t been able to convince folks to make their first donation.
We’re not sure if it’s because folks think Ruben has won this race already based on the polls. That’s just not true — polls this early aren’t worth the paper they’re written on.
We’re not sure if it’s because we’ve beaten Sinema’s raise each quarter. We have, but we’re running a campaign here. She hasn’t even announced yet. While we’re spending, Sinema is stashing away every dollar she raises.
And we’re not sure if it’s because our GOP opponents are so ridiculous, so far-right, that people think we’ll definitely beat them. These people are dangerous — and worse, in a state like Arizona, they can win.
Whatever it is, We NEED to catch up. So today, September 8th, 2023, we are praying for a HUGE day. Please:
[**Can you use this link to contribute $3 to Ruben Gallego's Senate campaign today? It is so unbelievably important to our chances to reach our goals before this FEC deadline. Ruben can't win this without you.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-sept23.a-3sdr&refcode=em230908-1-ASP&t=1&akid=1157%2E734936%2EhRtv6z)
