clean_body: Complete, total, 100% honesty from Team Gallego today. Peter, Complete, total, 100% honesty from Team Gallego today. On September 30th, we’re going to file our numbers with the FEC. Whether we hit our goals or not, those numbers are going public. And if they went out today, we’d be ashamed. We had a huge launch — a historic first day raise. Our first few months were huge, too. But lately, we haven’t been able to convince folks to make their first donation. We’re not sure if it’s because folks think Ruben has won this race already based on the polls. That’s just not true — polls this early aren’t worth the paper they’re written on. We’re not sure if it’s because we’ve beaten Sinema’s raise each quarter. We have, but we’re running a campaign here. She hasn’t even announced yet. While we’re spending, Sinema is stashing away every dollar she raises. And we’re not sure if it’s because our GOP opponents are so ridiculous, so far-right, that people think we’ll definitely beat them. These people are dangerous — and worse, in a state like Arizona, they can win. Whatever it is, We NEED to catch up. So today, September 8th, 2023, we are praying for a HUGE day. Please: If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | ** | | | | | | | ** Thank you in advance for chipping in. name: Jaiden (Gadsden Flag)
subject: I was kicked out of school. Here’s what’s next…
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Libertas Institute
body:
I'm guessing you saw me in the news last week.

[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=591da277877f4caea25d4b19e8d87497&_e=dXtWUmvO73w7b45OgMOrjbjmcysDASCWviKa7nlYFyd1d6wBXCBQ5tQWxjwVpU1gt93XBFpBhEOH16ApC6Ht3w1lQu66oc2UYNhZmjqNJ7VLSpptz3B7e9bcHBIT9BYChZWdBVgzLEA5QnIDPvPbEHqmPPhTpxZWOq4btlD6cts2Av_BoV4YJ4ZrlAD-fwBbSWGoKSu0lWqIuJz18a6aZbiQZxKjYZWsxGdaFJljFea2h6g5ydRoVFiDAVuIjES5etzaSmKTFmpgxKRRbsluQmr-mK_hP8NigfdCN7a_raI%3D "Tuttle Twins")

Dear Friend,

I'm guessing you saw me in the news last week. I'm the 12-year-old boy who was kicked out of class in my school in Colorado because I had a "Don't tread on me" Gadsden flag patch on my backpack.

The vice principal claimed that it was tied to slavery. (Totally false!) And they wouldn't let me come back to class until I removed the patch.

You might not know why this story got so many views -- over 40 million so far!

After I was kicked out of class, I talked with my mom about what to do. I remembered in one of the Tuttle Twins books how the kids got the media involved to fight against some corruption in the government.

[The Tuttle Twins helped me stand up for what I believe in. I want to help them ship their pro-American history books to schools and families. Can you chip in $25 or more today?](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=591da277877f4caea25d4b19e8d87497&_e=dXtWUmvO73w7b45OgMOrjbjmcysDASCWviKa7nlYFyd1d6wBXCBQ5tQWxjwVpU1gt93XBFpBhEOH16ApC6Ht3w1lQu66oc2UYNhZmjqNJ7VLSpptz3B7e9bcHBIT9BYChZWdBVgzLEA5QnIDPvPbECw7TszW2UciGKtxxKhEyDcpiOUjbpWOIw3djfYMUM0yd0rN1EJOsG-mIlFf-7YBnadhLNkWMMKr-ry4kKThpo3vX81BUuKx2Uj8zFM7Q3nxEwyZRHnd5VINRavtGa7m-JaaChw5jMmxxIIXTWzbwZs%3D)

[Support Tuttle Twins >>](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=591da277877f4caea25d4b19e8d87497&_e=dXtWUmvO73w7b45OgMOrjbjmcysDASCWviKa7nlYFyd1d6wBXCBQ5tQWxjwVpU1gt93XBFpBhEOH16ApC6Ht3w1lQu66oc2UYNhZmjqNJ7VLSpptz3B7e9bcHBIT9BYCq4sNPqPQTpdbtkBnib5Jf3pRPtnGc9ufhf0u6w7u3qeL_occZaotK6Fkd189ijFh7nQo3DwpQZBCEEwFsyTG6uB8cwA_A9VeyYGvKTZAwRAal8bY64BcRN7NnEuNPj9k5fLzfw7RahHr-mprxU-iqQAPHdiyzF80ZYr44eefcC55LgamMb32rOELsLHAsrnP)

I asked my mom if we could drive over to the local TV station. She agreed, so I went up and rang the doorbell of their office. Here I am:

[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=591da277877f4caea25d4b19e8d87497&_e=dXtWUmvO73w7b45OgMOrjbjmcysDASCWviKa7nlYFyd1d6wBXCBQ5tQWxjwVpU1gt93XBFpBhEOH16ApC6Ht3w1lQu66oc2UYNhZmjqNJ7VLSpptz3B7e9bcHBIT9BYChZWdBVgzLEA5QnIDPvPbEOBHtvojJps_RyjaqNvBHW5QPAowPqwmA2uXDf5bawe8Q-e-xHdLrUq3MlVGWa8m-vP4umt0UlF2TNR9Ji7t6DG_7MB41-2GJIBvrihkeX98fClR91391ujizTRSCzyZwr4xnOi-JnNflDX0bfZSqzg%3D)

Nobody would speak with me. I felt defeated -- this was a story that needed to be told! My 1st amendment rights were being violated. Why didn't other people care?

Then, my mom decided to reach out to Connor Boyack that night. He's the author of the Tuttle Twins books -- and I'm a huge fan. Connor agreed to share the video my mom had recorded of the vice principal, and now it seems like everyone has seen it!

I'm definitely a little more popular at school now, haha. Lots of other kids are now putting Gadsden flag stickers on their lockers.

I was interviewed by a lot of people afterward. When I talked with Ben Shapiro, he asked me why I knew so much about politics and American history. Here's what I told him:

_" I give it mainly to Connor Boyack with his Tuttle Twins books. I read those growing up, and that really, really helped me. And now I have a good understanding of America and all sorts of key concepts."_

[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=591da277877f4caea25d4b19e8d87497&_e=dXtWUmvO73w7b45OgMOrjbjmcysDASCWviKa7nlYFyd1d6wBXCBQ5tQWxjwVpU1gt93XBFpBhEOH16ApC6Ht3w1lQu66oc2UYNhZmjqNJ7VLSpptz3B7e9bcHBIT9BYChZWdBVgzLEA5QnIDPvPbEFOmgpuBHH-nkvRARxTNKzmZidrdyckGUtqE0BhQSjaf09X84nWZBff5teoDK6ZvFOGHF-zf7Oq_1GVmi3rwEIFN_rW33aPkoN8AqE4duE_68X9EATd9xpyIAdy1TI_0Wv7Yu3OjzsirCJNh2nI067U%3D)

I'm so happy that Connor shared my story. But what's next?

Well, one day, I want to run for governor of Colorado. I have to be 30 years old, so that will be in the future.

There is something I can do in the meantime. I can use this attention for good. I can pay it forward. I can get other kids to learn the same things I've learned so when the time comes up, they can stand up for themselves, too.

Connor, my mom, and I have been talking over the past few days about what we can do to use this moment for good. And this email is one of the ideas -- we can use my story to encourage people like you to help us.

**So here is what we are doing:**

Connor and his team have some new American history books that teach the ideas of freedom and the founding fathers. They're so much better than the textbooks we have to use in school that don't really teach history with any kind of depth.

**I want more kids to be able to read these history books. So we are launching a fundraiser to raise $25,000 this week, and we will use the money to ship history books to schools across the country -- with a heavy focus on my state, Colorado.** 😀

[Will you stand up with me and help me? I'm super excited by this. Please donate here -- every $25 donation covers the cost of the book and shipping to a library or classroom.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=591da277877f4caea25d4b19e8d87497&_e=dXtWUmvO73w7b45OgMOrjbjmcysDASCWviKa7nlYFyd1d6wBXCBQ5tQWxjwVpU1gt93XBFpBhEOH16ApC6Ht3w1lQu66oc2UYNhZmjqNJ7VLSpptz3B7e9bcHBIT9BYChZWdBVgzLEA5QnIDPvPbEMrg8E7Y60YTUYKcc7p_EdwPgPnPoNceW-80Fd396LHHEKk9ceK7ox778vqPiRd7M7P-YgR84jXx_3LUnPtsOcyK40bt_l3tYVeaU5gE_5bhHF00a7_qaSmOdFy5ooST0pdf7HRlLmFuJQ6zRimGcJ8%3D)

clean_body: I'm guessing you saw me in the news last week. "Tuttle Twins" Dear Friend, I'm guessing you saw me in the news last week. I'm the 12-year-old boy who was kicked out of class in my school in Colorado because I had a "Don't tread on me" Gadsden flag patch on my backpack. The vice principal claimed that it was tied to slavery. (Totally false!) And they wouldn't let me come back to class until I removed the patch. You might not know why this story got so many views -- over 40 million so far! After I was kicked out of class, I talked with my mom about what to do. I remembered in one of the Tuttle Twins books how the kids got the media involved to fight against some corruption in the government. I asked my mom if we could drive over to the local TV station. She agreed, so I went up and rang the doorbell of their office. Here I am: Nobody would speak with me. I felt defeated -- this was a story that needed to be told! My 1st amendment rights were being violated. Why didn't other people care? Then, my mom decided to reach out to Connor Boyack that night. He's the author of the Tuttle Twins books -- and I'm a huge fan. Connor agreed to share the video my mom had recorded of the vice principal, and now it seems like everyone has seen it! I'm definitely a little more popular at school now, haha. Lots of other kids are now putting Gadsden flag stickers on their lockers. I was interviewed by a lot of people afterward. When I talked with Ben Shapiro, he asked me why I knew so much about politics and American history. Here's what I told him: " I give it mainly to Connor Boyack with his Tuttle Twins books. I read those growing up, and that really, really helped me. And now I have a good understanding of America and all sorts of key concepts." I'm so happy that Connor shared my story. But what's next? Well, one day, I want to run for governor of Colorado. I have to be 30 years old, so that will be in the future. There is something I can do in the meantime. I can use this attention for good. I can pay it forward. I can get other kids to learn the same things I've learned so when the time comes up, they can stand up for themselves, too. Connor, my mom, and I have been talking over the past few days about what we can do to use this moment for good. And this email is one of the ideas -- we can use my story to encourage people like you to help us. So here is what we are doing: Connor and his team have some new American history books that teach the ideas of freedom and the founding fathers. They're so much better than the textbooks we have to use in school that don't really teach history with any kind of depth. I want more kids to be able to read these history books. So we are launching a fundraiser to raise $25,000 this week, and we will use the money to ship history books to schools across the country -- with a heavy focus on my state, Colorado. 😀 What 's super cool about this is Connor has a big donor who is passionate about this, and they agreed to double everyone's donations! So, let's say you want to sponsor 5 books for students. That means you'll actually do 10 books when your donation is matched! I knew how to act when my school tried to shut me down because I'd been learning these ideas for years. Because of the Tuttle Twins, I know what my rights are and how to stand up for them. People like Connor and you have been part of my story, and I'm grateful. Now, we have to use this moment for good, and I hope you'll stand with me to make a difference. So many other kids need to learn what I have. It's education -- real, true, good education -- that will make sure other kids don't get tread on, too: Let's use this momentum to find more Jaidens -- and get them learning today! I'm pumped to work with the author of my favorite books to help even more kids learn what I have. I'm just a 12-year-old kid. I have to focus on my school work and my family, but this is a great opportunity for me to make a difference while I get ready for my gubernatorial campaign 18 years from now. I hope you can support us! In the meantime, stay free and stay strong! Jaiden (Gadsden Flag) Paid for by Libertas Institute Conservative Liberty Wire 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 | _

body:
How you can help today

| | | | | [](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fgranitesolutions%2Fdonate/1/0100018a750ed306-eaa4a385-ab2b-425a-8276-4f64430d460d-000000/YiLj9QVsNbBzrbJW-C5dDYtzgs4=338)
---
| | Derek,

I know you get a lot of political emails, but this one is important.

Democrats just won the special election in Enfield, putting them one seat closer to flipping control of the New Hampshire House.

**We can't let that happen.
**
Educational Freedom, our Second Amendment Rights, and our New Hampshire Advantage of no Sales or Income Tax are all on the lines if the Democrats regain control of New Hampshire State Government.

[Can you help us elect Republicans in upcoming specials and lay the groundwork to expand our House majority with a donation today? ](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fgranitesolutions%2Fdonate/2/0100018a750ed306-eaa4a385-ab2b-425a-8276-4f64430d460d-000000/kDWcRlPJOMyMdk4MhwJwjKxv6z8=338)

I really can't stress enough how much each donation matters towards the overall effort.

[Whether you can donate $10, $25, $50, or even $100 today to Granite Solutions](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fgranitesolutions%2Fdonate/3/0100018a750ed306-eaa4a385-ab2b-425a-8276-4f64430d460d-000000/06wNsExOVkDd1X40PZfKQO5xryk=338) you can help us fund our efforts to expand the New Hampshire House and keep New Hampshire in Republican hands after next November.

It's not going to be easy, but nothing worth doing ever is. [Please consider contributing to the cause today and paving the way for Republican wins in New Hampshire.](https://5wbjs096.r.us-east-1.awstrack.me/L0/https:%2F%2Fsecure.winred.com%2Fgranitesolutions%2Fdonate/4/0100018a750ed306-eaa4a385-ab2b-425a-8276-4f64430d460d-000000/8H5Bt_UNZvpYfXNbMWWxZTmPr6g=338)

Best,

Rep. Joe Sweeney
Chairman, Granite Solutions

name: Ryan Zinke - Navy SEAL
subject: Closing up shop
disclaimer_text: Paid for by ZINKE FOR CONGRESS
body:
| |
---
| | | I'm at my wits' end, Friend.

Biden and the Democrats just have too much power, too many connections, and too much in their fundraising war chest. Now their sights are set on me.

At this point, if I don't do a total 180 on the fundraising front, not only will I lose my House seat, Republicans may never hold the majority in Congress again.
**Friend, this is Ryan Zinke. I served as President Trump 's Secretary of the Interior and I was the commander at SEAL Team 6.**
**I 'm also running for Congress in the most critical race in the nation.**
But if Biden can destroy me in this race, I can guarantee you no other Republican will have a chance.
**In 2022, I lead the team of Navy SEAL 's that retook the House Majority, and I have more battle experience than anyone else. Point is, I'm one of the toughest, most battle-tested Republicans in Washington D.C. If I can't beat the Democrats gunning for my seat - no one can.**

---
| [](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=f9bafe7ad9b2422bbac44465cb06730f&_e=wNUUmjudcz0EYqVF90O5_oRct1rDertZ9xZYSfnmLU8bihq7mZV05FsRMILAx4szhL40YTSpd3ejd5Rk1QHKs-oKDUjYX-zvuz-DDXNSLlHzIGDIkXNbnE5_19XEBfTMKa38DnWdq4GDcyzSithkFIg-J5gFpUvokidewj01V4hr7XpPHdz_8Ubcm7P6nC6N5vuO57KTMNDy6CkG9NMb3dOdo-g0rRek7zcFh4oQh0VNHbtntSrx0yZvPDhGdsQwWllzdj7XgPxJsHiYO_qawBQtyz8uiJFohw2H8LZLZkzSrDLH7vjsVhetD7a859g7nAZB48lUHf0DUbN3sPqUWgY4Y_q6-60TQBtSTZP1ZtUdpdmJ0njyz2tssNPc7_ewIw7WPvMuPjJe-jGVe_eRp397aYb1DSzqUgNeUpMLb78%3D)
---

So, I'm going to be blunt with you, Friend. **[If you chip in just $5 right now,](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=f9bafe7ad9b2422bbac44465cb06730f&_e=wNUUmjudcz0EYqVF90O5_oRct1rDertZ9xZYSfnmLU8bihq7mZV05FsRMILAx4szhL40YTSpd3ejd5Rk1QHKs-oKDUjYX-zvuz-DDXNSLlHzIGDIkXNbnE5_19XEBfTMKa38DnWdq4GDcyzSithkFIg-J5gFpUvokidewj01V4hr7XpPHdz_8Ubcm7P6nC6N5vuO57KTMNDy6CkG9NMb3dOdo-g0rRek7zcFh4oQh0VNHbtntSrx0yZvPDhGdsQwWllzdj7XgPxJsHiYO_qawJ5El-eK4SAAgORiaiH7YhdA-TS0LNdi3y8jkM_YkMddcoVWIDi4pcSl3kQpnLc3ehOLjWiAkzsGJTT7qOmMCIrxMj8VxI9oHudwsepvJRrvc-Sfjaide4tDfUPN_8XvfPfmxWcuekDa51YLM8ruCus%3D "If you chip in just $5 right now,")** I can promise you that we will blow my fundraising goal out of the water and ruin Biden's plan to destroy our nation.

I'm humbly asking you, as a warrior who's fought for this nation for my entire life, will you help me out?

---
| | [DONATE TODAY](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=f9bafe7ad9b2422bbac44465cb06730f&_e=wNUUmjudcz0EYqVF90O5_oRct1rDertZ9xZYSfnmLU8bihq7mZV05FsRMILAx4szhL40YTSpd3ejd5Rk1QHKs-oKDUjYX-zvuz-DDXNSLlHzIGDIkXNbnE5_19XEBfTMKa38DnWdq4GDcyzSithkFIg-J5gFpUvokidewj01V4hr7XpPHdz_8Ubcm7P6nC6N5vuO57KTMNDy6CkG9NMb3dOdo-g0rRek7zcFh4oQh0VNHbtntSrx0yZvPDhGdsQwWllzdj7XgPxJsHiYO_qawDPISHW3SVa6H2tcUKTjrxR1cUabS5dLSIi9_e40ZPvwfZwDynS44eXU-_HNdisj6kqcOPXnbBHLDvPMoV0kJ2FfiAJMxJ0BLdOPenaWKJ4-sYtjFY8ojIflffeue36O4cbD-P_uuu-unNfQGerEaXc%3D)
---

You have my word, as a former Navy SEAL and commander at SEAL Team 6, if you help me out, I will continue to return the favor in Congress.

Thank you for your support,
Ryan Zinke

* * *
Ryan Zinke is a fifth generation Montanan who has dedicated his life to serving our great nation. Ryan is a decorated U.S. Navy SEAL officer who retired after 23 years of military service. After the military, Ryan served two terms as a State Senator, was twice elected as Montana's Congressman, and served two years as U.S. Secretary of the Interior under President Trump. Now after a couple quiet years spent with his family, he is serving again in Congress to help save America from threats we face both foreign and domestic.

body:
Tell us before the end of today. | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69399273/426028178/1420976906?refcode=ea.2978f100-504e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ms=ea.2978f100-504e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTU5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTc4ZjEwMC01MDRlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fT_i-I-TVun63RmlBeXagPbWKh_zKIMOzlsfOsBzguk=&emci=1dd5ee6b-9c4d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=2978f100-504e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=37077096)

**Team, the state of our democracy is in danger, and we can’t afford to sit on the sidelines for a moment longer:** → MAGA Republicans _(including our opponent, Anthony D’Esposito)_ refuse to condemn our disgraced former president, Donald Trump, as he continues to peddle debunked election conspiracies and faces criminal charges over his attempt to overturn the 2020 election results. → And House Republicans are doing everything in their power to undermine our democracy. In July, they introduced _the most restrictive elections bill in DECADES_ – and guess what? My MAGA opponent, Anthony D’Esposito cosponsored it! This bill would ban same-day voter registration, bar universal mail-in voting, require audits after every election, and more. → Meanwhile, GOP-led states have already introduced nearly _400 anti-voter suppression bills_ across the nation. **Bottom line: the GOP’s actions are both dangerous and irresponsible for our country.** That brings us to a straightforward question: | **Poll fordpwillis67@gmail.com**

name: News Alert (via Courier Newsroom)
subject: Fox News’s push to impeach Joe Biden
body:
# [](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/go/83?t=1&akid=1527%2E120351%2ENES3f0)
Peter,
Right now, an impeachment inquiry into President Joe Biden is looming — and Fox News is driving it _without an ounce of evidence._
We’ll explain in a moment, but if you’re short on time, [**will you pitch in $5 to help COURIER Newrooms fight back against right-wing propaganda networks like Fox News and their dangerous misinformation?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230908?refcode=em20230908&refcode2=1527_120351_NES3f0&akid=1527%2E120351%2ENES3f0)
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230908?refcode=em20230908&refcode2=1527_120351_NES3f0&akid=1527%2E120351%2ENES3f0)**
Here’s where things stand:
As a ploy to drive ratings and distract from Donald Trump’s 91 criminal charges and four indictments, Fox News has launched a misinformation crusade, baselessly calling for a “fast-tracked” impeachment of President Biden to “run counter to Trump trials next year.”
Speaker Kevin McCarthy called for an impeachment inquiry into President Joe Biden during a Fox News appearance late last month. Now, news reports suggest the investigation could begin as early as the end of the month.
Despite the sudden urgency, Fox News and McCarthy have zero new evidence to push for impeachment, just the same tired conspiracy theories about Hunter Biden and the so-called Biden “crime family.” 🙄
**Peter, we know Fox News’ game. By pushing to impeach President Biden ahead of the 2024 election, they’re looking to boost ratings and Trump’s chances of retaking the White House.**
**Here’s the good news, Peter: we’re fighting back.**
Courier Newsroom is exposing Fox News for what they are, and we’re correcting the record in crucial battleground states where Donald Trump and Fox News’ misinformation campaign could take hold. [**Will you chip in $5 to power our newsrooms and help us stop the spread of bad information?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-courier-20230908?refcode=em20230908&refcode2=1527_120351_NES3f0&akid=1527%2E120351%2ENES3f0)
Thank you,
Courier Newsroom
**[DONATE »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-footer?refcode=em-footer--1527&t=2&refcode2=1527_120351_NES3f0&akid=1527%2E120351%2ENES3f0)**
Email us: [**info@couriernewsroom.com**](mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/signup/update-your-information)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.couriernewsroom.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=1527%2E120351%2ENES3f0)

To give by check:
Courier Newsroom
Box 509
New York, NY 10032

speaking with voters, chatting at cookouts, joining local events, and

name: Defend the Constitution
subject: Big Pharma and the federal government
body:
In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators.

This sponsored message from Defend the Constitution is on behalf of Hillsdale College | | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=44c88fcff71f471e98eb2a9147e7dcb7&_e=DgTHy4PUKJPfb7Gjw98ufaY-uA3s680_W60WubrV252eNEyp4E3azETWlvEwR7OBjblAxSdzoAcVWhFRQEG5T7QdiMsptuESEObEhvpzWfzlG9Lj9NR1RxdS_Q4niTlgVUXa3J87uVWCbXZRGhO64icX7mEjG3Ctj_l7h9wI9neJKrtnzrTfehwpGmR6hHMlZJhMBfJdOdLPTU-Oq_PUvZ1R04qgA-Y0J134VcjyeE_HQCzu5lO4ZrQ8HVZGl_vHretG0Zwtu0vrYd17Ek5MpcBAoh2UsFfrX-ZU2w6HOJemPKARjTx4m2Rh0rrcdx_pApMz75f713IZbr2o98fL-H5prKJviIpF3R7FysiRAF58i9l17UvHSLV6mpR4UIpa)
---
| | Dear Friend,

In America, various industries have close ties to government regulators.

The pharmaceutical industry is one of the most notable and most troubling.

Last year alone, "Big Pharma" spent over $373 million on lobbying--much more than any other industry.

While the Constitution certainly protects the rights to free speech and to petition the government, it was never intended to grant the special privileges that are characteristic of today's bureaucratic, administrative state.

In addition, Big Pharma's reputation has come under attack in the wake of America's opioid epidemic--since 1999, more than 600,000 people have died from opioid overdoses in the U.S. and Canada alone--and the COVID pandemic.

Given these current controversies, we decided to host a conference to consider the rise of Big Pharma, its role in the declining state of American health, and ideas for reform.

**The result is a free online video series that reveals the truth about Big Pharma.**

When you watch this free video series, you'll learn about the collaboration between the federal government and pharmaceutical companies, the content of the "Pfizer documents," and the origins of Big Pharma and the opioid epidemic.

You'll also gain valuable insights into Anthony Fauci and the public health establishment from Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.

**You can receive instant access to this free video series right now using this secure link:**

**[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/big-pharma-cca/](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=44c88fcff71f471e98eb2a9147e7dcb7&_e=DgTHy4PUKJPfb7Gjw98ufaY-uA3s680_W60WubrV252eNEyp4E3azETWlvEwR7OBjblAxSdzoAcVWhFRQEG5T7QdiMsptuESEObEhvpzWfzlG9Lj9NR1RxdS_Q4niTlgVUXa3J87uVWCbXZRGhO64icX7mEjG3Ctj_l7h9wI9neJKrtnzrTfehwpGmR6hHMlZJhMBfJdOdLPTU-Oq_PUvZ1R04qgA-Y0J134VcjyeE9tPtlf3_QsPeHETFUf8Xilfi95srcfnwejOG0PexvpgFMaYRwvSIVCEPiyAQWW3QFq8MyMdIfh_dKm7_CcQQ0gohPwtTBmFBSJCTy1EZ9IZRVbivmzFQzgD786gwjySNaRVI5ViRwTnhRFoHioLrod)**

We filmed the series at a recent Center for Constructive Alternatives conference on the Hillsdale campus. You will not have to watch for long to discover why it was one of our most popular and well-attended events.

**Please use the secure link above to receive your Big Pharma video series. When you complete the form, we will email you the series so you can watch it immediately.**

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844**
**
---
| |
---

Defend the Constitution
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
[](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_s=44c88fcff71f471e98eb2a9147e7dcb7&_t=AiFH-TdZbBEPVRnqjxNFBW66wCBr7euuD4M8jOgSb9Z7_ZjYzbMupxcuUH0jJMleuzNKVHoCDmuf5nwDSFrl4Ugq8CpUCiJn3nb7bbEAgrLkkTZk3wmMUMxRLS5dWEPmklSHnR39xRI7mRPmOdyBHxdtH5cXpyxEQAlWEsQ4f40%3D)

# FROM THE DESK OF NEWT GINGRICH
---
| | Dear Reader, **I 'm pleased to share with you that The New York Sun is now carrying my exclusive weekly column.**

In it, I'll weigh in on the most pressing matters facing our country - and there are many.

**Under the Biden administration, our nation has lost its way.** Many politicians and major institutions are corrupt. Leading corporations are following their lead.

But it's the corruption of the media that has me most concerned. In my 70-year career in American politics, I've never seen it so bad. For this reason, I've chosen The New York Sun as a partner.

It's a paper that shines like a beacon amid a sea of lies and misinformation. It has done so for nearly 200 years.

**It 's a patriotic paper that lives and breathes American values.** It places our Constitution front and center and has long been among its most valiant defenders.

It remains our nation's most effective counterweight to The New York Times, which has bizarrely claimed the title of "paper of record" but speaks for so few of our fellow citizens.

Now more than ever, the battle for the future of our nation starts with the restoration of real American journalism, and The New York Sun is devoted to that mission. It truly "shines for all."

But I know what the Sun is up against. All the cards are stacked against us.

To win, we need you to join us. To join The New York Sun is to join the movement to save America.

**Membership starts at just 1 cent per day.**

name: (2) me, Donald J. Trump
subject: FW: “60 days to beat [Trump]”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J
body:
The special interest RINOs are coming for us... | | | Patriot,

---
Remember how I told you that the special interest RINO’s who already pledged to spend $370 million against us in the _primary_ are now plotting to add another $50 million to that total this month?
---
And remember how leaked reports revealed that behind closed doors they even said, **“**** _We’ve got to beat [Trump] in the next 60 days”_**?
---
Well, I’ve been thinking...
---
_What would be the best way to show these cowards that their plot to cancel out YOUR vote BACKFIRED beautifully?_
---
And I know just the thing...
---
**We’re going to kick off our largest fundraising** _**SURGE**_**of the entire campaign to date!**
---
Which is why I’ve set an ambitious new goal for our Primary Victory Fund of **60,000 grassroots donations** over the RINO’s **“60-day window.”**
---

clean_body: The special interest RINOs are coming for us... | | | Patriot, Remember how I told you that the special interest RINO’s who already pledged to spend $370 million against us in the primary are now plotting to add another $50 million to that total this month? And remember how leaked reports revealed that behind closed doors they even said, “ We’ve got to beat [Trump] in the next 60 days”? Well, I’ve been thinking... What would be the best way to show these cowards that their plot to cancel out YOUR vote BACKFIRED beautifully? And I know just the thing... We’re going to kick off our largest fundraising SURGEof the entire campaign to date! Which is why I’ve set an ambitious new goal for our Primary Victory Fund of 60,000 grassroots donations over the RINO’s “60-day window.” Because what we’ve PROVEN to be true time and again is that no amount of special interest money from shadowy RINO Super PACs can stop our beautiful movement of more than 74 MILLION patriots. | | Thank you, Donald J. Trump45th President of the United States \---------- Forwarded message ---------From: Donald J. Trump Date: Sun, September 3, 2023Subject: Another $50 MILLION?!To: <dpwillis67@gmail.com> | | Patriot, The amount of money the special interest “Republicans” (RINOs, as we like to call them) are spending to try and defeat OUR beautiful movement instead of Crooked Joe is utterly absurd. By now, I’m sure you’re already aware of the $370 million that they’ve pledged to spend against us in the primary... ...But LEAKED reports now reveal that the RINOs’ chief Super PAC is plotting to add *** ANOTHER $50 MILLION THIS MONTH ALONE! These cowards were even caught saying... “ Now let me tell you a secret — don’t leak this... We’re making a move now. We have to beat [Trump] and we’ve got to beat him in the next 60 days.” How can any Republican spend hundreds of millions of dollars against their own Party’s undisputed FRONTRUNNER leading by 50 and even 60 points? Not to mention these cowards just watched as Crooked Joe weaponized our country’s justice system to try and JAIL his leading opponent for LIFE like a Third World dictator. Well, here’s the TRUTH about them: They don’t care at all about Republicans winning back the White House. These special interest RINOs have made a fortune off selling out our country at YOUR expense for decades! And the only thing they really care about is preserving their uniparty globalist agenda – and nothing more. Which is why they will go to unimaginable lengths to try and nominate their Deep State-approved puppet and HELP Crooked Joe remain in power, so long as it means the ONLY candidate who puts AMERICA FIRST (yours truly) never again steps foot in the White House. Patriot, these people are just as sick and twisted as Crooked Joe and his accomplices. But, as we’ve already proven to be true, even their millions in dark money is no match for our grassroots movement of more than 74 MILLION Americans giving just $1, $5, $10, even $24 alongside your fellow patriots. And now, we need to show these RINOs that every time they attempt to BUY this nomination, our movement will stop them dead in their tracks. Because every dollar they continue to waste attacking us , is another dollar of life support given straight to Crooked Joe’s flailing campaign. | | Thank you, Donald J. September 08, 2023 Bringing _you_ the latest news, updates and what you _need to know_ about the race for U.S. Senate in Ohio **Happy Thursday!**
---
|
---
# Three Things to Know This Week:
---
1. Matt Dolan marks unofficial end to summer with flurry of voter contacts at Ohio fairs and festivals.

2. Matt Dolan campaign continues to bolster support from Ohio Law Enforcement community.

3. Matt Dolan earns endorsement, praise for delivering results for hardworking families, small-business owners.

---
# Get up to speed...
---
|
---
Matt Dolan marks unofficial end to summer with flurry of Labor Day fairs and festivals, meeting Ohio voters at every stop.
* Matt Dolan’s campaign capped off Labor Day Weekend with a slew of events, fairs andfestivals across the state.

* The past week featured meeting countless voters at the Canfield Fair, Great Geauga County Fair, Stark County Fair, helping out at the 67 th Hungarian Scout Picnic in Parma and participating in the Barberton Labor Day Parade.

* These were among hundreds of events throughout the state where Matt Dolan discussed first-hand with voters the issues that matter most to them, a schedule that will only continue to accelerate heading into fall.

**
Matt Dolan to Ohio Law Enforcement Community: “I will always have your back.”
**
* Matt Dolan met with Ohio’s law enforcement community in Erie County to express his respect and gratitude for keeping Ohio families safe.

* His visit came just days after joining Ohio sheriffs in southeast Ohio to discuss vital topics for protecting Ohio communities.

* As a state senator, Dolan has a proven track record of Backing the Blue, including establishing and funding a law enforcement training program to protect local communities from violent crime.

Matt Dolan earns endorsement, praise for delivering results for hardworking families, small-business owners.
* Matt Dolan’s campaign has earned another key endorsement, this time from former State
Representative and current Pickaway County Commissioner Gary Scherer.

* In his endorsement, Scherer lauded Dolan for delivering results for hardworking Ohio families and small-business owners.

* “When it comes to commonsense, conservative policymaking, Matt doesn’t just talk the talk. He delivers. He will be a tremendous addition to the US Senate,” Scherer said.

name: DLCC Special Elections Team
subject: The Pennsylvania House is TIED!
body:
A critical special election will take place in Pennsylvania in less than two weeks. Will you join us as we stand against extreme Republicans? | | |
---
| | **In _less than_ two weeks, one vacant legislative seat in Pennsylvania will determine which party will control the state House.** Since Democrats flipped the Pennsylvania House last year and broke the GOP’s grip on the state legislature, we’ve defended our narrow majority in _four_ special elections. But now, the Pennsylvania House is TIED once again, and we need to fend off a right-wing power grab in _another_ special election THIS MONTH. Pennsylvania has been at the top of the Republican Party’s target list, and they're hellbent on rolling back gun safety measures, cutting public education spending, and advancing a constitutional amendment that would pave the way for future abortion restrictions. **This election is about more than just one seat; it's about securing our fundamental rights in states like Pennsylvania. Losing this seat not only cedes chamber control back to the GOP, but it also means giving a QAnon conspiracy theorist and Jan. 6th insurrectionist a voice in PA’s legislature.** [With the Pennsylvania House TIED and our majority teetering on the edge, we need you. clean_body: A critical special election will take place in Pennsylvania in less than two weeks. Will you join us as we stand against extreme Republicans? | | | | | In less than two weeks, one vacant legislative seat in Pennsylvania will determine which party will control the state House. Since Democrats flipped the Pennsylvania House last year and broke the GOP’s grip on the state legislature, we’ve defended our narrow majority in four special elections. But now, the Pennsylvania House is TIED once again, and we need to fend off a right-wing power grab in another special election THIS MONTH. Pennsylvania has been at the top of the Republican Party’s target list, and they're hellbent on rolling back gun safety measures, cutting public education spending, and advancing a constitutional amendment that would pave the way for future abortion restrictions. This election is about more than just one seat; it's about securing our fundamental rights in states like Pennsylvania. Losing this seat not only cedes chamber control back to the GOP, but it also means giving a QAnon conspiracy theorist and Jan. 6th insurrectionist a voice in PA’s legislature. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | We’re at a pivotal moment, and we cannot let Republicans enact their right-wing agenda in a critical swing state. What we do now will determine the future of states like Pennsylvania – and it all starts with defending our razor-thin majority with this special election. | Monrovia, MD, September 5, 2023 -- The Committee To Elect Stephen McDow has affiliated with the Forward Maryland. The two came together to affect change in the state of Maryland and the United States. McDow already outlined 22 policy objectives, 18 already framed for resolution, and wrote two resolutions. McDowʼs objectives range from opening up the primary system in Maryland, developing a new inclusive trade deal with Africa and South America, creating a Marijuana Safe Law, as well as increasing funding for Law Enforcement and providing tax incentives and breaks for small businesses $50 million and under.

name: Sign the Petition (Left Action)
subject: Sign your name: ALL Trump trials should be televised >>
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Sign your name: ALL Trump trials should be televised >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Te71c7b21-a3aa-485d-8355-b1f6ca514450/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tfeb095a9-d82f-4aed-9d22-3d6ca0f0fbb6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Incredible – a judge overseeing Trump's election interference case in Fulton County, Georgia has ruled that the trials in this courtroom can be livestreamed and televised. **After years of Trump rallies and nonstop airtime on his terms, we can't wait to see Trump shown for who he really is – a criminal forced to sit and listen to the charges against him in a venue where his lies are not tolerated**. Unfortunately the Georgia judge's ruling won't apply to cases against him in other states or federal court. So we're calling for ALL of Trump's upcoming trials to be televised. The American people deserve to see Trump face the music. [**Add your name, and demand that ALL Trump trials be televised**.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T538f0327-29fe-4e0f-acc7-935621aaa909/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | | | Incredible – a judge overseeing Trump's election interference case in Fulton County, Georgia has ruled that the trials in this courtroom can be livestreamed and televised. After years of Trump rallies and nonstop airtime on his terms, we can't wait to see Trump shown for who he really is – a criminal forced to sit and listen to the charges against him in a venue where his lies are not tolerated. Unfortunately the Georgia judge's ruling won't apply to cases against him in other states or federal court. So we're calling for ALL of Trump's upcoming trials to be televised. The American people deserve to see Trump face the music. | | | | | | | Thank you, Left Action [P. name: =?utf-8?Q?Julie=20Clark?=
subject: Fmr. TX GOP Vice Chair Alma Jackson Endorses Julie Clark
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Conservatives for Julie Clark]( "Paid for by Conservatives for Julie Clark")
body:
“Julie is by far the best candidate for the job and is a strong voice for all Americans.” | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/76ad389a5d66/im-announcing-my-run-for-congress-12650438?e=c982eb7ad4)
---
| | [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=eb70f7a4f5&e=c982eb7ad4)
---
| | Dear Peter,
---
| **I’m delighted to share that Fmr. Texas Republican Party Vice Chair Alma Jackson has endorsed my Congressional campaign to serve Texas’ 23rd District!**

Alma has been an active Texas Republican who has served in various elected party positions, and was an Election Judge in Bexar County for over 10 years.
---
| [ ](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=9b09e0910a&e=c982eb7ad4)
---
| **Alma shared the following statement:**

_“Julie Clark is the best candidate for the 23rd CD. Julie is moral and courageous. That spunky lady knows her district and has the work ethic needed for such a job. Too many elected officials think that we work for them when the truth is that THEY ARE SUPPOSED TO WORK FOR US. Julie understands this truth. I proudly endorse her.”_

**Alma epitomizes what is needed to get our country back on track with her civic engagement at the local and state level. **

_**I’m deeply honored to have Alma’s endorsement**_ and I’m grateful for her recognition that my courage and work ethic are needed to address the challenges we’re facing.

**When elected to Congress** , I will be a woman of my word who fights for Texans’ Constitutional rights and will work tirelessly to ensure that their nation has protected borders and their taxpayer dollars are used to prioritize them, not foreigners!

**Peter, let’s change the tide of history together by sending me to Congress to work for YOU.** With your grassroots support, we will break the status quo and put the government back to work for We The People!

[**Can I count on your endorsement with a donation of $23.00 today?**](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=0b573ab825&e=c982eb7ad4)

---

---
| [ENDORSE CLARK FOR CONGRESS »](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=e6dbb4d7cf&e=c982eb7ad4 "ENDORSE CLARK FOR CONGRESS »")
---
| [CONTRIBUTE TODAY »](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=fcc3d4d56d2b95c7d6dfed110&id=357c8d2e25&e=c982eb7ad4 "CONTRIBUTE TODAY »")
---
| For Texas,

Julie Clark
Former Medina County Republican Chair
Candidate for U.S. Congress, TX-23

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69408753/426058900/1868297723?refcode=email_090923_Headlines&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjI5NmUzYS01YzRlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0U0d0vLLeb9zbKo5cRNlemolTqaSdW1Aqfa-u8EVfSM=)
It’s no secret that the fentanyl crisis is tearing families apart across our country. That’s why Brittany introduced a bill that would create a mechanism for hospitals to be reimbursed for purchasing and distributing naloxone to eligible patients, **a medication that can save a life** during an overdose.
Brittany knows it’s long past time for the federal government to end the stigma and offer support to those struggling with opioid addiction.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69408754/426058901/1868297723?refcode=email_090923_Headlines&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjI5NmUzYS01YzRlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0U0d0vLLeb9zbKo5cRNlemolTqaSdW1Aqfa-u8EVfSM=)
Last month, Brittany visited a family resource center that distributes food to low-income families in Broomfield County. But now, some Republicans are working to cut benefits to these invaluable resource centers, putting thousands of Colorado families at risk.
Make no mistake: **Brittany will always fight to protect benefits that help families keep food on the table.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69408755/426058902/1868297723?refcode=email_090923_Headlines&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MDIyOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NjI5NmUzYS01YzRlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0U0d0vLLeb9zbKo5cRNlemolTqaSdW1Aqfa-u8EVfSM=)
Finally, Brittany visited Chaffee County to meet with local officials about extreme weather preparedness at a town hall meeting. In order for local communities to be better prepared for wildfires and extreme weather, Brittany has worked to notify municipalities about funding opportunities from the federal level and support their grant-writing efforts.
**Team, we could go on forever about Brittany’s important work for CO-07** , but right now, we want to ensure Brittany has the resources to win in 2024 and can continue to deliver the progress and results that Coloradans deserve.

Peter,

**Donald Trump Jr here.**

**Friend, let me be the one to tell you - these continued indictments, arrests, arraignments, and most recently, MUG SHOT PHOTOS, are all a part of the scare tactics being employed by the radical left to SHUT DOWN the MAGA movement.**

**Although, I do believe - and I 'm sure you do too - that his mugshot is the best ever taken by anyone, ever. ** [](http://links.jdforohio.org/u/click?_t=52e88da6462b43fd9dbbfea97c7983e9&_m=4459ff59b5cb470e927ebce9a67a28db&_e=ByufeYx2hGPfC8GWwPjbH29Bw2jh-o1dlWJliHQZKXbT96Jnax37TZLY5X1nmZcK66OV0eFkdr7jfoYA5ICD_wzhC0iKHcT4VeYg5eeAxgJKxCGIRDxlzMInGE_Bksau920GyMIAdV1XCwhGSiuDeqnUcJ6LOgrUJq7xphMDeBgu_e95xYtDZBvVKyS_UUx_jOoNqZe536BiFJSzQ2idPZui9FsTWKA2rw9KRont-3sYDk1cFjBNrwEWVuvBq50uCVaURsONJkrhQETSrrgHg-nA-etVLAnWUXrHblptUDjzqui9eRj2QPmr7o_mwYaz) I've said it before, and I'll say it again: ever since my father came down that escalator, he's been the target of the establishment's ruthless attacks on his family, on his character, and on his success.

Listen, friend. body:
These 20,000 votes could ensure Democratic victory in 2024.
#
Peter,
In a moment, I’m going to ask you to ********[donate to re-elect my friend Tammy Baldwin](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69408867/426059681/131709225?refcode=dd_em_230908_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYmEwMTg5NS01YzRlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S8nD8Eryo2XAsZOVQImMTPGHZcDbklscZzHLIsbiwLw=). ********But first, I wanted to share a few facts about Wisconsin and why it’s crucial to our Senate majority:
\- Wisconsin’s 10 electoral votes helped decide the past two presidential elections
\- Republicans won last year’s Senate race in Wisconsin by a razor-thin 1% margin
\- Winning that 1%—about 20,000 votes—could ensure Democratic victory in 2024
Wisconsin is known for its close elections and next November’s will surely be a nail-biter. Not only are we counting on Wisconsin to defend our Senate majority, it’s a crucial swing state that could help deliver the presidential election to President Biden. The stakes couldn’t be higher.
**********[Democrats are facing a critical end-of-quarter FEC deadline this month. Can you make sure Tammy Baldwin has a strong showing on the next public fundraising report? Chip in $5 now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69408869/426059686/131709225?refcode=dd_em_230908_1_i&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYmEwMTg5NS01YzRlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S8nD8Eryo2XAsZOVQImMTPGHZcDbklscZzHLIsbiwLw=)**********
My friend Tammy Baldwin is a great partner of mine in the Senate. Recently, we’ve partnered on legislation including the _Equality Act_ and the _Federal Death Penalty Prohibition Act_. She’s a valuable member of our Democratic majority—and we need her with us in Washington.
Tammy has also proven herself to be a fierce competitor who can win in a state like Wisconsin, but we know the Republicans aren’t going to let her walk to an easy victory next November. The experts are already predicting that Wisconsin will be one of the biggest battlegrounds of 2024.
**************[Protecting our majority in the Senate starts with defending Democrats in close races like Tammy Baldwin in Wisconsin. Will you make a contribution now to keep the Senate blue?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69408871/426059687/131709225?refcode=dd_em_230908_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYmEwMTg5NS01YzRlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S8nD8Eryo2XAsZOVQImMTPGHZcDbklscZzHLIsbiwLw=)**************
My best,
Dick Durbin
********** **********
****************[CONTRIBUTE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69408872/426059688/131709225?refcode=dd_em_230908_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Englewood&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODQ4OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiYmEwMTg5NS01YzRlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=S8nD8Eryo2XAsZOVQImMTPGHZcDbklscZzHLIsbiwLw=)****************

name: Team Kennedy
subject: Participate in a National Day of Service!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
“Ask not what your country can do for you. Ask what you can do for your country.” On September 11th this year, Mr. Kennedy is asking all of us the same question.

| [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=day_of_service_unopens_5&n=1)
---
Peter -- Are you signed up to participate in a service project for the [National Day of Service](https://www.kennedy24.com/september-11-day-of-service?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=day_of_service_unopens_5&n=2)? Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. has asked all of us to participate in the September 11th National Days of Service and Remembrance, on September 9, 10, and 11. Mr. Kennedy wants us to harness the enthusiasm and momentum of his campaign to spark positive, lasting change for communities that need it most, NOW, rather than waiting for some distant time in the future. Mr. Kennedy will be right by our side, participating in service projects as well. [](https://www.kennedy24.com/september-11-day-of-service?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=day_of_service_unopens_5&n=3) Over the past three weeks, volunteers across the country have answered this call to service by submitting over 195 Day of Service projects! These hosts are looking to others in their communities to join their project and contribute a few hours of time. Will you sign up for a service project? | [](https://www.kennedy24.com/september-11-day-of-service?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=day_of_service_unopens_5&n=4 "Sign Up To Volunteer") [Sign Up To Volunteer](https://www.kennedy24.com/september-11-day-of-service?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=day_of_service_unopens_5&n=4)
---
Some projects are filling up fast, while others still have a need for many volunteers. With over 195 projects available to choose from–with one in almost every state–we hope you can [find one near you](https://www.kennedy24.com/september-11-events?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=day_of_service_unopens_5&n=5). If not, there are also several virtual projects (see below), as an alternative, or submit your own project! These service projects are a great way to meet other supporters in your region!
**To Find a Service Project Near You:**
1. Go to the [Day of Service Events Page ](https://www.kennedy24.com/september-11-events?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=day_of_service_unopens_5&n=6)
2. Enter your zip code and select the distance you would be willing to travel to participate.
3. Explore the date, time, and activity for the projects closest to you and choose the best one for you.
4. Click the RSVP button and fill out the form so that the host can contact you with up to date information.
5. Invite your friends and family, and share the link in your confirmation email with your networks by text, email, and social media.

If you have any questions, email us at [dayofservice@teamkennedy.com](mailto:dayofservice@teamkennedy.com).
Let’s show the world that **we the people** are ready, willing, and able to heal our country!
Warm Regards,
Team Kennedy
[Dayofservice@teamkennedy.com](mailto:Dayofservice@teamkennedy.com)
Can't attend in person? Check out one of the virtual projects:
1. Holiday Cards for Our Military \- [here](https://www.kennedy24.com/unusualamerican/holiday_cards_for_our_military?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=day_of_service_unopens_5&n=7)
2. [](https://www.kennedy24.com/earthbody/holding_space_for_my_community_with_a_free_virtual_earth-body_reclamation_circle?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=day_of_service_unopens_5&n=8)Activities throughout central Texas to protect water resources and to feed people in need - [here](https://www.kennedy24.com/texaslinda/activities_throughout_central_texas_to_protect_water_resources_and_to_feed_people_in_need?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=day_of_service_unopens_5&n=9)
3. Spread Love through "Open Heart Origami" - [here](https://www.kennedy24.com/olifeclass/spread_love_through_open_heart_origami_with_oho_lab?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=day_of_service_unopens_5&n=10)
4. Virtual Reclamation Circle \- [here](https://www.kennedy24.com/earthbody/holding_space_for_my_community_with_a_free_virtual_earth-body_reclamation_circle?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=day_of_service_unopens_5&n=11)
5. Friends of the World Zoom for Peace and Healing - [here](https://www.kennedy24.com/judithelia/friends_of_the_world_zoom_for_peace_and_healing?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=day_of_service_unopens_5&n=12)
6. Activities throughout central Texas to protect water resources and to feed people in need - [here](https://www.kennedy24.com/texaslinda/activities_throughout_central_texas_to_protect_water_resources_and_to_feed_people_in_need?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=day_of_service_unopens_5&n=13)
7. Lahaina Fires Survivors' Relief Fundraiser and Hawaiian Craft Workshop -[here](https://www.kennedy24.com/bonnierockwood/lahaina_fires_survivors_relief_fundraiser_and_hawaiian_craft_workshop?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=day_of_service_unopens_5&n=14)

[Donate today](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=day_of_service_unopens_5&n=15) to put a Kennedy back in the White House — Elect Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. as President to unite America in 2024! Make sure to join us on Social Media to help spread our campaign's message and put Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. in the White House! [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=27Ax0UmWOX2J8J_QwK9Z6nQ2OSzJvbzn8H14UVJyZeU&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=day_of_service_unopens_5&n=16) [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=YqgukYA3Mrlri-dqG7I8TvJMDEmDChn4crVEdym-uYEvPdkFBV9SaYXx39MwIdLI&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=day_of_service_unopens_5&n=17) [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/r?u=6hyvAYXBs1PELL28GD73y2F3NBqF5BJJJ4dLoTp9j7umB4CtvDL9QcHxwZkP_0TO&e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=day_of_service_unopens_5&n=18)
* * *
PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
This email was sent to [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com).
To stop receiving emails, [click here](https://www.kennedy24.com/unsubscribe?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=day_of_service_unopens_5&n=19).

| Peter, Studies show that I only have a few seconds to get your attention after you open this email, so I’ll get right to it...

**The crime wave sweeping across California has gotten so bad that it’s shuttering businesses. I’m running for Congress here to protect our economy and keep our communities safe, but last year,_soft-on-crime_ _Democrats outspent me to 9 to 1._ [Can you help me bridge that gap this time so I can FLIP a blue seat and STOP this insanity?](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=8bc7f50dee&e=8a657725d1)**
---
| [ ](https://baughforcongress.us20.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c960c16667ac69bd188629a19&id=3e9ec52637&e=8a657725d1)

---
| _If you need more convincing, keep reading..._

Peter, these Southern California shops have become the latest businesses forced to permanently close their doors due to the lawlessness that is sweeping across our state.

Get this – one of these shops that was just forced to close due to crime? They sold wigs to CANCER patients!

So how’d we get to this point?

Well, we can thank our state’s Democrat politicians for that, Peter. They seriously called to **defund** our police departments. They pass bills that downgrade thefts from stores like this one to mere misdemeanors. Their only “solution?” **_TAXING_** you more so they can throw more money at the problem!

**Look – we can do better here in California, Peter. The innocent, hard-working folks of our state deserve it.**

That’s why I’m running to build on what we started last year in CA-47. This district is being rated the top target in the entire country for Republicans – and if we win, it’ll mean one less soft-on-crime Democrat running California into the ground.

**Is that a mission you can get behind? If so, I’d be incredibly grateful to have your support. Every single dollar contributed from generous folks like you is going to make a major difference in a race this close and this important.**

For too long, Democrats' ROGUE agencies have ABUSED their power
to INTIMIDATE and SILENCE their political adversaries & everyday
Americans.

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/osLpXbODVN

Friend, it's Jim Jordan.

For too long, Democrats' ROGUE agencies have ABUSED their power
to INTIMIDATE and SILENCE their political adversaries & everyday
Americans.

They SPY on our campaigns…

They CENSOR our voices…

They HARASS concerned parents…

They TARGET America First patriots like YOU…

& they INDICTED President Trump!

DRAIN THE SWAMP

Now: Democrats are FURIOUS.

Now that House Republicans are finally uncovering their
corruption and working to DRAIN the Swamp, the Democrat money
machine is working overtime to silence us yet again. They will do
ANYTHING to stop us.

And if they succeed, our work will all be for nothing. They

So, I'm humbly asking: if you support our efforts to drain the

1 click.
The plan to END Biden's Border Crisis is 1 click away... All I

This is

We're

Voters

This is

subject: 10 life-saving prescription drugs 🤝 price negotiations
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
thanks to the Inflation Reduction Act

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69411401/426069064/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTIxZWIwYS02MTRlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6MYakVMFCDejsELgvg4PVwURjaGyWwmM6yu7hOhe2BI=&emci=b1231d22-b74d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=be21eb0a-614e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=4568237)

| | Fantastic news, Derek. Thanks to Mark Warner and his fellow Democrats’ efforts to pass the Inflation Reduction Act, **Medicare announced the first ten prescription drugs that are eligible for price negotiations.** For years, Medicare was blocked by law from negotiating lower drug prices for older Americans. But now, thanks to the Inflation Reduction Act, Medicare has the tools needed to bring down the cost of key drugs. These medications vary from drugs that treat heart failure, to arthritis, to Crohn’s disease. This is a historic step forward in lowering costs for Americans, but it’s just the beginning. **__[**If we want to see continued progress to cut the cost of prescription drugs, we need to elect Democrats up and down the ballot next year. Will you chip in $5 today to help us make that happen?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69411402/426069065/161482022?refcode=mw_em_230908_1&amount=5&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTIxZWIwYS02MTRlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6MYakVMFCDejsELgvg4PVwURjaGyWwmM6yu7hOhe2BI=)__** And let’s not forget that the Inflation Reduction Act is also the most significant climate legislation ever. Not only will it lower the cost of these medications that millions of Americans rely on, but it’s going to slash carbon emissions and create high-paying, green energy jobs. ******_****[But if we want to keep seeing historic progress, we need to expand our Senate majority. Can you donate anything you can afford to keep the Senate blue and help us secure more monumental wins for our country?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69411404/426069067/161482022?refcode=mw_em_230908_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTIxZWIwYS02MTRlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6MYakVMFCDejsELgvg4PVwURjaGyWwmM6yu7hOhe2BI=)****_****** Thank you, Team Warner ************[Contribute](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69411406/426069070/161482022?refcode=mw_em_230908_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&lastname=Willis&addr1=&city=Manassas&state=&phone=&employer=&occupation=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZTIxZWIwYS02MTRlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6MYakVMFCDejsELgvg4PVwURjaGyWwmM6yu7hOhe2BI=)************

name: Chair Ben Wikler, Wisconsin Democrats
subject: Republicans are attempting to impeach Justice Janet Protasiewicz in Wisconsin
body:
This is our last stand for democracy.
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9ab88f42-dd11-43ae-8bcd-005810e0483b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | Hi, Peter. It’s Ben Wikler, Chair of the Democratic Party of Wisconsin. I asked Blue Amp Action if we could reach out about the democracy emergency happening right now in Wisconsin We’ll be honest. When we won the most important election of 2023 and flipped our Supreme Court progressive, we knew Republicans wouldn’t stop there. Now, Wisconsin Republicans are attempting to impeach, convict, and remove newly-elected Justice Janet Protasiewicz from the Supreme Court. [We’re going to ask you to split a $10 donation between the WisDems and Blue Amp Action but let me first tell you why.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6d248689-13bc-4d56-9f3c-2274347090a1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T140ce9a5-1282-4c93-80fb-8ecf62d9e191/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| In 2020, Wisconsin came the closest of any state to overturning presidential election results. A single vote on the Court stopped Republicans from overturning President Biden’s victory in Wisconsin and handing the whole election to Trump. In 2024, Republicans could try again—and without Justice Protasiewicz on the bench, their next effort to thwart democracy could be successful. The risk is too high—we must stop this threat now before it goes any further. This impeachment threat is a desperate, unconstitutional, unprecedented, and obscene power grab attacking Wisconsin voters, the courts, and our democracy. If Republicans pull this off, we know they’ll attempt to do the same in states like yours. If we want to stop this desperate attack, set an example that Democrats will protect the will of voters, and hold off Republicans’ undemocratic power grab for 2024, then we need to win this fight in Wisconsin now. There is no other option. This is our last stand for democracy. [That’s I’m asking you to chip in a $10 split donation between WisDems and Blue Amp Action to help us win this fight and protect our democracy. Are you in? >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T6de3a0de-7574-497b-a893-d7ca8d2cbdba/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T91e9b5c8-ce0c-436b-937b-e6d13d6776a2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Thank you for your support, Peter. Ben Wikler, Chair of WisDems
---
|
---
| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.
---
|
---

1776 Mentor Ave. #411 | Norwood, Ohio 45212
513.438.0171 | info@blueampaction.com

| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
