Without your help, the radical Left will have everything they need to continue to put your children's freedom in jeopardy just to push a political agenda. One word: unacceptable. It's time to fight back and show them the reckoning that is coming. I'm asking for your help because it matters. It matters to me not just as a candidate for President, but as a parent myself. American freedom is on the line right now and I refuse to be a bystander. | | I am counting on YOU. Please, do what you can today. In Freedom, | Ron DeSantis | Meet Ron DeSantis | | | | | A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer. During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal. Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment. In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health. In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular. Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities: Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates, Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities, Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT, Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable, Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency, Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation, Turning Florida into a model for election integrity, Protecting the unborn, Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state, Expanding education freedom, Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities, Lowering prescription drug costs, Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable, Creating a universal school choice program, Delivering record-breaking tax relief, Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership, Supporting law enforcement and our veterans, Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders, Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court, ...and so much more. After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes. But history didn't stop there: Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points. Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall. Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women. Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism." Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history. This year, Governor DeSantis signed: Record tax relief ESG prohibitions Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation. Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI Improvements to our state's infrastructure Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback. Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason. | Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder). This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution. I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person. I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source. Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense. | Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President | This email was sent by: Ron DeSantis for President PO Box 3696 Tallahassee, FL 32315 %%profilecenterurl%% %%subscriptioncenterurl%% %%unsubcenter_url%%

These are not just words in a court opinion; they are a rallying cry for justice and fairness. Alabama's electoral map has been declared unlawful, unfit for the purpose of fair representation. **But our work is far from over.**
We must seize this moment. The relentless and successful litigation efforts by our affiliate organization has brought us to the brink of positive change, and we couldn’t be more proud of their work. But now we need your support. These are not Alabama's issues alone; they are emblematic of challenges faced by communities of color across our nation.

name: The Federalist Wire
subject: Top Republican causes a world of trouble for Mitch McConnell
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

DAILY NEWS | September 08, 2023

Top Republican causes
a world of trouble for Mitch McConnell
Republicans can't let 2024
go to waste. If they want to win, that means putting pressure on
their own, including McConnell.

And this top Republican caused a
world of trouble for Mitch McConnell.
➞ Continue Reading

TRENDING NEWS

This Republican candidate
has come to blows with Donald Trump

The second Republican
primary debate is still upcoming. But that hasn't stopped
candidates from throwing punches.
➞ Continue Reading

Trump just obliterated a
reporter for asking this moronic question

Former President
Trump has always had a low tolerance for stupidity. The media
knows that better than anyone.
➞ Continue Reading

This Democrat Congressman
said three words that sent Biden into convulsions

Biden's Democrat
Party is getting sick of him. Now they're looking to make a
change.
➞ Continue Reading

ABOUT
US
The
Federalist Wire brings you dependable news that highlights the US
political landscape as well as the economy. We're here for
citizens who want to stay in the know. If you're particularly
interested in politics or economics, our regular news updates
will help keep you informed. If you're not especially interested
in the topics but know it's important to keep up, then our
reports will be simple to understand.

You know that the political and
economic worlds often collide, and that's why we provide you with
specific coverage. Our news team strives to pinpoint and report
the stories that interest you most. We keep our eyes on domestic
and international matters, both political and financial, so we
can help you stay on top of the latest happenings.

DISCLAIMER
Your privacy is important to us.
It is The Federalist Wire's policy to respect your privacy and
comply with any applicable law and regulation regarding any
personal information we may collect about you, including across
our website, and other sites we own and operate.

subject: a few things
body:
🤔 |
---
| | Idaho Republicans in the statehouse have abandoned conservatism....

I didn't say that...

_The Daily Wire did._

They even list Idaho as one of the LEAST conservative states in the union ([see the article here](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=b078567bfa&e=dea908e0fe "Sad!")).

Bottom line: the fight's never been more important.

If you want to keep Idaho from going the way of our leftist neighbors to the West - you HAVE TO get involved.

Email me if you need help figuring it out.

Cheers,

Brian

**P.S.** One way to get involved is to get on the Idaho Freedom Caucus list. We're at the forefront of the war for our state and regularly release messages from the frontlines.

[Click here to do that](https://votelenney.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=7ce84224f3cc6e52f7633cc60&id=4047abdced&e=dea908e0fe "get on our list") (it's free).

subject: The hard truth

body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69414551/426080631/-2095412496?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230908_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTUzNzBiMDctNjg0ZS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fmI-QSarOLubV856AX5UCrtUijVLvZwpYNs8wX0o7R0=)
---
I’m never going to be afraid of telling you the hard truth, Peter, and here it is: It’s dangerous to be a woman in politics. A recent study from Princeton University and the Anti-Defamation League found female officials are _3.4 times more likely_ to receive online harassment than their male counterparts. And it’s not just digital threats, either. In the past few years we’ve witnessed a violent intruder show up to Nancy Pelosi’s home with rope, zip ties, and a hammer; a man with a gun stalk Pramila Jayapal outside her house; and a thwarted plot to kidnap Governor Gretchen Whitmer. **Then there’s what happened to me: A coordinated cyber-attack by far-right political operatives and media outlets meant to shame me out of office. ** After the attack on her husband, Nancy Pelosi said she was worried it would discourage other women from running for office. That’s something I worried about, too — and it’s not unfounded. When we say women running for office need extra support, we mean **every** type of support. There are so many invisible challenges and dangers that come with being a woman in politics, and that’s why I started HER Time: To help women overcome them. [_**But I can’t do it alone. So I’m counting on you, Peter, to help me support women running for office with a donation of any amount today.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69414552/426080633/-845140112?refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230908_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTUzNzBiMDctNjg0ZS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fmI-QSarOLubV856AX5UCrtUijVLvZwpYNs8wX0o7R0=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69414555/426080634/-845140112?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=AU_HTP_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230908_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS8xMDI1NDMiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTUzNzBiMDctNjg0ZS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=fmI-QSarOLubV856AX5UCrtUijVLvZwpYNs8wX0o7R0=)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Illinois=20Review?=
subject: BREAKING: Trump Wins Illinois Straw Poll
body:
The results are in, and for Ron DeSantis, it may be game over. Northwest Suburban GOP straw poll gives overwhelming victory to President Donald Trump.

View this email in your browser (https://mailchi.mp/2cd2589d0246/breaking-desantis-supporter-jeanne-ives-slams-ir-donald-trump-jr-9581612?e=1cb5fdae9e)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0bf2cb53f8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_07_03_47_COPY_05&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-9fb8a18792-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Illinois Review eBlast Powered By
https://kasparlaw.co/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0bf2cb53f8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_07_03_47_COPY_05&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-9fb8a18792-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
https://www.bestdental.org/?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0bf2cb53f8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_07_03_47_COPY_05&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-9fb8a18792-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Trump Wins NW Suburban Lincoln Day Dinner Presidential Straw Poll Over DeSantis 47-22, as Grassroots Prepare for Trump Jr. Visit in Oct. (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/09/trump-wins-nw-suburban-lincoln-day-dinner-presidential-straw-poll-over-desantis-47-22-as-grassroots-prepare-for-trump-jr-visit-in-oct.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0bf2cb53f8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_07_03_47_COPY_05&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-9fb8a18792-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D)
https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/09/trump-wins-nw-suburban-lincoln-day-dinner-presidential-straw-poll-over-desantis-47-22-as-grassroots-prepare-for-trump-jr-visit-in-oct.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0bf2cb53f8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_07_03_47_COPY_05&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-9fb8a18792-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
Florida governor and presidential candidate Ron DeSantis, left and AM 560 radio host, and DeSantis presidential campaign supporter Jeanne Ives, right. (Illinois Review)

On Thursday evening during the annual Northwest Suburban Republican Lincoln Day Dinner in Niles, President Donald Trump was victorious in the 2024 presidential straw poll, defeating Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis 47-22.

Nikki Haley came in third with 11 percent of the vote; Vivek Ramaswamy in fourth with 7 percent; Mike Pence 4 percent and Tim Scott 3 percent.

https://www.politico.com/newsletters/illinoisplaybook?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0bf2cb53f8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_07_03_47_COPY_05&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-9fb8a18792-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
(Politico Illinois Playbook)

President Trump leads DeSantis in national polls by over 40 points, solidifying his position as the 2024 Republican nominee for President of the United States.

https://www.facebook.com/mark.weyermuller/posts/pfbid0EBuW7bCPUMwU3FxJr3hhL2NXHhD1tHtqC3pAoTEsU3DmosmymThUaE77kHquhNPMl?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0bf2cb53f8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_07_03_47_COPY_05&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-9fb8a18792-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
(Facebook/Mark Weyermuller)
Donald Trump Jr., the eldest child of President Trump will be making several stops in Illinois next month as part of a national book tour to promote Letters To Trump (https://45books.com/products/letters-to-trump?gclid=CjwKCAjwjOunBhB4EiwA94JWsNLi8MMGkEr2R3r-SG7JoZT94h4hdnkF_GRPN2eTQbHhncdTpUG-sRoCGPIQAvD_BwE&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0bf2cb53f8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_07_03_47_COPY_05&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-9fb8a18792-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) – a 319-page book that captures the private correspondence between President Trump and some of the biggest names in history over the last 40 years.

The
McHenry County GOPAC (https://www.mcgopac.com/event-details/exclusive-event-with-donald-trump-jr?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0bf2cb53f8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_07_03_47_COPY_05&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-9fb8a18792-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) is hosting an event for Trump Jr. at 11:00 am on October 27th, and Darren Bailey (https://secure.winred.com/bailey-for-congress/trumpjrevent?fbclid=IwAR2gQaPuHpD-8V_OtXRugoAE2iwokSsY-irCuZRqL-U1znSNMJZmNYKb9wk_aem_Aap9Qj4Tkjq8HvgAm1u1LXRJ51GA3HZ5sPxmQ-Bkcz2LoKl1TjY9kKlt8gKmyoM5HZ8&mibextid=Zxz2cZ&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0bf2cb53f8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_07_03_47_COPY_05&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-9fb8a18792-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) is hosting a book signing party later that same evening in Effingham. Private events, including a lunch, will take place in between, and a full schedule has not yet been released.

But as preparations are underway for the VIP visit, sources can confirm to Illinois Review that
AM 560 radio host (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/09/donald-trump-jr-to-visit-illinois-during-letters-to-trump-book-tour-as-desantis-campaign-supporter-jeanne-ives-sends-emissaries-in-hopes-of-securing-an-interview-share-stage-with-vip-guest.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0bf2cb53f8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_07_03_47_COPY_05&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-9fb8a18792-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) and state central committee member Jeanne Ives, who announced in May that she was backing Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis’ campaign for president – recently sent emissaries to try and secure special “VIP” treatment during the high profile visit, including a request for an interview with Trump Jr. on her Sunday evening radio show and a request to speak on stage during one of the stops on the book tour – but the requests were all denied.

In the Trump world, loyalty means everything – and throwing one’s support behind DeSantis, who trails President Trump by over 40 points, is a non-starter.

On Wednesday morning, the
AM 560 radio host (https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/09/am-560-host-jeanne-ives-has-history-of-slamming-ir-says-conservative-publication-full-of-lies-and-garbage-falsely-alleges-trump-jr-event-cant-sell-ticke.html?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0bf2cb53f8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_07_03_47_COPY_05&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-9fb8a18792-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D) took to her Facebook page and attacked IR for its reporting, alleging that this publication – the leading conservative news source in Illinois, is “full of lies.”

https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/09/am-560-host-jeanne-ives-has-history-of-slamming-ir-says-conservative-publication-full-of-lies-and-garbage-falsely-alleges-trump-jr-event-cant-sell-ticke.html?fbclid=IwAR1mdT5dU53CAOe6Pa2b6NAMDLG4sUEELaTeiu1YzDxnY1laodC_lQrDLFg&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0bf2cb53f8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_07_03_47_COPY_05&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-9fb8a18792-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
AM 560 radio host Jeanne Ives says IR “articles are filled with lies.” (Source: Facebook/Jeanne Ives)
Ives’ Facebook comments were all over the map. After attacking this publication, she then tried to walk back her support of DeSantis’ presidential campaign, and in another comment she pivots and then shockingly attacks the upcoming visit with the former president’s son, falsely claiming that the Donald Trump Jr. event in Addison can’t sell tickets.

https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/09/am-560-host-jeanne-ives-has-history-of-slamming-ir-says-conservative-publication-full-of-lies-and-garbage-falsely-alleges-trump-jr-event-cant-sell-ticke.html?fbclid=IwAR1mdT5dU53CAOe6Pa2b6NAMDLG4sUEELaTeiu1YzDxnY1laodC_lQrDLFg&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0bf2cb53f8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_07_03_47_COPY_05&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-9fb8a18792-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
AM 560 radio host Jeanne Ives falsely alleges that the Donald Trump Jr. event can’t sell tickets. (Source: Facebook/Jeanne Ives)
The AM 560 radio host even went so far as to falsely suggest that members of the Trump Jr. team reached out to her office in DuPage County and asked to promote the event on her radio show and schedule an interview, and she “declined.”

https://www.illinoisreview.com/illinoisreview/2023/09/am-560-host-jeanne-ives-has-history-of-slamming-ir-says-conservative-publication-full-of-lies-and-garbage-falsely-alleges-trump-jr-event-cant-sell-ticke.html?fbclid=IwAR1mdT5dU53CAOe6Pa2b6NAMDLG4sUEELaTeiu1YzDxnY1laodC_lQrDLFg&utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0bf2cb53f8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_07_03_47_COPY_05&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-9fb8a18792-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D
AM 560 radio host Jeanne Ives tries to walk back her endorsement of Ron DeSantis for President. (Source: Facebook/Jeanne Ives)
Sources confirmed to Illinois Review late Thursday that the Trump Jr. team was not impressed with the AM 560 radio host’s comments.

A more detailed schedule of the book tour will be posted on Illinois Review when it becomes available.
https://youtu.be/WScM5u2MkQg?utm_source=Illinois+Review&utm_campaign=0bf2cb53f8-EMAIL_CAMPAIGN_2023_09_07_03_47_COPY_05&utm_medium=email&utm_term=0_-9fb8a18792-%5BLIST_EMAIL_ID%5D

Click here to record your response.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69415445/426083715/-1482142364?refcode=email_090823_midterms-poll&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWQ2ZDY0Yi02OTRlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4kSLlWWTUDQLQpw3QOHxUkD-ykZP5duKmjPpQeNa02s=&emci=02d6d64b-694e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&emdi=0ed6d64b-694e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=10203249)
Your answer will remain private – but make sure you respond before 11:59:59pm on 9/8/23 so we have accurate data to connect with voters across Pennsylvania more effectively.

name: Dr. Cornel West
subject: On the Indian Child Welfare Act:
body:
| | | [ ](https://www.cornelwest24.org/?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=indian_child_welfare_act&n=1&v=8)
---
Peter - When we delve into the imperative to [dismantle the American Empire](https://www.cornelwest24.org/?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=indian_child_welfare_act&n=2&v=8#section-issues), there's an unquenchable thirst for atonement. A reckoning with our past that bleeds, wails, and suffers, especially when it comes to the historical trauma inflicted upon our First Nations people, the Native Americans. This summer, the Supreme Court rendered its verdict in Haaland v. Breckeen, scrutinizing the very bones of the Indian Child Welfare Act—ICWA to you and me. A collective sigh went through our community as the court upheld key provisions. But, still on the table is this query: Does the statute's preference for Native adoptive parents constitute an unconstitutional racial bias? Several non-Indian adoptive parents made an argument against this provision. For now, the court said they had no legal standing to bring their cases to the Supreme Court. Now, let me be unequivocally clear: a negative verdict on the ICWA would have been a visceral leap backwards into the belly of the paternalistic beast that is our colonial history! Yet, to protect and nurture the culture, the spirit, the very essence of Native peoples, we must also affirm the constitutional preference for Native adoptive parents. The ICWA emerged in 1978 as a moral counterpunch to the grotesque practice of wrenching Native children from their homes—putting them in foster care, boarding schools, or adoptive families. All this was done in the demonic name of “assimilation,” even when fit and willing relatives could take care of these children. We can’t forget the harrowing annals of forced removal, of cultural erasure, starting in the late 19th century, extending late into the 20th! Hundreds of thousands of Native children were plucked from their communities, their names forcibly changed, their languages stifled, and horrific abuses perpetrated against body and soul. Native American children have been sent to [way more Indigenous boarding schools](https://www.cornelwest24.org/r?u=PrpQ9rI6aoQ_5Oy8rGxHEp3W-WQvTEln4A47vER7zraigEYMVCvSyoAj3Is0CVXISEES-w2KRmnz2zyAdKvzMR4HZRZsunF1BCERMyVSOReZ1Av_ya6Elzq360byrh4G&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=indian_child_welfare_act&n=3&v=8) than previously reported! Although we've ended this genocidal extraction of children, the colonial trauma still festers and mutilates Native American families and communities. The government’s ongoing egregious neglect of tribal sovereignty, of basic human needs like education and healthcare, continues the cultural genocide of Native Americans. To channel Faulkner, "The past is never dead. It's not even past." The abyss of broken promises and treaties made to 8.75 million federally recognized, and countless unrecognized, Native Americans—begs to be filled with truth and justice! Under a West administration, those promises shall not only be remembered but fulfilled! We stand arm-in-arm, soul-to-soul with the Indigenous people, those who have lost loved ones to the boarding schools, those who suffer injustice both on and off the reservations. And together, as a collective act of moral and spiritual audacity, we shall dismantle the weapons of empire that blunt and deny our shared humanity!**** But first, we need help from you. Every dollar you contribute to our campaign today will be used to organize people in pursuit of making this dream of a just, caring, and generous nation a reality.
---
| [](https://www.cornelwest24.org/donate?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=indian_child_welfare_act&n=4&v=8 "DONATE") [DONATE](https://www.cornelwest24.org/donate?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=indian_child_welfare_act&n=4&v=8)
---
My beloved brothers and sisters, let's cut to the bone: Native American tribes stand not as afterthoughts but as sovereign entities. They hold a divine right—a God-given right—to protect their families, their young, their cultural tapestry through self-governance!**** Now, a seismic shift is upon us—America is poised to mend ancient and fresh wounds. We're beckoned toward a more enlightened future; it's not an option, it's a moral imperative!**** Heed the words of the Friends Committee on National Legislation: the federal government ought to fund life's essentials—not as charity, but as the fulfillment of age-old commitments. This isn’t about handouts; it's a debt long overdue, a moral contract etched into the nation’s DNA. **** In solidarity, Dr. Cornel West [](https://www.cornelwest24.org/?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=indian_child_welfare_act&n=5&v=8)[https://www.cornelwest24.org/](https://www.cornelwest24.org/?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=indian_child_welfare_act&n=6&v=8)
---
| [](https://www.cornelwest24.org/donate?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=indian_child_welfare_act&n=7&v=8 "DONATE") [DONATE](https://www.cornelwest24.org/donate?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=indian_child_welfare_act&n=7&v=8)
---
Cornel West for President · PO Box 796711, Dallas, TX 75379, United States
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com · [Unsubscribe](https://www.cornelwest24.org/unsubscribe?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=indian_child_welfare_act&n=8&v=8) Created with [NationBuilder](https://www.cornelwest24.org/r?u=8ZU0Lizkf4ldaLE4eHvP4jrdVLeo6TMxn9HZ_FOKnho&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=indian_child_welfare_act&n=9&v=8). Build the Future.
---

name: Josh Harder
subject: My thoughts on the GOP’s “dream candidate”
body:
Sigh.
Hi Peter,
I know my team has been emailing you a bunch about our new opponent, but it’s important to me that we don’t get too down about this. Yes, my opponent is the mayor of our largest city and he’s being branded as a “Dream Candidate” for Republicans. But, what national Republicans don’t realize, is how strong of a grassroots team we’ve built here in the Valley.
**Together, we beat a sitting Republican Congressman, a MAGA extremist, and a corrupt County Supervisor in order to flip this seat blue and keep it that way. I won’t be going down without a fight.**
Kevin McCarthy recruited my opponent because McCarthy is desperate to win back this seat and keep a GOP majority. And now McCarthy is putting his money where his mouth is and running thousands of dollars worth of negative ads against me.
_Ok, not ideal, but also nothing that we can’t handle. We know how to win tough races - organize early, stick to our message, and outwork the competition._
This is likely going to be the most expensive race I’ve ever had and we’re going to have to spend earlier than ever to combat these negative ads. I know we can beat this guy and do our part to take back the House, but I cannot do it without your support. I need it now more than ever.
So if you can, please rush in a donation today. I’ll leave a link here:
[**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/JHCA-09-Email-Sept2023-FR-September**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69417099/426088803/-1515403871?&refcode=E4031-20230908-JoshDreamCandidate-SL-CampaignNews&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiOGNlMDZkMTMtNmM0ZS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=IonT57Co3acytlH9yR1CqgV05xx7ZTr19COWrUfXhas=)
Thank you so much, I know we can do this.
Josh

Josh Harder for Congress
10 N California St
Stockton, CA 95202
United States
[unsubscribe](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/7te8sxLvVUSDWs_e-jVleA2?unsubscribedata=np79UqmUvehprYKN8Mk%2FfpWz4JR%2FjCo9nCrPVyGZn%2B7N4gOE27MTCMPF8D6Y6K%2FpbsI8TkE8FVxHzujsufQANdkqUDbz0rOHpNCyLSmWW%2FzWacnxjS%2F8rHEF%2B1Rf5D4o7Cn99YPlEQX9y45XjETpa2TA1yfFEmEsVYcMp%2Bzv8dAucew%2FwM3SaQIq8TX3vbKAPbFf1OiIRN%2BwAlafQvVQYG5fsp6gkwxDDdBTXXDVSY7ibdTkpgJ3lB7ZFiIxmjCHN72VOoLWZnbhuNXL%2F6muQKgPuIOWh2buFlA8EuHmnju8ESV9D0ZVm4lTTdLa7hY%2FWXvCfY01LIwkftBD%2BwAwrZma8J4JrrY0TgdiUl%2FqAkqrmWbfXaRlQPk%2BUeFmxm6iOL2qgiebZlx%2Bzfoiod%2F%2Fevr8HmFYGjNm1SfweoaCYQiJZQ1jERxuCpfGiCf11oRx)

name: Joseph Geevarghese, Executive Director
subject: Join me for a virtual rally for the UAW this Sunday!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

This is BIG:

Next Thursday, September 14th at 11:59 PM nearly 150,000 auto workers’ contracts will expire! This could be the beginning of one of the BIGGEST strikes of the year.

The United Auto Workers (UAW) union is in the middle of negotiations with General Motors, Ford, and Stellantis, demanding things every worker has the right to expect from their employer:
* Fair pay increases
* Improved benefits and Pensions
* An end to the tiered wage system
* And job security for all workers during the transition to electric vehicle

But here’s the thing Peter Willis, if these Greedy Big Corporations refuse to make a fair deal the UAW members have authorized the union to call a strike against the companies.

So this Sunday, September 10th at 7pm ET, we’re joining a virtual rally with the UAW, Working Families Party, MoveOn, and other allies to show our solidarity with union members and their families as they get ready to take on the biggest U.S. automakers. (https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/UAW_Event_Invite/?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230908_INV_uawinv_0_3MO_uawevent_na_na_uawevent&t=1011&akid=4646%2E5885482%2ExEFH3L)

https://act.ourrevolution.com/signup/UAW_Event_Invite/?source=EM_NBI_OR_20230908_INV_uawinv_0_3MO_uawevent_na_na_uawevent&t=1012&akid=4646%2E5885482%2ExEFH3L

UAW President Shawn Fain will update us on the latest from the bargaining table, and what we can do to support these workers and their families.

Joining us will be U.S. Representative Rashida Tlaib and WFP National Director Maurice Mitchell to share their stories of solidarity and why the struggle for a fair contract matters for all of us.

So Peter Willis, join us and UAW President Shawn Fain, U.S. Representative Rashida Tlaib, WFP National Director Maurice Mitchell, and more movement leaders from around the country this Sunday, September 10th at 7pm ET.

When we organize, we win!

name: Tammy Baldwin
subject: I was in the hospital for three months
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
body:
| I am not going to let anyone make me forget where I came from or why I got into public service in the first place.
# [](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=1&akid=1127%2E35263%2EazJMl6)
Peter — When I was a child, I was diagnosed with a serious illness and spent three months in the hospital. When I got better, my grandparents, who raised me, began looking for an insurance policy that would cover me in the future. But they couldn’t find such a policy because of my previous illness. Not from any insurer. Not at any price. They had to pay for my health care out of pocket — and they had to make enormous sacrifices to do so — all because I was a child labeled with those words: **"pre-existing condition."** Peter, I got into public service because I saw my grandparents stay up late at night, worried sick that I would fall ill again and that they wouldn't be able to afford my care. No one should ever have to go through that. **Like 133 million Americans, I know what it's like to have the label "pre-existing condition" attached to my care — and before the _Affordable Care Act_ was passed, many of us could be denied coverage.** Today, insurance companies can no longer discriminate against someone based on their pre-existing condition. I championed health reform and fought to allow young people to stay on their parent’s insurance plan up to age 26. These policy changes have led to millions more Americans getting the health insurance they need. So, you can imagine my frustration whenever Republicans attack our health care or threaten protections for folks with pre-existing conditions — people like me. The GOP has spent years playing politics with people’s lives. And if Mitch McConnell and his Republican mega-donors flip my seat in Wisconsin and take hold of the Senate majority next election, countless Americans could find themselves in a place where insurance companies, once again, write all the rules. The people of Wisconsin did not send me to Washington to take people’s health care away, which is why I fought against Republican repeal efforts and why I will never back down. But I can’t defend the hard-fought progress we’ve made without your help, Peter. **[So today, I’m humbly asking: Will you make a donation to my reelection campaign to defend our Senate majority and prevent Republicans from rolling back the progress we’ve made expanding access to affordable health care?](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-sep23.1u6uGA&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230908_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=1127%2E35263%2EazJMl6)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2150?c0=tbe-em-sep23.g8eV4w&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230908_PM1_V1_S1&t=5&akid=1127%2E35263%2EazJMl6)
---
[CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2151?c0=tbe-em-sep23.saM6fI&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230908_PM1_V1_S1&t=6&akid=1127%2E35263%2EazJMl6)
---
| [CHIP IN $25 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2152?c0=tbe-em-sep23.z86uBZ&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230908_PM1_V1_S1&t=7&akid=1127%2E35263%2EazJMl6)
---
[CHIP IN $50 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2153?c0=tbe-em-sep23.TghmNL&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230908_PM1_V1_S1&t=8&akid=1127%2E35263%2EazJMl6)
---
| [CHIP IN $100 NOW](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2154?c0=tbe-em-sep23.d8D94V&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230908_PM1_V1_S1&t=9&akid=1127%2E35263%2EazJMl6)
---
[ANOTHER AMOUNT](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-sep23.1u6uGA&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230908_PM1_V1_S1&t=10&akid=1127%2E35263%2EazJMl6)
---
I am not going to let anyone make me forget where I came from or why I got into public service in the first place. My experience has always inspired my work to do everything I can to make sure that every American has quality, affordable health care coverage and stand up against those who want to take it away.
So long as you're with me, I know we can overcome any challenge we may face on the road ahead and stop the Republicans from taking away health insurance from millions of Americans once and for all. **[It starts by holding onto the Democratic Senate majority; chip in if you can.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-sep23.1u6uGA&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20230908_PM1_V1_S1&t=11&akid=1127%2E35263%2EazJMl6)**
Thank you for standing with me.
— Tammy
P.O. BOX 696 MADISON, WI 53701
**[www.tammybaldwin.com](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/67?t=2&akid=1127%2E35263%2EazJMl6) | [INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM](mailto:INFO@TAMMYBALDWIN.COM) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/68?t=3&akid=1127%2E35263%2EazJMl6)**
PAID FOR BY TAMMY BALDWIN FOR SENATE
---
If you would like to receive fewer emails, update your subscription preferences [here.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/signup/fewer-emails/?t=12&akid=1127%2E35263%2EazJMl6) If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please [unsubscribe.](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=13&akid=1127%2E35263%2EazJMl6)

name: Peter, Hakeem Jeffries
subject: I need your help, Peter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeffries for Congress
body:
---
| | [_**Peter, I need your eyes on this immediately. A new memo revealed that extreme MAGA Republicans plan to spend $100 million – and they’re prepared to use every penny to sabotage our chance to take back the House. | | _**My Prayers for Canada**_ By Sean Feucht
---
| | Last night, I was up late praying for this weekend's Let Us Worship revivals in Canada, specifically the cities of Ottawa, Calgary, and Vancouver. Canada may be a first-world democracy and one of the richest nations in the world, but in just the last few years we've watched pastors defy Canada's extreme COVID lockdowns by holding church services. The result? They were arrested. Similarly, when pastors protested child drag shows, they too were arrested. Simply put, Canada is a hostile environment for the Gospel. So many people have asked me over the last week why we would go to a place like Canada. My answer is simple: We are called to worship in the places needing the greatest breakthrough. Let Us Worship is a movement born out of the desire to see a Holy revival fall upon our nation. But the desire for revival is not held exclusively by us Americans—far from it!! **[FINISH READING ON SUBSTACK → https://seanfeucht.substack.com/p/my-prayers-for-canada](https://links.iterable.com/u/click?_t=dcac8242330e4c15a55d3b915d5debd3&_m=caaf3e86b67247f3b300662a06891607&_e=knlxErvKTZOycypS2F_ehRNfBEWRn2mD5gxq43qQo57Y0g81WnjHbZ8i2opOAz9qsOCsttUzU-thiwoLS74OFN6Qr_KmIViE6GzHlfGKzQUHFn0JksbsFwU_67HV4vBVvxtAmOjAUYqPYvMuwGxsGg56mzh3BCWf994q1AYMCU5YbJ96N-HAWzC8sT5MUVJVuRstXWY9LIgwUd4xDbNL_HtDThPzRlbfX3bQIy_MH11ovFX04f2Ykb0AhXcor--z3fh3YttupTPlyqNhJOsvRONy3YeNhDqO_gnfIFAxs2pv0XdNQWaw5QlnoK730y3ZKplLqIVfv7Qg-2fdMewTxw%3D%3D)**

|
Peter –
Dan Crenshaw here. As we prepare for Congress to return to session next Tuesday, I used this week to highlight some of the major energy and healthcare policy failures of the Biden Administration which absolutely must be addressed before it's too late. I also continued speaking out against the social contagion of "gender-affirming care" which is causing lifelong physical and mental suffering to thousands of minors.
Over the past 5 years of my service in Congress, contributions from supporters like you have made it possible to share our time-tested conservative principles with millions of Americans. Now more than ever, we need to fight back against the far-left's attacks on the truth and values which created and sustained the miracle of America. [Any donation, no matter how small, that you contribute to my re-election campaign will help me continue our mission to save this great country for the next generation.](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001H99rG6vszizs0UGj8PpIKhUeaLGcNOuFkYu5gnu4F_ozlYi7OSNtHqe-x_HGeKdFggQNNUiqtqnp1sZ2xs7vw8InJiuuM63VjY0A45fZpm27-Dfbl75pDx0fe2J2HZH-xoQ0Rx__PRTu1ONPAjyeqGtRgdoF123SZtw8Q_jDY83wb_oUXzIKauKk8AofhBwHNSOj0hxOfBImFm67TjNTmlpK3gtxF9qS7UWGu5PcZwuY1ZAfntAMmduLhdgGvJbJf2iaZn6Iw9ZH3y9QfMAHmu7hYNx3Qv8pk6cnUfzWWu7VCm28K-C1iybxaFWO-m3Z2u04MUMZwaa2svRI7lCCdbfbQ42taWoMcTKi-CwDhlA=&c=P9yTRSuSiXGe4qi9i_Vr960nJ_E4J8jeq0fAxkxW7YepZb8P69CNtQ==&ch=KyLChGDH-icriMcdlsiTaPDTTFuUrOgtkxW5buDA8UL_rHuQRcRv1Q==)
Now, here's your campaign brief:

| BIDEN JUST MADE IT HARDER TO TRANSPORT CLEAN, AFFORDABLE NATURAL GAS ACROSS AMERICA
---
| |
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001H99rG6vszizs0UGj8PpIKhUeaLGcNOuFkYu5gnu4F_ozlYi7OSNtHqe-x_HGeKdFU8Se24V8aYrmvghUzpnoBUG2248-MmAp6roTJAH0vpevaVVHv4Lr7QvU1wyfTFIb1W_hfO4dSm-CzFA2JoMJyU4F60skM6fIsn1gMGI_rf6WsoNhBReT-fXrZQE5qJs_cxbCf5Dlw3ymp7ovPorBD94xZf158bQTapsPiYyjLX4vE_74Nh0u6gpO_F2LTCfD_0OJD4R3NVomYlmedWGXpQ==&c=P9yTRSuSiXGe4qi9i_Vr960nJ_E4J8jeq0fAxkxW7YepZb8P69CNtQ==&ch=KyLChGDH-icriMcdlsiTaPDTTFuUrOgtkxW5buDA8UL_rHuQRcRv1Q==)

| [CLICK HERE OR ON THE IMAGE ABOVE TO READ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001H99rG6vszizs0UGj8PpIKhUeaLGcNOuFkYu5gnu4F_ozlYi7OSNtHqe-x_HGeKdFU8Se24V8aYrmvghUzpnoBUG2248-MmAp6roTJAH0vpevaVVHv4Lr7QvU1wyfTFIb1W_hfO4dSm-CzFA2JoMJyU4F60skM6fIsn1gMGI_rf6WsoNhBReT-fXrZQE5qJs_cxbCf5Dlw3ymp7ovPorBD94xZf158bQTapsPiYyjLX4vE_74Nh0u6gpO_F2LTCfD_0OJD4R3NVomYlmedWGXpQ==&c=P9yTRSuSiXGe4qi9i_Vr960nJ_E4J8jeq0fAxkxW7YepZb8P69CNtQ==&ch=KyLChGDH-icriMcdlsiTaPDTTFuUrOgtkxW5buDA8UL_rHuQRcRv1Q==)
---
| |
---
| Add this to the long list of Biden's attacks on American energy: he just reversed Trump's policy that allowed for liquified natural gas (LNG) to be shipped by rail.
While rail hasn't been a primary way to ship LNG, there's just no good reason to reverse a Trump-era policy that would have given LNG companies more flexibility when transporting their product -- except to appease radical environmentalist interest groups like the Sierra Club.
Here's why this matters: As natural gas production continues to grow, companies will need to transport it. By preventing LNG from being shipped on rails it is possible that we actually see an increase in accidents involving LNG transported by trucks.
It's simple: Natural gas provides dispatchable, affordable energy with much fewer emissions than other forms of fuels. In fact, natural gas is the primary reason we've been able to reduce emissions in America.
Average Americans are concerned about high energy costs, decreasing energy security, and general economic uncertainty.
Yet this administration is far more concerned with addressing the priorities of radical far-left environmentalists rather than those of average Americans.
Democrats should work with Republicans to pass legislation making it easier -- not harder -- to produce, transport, and utilize natural gas.
---
| |
---
| | |
---
| |
---
| EVEN DEMOCRATS ARE SPEAKING OUT AGAINST BIDEN'S CANCELLATION OF THESE ALASKAN ENERGY LEASES
---
|
---
| |
---
| On Wednesday President Biden canceled 7 Alaskan energy leases that were granted during the Trump Administration -- the same week that oil prices topped $90 a barrel for the first time since November 2022.
This move will have almost zero impact on global emissions. But it will hurt American energy security and contribute to rising prices at the pump.
Even Democrats like Alaska's [Rep. Mary Peltola](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001H99rG6vszizs0UGj8PpIKhUeaLGcNOuFkYu5gnu4F_ozlYi7OSNtHqe-x_HGeKdFqduE_gCuvJ6O9rz4nY7Zwdms53L5et4t6hRpQyrkMZfcoH9cpjg-oJcNteAhWrU6AzZo4XdYhwqLEOf8Ojev-BUAOdomPTpeBsJm1Ck_5uJS_EWtw-qft3WEFTz0Bf0k&c=P9yTRSuSiXGe4qi9i_Vr960nJ_E4J8jeq0fAxkxW7YepZb8P69CNtQ==&ch=KyLChGDH-icriMcdlsiTaPDTTFuUrOgtkxW5buDA8UL_rHuQRcRv1Q==) called the cancellations unlawful and harmful to the Alaskan Native Communities who are losing out from these canceled leases.
An administration that actually cared about America's energy sector would:
1\. Fast track permits for new oil & gas projects. 2\. Open additional leases for exploration and production. 3\. Rollback overzealous regulations and red tape.
Instead Biden has proven time and time again that he would rather destroy good-paying energy jobs, decrease our energy security, and exacerbate high fuel costs for Americans.

| BIDEN'S PRICE CONTROLS ARE KILLING FUTURE MEDICAL INNOVATIONS
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001H99rG6vszizs0UGj8PpIKhUeaLGcNOuFkYu5gnu4F_ozlYi7OSNtHqe-x_HGeKdFEftfUCrS12upvkdWSXLN4FWRYchu7-adIts_SXiv0zPMTKtGFpOYkiAR0MmVoYb2KKjpHSHiMirPds8Cht_cmEgSxMazpLs-o1H1awklpJrN_r15tfJioy2V6dMAgEd_jMSHzYzb6UVeVGfl_0gaQmdBsxyRiId48ejwd__bFPg6GIGfUrEEZjb6PrPksphYxTuwquOsMks=&c=P9yTRSuSiXGe4qi9i_Vr960nJ_E4J8jeq0fAxkxW7YepZb8P69CNtQ==&ch=KyLChGDH-icriMcdlsiTaPDTTFuUrOgtkxW5buDA8UL_rHuQRcRv1Q==)
---
| [CLICK HERE OR ON THE IMAGE ABOVE TO READ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001H99rG6vszizs0UGj8PpIKhUeaLGcNOuFkYu5gnu4F_ozlYi7OSNtHqe-x_HGeKdFEftfUCrS12upvkdWSXLN4FWRYchu7-adIts_SXiv0zPMTKtGFpOYkiAR0MmVoYb2KKjpHSHiMirPds8Cht_cmEgSxMazpLs-o1H1awklpJrN_r15tfJioy2V6dMAgEd_jMSHzYzb6UVeVGfl_0gaQmdBsxyRiId48ejwd__bFPg6GIGfUrEEZjb6PrPksphYxTuwquOsMks=&c=P9yTRSuSiXGe4qi9i_Vr960nJ_E4J8jeq0fAxkxW7YepZb8P69CNtQ==&ch=KyLChGDH-icriMcdlsiTaPDTTFuUrOgtkxW5buDA8UL_rHuQRcRv1Q==)
---
| The Biden Administration recently announced the first 10 drugs subject to the big government price controls under Medicare negotiation. The so-called "negotiation" is really anything but negotiation. It's just the government killing future medical innovations and raising long-term costs. That's all. Under the new law, selected drugmakers are given a timeline to accept the lowered government price. Make no mistake - the government holds all the cards and will tax the innovator to death at 95% of their U.S. earnings if they don't comply.
If all the drugs that were ever going to be invented had already been invented, if all the cures already existed, then one *might* make a moral case for price controls.
But that's not the case. We have a dire need for constant new innovation. What incentive will companies have to spend billions on research if they get the rug pulled out from under them?
In fact, a 2022 University of Chicago brief estimates a total [$663 billion dollar loss](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001H99rG6vszizs0UGj8PpIKhUeaLGcNOuFkYu5gnu4F_ozlYi7OSNtHqe-x_HGeKdFHPv83J0LEWiIwNoAkORUw0Jnp26aI5Rz8Y1jOblZWHCDur5r2DwLaAeCDaVsFQJqkUj4hIuXP74ZAtxxWCWjdac8pN4s4vOeszNDINaNri2LeejVXbsJPprqGUPdd-P0oxKb5-BLo4Buipddjo40P98pAb4ZCq9Uo3Jc93dpet45I0Epzzcbg8UEWx8pbW4sD3cR55_dvXEwEKk89QfC9d9oa9sx3pZKAihQETUJ5I0=&c=P9yTRSuSiXGe4qi9i_Vr960nJ_E4J8jeq0fAxkxW7YepZb8P69CNtQ==&ch=KyLChGDH-icriMcdlsiTaPDTTFuUrOgtkxW5buDA8UL_rHuQRcRv1Q==) in research and development investment, leading to at least 135 fewer medications.
On top of that, the [Congressional Budget Office](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001H99rG6vszizs0UGj8PpIKhUeaLGcNOuFkYu5gnu4F_ozlYi7OSNtHqe-x_HGeKdFN9W42AZbyhns_K0vaeYIBAz-Fn1v3eqMj-wCsWeM3LpFI4msjKP4t3cFORxHDO5-wbAmWJHYrB1-2Rzc9Y5qy__-_VMFBkLW0YyTgSTQisbjceH1ZJFAWeTh9P44FtNGPipxA58oRJQ=&c=P9yTRSuSiXGe4qi9i_Vr960nJ_E4J8jeq0fAxkxW7YepZb8P69CNtQ==&ch=KyLChGDH-icriMcdlsiTaPDTTFuUrOgtkxW5buDA8UL_rHuQRcRv1Q==) finds that so-called negotiation will "increase the launch prices for drugs that are not yet on the market relative to what such prices would be otherwise." In other words, the price of new cures will go up for everyone else.
So how do we lower drug prices? Innovation and competition. Let the free market work. That means creating a more streamlined regulatory process for over the counter drugs, removing anti competitive barriers to generic drugs, and expediting our approval of low cost, biosimilar alternatives to the costly biologics driving up drug costs. It seems like a simple idea, but price controls will only decrease access and increase health care costs over the long term.
To be clear, much of Big Pharma will do just fine with Biden's rule. They'll shift manufacturing and investment to "safe" drugs with known return on profits. Nothing new will be invested in.
Small biotech startups trying to cure cancer? Good luck. Now, no one will want to invest. They'll just start disappearing.

| I recently introduced [H.R. 3887](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001H99rG6vszizs0UGj8PpIKhUeaLGcNOuFkYu5gnu4F_ozlYi7OSNtHqe-x_HGeKdFF1HhkhrRNMs6e0RLt2NiZAxiLnNULDGia01k2gsdfZuBBYKRQnEeLg4mzgRa5vsArXZ1XEVmSGaoFYdla-4WGfyPWI_efcbLqJw9KZuarCThMcALKJNoGjsJKbltJBiU_0xvK0EomRg=&c=P9yTRSuSiXGe4qi9i_Vr960nJ_E4J8jeq0fAxkxW7YepZb8P69CNtQ==&ch=KyLChGDH-icriMcdlsiTaPDTTFuUrOgtkxW5buDA8UL_rHuQRcRv1Q==), which would ban program funding for children's hospitals that perform gender-transition therapy/surgery on minors. This bill is how we, as legislators, can fight back against this lunacy plaguing our medical institutions.
This should be an easy bill for my Democrat colleagues to support. As I noted in my recent op-ed for [Newsweek](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001H99rG6vszizs0UGj8PpIKhUeaLGcNOuFkYu5gnu4F_ozlYi7OSNtHmFrxSoct6LBhGJPyhg4_FR0Xb4H0iEEl2TBd7tXeOHzjRgyCSSbNVUkPVcSGN-R0UIoBIDovRnHp7QICxD6nQAuxvlTnK6J5ep5-qqDD6IQ5hKtQdCkt0uLdfU4yeF6qrY_BcrtPweMrRTk9KItwCBg7v9FdEB9F-4aWYvztJtRB7y0cw4dk6X2XPnj43tukg==&c=P9yTRSuSiXGe4qi9i_Vr960nJ_E4J8jeq0fAxkxW7YepZb8P69CNtQ==&ch=KyLChGDH-icriMcdlsiTaPDTTFuUrOgtkxW5buDA8UL_rHuQRcRv1Q==), none of them would seriously declare that they believed any of this harmful pseudoscience nonsense about "gender-affirming care" for minors even 10 years ago.
Watch the clip above to learn more about my bill and hear [Chloe Cole](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001H99rG6vszizs0UGj8PpIKhUeaLGcNOuFkYu5gnu4F_ozlYi7OSNtHqe-x_HGeKdFmO-dWTaTfXEYLXE1g-bUacbEnUKnM4bQ5fulhVJZ1x-1JmISh4KGi8CC6zHRYpUa0bBWpDp-KeN-RRgxl2NTmw==&c=P9yTRSuSiXGe4qi9i_Vr960nJ_E4J8jeq0fAxkxW7YepZb8P69CNtQ==&ch=KyLChGDH-icriMcdlsiTaPDTTFuUrOgtkxW5buDA8UL_rHuQRcRv1Q==)'s powerful testimony before Congress about the grotesque manipulation she experienced as a 12-year old girl from doctors, psychiatrists, and online peer pressure.
I challenge any of my Democrat colleagues to look Chloe in the eyes and tell her that her decision to begin taking puberty blockers at 12, and get a double mastectomy at 15, was not driven by a social contagion that's promulgated on the internet and reinforced by reckless doctors who fall back on unscientific studies to defend their atrocious actions. This madness has to end, and my bill is an important first step.

clean_body: | | | | | | | | == | Peter – Dan Crenshaw here. As we prepare for Congress to return to session next Tuesday, I used this week to highlight some of the major energy and healthcare policy failures of the Biden Administration which absolutely must be addressed before it's too late. I also continued speaking out against the social contagion of "gender-affirming care" which is causing lifelong physical and mental suffering to thousands of minors. Over the past 5 years of my service in Congress, contributions from supporters like you have made it possible to share our time-tested conservative principles with millions of Americans. Now more than ever, we need to fight back against the far-left's attacks on the truth and values which created and sustained the miracle of America. == Now, here's your campaign brief: | | | | | | | | BIDEN JUST MADE IT HARDER TO TRANSPORT CLEAN, AFFORDABLE NATURAL GAS ACROSS AMERICA | | | == | == | | | Add this to the long list of Biden's attacks on American energy: he just reversed Trump's policy that allowed for liquified natural gas (LNG) to be shipped by rail. While rail hasn't been a primary way to ship LNG, there's just no good reason to reverse a Trump-era policy that would have given LNG companies more flexibility when transporting their product -- except to appease radical environmentalist interest groups like the Sierra Club. Here's why this matters: As natural gas production continues to grow, companies will need to transport it. By preventing LNG from being shipped on rails it is possible that we actually see an increase in accidents involving LNG transported by trucks. It's simple: Natural gas provides dispatchable, affordable energy with much fewer emissions than other forms of fuels. In fact, natural gas is the primary reason we've been able to reduce emissions in America. Average Americans are concerned about high energy costs, decreasing energy security, and general economic uncertainty. Yet this administration is far more concerned with addressing the priorities of radical far-left environmentalists rather than those of average Americans. Democrats should work with Republicans to pass legislation making it easier -- not harder -- to produce, transport, and utilize natural gas. | | | | | | | | EVEN DEMOCRATS ARE SPEAKING OUT AGAINST BIDEN'S CANCELLATION OF THESE ALASKAN ENERGY LEASES | | | | On Wednesday President Biden canceled 7 Alaskan energy leases that were granted during the Trump Administration -- the same week that oil prices topped $90 a barrel for the first time since November 2022. This move will have almost zero impact on global emissions. But it will hurt American energy security and contribute to rising prices at the pump. Even Democrats like Alaska's == called the cancellations unlawful and harmful to the Alaskan Native Communities who are losing out from these canceled leases. An administration that actually cared about America's energy sector would: 1\. Fast track permits for new oil & gas projects. 2\. Open additional leases for exploration and production. 3\. Rollback overzealous regulations and red tape. Instead Biden has proven time and time again that he would rather destroy good-paying energy jobs, decrease our energy security, and exacerbate high fuel costs for Americans. | | | | | | | | BIDEN'S PRICE CONTROLS ARE KILLING FUTURE MEDICAL INNOVATIONS | == | == | The Biden Administration recently announced the first 10 drugs subject to the big government price controls under Medicare negotiation. The so-called "negotiation" is really anything but negotiation. It's just the government killing future medical innovations and raising long-term costs. That's all. Under the new law, selected drugmakers are given a timeline to accept the lowered government price. Make no mistake - the government holds all the cards and will tax the innovator to death at 95% of their U.S. earnings if they don't comply. If all the drugs that were ever going to be invented had already been invented, if all the cures already existed, then one might make a moral case for price controls. But that's not the case. We have a dire need for constant new innovation. What incentive will companies have to spend billions on research if they get the rug pulled out from under them? In fact, a 2022 University of Chicago brief estimates a total == in research and development investment, leading to at least 135 fewer medications. On top of that, the == finds that so-called negotiation will "increase the launch prices for drugs that are not yet on the market relative to what such prices would be otherwise." In other words, the price of new cures will go up for everyone else. So how do we lower drug prices? Innovation and competition. Let the free market work. That means creating a more streamlined regulatory process for over the counter drugs, removing anti competitive barriers to generic drugs, and expediting our approval of low cost, biosimilar alternatives to the costly biologics driving up drug costs. It seems like a simple idea, but price controls will only decrease access and increase health care costs over the long term. To be clear, much of Big Pharma will do just fine with Biden's rule. They'll shift manufacturing and investment to "safe" drugs with known return on profits. Nothing new will be invested in. Small biotech startups trying to cure cancer? Good luck. Now, no one will want to invest. They'll just start disappearing. | | | | | | | | == | | | == | | | | | | | | RISING TRENDS OF MINORS TRANSITIONING ARE FUELED BY SOCIAL MEDIA AND RECKLESS DOCTORS | == | == | I recently introduced ==, which would ban program funding for children's hospitals that perform gender-transition therapy/surgery on minors. This bill is how we, as legislators, can fight back against this lunacy plaguing our medical institutions. This should be an easy bill for my Democrat colleagues to support. As I noted in my recent op-ed for ==, none of them would seriously declare that they believed any of this harmful pseudoscience nonsense about "gender-affirming care" for minors even 10 years ago. Watch the clip above to learn more about my bill and hear powerful testimony before Congress about the grotesque manipulation she experienced as a 12-year old girl from doctors, psychiatrists, and online peer pressure. I challenge any of my Democrat colleagues to look Chloe in the eyes and tell her that her decision to begin taking puberty blockers at 12, and get a double mastectomy at 15, was not driven by a social contagion that's promulgated on the internet and reinforced by reckless doctors who fall back on unscientific studies to defend their atrocious actions. This madness has to end, and my bill is an important first step. | | | | | | | | ON SOCIAL MEDIA | | | == | == | == | == | | | | | | | | NEWS | WASHINGTON EXAMINER: == WSJ: == NATIONAL REVIEW: == | That's it for this week's campaign brief. Thank you for reading and staying informed. Have a great weekend! | In Service, | | Dan Crenshaw | | | | | | | | Was this email forwarded to you? == to get the latest updates on the fight in Washington direct from me. Any questions, comments, or concerns? Simply reply to this email or give Team Crenshaw a call at 281-888-4016. These updates are only possible with the generous gift of supporters like you! If you'd like to donate by check, please make your check payable and mail to: Dan Crenshaw for Congress, 5900 Memorial Drive, Suite 215, Houston, TX 77007. | | | == == == | | | | | | PAID FOR BY DAN CRENSHAW FOR CONGRESS | | Dan Crenshaw for Congress | 5900 Memorial Drive, Suite 215, Houston, TX 77007 | | Sent by mailto:dan.crenshaw@crenshawforcongress.com

body:
The Party Line — An Indiana Republican Party Newsletter
| | |
---
| |
# **A Message from the Chairwoman**
---
| |
# _60 Days!_
---
Team,

With Labor Day behind us, we are officially in crunch time as we head toward Election Day. Over the next 60 days, we will need all hands-on deck across the Hoosier state to elect strong Republican leaders who will make our cities and towns thrive. For us to be successful this November, it's going to take grassroots leaders like you stepping up to help our candidates.

If you're wondering how you can get involved, we can point you in the right direction. First, sign up to help candidates in your area. We need door knockers, phone callers, texters, donors, and more! If you have a desire to help power our grassroots operations, we can get you plugged into operations in your county. All of these efforts are critical to taking our message to voters and activating them to _**get out and vote!**_

Please, sign up today to help our hard-working municipal candidates. Together, I am confident that we can deliver victories across our state this November.
---
---
| |
# **Governor Eric Holcomb's Week in Review**
---
| |
# ✅ _READI 2.0_
---
---
| | _**Governor Eric Holcomb** participates in a groundbreaking for a playground funded by READI 1.0 last year._**
---
This week,**Governor Eric Holcomb **officially rolled out READI 2.0, the second edition of the state's Regional Economic Acceleration and Development Initiative (READI).
* This was a part of his 2023 Next Level Agenda, and was approved by the Indiana General Assembly in this year’s legislative session.
* The second round of $500 million was a direct response to the significant demand for quality of place investments from communities across the state.

**What he's saying:** "Innovation knows no boundaries and there’s no limit to what can be accomplished when we work together to better the lives of Hoosiers," said **Gov. Holcomb**.
* “This transformative program will fund projects that lean into a region's strengths while building community gathering places, accessible parks, performing arts centers and expanding the trail system that will have generational impact across each region and with every person who visits our great state. In Indiana, there is no greater priority for us as leaders than to work in unison to improve Indiana’s standing as the best location to live, work, play, study and stay”

**What else happened this week?****Gov. Holcomb**[shared a video update](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/122647742b217740/cee36582c51d7076c3d6b838967d376c/40313) from the one-and-only**Dolly Parton** about Indiana's expansion of the Dolly Parton Imagination Library.******
* To stay up-to-date, follow **Gov. Holcomb** on [Facebook](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/122647742b217740/f403e3d053a934e3c3d6b838967d376c/40313) or [Twitter](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/122647742b217740/e277d4cde8fddb76c3d6b838967d376c/40313).

---
| |
# **Notable and Newsworthy**
---
| |
# 🏙️ _Read Our Candidate Features_
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/122647742b217740/de5e723f1c729992c3d6b838967d376c/40313)
---
We've long talked about our deep bench of talent across the state. And in this year's municipal elections, it's certainly showing. You can read our quick Q&As; with multiple candidates and take action to support their candidacies by visiting our [website](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/122647742b217740/f2788cd973e01387c3d6b838967d376c/40313). **Be on the lookout:** More will be shared next week! **Are you a mayoral candidate that would like to be featured? **[Reach out](mailto:lthomas@indiana.gop?subject=2023%20candidate%20feature "lthomas@indiana.gop") to us.
---
|
---
# 📰 _ICYMI: National Review: National Archives Confirms Existence of 5,400 Emails, Records Containing Alleged VP Biden Pseudonyms_
---
From [_National Review_](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/122647742b217740/ba6f9c9ad1318d08c3d6b838967d376c/40313) _:_ "The National Archives and Records Administration has confirmed that it is in possession of nearly 5,400 emails, electronic records, and documents containing pseudonyms President Biden used as vice president. "Legal non-profit Southeastern Legal Foundation filed a Freedom of Information Act request in June 2022 for the records. Those included emails containing the names Robin Ware, Robert L. Peters and JRB Ware, pseudonyms Biden used while serving in the Obama administration, according to House Republicans investigating Hunter Biden’s overseas business dealings. "On Monday, the legal organization sued NARA to obtain the records, which it alleges could reveal that Biden shared confidential government knowledge with his son." _[Story continues](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/122647742b217740/b1f89d28a7e65f67c3d6b838967d376c/40313)[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/122647742b217740/3f07c735459b1437c3d6b838967d376c/40313)[.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/122647742b217740/b263f5ae60ea1375c3d6b838967d376c/40313)_
---
|
---
# 📋 _Sign Up to Work the Polls_
---
[](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/122647742b217740/1c2d490d0acfcc03c3d6b838967d376c/40313)
---
Help ensure fair and transparent elections in your local community! **So:** Our elections depend on dedicated Hoosiers stepping up and actively participating in the process. That doesn't just mean voting, but volunteering to make sure every vote counts. **Sooo:** If you care about fair and transparent elections, we encourage you to volunteer to become a poll worker this November.
* **Depending on what county you live in, you can earn up to $150 for your time.**

**Take action:** If your interested in working the polls, click the button below and send us your information. We will then forward it to your local county Republican Party chairperson.
---
[Share Your Interest](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/122647742b217740/1df1540c922e18a2c3d6b838967d376c/40313)
---
|
---
# 📰 _WIBQ: Groundbreaking Ceremony for $1.5B Facility Coming to Vigo County_
---
From _[WIBQ:](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/122647742b217740/0340279fa130f539c3d6b838967d376c/40313)_ "An exciting day for Vigo County and the state of Indiana – that was the collective message spoken by numerous state, local, and company officials as ENTEK held a groundbreaking for its upcoming $1.5B lithium battery separator manufacturing facility. "The investment is ENTEK’s largest investment to date. The groundbreaking began at 10 a.m. Wednesday with comments from company officials about why they chose Vigo County to house the planned 345-acre facility.

"Larry Keith, CEO of ENTEK, said they looked at several building sites but after meeting local leaders he said the decision to come to Terre Haute was easy.

“'They’re just very welcoming. The education system here in this state is top-notch. Ivy Tech and all the other high-level education was just amazing to us,' Keith said." _[Story continues.](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/122647742b217740/a2d085178a031ca8c3d6b838967d376c/40313)_
---
|
---
# 🗳️ _Less Than 60 Days to Go_

---
We are officially less than 60 days until Election Day and there are plenty of important dates you need to be aware of. **Make a plan:** Add these dates into your calendar and make a plan to vote this fall.
* Sept. 23, 2023: Absentee ballots begin to be mailed
* Oct. 10, 2023: Voter registration ends
* Oct. 11, 2023: Early voting begins
* Oct. 26, 2023: Deadline to request an absentee ballot
* Oct. 6, 2023: Early voting ends and absentee ballots due at noon
* **Nov. 7, 2023: ELECTION DAY**

Visit [indianavoters.com](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/122647742b217740/a75847b3659536bac3d6b838967d376c/40313) today!
---
|
---
# _Upcoming Events Across the State_

---
September 15: [Brown County Lincoln Day Dinner](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/122647742b217740/61c31d37ee2fc9fec3d6b838967d376c/40313) September 21: [Whitley County Hog Roast](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/122647742b217740/bd589b02e007b17ac3d6b838967d376c/40313) September 24: [Cass County Fall Fun-raiser](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/122647742b217740/dda159865db4f390c3d6b838967d376c/40313) _Events past these dates are available on our website and will be added to the newsletter as we approach them._
---
[Submit Your Event](mailto:lthomas@indiana.gop?subject=Information%20for%20Upcoming%20GOP%20Event)
---
|

# _News You Can Use_

---
**Governor Eric Holcomb** [speaks](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/122647742b217740/127d94c39a10b340c3d6b838967d376c/40313) during reopening of biofuels facility in Cloverdale **Lt. Gov. Suzanne Crouch**[speaks](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/122647742b217740/8aaade04338c9859c3d6b838967d376c/40313) during Civic Learning Symposium** ** **Secretary of State Diego Morales** [announces](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/122647742b217740/04b45e69a068c3bac3d6b838967d376c/40313) election improvement grant funding **Attorney General Todd Rokita** [releases](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/122647742b217740/c1c126c1eb06475ac3d6b838967d376c/40313) statement on ACLU lawsuit against IDOC **State Comptroller Tera Klutz** [presents](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/122647742b217740/d1a38f9f244335cec3d6b838967d376c/40313) Indiana’s fiscal year-end report **Treasurer of State Daniel Elliott** [speaks during](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/122647742b217740/1474b9aebc1017aac3d6b838967d376c/40313) Indiana County Treasurers Association meeting** **U.S. Sen. Todd Young** [remembers](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/122647742b217740/cc1942eb15b43fc7c3d6b838967d376c/40313) Hoosier and American service members killed in Kabul two years ago **U.S. Sen. Mike Braun** [speaks out](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/122647742b217740/afe28a4dc8fec248c3d6b838967d376c/40313) about latest revision to WOTUS rule **Congressman Rudy Yakym** [accepting](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/122647742b217740/ac71503715973528c3d6b838967d376c/40313) nominations for U.S. Service academies **Congressman Jim Banks** [discusses](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/122647742b217740/6923df0504f4f0adc3d6b838967d376c/40313) NARA finding emails linked to President Biden's pseudonym **Congressman Jim Baird** [meets with](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/122647742b217740/40a1ca6a9192d305c3d6b838967d376c/40313) Prosperity Indiana and Hoosier Housing Needs Coalition **Congresswoman Victoria Spartz** [congratulates](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/122647742b217740/fc6f575ea1d27a13c3d6b838967d376c/40313) district native Judge Paul Felix for his appointment to Indiana Court of Appeals **Congressman Greg Pence** [remembers](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/122647742b217740/0a6ee1c4cdf85717c3d6b838967d376c/40313) 13 service members killed in Kabul two years ago **Congressman Larry Bucshon** [speaks during](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/122647742b217740/9268223e0fd97fc0c3d6b838967d376c/40313) 110th annual meeting of the Terre Haute Chamber of Commerce **Congresswoman Erin Houchin** [stops by](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/f7f15e9875c39250df60ac364a9f256a/40313/122647742b217740/5b7febe14b867ff5c3d6b838967d376c/40313) Scott County Family YMCA

Peter,
I wanted to make sure you heard the good news! This morning, The Congressional Hispanic Caucus BOLD PAC announced they’re endorsing our campaign for Congress. Receiving the endorsement from CHC BOLD PAC isn't just a nod to our campaign; it's a powerful affirmation of the critical role diversity and representation play in our democracy. As the sole Latina candidate for Arizona's third congressional district, I carry the weight and promise of that representation.
This endorsement isn't just for me; it's a milestone for every voice striving for equity, justice, and inclusivity in our political arena. It fuels my commitment to work relentlessly for a brighter, more inclusive future for all.
Will you join BOLD PAC and our grassroots movement by donating $5 or more to our campaign today? >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upliftteran?refcode=X_090823_BOLD&amount=5]
A ganar,
Raquel Terán

body: ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=8824c582532ccee96bf07a922868bf283c7379a25c1257e1f25b43783160fc8835a3d60d5d9a92b6c83bd8208a8ce340c1052489d1761025cc1e88c0e2034d24 Peter, You may have seen my name in the news a lot over the past couple days. A new poll was just released that shows I am STOMPING on Biden by 6 points, and I’m the ONLY candidate who can defeat him in the general election. Which brings me to an important story I want to remind you of… → I’ve been the underdog in every race I’ve run. → I was an outsider when I ran for South Carolina’s state legislature against a 30-year incumbent. A week before the primary, I was polling at 15 percent. → When I ran for governor, I was the least funded, and the least known GOP candidate in the race. A few months before Election Day, I was polling in fourth place. → I’ve been the underdog each time — and I’ve never lost an election. https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=8824c582532ccee96bf07a922868bf283c7379a25c1257e1f25b43783160fc8835a3d60d5d9a92b6c83bd8208a8ce340c1052489d1761025cc1e88c0e2034d24 Now, will you help me win the most important election yet? https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=8824c582532ccee96bf07a922868bf283c7379a25c1257e1f25b43783160fc8835a3d60d5d9a92b6c83bd8208a8ce340c1052489d1761025cc1e88c0e2034d24 https://click.email.nikkihaley.com/?qs=8824c582532ccee96bf07a922868bf283c7379a25c1257e1f25b43783160fc8835a3d60d5d9a92b6c83bd8208a8ce340c1052489d1761025cc1e88c0e2034d24 RUSH SUPPORT Winning the White House was never going to be easy. I knew getting into this race that it would take a lot of hard work, determination, and a strong group of grassroots supporters to get this done. We’re making huge strides, but this work is far from over. I want to tell you a bit about myself and why I’m running for President of the United States. I’m running for President because my parents came to America more than 50 years ago – an America that was strong and proud, and full of opportunities. I want them to know that America again. I’m running for President as a military spouse. My husband is deployed and I want him and his military brothers and sisters to know their sacrifice means something – that we do love this country. I’m running for President for the future of our kids. I have a daughter who just got married and I saw how hard it was for her and her husband to buy a home. I’m doing this for my son who’s a senior in college and shouldn’t have to worry about saying things on a paper that he doesn’t believe in just to get an A. I’m running for my daughter, my son, and our future generations. I want them to experience the freedom and opportunity that the American Dream has to offer. I’m running for President because we have a country to save! I’ve seen that even on our worst days, we are blessed to live in America. But I also know that under Biden’s leadership, times are tough, our future is slipping, and America can be doing so much better. As governor, I was dubbed a “jobs governor” because I slashed our unemployment rate, brought jobs back to our state, and shepherded in a successful economic recovery. At the UN I fought for America, made sure our allies knew we had their backs, stood up for Israel even when others refused, and stood up to murderers and dictators to let them know that America was taking names. I know how to make America strong and proud because I’ve done it before. And I’ll do it as your next President.
