clean_body: Trump’s false promises| | | | | Another day, another unfulfilled promise from Donald J. Trump, Folks. If I had a dollar for every time Trump failed to deliver, I’d have enough dollars to build the border wall. We need it too because, despite Trump’s promises to make Mexico pay for the border wall, we haven’t seen a single peso from Mexico. We’ve had unused border wall materials sitting around and being wasted since Trump’s presidency – and Joe Biden is only continuing Trump’s legacy of dropping the ball. It’s time to build the wall, secure our border, and stop the criminals, human traffickers, and cartels who are taking advantage of our weak leaders. Thank you, Chris Christie | | | | | | | | ---|---|---|---

name: ElissaSlotkin.org
subject: A Republican has entered this race
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Friend —

There's some big news in our Senate race: **Former Michigan Congressman, Mike Rogers, announced he is running for the Republican nomination for the open Senate seat here in Michigan.** | [CONTRIBUTE NOW »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52481?t=6&akid=10316%2E878179%2E2prCxe)
---
So what does this mean for us?

Mike Rogers’ announcement sets up a competitive and expensive election for the U.S. Senate in Michigan. **Recent polling has shown that the Presidential and Senate races are both statistical dead-heats, which means we’ll have two close races to win in Michigan next year.**

We know Mike will try to paint himself as a moderate in this race – but his record in Congress speaks for itself. He was repeatedly one of the top recipients of PAC money in all of Congress, and the special interests always got a great return on their investment: Mike protected the companies that shipped Michigan’s jobs to China, supported Big Pharma’s efforts to keep drug prices high, and even voted to cut Medicare and Social Security.

We know that Mike supports extreme bans on abortion even in the cases of rape, incest, and a common miscarriage.

While there are still other candidates who might jump in the race, National Republicans have made it clear that Michigan is one of their top priorities in their efforts to take control of the Senate and the White House. That means we need to use this moment and send a clear message that, no matter who our eventual opponent is, this will not be an easy seat to flip in 2024.

So given this important inflection point in the campaign: [_Would you consider splitting a donation of $10 between Elissa Slotkin’s campaign for Senate and the Voter Protection Project? The amount isn’t as important as the donation itself, because every one sends a message about the strength of our grassroots campaign._](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52481?t=7&akid=10316%2E878179%2E2prCxe)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Elissa Slotkin and VPP will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52482?t=8&akid=10316%2E878179%2E2prCxe)
---

[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/52486?t=12&akid=10316%2E878179%2E2prCxe)
Things just got interesting!

| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=10316%2E878179%2E2prCxe). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=10316%2E878179%2E2prCxe).**

clean_body: Help us keep up the momentum to defend this critical seat. | Peter, In the upcoming 2024 election, where the House majority is once again up for grabs, all eyes are on 12 critical toss-up seats and Arizona’s 6th Congressional District is on the list. Our district is listed as the most evenly divided district in the country, showcasing the work we have cut out for us to defend this all-important seat. But because of all our hard work over the past few months, our race has been listed as Tilt Republican, giving us a razor thin advantage. To win this seat once again and defend our narrow majority we have to keep up the momentum – and I’m counting on my top grassroots supporters like YOU to help. We are narrowly holding on to the House with a 5-seat majority. As 1 of the 5 seats that gave Republicans control of the House, we have become a top target for the Left. And now that our race is labeled Title Republican the radical Left will be doubling down on their efforts to gain on our lead. We can’t let that happen. The future of the country and the American Dream is at stake as the radical Left does everything they can to destroy it. It’s up to us to FIGHT BACK and win to continue the fight for a better future for all. Thank you, Rep. Juan Ciscomani Arizona’s 6th Congressional District PAID FOR BY CISCOMANI FOR CONGRESS P.O. Box 35103 Tucson, AZ 85740

name: Team Lucas
subject: A note about our September 30th deadline
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
We know it’s early. But here’s why we need to stay on track:
#
Peter,
The next big test for our campaign — our third end-of-quarter FEC fundraising deadline — is coming up on September 30th.
Before we ask you to **[add a donation of any amount to help our campaign stay on track this quarter,](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36363?refcode=em20230908-3720&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=3720%2E614464%2Eg3GpDt) will you please let us share more about what this deadline means for our movement here in Missouri?**
**[CHIP IN NOW →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36363?refcode=em20230908-3720&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=3720%2E614464%2Eg3GpDt)**
Every three months, the Federal Election Commission requires every candidate running for federal office to submit the full report of their campaign’s fundraising numbers into the public record — everything from how much we’ve raised, how many donations we’ve received, and who we’ve received those donations from.
These quarterly reports are an important measure of transparency. They give the public an opportunity to look under the hood of our grassroots movement and hold us accountable. But everyday people aren’t the only ones paying attention.
GOP insiders, members of the media, and even Josh Hawley himself will have access to all this information too — and they’ll use it to make all kinds of judgments about the strength of our campaign. So here’s the reality:
**We outraised Hawley’s campaign over the first half of this year, but we can’t take outraising him for granted this quarter** — ESPECIALLY since national Republicans and corporate mega-donors have already shown their willingness to spend millions to make Hawley look strong and fund attacks against Lucas.
So we need all hands on deck this month, Peter. We need this grassroots team to show up, and when we submit our report after September 30th, we need your name to be on it.
**That’s why we’re asking earlier than normal:[Will you help our campaign stay on track to have another record-breaking fundraising quarter by adding a donation of $25, $10, or whatever you think is best today? Lucas isn’t taking a cent from corporate PACs or shady mega-donors in this race, so we’re counting on working people like you every step of the way.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36363?refcode=em20230908-3720&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=3720%2E614464%2Eg3GpDt)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36364?refcode=em20230908-3720&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=4&akid=3720%2E614464%2Eg3GpDt) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36364?refcode=em20230908-3720&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=5&akid=3720%2E614464%2Eg3GpDt) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36364?refcode=em20230908-3720&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=6&akid=3720%2E614464%2Eg3GpDt) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36364?refcode=em20230908-3720&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=7&akid=3720%2E614464%2Eg3GpDt) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36364?refcode=em20230908-3720&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=8&akid=3720%2E614464%2Eg3GpDt) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36364?refcode=em20230908-3720&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=9&akid=3720%2E614464%2Eg3GpDt) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/36363?refcode=em20230908-3720&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=3720%2E614464%2Eg3GpDt)

Let’s prove to everyone that we’re building the grassroots movement that can defeat Josh Hawley, flip Missouri’s Senate seat, and take back power for working people in 2024!
We’re so glad to have you on this team, Peter.
Team Lucas Kunce

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lk-email-footer?refcode=em20230908-3720-footer&t=11&refcode2=3720_614464_g3GpDt&akid=3720%2E614464%2Eg3GpDt)**

name: =?utf-8?Q?Max=20Ukropina?=
subject: 📈 QUIZ: how big is Biden's budget deficit?
body:
We all know Washington has a bad spending problem. But do you know HOW bad? |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| Hi Peter, it's Max.

We all know Joe Biden and the career politicians in Washington have a massive spending problem.

_But do you know just HOW big Biden's latest budget deficit is? _

I read a report this week projecting that _**Biden's out-of-control budget deficit will DOUBLE from last year to a shocking $2 TRILLION.**_

Thanks to leaders from both parties, our country is now nearly $33 trillion in debt. This is unsustainable. This is why I opposed the debt ceiling suspension earlier this summer. **I believe the time for kicking the can down the road is over.**

I don't want to go to Washington to be a wallflower. I'm running for Congress to be an unapologetic conservative voice for cutting spending, reducing the debt, and balancing the budget. I mean it.

It'll be a tough fight. It's worth having ... but I need to know if Orange County's conservatives will be with me on this.
[**_Can you add your name so I know we're in this fight to cut spending together?_**](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=18b0938e5d&e=86e91e802d)
---
| [ADD YOUR NAME >>>](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=3570534a30&e=86e91e802d "ADD YOUR NAME >>>")
---
| The government's interest payments on the federal debt are skyrocketing.

Even worse, out-of-control national debt drives up interest rates on everyday Americans like you and me.

The time for procrastination is over. Our future is at stake.

I'm willing to go to Washington and fight to save our country ... **[but](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=5db6044826&e=86e91e802d)[ ](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=29d0a66816&e=86e91e802d)[I need to know if you'll ](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=f476c41b65&e=86e91e802d)[have my back.](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=1b4c9af2ea&e=86e91e802d)**

I am confident we can turn our budget outlook around if we're standing together.

Max Ukropina
---
| [ ](https://maxforoc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=0d5d4fbfb4ace920581f6c90d&id=5fe49bcc89&e=86e91e802d)
---

clean_body: We all know Washington has a bad spending problem. But do you know HOW bad? | | | | | | Hi Peter, it's Max. We all know Joe Biden and the career politicians in Washington have a massive spending problem. But do you know just HOW big Biden's latest budget deficit is? I read a report this week projecting that Biden's out-of-control budget deficit will DOUBLE from last year to a shocking $2 TRILLION. Thanks to leaders from both parties, our country is now nearly $33 trillion in debt. This is unsustainable. This is why I opposed the debt ceiling suspension earlier this summer. I believe the time for kicking the can down the road is over. I don't want to go to Washington to be a wallflower. I'm running for Congress to be an unapologetic conservative voice for cutting spending, reducing the debt, and balancing the budget. I mean it. It'll be a tough fight. It's worth having ... but I need to know if Orange County's conservatives will be with me on this. | "ADD YOUR NAME >>>" | The government's interest payments on the federal debt are skyrocketing. Even worse, out-of-control national debt drives up interest rates on everyday Americans like you and me. The time for procrastination is over. Our future is at stake. I'm willing to go to Washington and fight to save our country ... I am confident we can turn our budget outlook around if we're standing together. Max Ukropina | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2023 Max Ukropina for Congress, All rights reserved.

body:
All eyes will be on Northeast Ohio, Peter, so we can’t afford to fall short.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69425045/426100551/-1741698823?refcode=em_fr_2023.09.08_b1_esft_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzcyYTU5ZC03NDRlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rF8XgZr5vl7-jrUbf-waDTdgktSeQz7-mhC2FrAUq_E=) Peter, at the end of the month, our campaign will face a critical deadline.

**After September 30th, we will publicly report our quarterly fundraising numbers to the Federal Election Commission,** and everyone — **from the Washington Republicans targeting Emilia to the political pundits calling our race a pure toss-up** — will look through our report to gauge whether our grassroots team has what it takes to bring home another historic victory next November.

[**To ensure we can put forward the strongest possible fundraising report, our team has set an ambitious goal of raising $20,000 in September. All eyes will be on Northeast Ohio, Peter, so we can’t afford to fall short. Is there any amount you can chip in today to help us get a head start on our end-of-quarter goal?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69425046/426100552/-1741698823?refcode=em_fr_2023.09.08_b1_esft_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzcyYTU5ZC03NDRlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rF8XgZr5vl7-jrUbf-waDTdgktSeQz7-mhC2FrAUq_E=) | [**CHIP IN**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69425047/426100553/-1741698823?refcode=em_fr_2023.09.08_b1_esft_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzcyYTU5ZC03NDRlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rF8XgZr5vl7-jrUbf-waDTdgktSeQz7-mhC2FrAUq_E=)

Last November, [**it was the continuous support of this grassroots team**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69425048/426100554/-1741698823?refcode=em_fr_2023.09.08_b1_esft_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzcyYTU5ZC03NDRlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rF8XgZr5vl7-jrUbf-waDTdgktSeQz7-mhC2FrAUq_E=) that enabled us to defy the odds and bring home a win for the Birthplace of Champions.

Our campaign wasn’t fueled by the right-wing dark-money groups that propped up Emilia’s opponent. **Instead, we were powered by hardworking Ohio families who chipped in what they could, when they could, because they believed a better future for Northeast Ohio was possible.**

Now, as MAGA Republicans aim to flip OH-13 to hold on to their fragile Majority, **we need to show that we’re up for the challenge once again.** _But we can’t do that without your help, Peter._

[**This end-of-quarter deadline will be a defining moment for our re-election campaign, so we’re asking for your full support. Will you pitch in $5, $25, or whatever makes sense for you to help us chip away at our $20,000 September goal?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69425049/426100555/-1741698823?refcode=em_fr_2023.09.08_b1_esft_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzcyYTU5ZC03NDRlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rF8XgZr5vl7-jrUbf-waDTdgktSeQz7-mhC2FrAUq_E=)

Thank you so much,

Emilia Sykes Finance Team

**A native of Akron, Ohio, Emilia Sykes has deep roots fighting for Ohioans. She learned from a young age how to use her voice and the power of the people to create change.** **In 2022, Congresswoman Sykes was elected to represent Ohio’s newly redrawn 13th Congressional District, winning one of the toughest races in the country._Emilia has cut through the divisiveness to deliver results._ **

[**Can we count on you to chip in a few dollars to Emilia's campaign?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69425052/426100556/-1741698823?refcode=em_fr_2023.09.08_b1_esft_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzcyYTU5ZC03NDRlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rF8XgZr5vl7-jrUbf-waDTdgktSeQz7-mhC2FrAUq_E=) | [**DONATE »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69425063/426100557/-1741698823?refcode=em_fr_2023.09.08_b1_esft_all-nd&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NTEyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NzcyYTU5ZC03NDRlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rF8XgZr5vl7-jrUbf-waDTdgktSeQz7-mhC2FrAUq_E=)

Alternatively, you may enter without contributing by clicking or by texting “BEVERLYHILLS” to 88022 for one (1) entry. By sending a text message from your mobile phone, you are providing your written consent to receive calls and SMS/MMS messages, including autodialed and automated calls and texts, to that number from the Save America JFC. Text message and data rates may apply. Consent is not required as a condition of entry. Text STOP to 88022 to opt out. Entries must be received between September 7, 2023, at 12:00 a.m. Eastern Time, and ends on September 12, 2023, at 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time. Odds of winning depend on the number of eligible entries received. One (1) “Prize Winner” will receive a trip for two to a September 29, 2023 reception in Beverly Hills, California consisting of the following: (i) round-trip coach class airfare for the Prize Winner and one (1) guest to the event destination from the major U.S. airport nearest Prize Winner’s residence within the 48 contiguous United States; (ii) two (2) tickets to the reception featuring President Donald J. Trump; (iii) two (2) day one (1) night first class hotel accommodations (1 room, double occupancy); (iv) one (1) photograph of the Prize Winner and guest with President Trump; approximate retail value (“ARV”) of the Prize: $8,000. body:
Ken Buck is trying to change his tune on Donald Trump, folks, In the aftermath of the 2020 Election, Buck was happy to go along with the extremists in the Republican Party who called the election rigged and said that Donald Trump was the real winner. | | | [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=caa1f675c07c416fae9cae37cd2150f7&_e=V07Y8vLBAUoaSPaqHeHwFgXPex6Rxb2guh-affN93XwDAr9tOyjq_yTwn1pNZqPG3OP_aryyxPd9uEJABQy8pw1xWziUZI8mvkUu5aauL0snfP0XSBSe2voD-4UcbYSHTL6JSoM0S5V5X-K2LbgEBHHq-0O74qClU73-JifvcOWaJZEuBEyuzMAie6ihuzMQt7vOqte9bDK6ubGG_j5ADk6nW-QY7FjyhqWHncRa23vEeo2UUIvEZk5lXm2UhAw9W5E_3Wr1fxhtGFxoYuTbEgi-50_oKnfnoTUrL8AjJJXcvsVkQ4b-JoerrkD91XG5QbvVFoQGggoEEJ7HTxmCgSzeknKTI34my-MvdAPZJ3QP2rK0acYner223TFGtznrE6o3keICkSeBMsN6-fI7ww%3D%3D) Ken Buck is trying to change his tune on Donald Trump, folks. In the aftermath of the 2020 Election, Buck was happy to go along with the extremists in the Republican Party who called the election rigged and said that Donald Trump was the real winner. _He was happy to stand alongside the rhetoric that eventually caused the January 6th Insurrection that nearly destroyed our democracy forever._ **That is, until it became less popular to do so.** You see, Ken Buck is a fair weather fan of Donald Trump – and only wants to be on his side when it’s politically advantageous to do so. So if he’s trying to destroy our democracy, but he’s popular? Ken Buck is all in. Now that he’s got several indictments against him and he’s seen as a little more dangerous, Ken Buck wants to act like he has the moral high ground. But we know the truth. Ken Buck is as opportunist a politician as it gets. And that doesn’t deliver what folks in the Fourth District need. **[Will you help us kick Ken out and elect John Padora by chipping in $10 or $20 to John’s campaign?](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=caa1f675c07c416fae9cae37cd2150f7&_e=V07Y8vLBAUoaSPaqHeHwFgXPex6Rxb2guh-affN93XwDAr9tOyjq_yTwn1pNZqPG3OP_aryyxPd9uEJABQy8pw1xWziUZI8mvkUu5aauL0snfP0XSBSe2voD-4UcbYSHTL6JSoM0S5V5X-K2LbgEBHHq-0O74qClU73-JifvcOWaJZEuBEyuzMAie6ihuzMQt7vOqte9bDK6ubGG_j5ADk6nW-QY7FjyhqWHncRa23vEeo2UUIvEZk5lXm2UhAw9ZCSc-bY0go1Al84hZ5IIiBZ7iNui6_MvIcDlajyH7zX69E4o6-wkBWFuxSAggoLp5bUCYc7sZEJQnpoOVjvSIkytyXDg9qGj-DuD_rfZVNsg2GMxOg6bgMtidxe3_E0HHJ7iST4-4jt_osEWCUjs6A%3D%3D)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [DONATE $10 NOW!](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=caa1f675c07c416fae9cae37cd2150f7&_e=V07Y8vLBAUoaSPaqHeHwFgXPex6Rxb2guh-affN93XwDAr9tOyjq_yTwn1pNZqPG3OP_aryyxPd9uEJABQy8pw1xWziUZI8mvkUu5aauL0snfP0XSBSe2voD-4UcbYSHTL6JSoM0S5V5X-K2LbgEBHHq-0O74qClU73-JifvcOWaJZEuBEyuzMAie6ihuzMQt7vOqte9bDK6ubGG_j5ADk6nW-QY7FjyhqWHncRa23s69Qi3-crCGlo4T-04nthE_fx_5IwbHBNMfNJkbtgM5YkGO_2hp2xHEdRyNCDwmJlZg283zlK2IJ0RQQnGDA9zeyl5ocJjRkV83-T8P6BbiSa-9Yxpg5YJdnTsCno0dA17BhsshWNEA3WX9SaLGPtvtto8sZ1LMTteqezHVVWgMHFl5BfvwxXPnO9Rfv83DCplKid0RpvIz-NNU73SM52_) | [DONATE $25 NOW!](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=caa1f675c07c416fae9cae37cd2150f7&_e=V07Y8vLBAUoaSPaqHeHwFgXPex6Rxb2guh-affN93XwDAr9tOyjq_yTwn1pNZqPG3OP_aryyxPd9uEJABQy8pw1xWziUZI8mvkUu5aauL0snfP0XSBSe2voD-4UcbYSHTL6JSoM0S5V5X-K2LbgEBHHq-0O74qClU73-JifvcOWaJZEuBEyuzMAie6ihuzMQt7vOqte9bDK6ubGG_j5ADk6nW-QY7FjyhqWHncRa23s69Qi3-crCGlo4T-04nthE_fx_5IwbHBNMfNJkbtgM5edkUXMLsGpopp1oLRNUwf6p12NQ7oO0Vf8Ze_pjNtBcu7RTB--bz93cMmD4nYYSUl-ny32PjYuF-LdXVJIQGld_yjYIKPsxx79VOIfL2Uxqwet4jvpuNj7HCE24AyWNdIEzMxH6LRWy5bYes-cX19G8O_IESgxMDPDUb24PfPTO)

| I’ve already taken action on the state level in Pennsylvania by sponsoring legislation to review our competitive status with China. This legislation would:
* * *
**• Ban TikTok on all Pennsylvania government-owned devices.
• Divest the Commonwealth from Chinese assets tied to the CCP.
• Prohibit the sale of Pennsylvania agricultural land and critical land near military bases to Chinese investors with ties to the CCP.
• Oversight or ban of Chinese investment or donations tied to the CCP that may be made to Pennsylvania colleges and universities.**

---

While China continues its aggressive military modernization program, flexing its muscles in the South China Sea, I have personally met with the democratically elected Vice President Lai Ching-te of Taiwan. While the US does not diplomatically recognize Taiwan’s independence, I believe it is important to stand with our democratic partners in the Indo-Pacific region.

[**With your help in sending me to Congress, we can send a powerful message to China that their attempts to intimidate and silence us will fail.**](http://links.mackenzieforcongress.com/u/click?_t=e09c1376a1134fb5bbc6c87f9d1914fb&_m=c34654109f954c70a3d61b04441fe386&_e=D3J7PuzMs4ss-b7c4hohVMRi39i5Pt9gLWwjWX3789-xvMH5tE2x_S9X4Xc6VuzERhUB-2bkSw6wOWRHks4WxaLoZNgpVL3r7gZSxS2Kvb3wN4S4uC_K8FOewcrXmGwdCAi8BtAUx9NNeccAG8515iZqSmzR5LAQ0yum9UjpAJbG-R65akI4GUallX7XaqAzlfwqsz4gPKKVHnqxKH77aFngQ2I1f1cs-6jweLUvUjs6J2SF3YkzV-Dfeo6zcyb2xihZO3KSNLo45uFiQbhiXc2gic1LCKwhYS7ts4O18vVjRmHve0l8VmMbEJcir-u_LsjYnZScn1316l4DsJImYRbb4p0GESgh91lTagy7G-nUZgEw92Mg_QAdPQ2upXVLwuNDkVtP51EfIN2_wmpW_2kHxFESK23Ov87KC4I_LDXxmvjFASR4wxWr3wDyi8SJ)

Ryan Mackenzie

MEET RYAN

* * *
_When it comes to fighting for American freedoms and helping others, Ryan Mackenzie has had some great teachers.

A 9th generation resident of the Lehigh Valley, Ryan's first ancestor to settle in our area fought in the Northampton County Militia during the Revolutionary War. In more recent generations, his family members helped build companies like Hercules Cement, served our country in both World Wars, and served our community here at home in professions like nursing and teaching.

It's that spirit of service that inspired Ryan to fight back against the Far Left here in Pennsylvania. Ryan faced an all-out assault by the abortion industry in his first race, and he beat them back. Rush Limbaugh said of Ryan: "Planned Parenthood took it on the chin ... Mackenzie won by an 18-point margin."

In Pennsylvania's state capitol, Ryan is known by conservatives and feared by the establishment as one of the most effective and proven reformers in government. Ryan didn't just talk – he got our values enacted into law._

clean_body: = $3,000,000.00. That’s how much Republican outside groups spent attacking me in 2022. Thanks to grassroots supporters like you, we were able to fight back, set the record straight and defy the odds to defend this battleground House seat for Democrats. Now, I’m one of the GOP’s top targets once again. They know they must win in Michigan in 2024 to have any chance of holding onto their majority, and they could spend just as much – if not more – to kick me out of office. = | | = | = Here’s the truth: My record of delivering jobs, lowering the cost of health care and protecting your right to an abortion makes the national GOP furious. So they’re going to do anything they can to flip this seat red – and all signs point to them dumping millions into our district again in an attempt to mislead voters and defeat us. I’m not going to back down, but I need your help. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you from the bottom of my heart. | | Peter, This week, Congress returned to session after a month-long recess — **and now must take action to keep our government funded and operational by September 30.** For years, members of Congress from both parties would come together and vote to keep the government running, setting aside partisan bickering to keep essential programs running. From keeping our national parks open and maintained to ensuring that seniors are receiving their Social Security benefits on time, keeping our government funded and functioning should be a no-brainer. **But instead of coming together to keep crucial programs up and running, Republicans in Congress are choosing to play political games at our expense.** The far-right House Freedom Caucus continues to withhold their votes _no matter what_. And with Kevin McCarthy refusing to negotiate a bipartisan deal, we could be thrown into a government shutdown within a matter of weeks. [**It's time to say enough to the political games and failed GOP leadership. Can you pitch in $3 to my campaign to help send a new kind of leader to Congress?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69427079/426102564/1183499175?refcode=2023-09-08-gov&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=6a1e5877-764e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQxNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmExZTU4NzctNzY0ZS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9asvUtRm4G9T2DcU_2tk5P8YQWniMrY26hTK06Plo7k=) Donate Now If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:

Stopping a government shutdown is more than just refusing to cave to far-right Republicans. It is about keeping basic services functioning and allowing federal employees to keep doing their jobs.**If the GOP-led shutdown happens:**
* Government agencies will be forced to work with skeleton crews, putting thousands of federal employees at risk of being furloughed
* Social Security and SNAP benefits will not be delivered on time, placing an undue burden on seniors and families across the country
* EPA and FDA inspections will be delayed, putting our food and our environment at severe risk

I'm running for Congress to stand up for everyday people, and that starts with ensuring that our government is functioning. We can't stand by and let far-right Republicans continue to throw the federal government into chaos for their own political benefit. [**Can you donate $3 to my campaign so we can bring real leadership back to Congress?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69427085/426102570/1183499175?refcode=2023-09-08-gov&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=6a1e5877-764e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQxNjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiNmExZTU4NzctNzY0ZS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=9asvUtRm4G9T2DcU_2tk5P8YQWniMrY26hTK06Plo7k=)

body:
Despite joining the Army at 17 to afford college, I still had to take out student loans to pay for my higher education. | [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69427167/426102855/-1962024584?refcode=EM_FL_MFOL_20230908_fr_studentloan_cand_kw_30da_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZmFiOTcwOS03NzRlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yEtMmbia6-94dM4lBFEyL6_QKO7jEAt5SC11lg4WdsY=)
---
Raise your hand if you’re still paying off your student loans, like me! ✋✋✋ Despite joining the Army at 17 to afford college, I still had to take out student loans to pay for my higher education. **For kids who grew up in working-class families like mine, a college degree and beyond should be a path to the middle class — but instead, it's become a lifelong burden that continues to hold them back.** Nearly every household, from union families to grandparents that co-signed loans for their grandkids, is affected by the crushing weight of student loan debt. So when interest and collections were paused during the pandemic, it was a huge relief to millions of borrowers. Suddenly we had hundreds of dollars a month to put back into the economy. We bought homes, started families, and saw record economic growth. **But while President Biden and Democrats fought tooth and nail to continue to provide relief to borrowers who need it most, Brian Fitzpatrick and his fellow Republicans have blocked him every step of the way. Fitzpatrick and his cronies even voted to retroactively charge interest on the loans! ** With repayments beginning next month, so many of my friends are stressing about their household budgets. Some have applied for Biden's latest relief program. But with Republicans promising once again to undo those efforts, borrowers are worried the relief they desperately need won't happen. **We need a representative who wants to help the nearly 1 in 7 Americans who have student loan debt — and pass a permanent solution once and for all. That's me.** If elected, I’m committed to expanding public forgiveness programs, Pell Grants, and GI bill funding as well as bringing down the cost of college. **[So let's flip this seat blue and elect a Democratic majority in Congress to turn this problem around. Will you donate to my campaign today so we can solve the student debt crisis once and for all?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69427168/426102856/-1962024584?refcode=EM_FL_MFOL_20230908_fr_studentloan_cand_kw_30da_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85MzM5OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZmFiOTcwOS03NzRlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=yEtMmbia6-94dM4lBFEyL6_QKO7jEAt5SC11lg4WdsY=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

name: David Shadburn, LCV
subject: TAKE ACTION: Help stop MASSIVE cuts to climate action.
body:
Help us reach 5,000 comments to overcome corporate polluters.? Tell the EPA:
PROTECT COMMUNITIES FROM CHEMICAL DISASTERS
The EPA is now seeking public input on a new rule to require industrial facilities to disclose the hazardous chemical risks posed by their operations, take stronger actions to prevent accidents, and move quickly should an accident occur.

Corporate polluters have already killed this rule once, when Trump decided to allow these dangerous facilities to operate in secrecy. We cannot allow them to succeed again.

GOAL: 5,000 actions
TAKE ACTION https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/j9y2f_Z_6wCV/T2pSU090d1ZxbUpiLzJlRlJOTTJjRis2M1BJdnczcVFwalAweU9mQUFsRVlyQTFSRFdkNWRsYXZ1ekUzQ21EUUM2R2tpUno0bHNqaFhZT2g4aGI0QUNWTWxlbGlMT29LSlVWOTczdnpXSk09S0/NmgrZ25xeHhYSEFDMVJ2ZVVWSjk0aVFVWEk2ZDR5SWh0RHdneHZrS2tOQytBYWU1SHYxOFh5RHhUQzZ6WHljWVV6ejZFZ2Y0dk9RaCtkNDQ4VURqdExGYUtJT1pBMzBPS0 ? ?
? Peter ? a critical new rule from Biden's EPA would finally require dangerous industrial facilities to disclose any hazardous chemicals they contain ? and take steps to prevent and mitigate harmful accidents.

This rule will especially protect people living closest to these facilities, which are overwhelmingly low-wealth communities and communities of color, as well as workers. Decades of environmental racism ensured these hazardous facilities were located in the neighborhoods with the least resources to fight back, meaning these frontline communities are disproportionately exposed to chemical accidents and harmful pollutants that have jeopardized their health.

Here's the problem: powerful interests, like the oil and gas industry and the chemical industry, are demanding the EPA once again abandon these important protections. Unless our movement speaks up right now, we may miss out on this opportunity to advance environmental justice and worker safety, and create healthier communities and workplaces.

Please TAKE ACTION right now to protect communities from chemical hazards. To beat the chemical industry, we need to urgently deliver 5,000 comments supporting the EPA's proposed rule. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/rNykfkdkLqS_/T2pSU090d1ZxbUpiLzJlRlJOTTJjRis2M1BJdnczcVFwalAweU9mQUFsRVlyQTFSRFdkNWRsYXZ1ekUzQ21EUUM2R2tpUno0bHNqaFhZT2g4aGI0QUNWTWxlbGlMT29LSlVWOTczdnpXSk09S0/NmgrZ25xeHhYSEFDMVJ2ZVVWSjk0aVFVWEk2ZDR5SWh0RHdneHZrS2tOQytBYWU1SHYxOFh5RHhUQzZ6WHljWVV6ejZFZ2Y0dk9RaCtkNDQ4VURqdExGYUtJT1pBMzBPS0

We've already seen the dangers these facilities can pose. In 2013, an explosion of ammonium nitrate fertilizer killed 15 people and destroyed a school, nursing home, and many homes in the city of West, Texas. The Obama administration began a painstaking process to prevent similar disasters, culminating in enhanced protections for minimizing and managing chemical risks.

But after an aggressive campaign from the chemical industry and other corporate polluters, the Trump administration abandoned the rule, choosing to prioritize corporate profits over the health of vulnerable communities and workers.

Under President Biden, the EPA can now reverse this dangerous decision and finally help protect people, especially environmental justice communities, from hazardous pollution and chemical disasters.

Don't let corporate polluters undermine critical environment protections. TAKE ACTION now to help us deliver 5,000 comments supporting environmental justice and corporate accountability. https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/ambdFrGrm2M_/T2pSU090d1ZxbUpiLzJlRlJOTTJjRis2M1BJdnczcVFwalAweU9mQUFsRVlyQTFSRFdkNWRsYXZ1ekUzQ21EUUM2R2tpUno0bHNqaFhZT2g4aGI0QUNWTWxlbGlMT29LSlVWOTczdnpXSk09S0/NmgrZ25xeHhYSEFDMVJ2ZVVWSjk0aVFVWEk2ZDR5SWh0RHdneHZrS2tOQytBYWU1SHYxOFh5RHhUQzZ6WHljWVV6ejZFZ2Y0dk9RaCtkNDQ4VURqdExGYUtJT1pBMzBPS0

Thank you for taking action to protect people and workers from environmental disasters.

Sincerely,

Madeleine Foote
Deputy Legislative Director

clean_body: Help us reach 5,000 comments to overcome corporate polluters.? Tell the EPA: PROTECT COMMUNITIES FROM CHEMICAL DISASTERS The EPA is now seeking public input on a new rule to require industrial facilities to disclose the hazardous chemical risks posed by their operations, take stronger actions to prevent accidents, and move quickly should an accident occur. Corporate polluters have already killed this rule once, when Trump decided to allow these dangerous facilities to operate in secrecy. We cannot allow them to succeed again. GOAL: 5,000 actions TAKE ACTION ? ? ? Peter ? a critical new rule from Biden's EPA would finally require dangerous industrial facilities to disclose any hazardous chemicals they contain ? and take steps to prevent and mitigate harmful accidents. This rule will especially protect people living closest to these facilities, which are overwhelmingly low-wealth communities and communities of color, as well as workers. Decades of environmental racism ensured these hazardous facilities were located in the neighborhoods with the least resources to fight back, meaning these frontline communities are disproportionately exposed to chemical accidents and harmful pollutants that have jeopardized their health. Here's the problem: powerful interests, like the oil and gas industry and the chemical industry, are demanding the EPA once again abandon these important protections. Unless our movement speaks up right now, we may miss out on this opportunity to advance environmental justice and worker safety, and create healthier communities and workplaces. Please TAKE ACTION right now to protect communities from chemical hazards. To beat the chemical industry, we need to urgently deliver 5,000 comments supporting the EPA's proposed rule. We've already seen the dangers these facilities can pose. In 2013, an explosion of ammonium nitrate fertilizer killed 15 people and destroyed a school, nursing home, and many homes in the city of West, Texas. The Obama administration began a painstaking process to prevent similar disasters, culminating in enhanced protections for minimizing and managing chemical risks. But after an aggressive campaign from the chemical industry and other corporate polluters, the Trump administration abandoned the rule, choosing to prioritize corporate profits over the health of vulnerable communities and workers. Under President Biden, the EPA can now reverse this dangerous decision and finally help protect people, especially environmental justice communities, from hazardous pollution and chemical disasters. Don't let corporate polluters undermine critical environment protections. TAKE ACTION now to help us deliver 5,000 comments supporting environmental justice and corporate accountability. Thank you for taking action to protect people and workers from environmental disasters. Sincerely, Madeleine Foote Deputy Legislative Director League of Conservation Voters ? ? ? ? ? name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: Imagine the Democratic Party without the Squad
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter, could you
imagine what the Democratic Party would look like without Justice
Democrat-endorsed progressives and the Squad?

No AOC, Ayanna Pressley, Ilhan Omar, Rashida Tlaib, Cori Bush, Jamaal
Bowman, or Summer Lee in Congress fighting for bold change and challenging
the status-quo?

We can’t either.

With an increasingly extreme Republican Party and too many
corporate-backed centrists in Washington, it’s already a struggle to pass
groundbreaking legislation that would improve millions of lives and move
our country forward.

Without our coalition of diverse, young, people-powered candidates
standing up for our values and fighting for the people, we can’t imagine
where we’d be right now. They’ve stopped some of the most harmful
right-wing legislation and made serious gains for our communities, but
there’s still so much work to do — like passing a livable minimum wage, a
Green New Deal, and Medicare for All.

That’s why it’s imperative that we re-elect our Justice Democrats
incumbents AND continue to elect new progressive champions to build our
movement in Congress every election cycle.

But we’ve been underdogs since the beginning: far-right and moderate
SuperPACs funded by corporations and the wealthiest few have poured
millions of dollars into attacks against our candidates, and they’re
already gearing up for 2024.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/137882?refcode=em20230908-30758&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=30758%2E1203867%2EQLH1Ni ]Peter, we
depend on grassroots support from people like you to recruit and support
progressives like the Squad: will you make your first donation right now to
fuel our fight?

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/137882?refcode=em20230908-30758&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1020&akid=30758%2E1203867%2EQLH1Ni ]Contribute $3

Anything you can contribute will directly support our work to defend our
incumbents already in Congress and elect the next generation of
progressive leaders in 2024 and beyond.

— Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time. If you’re struggling, you can find a food bank
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/28883?t=1021&akid=30758%2E1203867%2EQLH1Ni ]here. We appreciate everything you do to keep our movement strong.

Please stay informed and follow the most up-to-date recommendations from the
[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/24438?t=1022&akid=30758%2E1203867%2EQLH1Ni ]Centers for Disease Control and your state public health department.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20230908-30758-footer&t=1023&refcode2=30758_1203867_QLH1Ni&akid=30758%2E1203867%2EQLH1Ni

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1024&akid=30758%2E1203867%2EQLH1Ni

Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603

clean_body: We have to keep this seat blue. = Peter, My name is Gabe Vasquez. In 2022, I won one of the closest races in the country to flip a House district from red to blue for Democrats - by 1,350 votes! Now I’m one of the youngest Democrats in Congress fighting for reproductive choice, affordable healthcare, protecting our environment, and the best interests of the people. But my opponent is running again and Republicans are already spending thousands of dollars on attacks against me. We have to win this seat to take back the House next year. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = I ran for Congress because I wanted to make a difference for my community. But what I’ve seen so far is politicians who care more about culture wars than getting anything done. We have to elect leaders who are going to put people first. I’m running for re-election because I believe we can truly reform our government and pass policies that are going to help working families. body:
| | | Our new video contains a trigger warning. Here’s why: it depicts a mass shooter preparing to enter a school. I know, this video is hard to watch. It should be.

But here’s the truth: Our kids have to deal with hard things every day. My first grader learned about her class’s active shooter plan on the first day. And just last week we watched UNC students jump out of windows to flee a gunman. As the adults in their lives, we should be fighting every day to protect them from the threat of gun violence.

That’s why Renee and I released this ad, to inspire that action. Now, we need your help to make sure that everyone else sees it and channels their anger by voting out weak politicians beholden to the NRA.

clean_body: | | | Our new video contains a trigger warning. Here’s why: it depicts a mass shooter preparing to enter a school. I know, this video is hard to watch. It should be. But here’s the truth: Our kids have to deal with hard things every day. My first grader learned about her class’s active shooter plan on the first day. And just last week we watched UNC students jump out of windows to flee a gunman. As the adults in their lives, we should be fighting every day to protect them from the threat of gun violence. That’s why Renee and I released this ad, to inspire that action. Now, we need your help to make sure that everyone else sees it and channels their anger by voting out weak politicians beholden to the NRA. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | We won’t stop until the kids are alright. — Annie Their Future PAC is solely focused on mobilizing resources and support for leaders and lawmakers who pledge to put the needs of children first in policy decisions. Our focus areas are: → Climate action → Quality education → Affordable healthcare → Sensible gun legislation → Ending child hunger and poverty → Strengthening democracy by protecting voting rights We’re powered by grassroots donations from people like you, so ** | | Paid for by Their Future PAC | | Sent via . name: Tennessee Update (via DLCC.org)
subject: Reps. Justin Jones and Justin Pearson →
body:
Last month, Tennessee lawmakers held a special session intended to improve public safety after a deadly school shooting earlier this year. | | |
---
| | **Last month, Tennessee lawmakers held a special session intended to improve public safety after a deadly school shooting earlier this year. Here’s what happened:**
* Republicans _refused_ to pass the gun safety measures their constituents have been begging them to enact for months.
* Republicans used their supermajority to once again _silence_ Rep. Justin Jones of the TN Three – prohibiting him from speaking and debating on bills for a day of the session.
* The rule used to silence Rep. Jones was adopted by the GOP-led chamber only a week prior – and gives Republicans the power to silence members of the House.

**Republicans are more focused on silencing those who call out their inaction than they are serving the people of their state. It’s shameful.** Democrats like Reps. Jones and Pearson are working to hold the GOP accountable and stand up to the gun lobby, but they can’t win this fight alone. To pass the meaningful gun safety measures that will make our communities safer, we _must_ build Democratic power in states like Tennessee. [ Will you chip in $7 today to elect Democrats who will push for gun safety measures in our statehouses? Together, we can loosen Republicans’ grip on our statehouses and build the progressive future we deserve. ](https://an.dlcc.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953xT87Do081Peey8mbiuSK7m06iLNAd-MSsCN8QIrrkMfNdlShhxh-ZAWiOAZ_AEYqFU2_eeqWs9zSa5L0NsCp26IOf5NNj-WlsSN2_34Mkjh0Y9LMEjYoy_nOvec6HTLNM5NCN8Uh7G2bhyy1USKXVQktZLCP62ZyE00BBz_KKiVGOkfRbswLassAl88O45o2W3wxQJRKdOz7NZk9SaoyUpczWjsqMgN7U3e1soLRfYlXk2CxJwmTEJdZC8Ut8gONNWAUmyFfjAPmXBCZDxYN22DpfRouH2SLjXw6AqKAKM1P5i1GKZups413_SqaXnypjumLMKxUWuVDAe5BOc3ueww7mWwvy2PJUeUid82dq-Oi9wVsEytL8GH5vbONZu8-Oowt-Tw9iwRgbFvGa3o8-K/3zf/vh9w-6dZTHa3xOhXti97Cw/h0/8KXLnn0HE7D2E0DKCX_NGK-K7VfRijknEh6Y4SJnGd8) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately.

name: Maxwell Frost
subject: You, me, and Summer Lee
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAXWELL FROST FOR CONGRESS
body:
| [ ](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/EedORO4W_wx1WAIiEQPw7w~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRm3fMpP0TKaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1zbC1lbT9yZWZjb2RlPTIwMjMwOTA4X2VtX2ZyX2IxX3N1bW1lcmxlZV9lbiZhbW91bnQ9MjcmY2RtYz0yVjdwZktPMnZ1WkxFQXdlNEphTDhNNTNHNmkmcmVmY29kZTI9MlY3cGZLTzJ2dVpMRUF3ZTRKYUw4TTUzRzZpJnJlZmNvZGVjZG1jPTJWN3BmS08ydnVaTEVBd2U0SmFMOE01M0c2aVcDc3BjQgpk-ilu-2QsVATBUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAaQ~~)

**Peter, I’m beyond excited to support Summer Lee as she launches her campaign for re-election!** Summer made history last year when she became the first Black Congresswoman elected in Pennsylvania and beat out millions of dollars in corporate PAC spending against her. But she didn’t let it slow her down one bit - she got to Washington and she’s been fighting for working class people day and night since taking office in January. Now it’s time to ensure she keeps that seat for the people of Western PA. [**_Before I go any further about why we need more progressive champions like Summer in the House, can you split a $27 donation between our campaigns to make sure Summer can continue to fight for working families for a second term?_**](http://clicksp.frostforcongress.com/f/a/EedORO4W_wx1WAIiEQPw7w~~/AAPPAAA~/RgRm3fMpP0TKaHR0cHM6Ly9zZWN1cmUuYWN0Ymx1ZS5jb20vZG9uYXRlL21hZi1zbC1lbT9yZWZjb2RlPTIwMjMwOTA4X2VtX2ZyX2IxX3N1bW1lcmxlZV9lbiZhbW91bnQ9MjcmY2RtYz0yVjdwZktPMnZ1WkxFQXdlNEphTDhNNTNHNmkmcmVmY29kZTI9MlY3cGZLTzJ2dVpMRUF3ZTRKYUw4TTUzRzZpJnJlZmNvZGVjZG1jPTJWN3BmS08ydnVaTEVBd2U0SmFMOE01M0c2aVcDc3BjQgpk-ilu-2QsVATBUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAaQ~~) **So why am I supporting Summer?**

As a true advocate for the people, **Summer Lee has always taken on big fights with greedy corporations who put profits over the lives of people,** and even led the call for accountability for Norfolk Southern after the East Palestine Train Derailment.

Summer has also introduced three crucial bills in her short time in office—the Hazard Pay for Health Care Workers Act, the Equality in our Laws Act, and the Bipartisan Abandoned Well Remediation Act—which passed through the Science, Space, and Technology committee with a unanimous, bipartisan vote. She even co-led over a dozen bills, including legislation to make sure billionaires pay their fair share in taxes.

**And this is all in just the 9 months since she took office. Imagine what we can accomplish together with another term and a Democratic majority!**

We’re already seeing right-wing billionaire-backed corporate Super PAC’s pour money into stopping our movement for true multiracial democracy and working class families in 2024, but we can’t let them win. Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party's weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. **** _Jennifer McCormick Within Striking Distance in Gubernatorial Race_ A new poll from Jennifer McCormick’s gubernatorial campaign shows that her bid is [gaining momentum](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69428124/426106063/-155653823?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjg2YjFhMS03OTRlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JytsZ8mieduD_6njM2edorUmoNRF9E1c9PFJC6EKNXM=&emci=fcd1293f-704e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&emdi=fb86b1a1-794e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=4925535) and putting her in striking distance. With the GOP locked in a brutal, expensive primary, it gives McCormick a great lane to continue getting her message out. **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69428126/426106065/-104603763?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjg2YjFhMS03OTRlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JytsZ8mieduD_6njM2edorUmoNRF9E1c9PFJC6EKNXM=&emci=fcd1293f-704e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&emdi=fb86b1a1-794e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=4925535)**[ Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69428128/426106067/-104603763?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjg2YjFhMS03OTRlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JytsZ8mieduD_6njM2edorUmoNRF9E1c9PFJC6EKNXM=&emci=fcd1293f-704e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&emdi=fb86b1a1-794e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=4925535) The polling shows that an overwhelming majority of Hoosiers believe our state is on the wrong track, as 20 years of one-party Republican control has left working families behind. It also shows once again that a majority of Hoosiers oppose the extreme ban on choice. ****_Birthing Centers Close, Doctors Leave Indiana as Abortion Ban Takes Effect_ Indiana is in the midst of a healthcare and doctor shortage. The extreme Republican ban on abortion only worsens this crisis. Just this week, two birthing centers in northeast Indiana [announced their upcoming closure.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69428129/426106070/-1271184491?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjg2YjFhMS03OTRlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JytsZ8mieduD_6njM2edorUmoNRF9E1c9PFJC6EKNXM=&emci=fcd1293f-704e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&emdi=fb86b1a1-794e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=4925535) **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69428130/426106071/-1271184491?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjg2YjFhMS03OTRlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JytsZ8mieduD_6njM2edorUmoNRF9E1c9PFJC6EKNXM=&emci=fcd1293f-704e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&emdi=fb86b1a1-794e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=4925535)**[Share INDems](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69428131/426106073/-1271184491?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjg2YjFhMS03OTRlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JytsZ8mieduD_6njM2edorUmoNRF9E1c9PFJC6EKNXM=&emci=fcd1293f-704e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&emdi=fb86b1a1-794e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=4925535)
Closures of healthcare facilities are dangerous for Hoosier families. We’re fighting to reverse this ban so we can recruit new doctors to Indiana and ensure the rights, freedoms, and safety of all Hoosier women. ****_Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks._ **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69428133/426106074/-1180687944?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjg2YjFhMS03OTRlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JytsZ8mieduD_6njM2edorUmoNRF9E1c9PFJC6EKNXM=&emci=fcd1293f-704e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&emdi=fb86b1a1-794e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=4925535)**[Share Senator Shelli Yoder](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69428135/426106076/-1180687944?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjg2YjFhMS03OTRlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JytsZ8mieduD_6njM2edorUmoNRF9E1c9PFJC6EKNXM=&emci=fcd1293f-704e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&emdi=fb86b1a1-794e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=4925535) This week we highlight policy from State Senator Shelli Yoder, who [called out](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69428138/426106078/-1180687944?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjg2YjFhMS03OTRlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JytsZ8mieduD_6njM2edorUmoNRF9E1c9PFJC6EKNXM=&emci=fcd1293f-704e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&emdi=fb86b1a1-794e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=4925535) the Republican supermajority’s attacks on wetlands. Since the rollback of wetland protections in 2021, [Indiana has lost over 200 acres of wetlands.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69428140/426106081/-2028117660?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmYjg2YjFhMS03OTRlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=JytsZ8mieduD_6njM2edorUmoNRF9E1c9PFJC6EKNXM=&emci=fcd1293f-704e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&emdi=fb86b1a1-794e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=4925535) These are vital ecosystems that provide flood protection and control. Statehouse Democrats will continue fighting to protect our wetlands from further damage because they know that they provide our communities with critical protection for the future.

clean_body: | Welcome to the Indiana Democratic Party's weekly newsletter, The Kernel of Truth. The State Party will provide the most important fact - a kernel of truth - from the week. ** Jennifer McCormick Within Striking Distance in Gubernatorial Race A new poll from Jennifer McCormick’s gubernatorial campaign shows that her bid is and putting her in striking distance. With the GOP locked in a brutal, expensive primary, it gives McCormick a great lane to continue getting her message out. The polling shows that an overwhelming majority of Hoosiers believe our state is on the wrong track, as 20 years of one-party Republican control has left working families behind. It also shows once again that a majority of Hoosiers oppose the extreme ban on choice. Birthing Centers Close, Doctors Leave Indiana as Abortion Ban Takes Effect Indiana is in the midst of a healthcare and doctor shortage. The extreme Republican ban on abortion only worsens this crisis. Just this week, two birthing centers in northeast Indiana Closures of healthcare facilities are dangerous for Hoosier families. We’re fighting to reverse this ban so we can recruit new doctors to Indiana and ensure the rights, freedoms, and safety of all Hoosier women. Each week, the State Party will highlight key policy from Democrats at the Statehouse or across the state. Democrats deliver a better future for Hoosier families, and we urge you to share this information with your networks. This week we highlight policy from State Senator Shelli Yoder, who the Republican supermajority’s attacks on wetlands. Since the rollback of wetland protections in 2021, These are vital ecosystems that provide flood protection and control. Statehouse Democrats will continue fighting to protect our wetlands from further damage because they know that they provide our communities with critical protection for the future. ** Get Involved! Opportunities to Volunteer Near You! Municipal campaign season is heating up, and campaigns around the state are needing help! Find an event near you and get involved to help ! Upcoming Candidate Trainings Wednesday, Sept. 12: 1-2 p.m. ET: Phone Banking for Political Campaigns: Join the National Democratic Training Committee for a free virtual live training to help your campaign take the next steps when it comes to contacting voters via phone banking! Leave your Tribute to Governor Frank O’Bannon Next week marks 20 years since we lost Governor Frank O’Bannon. As governor, he always did what was right regardless of party and he believed in Indiana. Indiana Young Democrats Candidate Endorsements The IYD is accepting candidate endorsement applications from those running for office this November. This is a great way to engage younger voters, and earn the support of the IYD. Power to the Polls: An Interactive Event by IDAAC on Sept. 9 Join the Indiana Democratic African-American Caucus (IDAAC) for Power to the Polls, an event featuring food, live music, candidate meet and greets, and more. There’s no shortage of great candidates running this year to meet. This is a fun family event, so please bring along any friends, family, or colleagues who may be interested in getting involved. This event will take place on Saturday, Sept. 9 from 12- 3PM ET. name: Madeleine Dean
subject: Thank YOU
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mad4PA PAC
body:
Thank you for joining me this week in standing with the labor movement. **** Thank you for joining me this week in standing with the labor movement.

Workers are the backbone of our economy, and I’m committed to securing the right to organize and ensuring fair, livable wages. House Democrats put these values to work with the _American Rescue Plan, Infrastructure Investment_ _and_ _Jobs Act_ , and the _Inflation Reduction Act_ – **and there’s more yet to be done.**

But with the House GOP in the majority, we know that advancing workers’ rights is sadly not a priority.

_Come 2024, we must retake the House majority to get back to prioritizing the needs of American workers and the labor movement._

Now is the time to act — before the onslaught of ads and attacks from the right really kicks in for 2024. **[I hope you’ll consider supporting our campaign with a contribution.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69428524/426107439/-850630802?amount=25&refcode=09082023_md_labor_en_3&refcode2=d9aca6eb-794e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOWFjYTZlYi03OTRlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e025Gk_1fDzB4GR7TrCFtZr9Q5n58B7EoWbfYlKnnOo=)**

I so appreciate your support,

– _Madeleine_ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69428525/426107440/-850630802?amount=25&refcode=09082023_md_labor_en_3&refcode2=d9aca6eb-794e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOWFjYTZlYi03OTRlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e025Gk_1fDzB4GR7TrCFtZr9Q5n58B7EoWbfYlKnnOo=)
* * *
_Madeleine is an attorney, professor, mother, grandmother, and Member of Congress, representing Pennsylvania’s 4th Congressional District of Berks and Montgomery Counties. She is an outspoken leader who champions progressive priorities such as education, universal access to healthcare, gun safety, and ethical government.**Madeleine Dean has built a reputation for getting things done, and we need her to continue to be our voice to serve us in Congress.**_ _We are excited to have you on Team Dean! Our campaign is funded by people who care about our democracy and want to see continued progress in our community and in our country. If you'd like to donate,[**click here.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69428526/426107441/-850630802?amount=25&refcode=09082023_md_labor_en_3&refcode2=d9aca6eb-794e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOWFjYTZlYi03OTRlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e025Gk_1fDzB4GR7TrCFtZr9Q5n58B7EoWbfYlKnnOo=) If you’d like to volunteer, [**click here.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69428527/426107442/-410778297?refcode=09082023_md_labor_en_3&refcode2=d9aca6eb-794e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOWFjYTZlYi03OTRlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e025Gk_1fDzB4GR7TrCFtZr9Q5n58B7EoWbfYlKnnOo=&emci=2ac7b628-954d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=d9aca6eb-794e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=36373569)_ [DONATE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69428528/426107443/-850630802?amount=25&refcode=09082023_md_labor_en_3&refcode2=d9aca6eb-794e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDQ1OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOWFjYTZlYi03OTRlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=e025Gk_1fDzB4GR7TrCFtZr9Q5n58B7EoWbfYlKnnOo=) | Paid for by Mad4PA PAC

name: Philip Stein
subject: PragerU update→
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Cinde Warmington
body:
| Hi there,

Cinde has a long track record of fighting back against radical proposals put forth by Governor Sununu and Frank Edelblut, the Department of Education Commissioner. We fought against their controversial PragerU plan, spreading the word about how harmful it would be for New Hampshire students.

_Now, just this week, Edelblut announced that he’s not running against us for governor._

**Make no mistake: The strong campaign we’re building for New Hampshire is making right wing candidates worried about their chances to win in 2024.

_[We know that Cinde is the candidate who is able to take the corner office. But now we want to hear from our top supporters about why you stand with Cinde. Will you answer our short survey before the end of the week to fill us in on the issues most important to you in this race?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69428640/426107654/-588667215?source=EM_NBI_CW_20230908_PT_executivecouncil_1.1_1MO_cm_na_na_news&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzgxMjAwYy03YTRlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IubQ218pNzte7oDUqDXLR0wPZDJS1WgggdR3EjL_jgU=&emci=6481200c-7a4e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&emdi=6c81200c-7a4e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=45626166)_** | | **[Answer Here→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69428641/426107655/-588667215?source=EM_NBI_CW_20230908_PT_executivecouncil_1.1_1MO_cm_na_na_news&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzgxMjAwYy03YTRlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IubQ218pNzte7oDUqDXLR0wPZDJS1WgggdR3EjL_jgU=&emci=6481200c-7a4e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&emdi=6c81200c-7a4e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=45626166)**
---

In Wednesday’s Executive Council meeting, Cinde stood up against Sununu and Edelblut’s plan to continue funneling public funds to private schools and further pushed back against the proposal to incorporate the right wing PragerU platform in our schools.

Recent polling shows that Cinde is viewed positively by a lot of Granite Staters and that’s in no small part due to her work standing up for public education in New Hampshire.

But the polling also shows that there are a number of undecided voters we still need to reach. Personal accounts of why our supporters stand with Cinde and the issues that are most critical in this race are key as we develop our plan to reach them.

Can we count on you to answer the call?

**[_https://go.cindewarmington.com/a/why-i-stand-with-cinde_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69428642/426107656/-588667215?source=EM_NBI_CW_20230908_PT_executivecouncil_1.1_1MO_cm_na_na_news&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU0MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YzgxMjAwYy03YTRlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=IubQ218pNzte7oDUqDXLR0wPZDJS1WgggdR3EjL_jgU=&emci=6481200c-7a4e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&emdi=6c81200c-7a4e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=45626166)**

Thank you,
Philip Stein
_Campaign Manager_

* * *

name: Mark Mullet
subject: re: Governor Inslee
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Elect Mark Mullet
body:
| | Governor Inslee will be endorsing my opponent Attorney General Bob Ferguson, likely tomorrow. First, let me say that I respect the Governor, but over the years we’ve had some serious differences around the direction of our state. We have strongly disagreed on the policies he’s championed that have made our state too expensive for regular people to live, and made our neighborhoods less safe.

Washington state has record high home prices, the highest gas prices, and a new payroll tax. **The affordability crisis we are currently experiencing didn’t just happen, it’s the result of policies of the Inslee administration and a Bob Ferguson administration will be more of the same.**

We need to make progress on building housing. Our current system has too much red tape and bureaucracy that stands in the way of housing affordability.

We need to make progress on public safety, homelessness, drug addiction and mental health. Not another four years of attempting to legalize hard drugs and passing the buck to local governments.

We need to make progress on climate change and be a leader that other states will want to follow. Not another four years of unaffordable gas.

If you want a Governor that will put affordability first, join this campaign. If you want a Governor that understands the urgency of building affordable housing, this is your campaign. If you want a Governor with a real plan to bring down gas prices, join this campaign. If you want a Governor that has the strongest track record on public safety and will take meaningful action in making our neighborhoods safer, join us.

[Chip in to our campaign and join our movement for a safer, more affordable Washington.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69428704/426107863/1116007068?amount=10&source=MM_EM_ST_90DO_230908_1_1&refcode2=20ce4733-7a4e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&contactdata=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MzAxMCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyMGNlNDczMy03YTRlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QRW4hFLdqZ7VCfIrwylkRb-exVpVoVWkjSvETDT9Z2Y=)

Our campaign has always been about these core issues and giving voters a choice, not a coronation.

Best Regards,

State Senator Mark Mullet

---
|
* * *
---
Mark Mullet is running for Governor to make Washington safe, affordable and prosperous.

Ted Cruz is worth at least $2.6 million, according to financial disclosures
A new report shows Ted Cruz has raked in millions of dollars since his failed 2016 presidential run.
Whether from his podcast or his culture-war-oriented books, Cruz has pocketed vast sums of money.
The report also showed that he’s holding at least $100,000 in shares of Exxon Mobil and other energy stocks.
Here’s the point: While Cruz is collecting millions of dollars from other projects, he’s done NOTHING for Texas.
The people of Texas deserve better. That’s why we support Roland Gutierrez, a Democratic State Senator who is fighting to restore honor and integrity to the U.S. Senate.

name: JohnFetterman.com
subject: Guts
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
The end of September (specifically 11:59 PM on Saturday the 30th) is our next Federal Election Commission deadline.
#
Derek,
Here's what we need you to know:
The end of September (_specifically 11:59 PM on Saturday the 30th_) is our latest Federal Election Commission deadline.
If you've been getting our emails for a while, you know what that means. **After the deadline we have to report every dollar we've raised publicly, for everybody to see.**
This summer has been slow for campaigns across the board, and we want to show strong fundraising $$ to keep up our support of John's work in the Senate. Grassroots donations are the only way we'll be able to catch up -- **[so if you're able to now, will you make a contribution so we can finish the fundraising quarter strong?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230908-1?refcode=em20230908-1-8552&refcode2=8552_434096_kPa9go&akid=8552%2E434096%2EkPa9go)**
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230908-1?amount=5&refcode=em20230908-8552&refcode2=8552_434096_kPa9go&akid=8552%2E434096%2EkPa9go)**
Derek, keeping our fundraising up for every deadline matters, even in the off-years. It takes guts to speak truth to power and keep it real like John does every day -- and he's able to do it by swearing off corporate PAC money and relying on us.
We've got to be prepared for anything that Republicans and their corporate PAC friends might throw our way. Every time we've asked, this team has stepped up.
**[It'd mean a lot to John + all of Team Fetterman if you could chip in $5 or whatever makes sense for you right now to power our movement.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-email-20230908-1?refcode=em20230908-1-8552&refcode2=8552_434096_kPa9go&akid=8552%2E434096%2EkPa9go)**
We know we can crush this FEC deadline -- and even if you can't chip in right now, thank you for reading these emails + being on this team. 😎
Together,
Team Fetterman 💛

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20230908-8552-footer&t=1&refcode2=8552_434096_kPa9go&akid=8552%2E434096%2EkPa9go)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=2&akid=8552%2E434096%2EkPa9go)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=3&akid=8552%2E434096%2EkPa9go)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

There’s some unsettling news coming out of the governor’s mansion this week. name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: Here's what I'm not willing to accept:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
Republicans love to say that they’re the party of “family values." Give me a break.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=51%2E4032634%2E7TAsXd)
---
Republicans love to say that they’re the party of “family values” — the party that looks out for parents and kids.

Give me a break.

Democrats are the ones fighting for paid family leave; quality, affordable child care; strong public schools for every family; good-paying jobs that leave parents with time to see their kids; and a government that works for every family, not just the rich and powerful.

Meanwhile, here’s what happens when Republican politicians win elections and get their way:
* More people are forced to give birth because they can’t access contraceptives or abortion care. They’re disproportionately low-income. Disproportionately women of color. (And do Republicans have any plans to help those babies once they’re born? With, say, child care? Nope.)
* More parents are forced to ration groceries and watch their children go hungry.
* More parents are forced to have hushed conversations at the kitchen table after they’ve put their kids to bed — conversations about how on earth they’re going to make rent, pay the mortgage, or cover medical bills.
* More parents — especially moms — are forced to give up their careers because child care costs more than their salary.
* More parents are forced to make impossible choices between going to work that day so they can buy groceries or staying home so they can take care of a sick child.
* More kids are forced to go to under-funded public schools, where some get cruelly punished for having little to no funds in their lunch accounts.
* More teachers are forced to deal with red tape that stops them from teaching honest lessons about Black history, or from trying to create safe, welcoming classroom environments for LGBTQ+ students.
* More working people and more retirees are forced to struggle to make ends meet and afford life-saving prescription drugs.

**We're the richest country in the history of the planet. And still, families are struggling more and more each day while Republicans’ rich donors boast about strong profit margins.** [**I’m not willing to accept any of this. I’m fighting my heart out to pass plans that actually help working families and fight back against the GOP’s damage to our country. Will you pitch in $28 or anything you can to power this fight? I can’t do this critical work in the Senate without your support.**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/444?t=8&akid=51%2E4032634%2E7TAsXd)

---

More parents are forced to ration groceries and watch their children go hungry. More parents are forced to have hushed conversations at the kitchen table after they’ve put their kids to bed — conversations about how on earth they’re going to make rent, pay the mortgage, or cover medical bills. More parents — especially moms — are forced to give up their careers because child care costs more than their salary. More parents are forced to make impossible choices between going to work that day so they can buy groceries or staying home so they can take care of a sick child. More kids are forced to go to under-funded public schools, where some get cruelly punished for having little to no funds in their lunch accounts. More teachers are forced to deal with red tape that stops them from teaching honest lessons about Black history, or from trying to create safe, welcoming classroom environments for LGBTQ+ students. More working people and more retirees are forced to struggle to make ends meet and afford life-saving prescription drugs. We're the richest country in the history of the planet. And still, families are struggling more and more each day while Republicans’ rich donors boast about strong profit margins. If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will process automatically: | | | | | | | I never expect you to donate to every email, and I’m grateful for your support no matter what. If a financial contribution would make sense for you right now, it would be a huge help.
