He is passionate about standing with law enforcement and making our communities more safe, protecting Social Security and Medicare, fixing our crumbling roads and bridges, and restoring the SALT deduction to lower taxes and make New York more affordable. | | USE THE ADDRESS BELOW TO CONTRIBUTE BY CHECK LAWLER FOR CONGRESS PO BOX 87 SOUTH SALEM, NY 10590 GET YOUR MIKE LAWLER, NO CUOMO MERCH No New Yorker wants to call our Tappan Zee Bridge the “Governor Mario M. name: Tim Sheehy, Navy SEAL
subject: You might as well get to know me
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
= Another opportunity for you to get to know me | [Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=ae0f80b500b2475d98c0e1403245e2f5&_t=gfR50XSQQcl3IU3MUul9geKsvgn-Einf1R-k4qE3WIvfdimcUoG0nqc4BeUttm6wWP4K4iFRRL-IDXWRj-QZXmf9a3421Q1yVlzfOzcL17w%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=ae0f80b500b2475d98c0e1403245e2f5&_t=gfR50XSQQcl3IU3MUul9geKsvgn-Einf1R-k4qE3WIvfdimcUoG0nqc4BeUttm6wWP4K4iFRRL-IDXWRj-QZXmf9a3421Q1yVlzfOzcL17w%3D)
---
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=ae0f80b500b2475d98c0e1403245e2f5&_e=aQYr6twb2T2BNMUNt0fr4fgP1wcTa99hax7WFubWhcaB3ZiQzA4K6ATH7fkMWXPJiJtRlzGcop7gp6cNPtUtTOSt6t382xoF4IWR0_BE4FA6JCByVPuv2vE8z3z8NAOfZEDyGE1rHoz5IHavQKsgXKfGiUjiVcNxWeZPQH-vsLuJOcY_F04mnuOblZoy4sQp7KXsrChfccRNlFDkcFnkintw1EJpAhp4vgaNvBCaprgpQESouZ03iAQvOsN4IybfwyKxr_3Kwh3Spj6UDnQjERgUILs0DrvadoZnWksrESqy3K8ECeKaB_DDvU0Hc-vkAUnqPXhU4xUiTjeA8kF97aba7YelbS5gXMUgWT65vZPnOMldPczhuuezFrR0qRLktpJfyLSgS2t6SKGPtUw_QQ%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

Service in government was once a noble calling. You didn’t run for office for a chance to get rich; it was a chance to serve your fellow Americans. I can’t speak for everyone, but from what I’ve seen coming out of Washington, D.C. we have too many career politicians running for office and not enough public servants – and the career politicians aren’t in it for the right reasons.

**_They run because they want to become famous._**

_**They run because they want power.**_****

Some run because they want to pad their resume on the road to becoming high-powered lobbyists, complete with a $1 million salary.

Not me.

I’m former Navy SEAL and current U.S. Senate candidate Tim Sheehy. From the time I was a kid, I knew I wanted to join the military – I knew I wanted to be a part of something bigger than myself. Serving other human beings is the highest calling of them all; a truth I’ve tried to live by my entire life.

I’ve been trying to get in touch with you since I launched my Senate campaign on June 27th, but I realize that it’s hard to get to know someone through words in an email. That’s why I’m including a link to my most recent TV AD – we’re calling it “ _**Mission**_ ” – for you to **[watch.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=ae0f80b500b2475d98c0e1403245e2f5&_e=aQYr6twb2T2BNMUNt0fr4fgP1wcTa99hax7WFubWhcaB3ZiQzA4K6ATH7fkMWXPJiJtRlzGcop7gp6cNPtUtTOSt6t382xoF4IWR0_BE4FA6JCByVPuv2vE8z3z8NAOfZEDyGE1rHoz5IHavQKsgXKfGiUjiVcNxWeZPQH-vsLuJOcY_F04mnuOblZoy4sQp7KXsrChfccRNlFDkcFnkintw1EJpAhp4vgaNvBCaprgpQESouZ03iAQvOsN4IybfE5anil9ht6rM77I1VXJkcUn5w61zO-udB8yzh1KAk6ogmP_iGm0BwfAakNi6ihla2513M9HmeF4wsybp1bxjzZx5QzESwaftdjVMwRQU8LVMAY3jFDNNara0aAGrt_7i1f-rrlDpR1GCoMBx_SJGow%3D%3D)**

I have asked – and I will continue to ask – for your time and your support. You might as well get to know me. **[Take a look now, it will only take 60 seconds.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=ae0f80b500b2475d98c0e1403245e2f5&_e=aQYr6twb2T2BNMUNt0fr4fgP1wcTa99hax7WFubWhcaB3ZiQzA4K6ATH7fkMWXPJiJtRlzGcop7gp6cNPtUtTOSt6t382xoF4IWR0_BE4FA6JCByVPuv2vE8z3z8NAOfZEDyGE1rHoz5IHavQKsgXKfGiUjiVcNxWeZPQH-vsLuJOcY_F04mnuOblZoy4sQp7KXsrChfccRNlFDkcFnkintw1EJpAhp4vgaNvBCaprgpQESouZ03iAQvOsN4IybfeHDj5_ZGU40YkPOnr0Q81UasjDExt35q3Z5ZyK7VrcTctPBDeg5zia_mFiQ97Wzl4yPJQL9BWqZzrUiXb1yxt2XXHH7WN7hzZhCxFcAHm5p5bXHAYbR1pDwYCJ4aqxT6vLFx0PaY3Qoa0IdHWUtWoQ%3D%3D) **

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=ae0f80b500b2475d98c0e1403245e2f5&_e=aQYr6twb2T2BNMUNt0fr4fgP1wcTa99hax7WFubWhcaB3ZiQzA4K6ATH7fkMWXPJiJtRlzGcop7gp6cNPtUtTOSt6t382xoF4IWR0_BE4FA6JCByVPuv2vE8z3z8NAOfZEDyGE1rHoz5IHavQKsgXKfGiUjiVcNxWeZPQH-vsLuJOcY_F04mnuOblZoy4sQp7KXsrChfccRNlFDkcFnkintw1EJpAhp4vgaNvBCaprgpQESouZ03iAQvOsN4Iybfc28z-iHl965hh1WXzJjfnrrXlN6NQgdl9m6417MnN7vrzzPtW7JPoCdnivxtZMVA19xEjyhtMfYguYdMCZwm5t6l_4r1AT6dNN-xjYclLvTAACJg_x8M6hWmvOhhyb717qgTOFdKPw52B-ETPsm8Qw%3D%3D)

[**GET TO KNOW ME ->
**](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=ae0f80b500b2475d98c0e1403245e2f5&_e=aQYr6twb2T2BNMUNt0fr4fgP1wcTa99hax7WFubWhcaB3ZiQzA4K6ATH7fkMWXPJiJtRlzGcop7gp6cNPtUtTOSt6t382xoF4IWR0_BE4FA6JCByVPuv2vE8z3z8NAOfZEDyGE1rHoz5IHavQKsgXKfGiUjiVcNxWeZPQH-vsLuJOcY_F04mnuOblZoy4sQp7KXsrChfccRNlFDkcFnkintw1EJpAhp4vgaNvBCaprgpQESouZ03iAQvOsN4IybfFLdx2CNAk1MfZUkP5HxH-v5hm0Wu0wZHwaGDzs7wHw3S3HIkyJWPaF009Faox2oJnECSbPPhrr_ogJ4wYOTkWN5s2sB569Qbjv9FjeaTSpjRP8iO6gfaKzeUba-EL6rbeKsPV5U49BBPgwvXh4r84w%3D%3D)

**From fighting wildfires in the American West to fighting on the battlefields of Iraq and Afghanistan** , I’ve come to understand the essence of what America is about. It’s individual responsibility, accountability, opportunity, and success.

**I want to remind Washington what it is to have service and sacrifice at the center of your mission. **

We need people in DC who understand what it means to serve their country and create a better future for our children.

We _**must**_ do better.

For our future,

Tim Sheehy
Former Navy SEAL
Republican for U.S. Senate

clean_body: = Another opportunity for you to get to know me | | Fellow Conservative, Service in government was once a noble calling. You didn’t run for office for a chance to get rich; it was a chance to serve your fellow Americans. I can’t speak for everyone, but from what I’ve seen coming out of Washington, D.C. we have too many career politicians running for office and not enough public servants – and the career politicians aren’t in it for the right reasons. They run because they want to become famous. They run because they want power.** Some run because they want to pad their resume on the road to becoming high-powered lobbyists, complete with a $1 million salary. Not me. I’m former Navy SEAL and current U.S. Senate candidate Tim Sheehy. From the time I was a kid, I knew I wanted to join the military – I knew I wanted to be a part of something bigger than myself. Serving other human beings is the highest calling of them all; a truth I’ve tried to live by my entire life. I’ve been trying to get in touch with you since I launched my Senate campaign on June 27th, but I realize that it’s hard to get to know someone through words in an email. That’s why I’m including a link to my most recent TV AD – we’re calling it “ Mission ” – for you to I have asked – and I will continue to ask – for your time and your support. You might as well get to know me. From fighting wildfires in the American West to fighting on the battlefields of Iraq and Afghanistan , I’ve come to understand the essence of what America is about. It’s individual responsibility, accountability, opportunity, and success. I want to remind Washington what it is to have service and sacrifice at the center of your mission. We need people in DC who understand what it means to serve their country and create a better future for our children. We must do better. For our future, Tim Sheehy Former Navy SEAL Republican for U.S. Senate | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." * | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. name: Dr. Kim Schrier
subject: Why lowering prescription drug costs is one of my top priorities:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
As a person with type 1 diabetes and as a doctor, I’ve seen firsthand how the price of prescription drugs has skyrocketed [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69430874/426116145/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTk0ZmQ0Ny04MjRlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GymZmtcaZTbPOqXrQtC8yh8bxDlotv1fv0jHHKIBDQc=&emci=111eca85-6f4e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&emdi=1594fd47-824e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=15820338)
---
Lowering prescription drug prices has always been one of my top priorities in Congress, Peter. Let me tell you why:

I was diagnosed with type 1 diabetes when I was sixteen years old. As a patient and as a doctor, I’ve seen firsthand how the price of prescription drugs has skyrocketed over the past twenty years – from $40 a vial to upwards of $300.

That’s why last year, I was proud to vote for the Inflation Reduction Act, which includes historic provisions allowing Medicare to negotiate lower drug prices. **And just last week, the Biden Administration announced the first ten drugs selected for Medicare price negotiation – including medication treating diabetes!**

Thanks to the Inflation Reduction Act, over 9 million Americans (and 100,000 Washington seniors) will save money when Medicare negotiates lower drug prices.

**But the bad news is that, no surprise, Big Pharma is still fighting back against our efforts to lower drug prices for seniors.** Pharmaceutical companies like Merck and AstraZeneca are even suing to block Medicare’s price negotiations. Given blockbuster profits, escalating prices, and spending on advertising and lobbying that outpaces spending on research, this can only be explained by corporate greed. Cutting-edge medicine will only help people if they can afford to buy it.

**No one should have to choose between putting food on the table and paying for the medication they need.** **[Peter, if you’re with me in the fight to keep lowering prescription drug prices for all Americans, sign our petition today>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69430875/426116146/-1460189451?ms=em23_230908_rxpric_adv_gq_act___dks_ettx&refcode=em23_230908_rxpric_adv_gq_act___dks_ettx&source=em23_230908_rxpric_adv_gq_act___dks_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230908_rxpric_adv_gq_act___dks_ettx&utm_medium=email&contactdata=e1Ikj1eTT0QA/YNdDJjGmPkhARqJqn3wLqTm0r/IcHO187CLzJZagoWaGJuPzOH2Y3IJ8wGlZStMf1r8Zdl9xfamNUIAA8j2bN9zR4k/YZ/xMSYG7WfGn6KjnmLwt09bxY9rHghek9+7WTuJ5z5OUDWRcRiao4RIENiLusMbivM=&refcode2=1594fd47-824e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNTk0ZmQ0Ny04MjRlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=GymZmtcaZTbPOqXrQtC8yh8bxDlotv1fv0jHHKIBDQc=&emci=111eca85-6f4e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&emdi=1594fd47-824e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=15820338)** I've been fighting for working families since before I even ran for office
| | | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69431337/426117824/657691562?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk122-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTU0OWFmYS04MjRlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ku5KBayC9KG2ktLU75B-Vc0IVuPp4c0q8Z6kUVhpcpQ=)

Hey, Peter – it's Patty Murray. If there's one thing you should know about me, it's that I've been fighting for working families since before I even ran for office.
Back in the '80s, local officials wanted to cut my kids' preschool program. I spoke out, and a male legislator told me I couldn't make a difference because I was "**just a mom in tennis shoes.** " Well, I laced up those tennis shoes, organized a coalition of 13,000 parents and ended up saving the program!
That's when I saw firsthand that local government could make a meaningful difference, and I decided to run for school board. Fast-forward to today: I'm still fighting for working families by pushing for **affordable child care** , expanding access to **paid leave** , and working to restore **reproductive freedom** for all women – no matter where they live.
The issue is, _Politico_ has reported that the Senate map is "hell" for Democrats this cycle. **To keep our Democratic majority and continue advancing our agenda, we urgently need your help:**[Peter, if you want to help fight for working families, will you donate $5 today?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69431338/426117825/657691562?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk122-fr-nd&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2YTU0OWFmYS04MjRlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ku5KBayC9KG2ktLU75B-Vc0IVuPp4c0q8Z6kUVhpcpQ=)

clean_body: I've been fighting for working families since before I even ran for office | | | = Hey, Peter – it's Patty Murray. If there's one thing you should know about me, it's that I've been fighting for working families since before I even ran for office. Back in the '80s, local officials wanted to cut my kids' preschool program. I spoke out, and a male legislator told me I couldn't make a difference because I was "just a mom in tennis shoes. " Well, I laced up those tennis shoes, organized a coalition of 13,000 parents and ended up saving the program! That's when I saw firsthand that local government could make a meaningful difference, and I decided to run for school board. Fast-forward to today: I'm still fighting for working families by pushing for affordable child care , expanding access to paid leave , and working to restore reproductive freedom for all women – no matter where they live. The issue is, Politico has reported that the Senate map is "hell" for Democrats this cycle. To keep our Democratic majority and continue advancing our agenda, we urgently need your help:= If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you, Peter. Your support means the world to me. – Patty Murray | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. People for Patty Murray PO BOX 3662 Seattle, WA 98124 United States | | PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY

Friend, Last week, we mourned a deadly, anti-Black attack in Jacksonville, Florida. The Republican-led state government has spread dangerous anti-Black rhetoric and policies that led the NAACP to issue a travel advisory, warning that the state was “openly hostile toward African Americans, people of color and LGBTQ+ individuals.” **We can’t let fascist propagandists and policymakers scapegoat the most marginalized members of our communities and take away our rights.** **In the face of right-wing, white supremacist attacks, we must urgently defend our neighbors and**** _expand_****our rights.** One way to strengthen our country’s civil rights protections and expand the rights of millions of Americans is by passing the _Justice For All Act of 2023._ This legislation would prohibit intentional and unintentional discrimination based on race, color, religion, sex, disability, age, or national origin—like rejected loans, workplace discrimination, unfair car insurance rates, and racial profiling by the police. It would help us fight back against anti-Black and anti-trans attacks by clarifying the definition of “race” to include race-related traits like hair texture, and clarifying the definition of “sex” to include sexual orientation, pregnancy, gender identity, sex stereotypes, or any sex-related traits. The bill would also empower people to hold more institutions accountable for rights violations, including by eliminating qualified immunity for police officers and other government employees. [**Add your name to support the**** _Justice For All Act of 2023_****. Together, let’s create the equity and safety that our communities urgently deserve.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnmlf9yb9ilux69QpyOCfiDuOn-rn-o6alQgGM-09BTkEm9bmc99-SGZhycK22bCdc7ELgMdpRifEtZdGW3X9Oij79D0WIL8__FYIPtP5R6Z40mUc3k0F1qmcbijUERz52eJJBskvbdhW-v0F3byFhsVvbrwUD7qmt-0WGBQtHgcax4WQ-nJM1-pCUOXcw64gsxk-cm6Xs_EAxks-kp5LO_9TVPZlGpfioFCcBMxfOmzGiEc_HRiz5SgI1UrHEU68PNqRM77AumkQrCfZ6NqyJ3BUp461jvC4zN65JMnVAitpV2nMsfEftvb9iEQZwp9eHoAfADPRzbXduRTIeaxe4zw/3zf/AfwThCd9TVqyMejsIsboxg/h1/wIQpaVZQo8EtSlaKrz6ICLY5UNZgCBXC9RzpVpIaNe8) In service and solidarity, Rashida

body:
I‘m reaching out to give you an update on my trip to Armenia.

Jirair is running for Congress because there is so much at stake to ensure everyone in our community has equal opportunities and a fair shot to chase their own dream. If you’d like to unsubscribe, [click here.](https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/zXToNFXV4kioy6WMrocbTQ2?unsubscribedata=LaSrVMSbmbc%2FMKibHzzpjCG4ahSoK1%2B6S5Hxz97vGLN2LqTit1DRbTbDOH33cFe5w8Ua54PCbLl8qkylEUgbKhb0LLYcNMpfsLyCY59LahcOI3nN9Cw2h%2BIprwLV0ALcgx6dQN0LI%2BIbRfi6vbjWESJwHvxPDRcyj8RFvhbKtqv9V0x0QUGh7oFZUL8RF7%2BCpab9TuZ4mmlW0pY1qxK382Sxs1VxzKsInk9vlU7VnlrCkfXSYF1h2qJSWJ8ISnOs1b9z8vEMVByCt2pi%2B2M00Y6TLO%2FDdaQQ6t86cWAgKYLLKRIOoHeWrl2356fVH9W%2Fzw6Ovm1HgCgwSdS73hIgXF5yic10805U0NLSDWLiihREFikTAO%2BjzUqhLKPJ726loLfr%2B7DYj8m9mXyirCi7S8q6mtb3HVI8MM5G45rvx9PzlpaxWt11Y%2BeUgV8i533d)
---
| |
---
Hey Peter, Jirair here.

I wanted to reach out and give you a quick update on my trip to Armenia last week. On Thursday, I met with the Children of Armenia Fund, which is an NGO that supports education initiatives and health clinics in rural Armenia, including near the border with Nagorno Karabakh.

I also met with the leadership of the American University of Armenia, and we discussed expanding exchange opportunities for California students.

On Friday, I was able to negotiate access to the new Armenia-Azerbaijan border area. Only about 100 people have entered this highly secure place over the past 9 months. [I saw the 22 humanitarian convoy trucks that have been parked there carrying food and water for over 3 months.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69431699/426119146/-1443276516?igshid=MzRlODBiNWFlZA==&refcode=JRFC_20230908_EM_TRIP&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDYxNDUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZGJhMzQyZDMtODM0ZS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ETEzdIHhl9N1aWlkR0X0fXsK11EODb95KStWyu3m7DA=&emci=904b44b3-6f4e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&emdi=dba342d3-834e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=1770913) I spoke to soldiers who are on guard for incursion at any time and visited a hospital on the Armenia side that has helped injured soldiers since the 2020 War.

While in Armenia I was humbled to have received special recognition from the Armenian Minister of Health, where I was presented an award for my work to support Armenians’ response to infectious diseases.

Peter, I want to thank you for your support of my work. Right now, outreach efforts like my trip to Armenia are more important than ever to inform my policy actions and priorities for this campaign, and I’m so grateful that I have people like you on my team.

Talk soon,
Jirair

name: Jeff Merkley
subject: The risk of severe and catastrophic fires continues to grow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
Three years ago, the fast-moving, destructive Labor Day wildfires swept through Santiam Canyon and the Southern Oregon towns of Talent and Phoenix, forcing people to flee at a moment's notice.
| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69431732/426119294/150430950?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDEvMS84OTMyNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhM2E2OTlmYS04MzRlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=pqt8DyLtpltKDf6mciQyaRZGP-HkKJxRIaoDqAVp5Mo=&emci=ca5e63f4-834e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&emdi=a3a699fa-834e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=7731215)
---

| | Three years ago, the fast-moving, destructive Labor Day wildfires swept through Santiam Canyon and the Southern Oregon towns of Talent and Phoenix, forcing people to flee at a moment's notice. The fires claimed nine lives, destroyed thousands of homes and businesses, and were the most destructive series of simultaneous wildfires in Oregon's history. While I'm encouraged by the ongoing rebuilding efforts and doing everything I can to make sure people have the resources they need to recover, we need to do more to ensure our communities are prepared for catastrophic wildfires. Yesterday, I introduced the Wildfire Resilient Communities Act to provide dedicated, federal support to reduce the risk of catastrophic wildfires and empower communities to prepare for wildfires. The Wildfire Resilient Communities Act would create economic opportunities in forest-dependent communities while reducing the risk of catastrophic wildfires by:
* **Supporting Wildfire Reduction Projects:** A $30 billion fund would provide stability and allow the Forest Service, Bureau of Land Management, and other land management agencies to increase the pace and scale of catastrophic wildfire reduction projects.
* **Working with Local Communities:** This legislation would reauthorize the Community Wildfire Defense Grant Program, tripling funds up to $3 billion, and help local communities plan and prepare for wildfires.
* **Reauthorizing Collaborative Forest Landscape Restoration Projects:** Permanently reauthorizing the Collaborative Forest Landscape Restoration Program will allow more projects to receive funding in a given fiscal year.
* **Creating a County Stewardship Fund:** The fund will provide payments to counties equal to 25 percent of stewardship contract receipts on federal land within their counties.

Climate chaos is creating longer, hotter, and more severe fire seasons across Oregon and the West, and we need to be prepared. So, I'm standing up to protect our communities by working with my colleagues in the U.S. Senate to pass the Wildfire Resilient Communities Act. clean_body: Three years ago, the fast-moving, destructive Labor Day wildfires swept through Santiam Canyon and the Southern Oregon towns of Talent and Phoenix, forcing people to flee at a moment's notice. | | | | Three years ago, the fast-moving, destructive Labor Day wildfires swept through Santiam Canyon and the Southern Oregon towns of Talent and Phoenix, forcing people to flee at a moment's notice. The fires claimed nine lives, destroyed thousands of homes and businesses, and were the most destructive series of simultaneous wildfires in Oregon's history. While I'm encouraged by the ongoing rebuilding efforts and doing everything I can to make sure people have the resources they need to recover, we need to do more to ensure our communities are prepared for catastrophic wildfires. Yesterday, I introduced the Wildfire Resilient Communities Act to provide dedicated, federal support to reduce the risk of catastrophic wildfires and empower communities to prepare for wildfires. The Wildfire Resilient Communities Act would create economic opportunities in forest-dependent communities while reducing the risk of catastrophic wildfires by: Supporting Wildfire Reduction Projects: A $30 billion fund would provide stability and allow the Forest Service, Bureau of Land Management, and other land management agencies to increase the pace and scale of catastrophic wildfire reduction projects. Working with Local Communities: This legislation would reauthorize the Community Wildfire Defense Grant Program, tripling funds up to $3 billion, and help local communities plan and prepare for wildfires. Reauthorizing Collaborative Forest Landscape Restoration Projects: Permanently reauthorizing the Collaborative Forest Landscape Restoration Program will allow more projects to receive funding in a given fiscal year. Creating a County Stewardship Fund: The fund will provide payments to counties equal to 25 percent of stewardship contract receipts on federal land within their counties. Climate chaos is creating longer, hotter, and more severe fire seasons across Oregon and the West, and we need to be prepared. So, I'm standing up to protect our communities by working with my colleagues in the U.S. Senate to pass the Wildfire Resilient Communities Act. Onward! | | This week, a trial started in Georgia that could change the makeup of not just the U.S. House of Representatives but also the Georgia House and Senate.

After the Supreme Court found that Alabama’s congressional maps violated the Voting Rights Act by diluting the power of Black voters, groups in Georgia are challenging our state’s gerrymandered maps for the exact same reason. Alabama is getting a new congressional map, and Georgia could get new maps too.

**_Now, Georgia could see a new U.S. House District, 3 new Georgia Senate Districts, and 5 new Georgia House Districts – and they’ll all be competitive!**_

body:
It’s not often that we get to meet our heroes. Here at Team Kennedy, we feel blessed that we get to meet our heroes on the streets, at events, and online every single day.

| [ ](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rfk_jr_and_eric_clapton3&n=1)
---
Peter, It’s not often that we get to meet our heroes. Here at Team Kennedy, we feel blessed that we get to meet our heroes on the streets, at events, and online every single day. We’re excited to offer you the opportunity to meet Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. in person and watch rock and roll legend Eric Clapton play at a small fundraising event at a private venue to celebrate Mr. Kennedy and his campaign. That’s right, Eric Clapton is performing live in Beverly Hills on Monday, September 18, and Mr. Kennedy is inviting you to be his guest at this once-in-a-lifetime concert. **Please make a contribution today to help us put RFK, Jr. in the White House in 2024**. [](https://www.kennedy24.com/clapton-reception-performance?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rfk_jr_and_eric_clapton3&n=2) To get the details for the event, and purchase a ticket, please sign up below. | [](https://www.kennedy24.com/clapton-reception-performance?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rfk_jr_and_eric_clapton3&n=3 "Purchase Tickets") [Purchase Tickets](https://www.kennedy24.com/clapton-reception-performance?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=rfk_jr_and_eric_clapton3&n=3)

clean_body: Republicans know that defeating me is their best chance at holding onto their House majority, and they’re willing to pull out all the stops to do it. | = | Peter, This isn’t the type of email I like to send, but I want you to know what we’re up against: as we approach the 2024 Election next year, all eyes are on our district. Republicans know that defeating me is their best chance at holding onto their House majority, and they’re willing to pull out all the stops to do it. = | | | = | = I won’t sugarcoat it: we could be in real trouble. I already have THREE Republican opponents running to replace me, and all of them support extremist views that could threaten the rights of millions. We don’t know yet who we’ll face in the general election, but for now, we need to be prepared for anything. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Susan | | = Paid for by Susan Wild for Congress Susan Wild for Congress 1636 N Cedar Crest Blvd. #183 Allentown, PA 18104 United States If you wish to contribute by check, you can do so at the address above. Kat Cammack, the youngest Republican woman in Congress. She won the seat on a conservative platform of growing jobs, securing our southern border, standing up for law enforcement, defending our Second Amendment, promoting fiscal responsibility, and defending life.
Congresswoman Cammack, now in her second term, sits on the House Committee on Energy and Commerce and House Committee on Agriculture, where she is the only Florida Republican serving the Sunshine State's farmers, ranchers, and producers. She was also appointed to the Select Subcommittee on the Weaponization of the Federal Government.
Kat and her husband Matt, who is a firefighter, paramedic, and SWAT medic, proudly call Gainesville, Florida home.

clean_body: | | | | I want to hear from you. Fellow American, The 2024 Republican Presidential Primary is in full swing and you know what that means: lots of horrible takes from talking heads on TV who have nothing but contempt for Republican voters. Not exactly a great source of information, are they? Let me know below: | | | | | | | | Polls require lots of responses in order to be statistically relevant so please, forward this email to reliable Republican primary voters in your network to increase the sample size. Thank you, | | Rep. Kat Cammack Congresswoman FL-3 | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- | Kat Cammack, the youngest Republican woman in Congress. She won the seat on a conservative platform of growing jobs, securing our southern border, standing up for law enforcement, defending our Second Amendment, promoting fiscal responsibility, and defending life. Congresswoman Cammack, now in her second term, sits on the House Committee on Energy and Commerce and House Committee on Agriculture, where she is the only Florida Republican serving the Sunshine State's farmers, ranchers, and producers. She was also appointed to the Select Subcommittee on the Weaponization of the Federal Government. Kat and her husband Matt, who is a firefighter, paramedic, and SWAT medic, proudly call Gainesville, Florida home. | | FOLLOW KAT ONLINE | "Facebook" | "Twitter" | "Instagram" ---|---|--- Donate by Mail Kat For Congress 5200 NW 43rd Street SUITE 102-180 Gainesville, FL, 32606 | | [PAID FOR BY KAT FOR CONGRESS]() Kat Cammack 5200 NW 43rd st, suite 102-180, Gainesville, FL 32606 = \- ==

name: Mark
subject: Humbly asking for a minute of your time
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Takano For Congress P
body:
| Peter — I’ve seen it firsthand: **the MAGA majority in the House is an abomination to the US government.** They’re waging a war on working families, wasting taxpayer dollars on political stunts, and even trying to impeach President Biden.

_It’s never been more important for Democrats to stand united and flip this House blue._

**That’s why I’m asking for your input now:**

**[Please Peter, will you take our minutes-long 2023 priorities survey today? This is critical to our work, and I’m counting on 500 responses by midnight »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69432372/426121383/-460851393?refcode=MTFC_20230908_EMSURV_E1_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM2MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzZWNiMGM3Zi04NjRlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-MrMNqR204dsmhxFnfgZJAeY4PK6Hfiixu-XewK-l5g=&emci=604af905-4c4e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&emdi=3ecb0c7f-864e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=18839602)** | **2023 PRIORITIES SURVEY SAMPLE QUESTION** | **Which of the following issues are most important to you right now?
(Click Below & Submit)**

subject: Final Moments of Our Mission
body:
| | | I'll be brief: _We're in the final moments of our mission._

The end-of-quarter deadline is approaching quickly, and regrettably, we're still shy of our goal.

**I don’t like harping on this kind of thing so much, but from my personal military experience,_the final minutes of a frontline mission are always the most important._**__

Nothing is truly over until every man boards that helicopter, humvee, or boat - and the 2024 election is no different. We can’t afford to leave anything on the table.

As someone who’s been on my team for so long, I’m asking with humility: **[Can I count on your contribution before MIDNIGHT tonight?](http://links.mwaltzforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d89142ed55974e2696402eb6b29e4daf&_m=5211c7f783f34b0aa87bea478488c805&_e=aeIsLIn2VccV38oXnxrIWKT3Cq9NTJdbEulFT48ox9xNyeAsNT0ruEEYULNWG-2fobb7m3fb5ByuWQRoSgJPSy64trJTU6fpxlniEao0Ubzf-dh_yEEcoKAamooSRL4sqAkGRVsGXhWaFBmNn3yncekFDBxDZGbffYiOTNukfe2RNhvsDZkfRH30MufTUjUZ0gU1P-JFiZYVqw3cDiCjJJje3LwRJU-KGxCk77F7tCL3vH1QeJt2yQbE_I70PHSiZB5YzWA20QnumoiLRzuBFhAOknFXeXzwZJQvx4vJCTykgJ1bUBZKJj3o7d6YMyzD-MlAYRpvjAQVVsO_iOgPXlsNDmM_0uh_kMCr4m0cF6vlPzdT7HGs3uuaZL84HCPs)**

clean_body: | | | I'll be brief: We're in the final moments of our mission. The end-of-quarter deadline is approaching quickly, and regrettably, we're still shy of our goal. I don’t like harping on this kind of thing so much, but from my personal military experience,the final minutes of a frontline mission are always the most important. Nothing is truly over until every man boards that helicopter, humvee, or boat - and the 2024 election is no different. We can’t afford to leave anything on the table. As someone who’s been on my team for so long, I’m asking with humility: - In Service, Col. name: Tina Smith
subject: Remember Louis DeJoy?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
|
#
Do you remember Louis DeJoy, folks? Donald Trump chose him for Postmaster General after being one of his wealthiest campaign donors. **Yikes.** Since being appointed, he’s slowed down mail delivery, cut pay for thousands of postal workers, canceled employee overtime, decommissioned mail-sorting machines, removed drop boxes, and more. **Major yikes.** Despite public outcry and pressure across the country to improve postal services, DeJoy hasn’t budged. We need to do what we can to turn up the heat and public pressure before the Postal Service is reduced to rubble. [**Will you sign my petition to demand DeJoy’s resignation from the Postal Service? We need a new Postmaster General to save the USPS from further sabotage and reverse the damage done to this critical lifeline millions of Americans depend on.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69432539/426122012/2101314082?refcode=AU_TSM_EG_GEN_PET_AC60_20230908_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDQ2M2I5Ny04ODRlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1MUxtk_OR2iEZVdkpRR53dhranDDqk6XCjVZxWgdRo4=&emci=2e09398a-d44d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=d0463b97-884e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=6227932) | [ADD MY NAME](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69432540/426122013/2101314082?refcode=AU_TSM_EG_GEN_PET_AC60_20230908_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMDQ2M2I5Ny04ODRlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1MUxtk_OR2iEZVdkpRR53dhranDDqk6XCjVZxWgdRo4=&emci=2e09398a-d44d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=d0463b97-884e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=6227932)

clean_body: | Do you remember Louis DeJoy, folks? Donald Trump chose him for Postmaster General after being one of his wealthiest campaign donors. Yikes. Since being appointed, he’s slowed down mail delivery, cut pay for thousands of postal workers, canceled employee overtime, decommissioned mail-sorting machines, removed drop boxes, and more. Major yikes. Despite public outcry and pressure across the country to improve postal services, DeJoy hasn’t budged. We need to do what we can to turn up the heat and public pressure before the Postal Service is reduced to rubble. | The Postal Service is a vital lifeline for millions of Americans. This is a service worth protecting with every ounce of energy we have. Thanks for doing your part. — Tina Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota Tina Smith for Minnesota PO Box 14362 St. Paul, MN 55114 United States | | Contributions or gifts to Tina Smith for Minnesota are not tax-deductible.

name: Ro Khanna
subject: A comprehensive 5-step political reform platform
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]

Friend,

Washington is broken. We need to prioritize a bold anti-corruption vision that we can deliver on when we win.

[https://www.huffpost.com/entry/ro-khanna-political-reform-plan_n_64fa2aace4b03d2db3493fbe/amp]

That’s why I’ve proposed a 5-step, comprehensive political reform platform to strengthen our democracy:

1. Ban campaign contributions from PACs and lobbyists of any kind;
2. Ban stock trading by members of Congress and lobbying from retired members;
3. Set 12-year term limits for members of Congress;
4. Set 18-year term limits for Supreme Court justices; and
5. Implement a judicial code of ethics for federal judges and Supreme Court justices.

Sign if you agree: It’s time to reform our way of governing and restore faith in our democracy. [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/political-reform-platform-petition?contactdata=kgxGjznKg5RF71E3WpJ1Mve+kwsDroODkqW4A7z3iBuZb+jJsHTfkDAW59cyPdMtpf6rMf3Ulj1EoxwKScde1h96azymzX8/HOAaVtKNoAK5dai6kJljJpzoVzAXH2/n1v2BdxoqCyJid4n92NyEpw==]

Sign the Petition [https://act.rokhanna.com/a/political-reform-platform-petition?contactdata=kgxGjznKg5RF71E3WpJ1Mve+kwsDroODkqW4A7z3iBuZb+jJsHTfkDAW59cyPdMtpf6rMf3Ulj1EoxwKScde1h96azymzX8/HOAaVtKNoAK5dai6kJljJpzoVzAXH2/n1v2BdxoqCyJid4n92NyEpw==]

Restoring confidence in our democratic institutions requires us to show that we’re putting the American people first, not corporations, special interests, or members of the federal government.

I’m leading by example, when I was elected to Congress the first thing I did was start the No PAC Caucus. I refused to take a dime of lobbyist money, corporate PAC money, or any PAC money. But we can’t depend on elected officials to volunteer to do the right thing. That’s why we need comprehensive anti-corruption reforms.

Just as my vision for a new economic patriotism aims to improve the living standards of all Americans, this platform is designed to build a better democracy for every American. I urge President Biden and my fellow Democrats to consider this bold platform and fight for a more perfect union.

Onward,
Ro

DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ngp-email-footer?refcode=20230908-political-reform-platform]

https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com] https://www.facebook.com/RoKhannaUSA [https://www.facebook.com/RoKhannaUSA] https://twitter.com/RoKhanna [https://twitter.com/RoKhanna] info@rokhanna.com [info@rokhanna.com]

Ro for Congress
P.O Box 3513
Santa Clara, CA 95051
United States

name: Sarah via Jane Fonda Climate PAC
subject: Hi! I’m JanePAC's new Executive Director!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
I wanted to take a moment to tell you a little about myself.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/69432781/426122686/-1917331050?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk1NzZiNzZiLTg5NGUtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=t4PmeSgaVFavCgoFMqS21y6_wuxWcq1fIOeBombIYpw=&emci=ca7b5dea-684e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&emdi=9576b76b-894e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=4823105)
---
| Hi team,

I’m Sarah Lane, Jane Fonda Climate PAC’s new Executive Director. I wanted to take a moment to tell you a little about myself.

I’m the daughter of two civil rights activists from the South. My mom worked on voting rights in Mississippi and my dad organized in Selma. I learned from my parents about fighting for what is right, no matter who or what is standing in your way.

So, like my parents, I went into activism. I focused my attention on elections. I truly believe (and still do) that if we elect candidates who will fight for what is right, we can make a real difference in the world.

My first job on the campaign trail was helping elect Jeff Merkley to the U.S. Senate. Most people didn’t think Merkley could pull out a victory back in those days. But we worked hard, we hit the pavement to reach voters, and we won. I went on to work for Sen. Merkley for many years in the Senate and on his campaign. It’s one of my proudest moments – to have been part of the team that elected one of the Senate’s biggest climate champions.

But I’m not done yet. Our planet is in real trouble. I have seen firsthand how the climate crisis has changed the Pacific Northwest. The good ol’ days of it being rainy and cloudy nine months out of the year are gone. We have longer, hotter, and more destructive wildfire seasons. We’ve experienced heat domes with temperatures in Portland, Oregon of 116 degrees. We’ve seen decimated salmon populations, green algae blooms, and invasive species.

So when I heard that Jane Fonda was looking for an Executive Director to help elect climate champions across the country – I knew I had to go for it.

I never thought in a million years that I’d be working alongside Jane Fonda in the climate battle, but here I am! Jane’s fearless advocacy and commitment to the climate movement inspire me every day.

I am ready to get to work! We are scaling up our campaign to elect climate champions at all levels of government. We will be launching a pilot neighbor-to-neighbor field program to get out the vote. And we’re going to take on Big Oil to prevent them from drilling for oil near schools, homes, and businesses.

[_**Will you chip in $23 to help us scale up our campaign for 2024? We need you in this fight!**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/69432783/426122688/931981458?refcode=BLU-JANE-20230908-1-EM&amount=23&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk1NzZiNzZiLTg5NGUtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=t4PmeSgaVFavCgoFMqS21y6_wuxWcq1fIOeBombIYpw=)
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/69432784/426122689/931981458?refcode=BLU-JANE-20230908-1-EM&amount=23&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk1NzZiNzZiLTg5NGUtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=t4PmeSgaVFavCgoFMqS21y6_wuxWcq1fIOeBombIYpw=)
---
As Jane likes to say – I'm small, but I'm a dynamo! I know that together we can make a real difference in this fight.

Let’s fight for our planet together,

Sarah Lane
_Executive Director_
Jane Fonda Climate PAC

name: Jacky Rosen
subject: how I fight back
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee
body:
I'm so grateful to have you by my side

| Peter, I needed to share this update out of Nevada right away:

**FIRST:** Political experts predicted that Senate control would likely come down to Nevada, just like in last year's midterms – and _CNN_ analysts rank me as one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection.

**THEN:** Mitch McConnell's handpicked candidate jumped into this race to flip our state red – and he _immediately outraised_ me within the first week of launching his campaign.

**NOW: Recent polling shows me 2 points down.**

**Peter, the only way I can fight back against the GOP, surge ahead, and protect this seat is with grassroots support from folks like you. But with time running out before tonight's midnight deadline, we're still short of our $15,000 goal.**

[_**That's why I'm humbly asking you: Please, will you rush $25 or more right now to split between my campaign and Fight for Progress to help me reach this midnight goal, keep Nevada blue, and defend the Senate for Democrats?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/69432798/426122734/-220169546?refcode=BLU-FFP-20230910-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc3NDA2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk3NzZiNzZiLTg5NGUtZWUxMS1hM2YxLTAwMjI0ODMyZTFiYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=sM6P5pYxkWWGf35GwSACmxS9F7OXhGos9tV3msaoFpQ=)

clean_body: I'm so grateful to have you by my side | Peter, I needed to share this update out of Nevada right away: FIRST: Political experts predicted that Senate control would likely come down to Nevada, just like in last year's midterms – and CNN analysts rank me as one of the most vulnerable senators up for reelection. THEN: Mitch McConnell's handpicked candidate jumped into this race to flip our state red – and he immediately outraised me within the first week of launching his campaign. NOW: Recent polling shows me 2 points down. Peter, the only way I can fight back against the GOP, surge ahead, and protect this seat is with grassroots support from folks like you. But with time running out before tonight's midnight deadline, we're still short of our $15,000 goal. = | = | = | = | = | = I'm so grateful to have you by my side in this fight to keep Nevada and the Senate blue. Together, I know we can win this. Thank you, Jacky Rosen * | | = Paid for by Fight for Progress PAC and not authorized by any candidate or any candidate's committee. | | **Time’s Up! We Need Term Limits ⌛ **
---
---
| | There’s no doubt we’ve got our hands full these days.
* Inflation is [hurting families](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=c9fc1c1e8c4a44b08b8f25261408b86a&_e=ySHYxvyLRBeqCC4QnTBjiyo4trFYPiuMOdUbf_RysI70u7GV8uFBKu3vAWAKk_uwv3QRIos2V-gt_rwA9_AlNrZNfb4pfHnQ-1D9uXHEk7LxEyMcik5IyMp3C4COHYPLz8w5qucrJc9_C41hU38BV3GUBxfb5iQkk9NMYs7NQx0CkzOir2hy-Vz9LjyYgY3Peze5skl9HV-DWE_alOX57O0n4hVqL4fA_Y1SIOLcOvCOjXfYq4ttDkZsi_vlIGswEW76VBoG2bDdk62vjsd1umJXlJcAjPEGFOXLnOrTH9-r29cHlvHOXx-3mCrT_WYJ)
* [China](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=c9fc1c1e8c4a44b08b8f25261408b86a&_e=ySHYxvyLRBeqCC4QnTBji5D1Lf_q1mNa4q8zHd0xGv6xXMTJl5X6pa060LVLsk19ZIRTcirIcOTWSeYY1z2r93sJmYtyaXnMu8guGAkpCA9tO6KH_4NxVRq45BL4s48H62v0-E1Tr3hsfeDgpSzYlSeeSO7BTglJyg5opd7smDJDaSSLGeuJCxU5IbCIwZEg4LK-O9D0XVj1MCmeRJFGhyjW4FvC-tWCVxGZLQ7rU7XjFAFfOcyvjFdabPfHDHiPGsZNdBlOFVZNNkd1-ceMmKXmIFZ1XJDyy2OkbpV7PJU%3D) is hot on our trail
* There’s a full-fledged [crisis](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=c9fc1c1e8c4a44b08b8f25261408b86a&_e=ySHYxvyLRBeqCC4QnTBjiyo4trFYPiuMOdUbf_RysI4GiNjsOUtM6EEtDzs2SjXSinTEdIwnEYYHV32BSQP4X-Gj6ez6BHlpyds6lLosmcf3uu7bs1H0TaA1p0kBqIiRn0QKZN7n2UxMGpZ9mhHY5SYUzIGWUC-OLjEbCqRGXDVAPlORCXfMJEsC0P1uA6UPgHitnUvpqPYVP5A-sd9AHWjBuKQru6_bfwormmtVh1QIkCYb5Ko_ge52SE24sRxkRBzq26gX9KhUW0KgYS3pVRSyrlDj96gamo6WmXxlwZ_0Gh4r-_9-Fh9u2bOEdtimULphtzghKFLE7B_OWC2BlA%3D%3D) at our southern border

Is it really in our best interest to have aging elected officials leading the charge when they can [barely stand up straight](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=c9fc1c1e8c4a44b08b8f25261408b86a&_e=ySHYxvyLRBeqCC4QnTBjiyo4trFYPiuMOdUbf_RysI4Lf_K7VIlWP36YF3GHAzV4mIFwuGz-4ZPMG0wzwgkcgJpX5KToXp9Wsq7E0RKbz6PH4psQvfnDDUZ5rMKfxYYtjuzvdvFnkkXY945ttbpDUgRpXwdt5pvfqpHKa2dlWmDr3QhNJ2HAaUJKwwj1f8edJ-SHoBzUZjx9kfYwQXyZxRt9vQM_ct2ZnOFvv78tE5Mhg2-NVAP7sKpNmo9v5d_Zsj4lV4q9kk30qqDYKc5iEbOaQFmf4Y613Gjcp2iJVBVw80hlAOdzNahA_XLdS9_V)? This point isn’t about ageism, it’s about what is best for America. Something’s gotta give. I’ve [proposed](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=c9fc1c1e8c4a44b08b8f25261408b86a&_e=ySHYxvyLRBeqCC4QnTBji991kquhNvua8__dD05c3o4SWZ-v178T3mCpb8CdjcT4NHkbmfB1h2GFlkV-wOVjaZP2Wpy88lXY8EiHhJE6jgLLn2bo_kHZxk2KknW1XnpCBDkWUegZ8m6WEFnv2vWdjQHv1btPY_npkLav47zDBf8fXcd8vC_s2lWQsXXaXjGi3f-zziNw-aYy0PBDXCt8ivuyQ2kw3RiHVC9G6vhBQuofl_GWFbxoFAeAbZHTG6oPq0osWPfhpwhuoJmwJ6yUpb_huzouKGcXT0QuKBOeb1i19wUMqXl4WmJOdK1eyd6gGmnTRgd_URs3mDfWl8Dkg0sYiuTzcTVRkNOX96CuEtfMpQm_e5lRcqjEKjiLevlSJcPtG7yH2hrrQYbbkhxvkA%3D%3D) term limits before—and I’m doing it again. Under [my resolution](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=c9fc1c1e8c4a44b08b8f25261408b86a&_e=ySHYxvyLRBeqCC4QnTBji2A9gshvAc1nhpUdTyEVyK_x6GinNEUJGgsKpCDL5ZQ3hkcDqE4VLGPpKUGumEvdq9hfC3gQZb7p-2Q-5LBJh8fSYfylQlA5qzHhTnWa0dwLOUwoZLqkTo_98nRRliK9oyTpY8OZFN32aLX9IxNwdhflFbudFpfTsbheLTYTCfvy4R9qYBsz1GVnQZVSmY7SVtF5wHdIoP_ipD3sIu0MT56hraRaTcmRhGZWxZkMdtDKcaq8CM3X9BPGLmMhY5nTYsxXijUH8ndNJ7PHPQ_kbQSsfKxl1S01wWzEmqqMlaSD), House members could serve three two-year terms while senators could serve two six-year terms. But here’s the reality check: Unless the current folks are grandfathered in (_no pun intended),_ Congress will never pass term limits. While I’d bring it to the floor and vote for it tomorrow, most of these politicians aren’t going to put themselves on the chopping block. Which brings me to my next point... If we can't quite wrangle them into term limits, we should at least make sure older lawmakers pass a competency test. It just seems like common sense, especially considering a whopping [76 percent](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=c9fc1c1e8c4a44b08b8f25261408b86a&_e=ySHYxvyLRBeqCC4QnTBji0BioqIYSWa1ZcFvKphAFuIWq8i5zrX23G97imN3bCie1qR9RN8pwDaMkCHatNsPiJ5xvn6yrKPB9owDw5t0IvrdyFnAHUDrkCAn41PjZSWqGoj_joASDYKc79oBIjPmig6yXmt2e1B9jGCzTcfMi1gSmM9iEF-Q_LSBMXIpwqeMf-ggt8ewUk7TXKbBE8tfnn62UqRbVwrVUIWHCWUlIRBqmPVhyF2TCU-YMTrmGi4IuKfy4l4_UT2lba6MyyXaryLgB7G15_UL4zKYtjmJgYiFK6BqRWlyjTCVT08bNg8s92O3-0X1nOHpa8tpJamyqA%3D%3D) of people support mandatory assessments for politicians older than 75. There’s no doubt that getting anywhere on this issue will be an uphill battle (it requires a [constitutional amendment](http://links.burchettforcongress.com/u/click?_t=feefb5ad83f24ba4b99ac997c1b47e86&_m=c9fc1c1e8c4a44b08b8f25261408b86a&_e=ySHYxvyLRBeqCC4QnTBji2A9gshvAc1nhpUdTyEVyK8B1U-d0zY4Cth5knjiSwCdvNK0oNzsseNkMrvZCHT6J3-fa0K1Xb7qo1dAcZm0LzRtlM8xxdOsWMtn9N54Rh69jKuY1FuM_dL4LEHA6KkliKErmzuZQannmZM8DWtSNZGrvodSquRUwXVcLuxWyr_dCTBBicZJF4cTZj1DQhaCmQKxDmZKwtIrSocXXtbupAGy10FzJvdLo4gDCVVDdYSAYuWspuTeSRLywJHXMG_JwQ%3D%3D))—but I’m prepared to keep climbing. Like a houseguest who won't take the hint, too many elected officials have overstayed their welcome. Time’s up!

| | _Photo by Andrew Ferguson/Tennessee Athletics_ Put on your orange—the Tennessee Volunteers are at it again! Football season is officially underway. The Vols came back onto the scene in a big way last weekend, beating Virginia with a final score of 49-13. There’s nothing like college football. It often feels like the one thing we can all rally around that is uniquely American and rooted in friendly competition. We may not wear the same jersey, but we can all enjoy the sport with family and friends each week. No matter what side of the aisle you’re on, everybody has a favorite college team they’re rooting for on Saturdays. While I’m absolutely biased as a University of Tennessee graduate, I have a feeling we’re onto something this season! Best of luck to the team as they prepare to take on Austin Peay this weekend—and as always—GO VOLS!

clean_body: TIMtalk will keep you updated on the important issues and goings-on in our campaign, in Tennessee, and in our country.| | | | | | | | Time’s Up! We Need Term Limits ⌛ | | There’s no doubt we’ve got our hands full these days. Inflation is is hot on our trail There’s a full-fledged at our southern border Is it really in our best interest to have aging elected officials leading the charge when they can ? This point isn’t about ageism, it’s about what is best for America. Something’s gotta give. I’ve term limits before—and I’m doing it again. Under , House members could serve three two-year terms while senators could serve two six-year terms. But here’s the reality check: Unless the current folks are grandfathered in (no pun intended), Congress will never pass term limits. While I’d bring it to the floor and vote for it tomorrow, most of these politicians aren’t going to put themselves on the chopping block. Which brings me to my next point... If we can't quite wrangle them into term limits, we should at least make sure older lawmakers pass a competency test. It just seems like common sense, especially considering a whopping of people support mandatory assessments for politicians older than 75. There’s no doubt that getting anywhere on this issue will be an uphill battle (it requires a )—but I’m prepared to keep climbing. Like a houseguest who won't take the hint, too many elected officials have overstayed their welcome. Time’s up! | | | | | The Boys Are Back In Town 🏈 | | Photo by Andrew Ferguson/Tennessee Athletics Put on your orange—the Tennessee Volunteers are at it again! Football season is officially underway. The Vols came back onto the scene in a big way last weekend, beating Virginia with a final score of 49-13. There’s nothing like college football. It often feels like the one thing we can all rally around that is uniquely American and rooted in friendly competition. We may not wear the same jersey, but we can all enjoy the sport with family and friends each week. No matter what side of the aisle you’re on, everybody has a favorite college team they’re rooting for on Saturdays. While I’m absolutely biased as a University of Tennessee graduate, I have a feeling we’re onto something this season! Best of luck to the team as they prepare to take on Austin Peay this weekend—and as always—GO VOLS! | | | | | Just For Fun 🎉 | | → Compassionate sportsmanship ❤️ ()→ Let's have a race 🏇 () → Lemonade made with love 🍋 () | | | | | Product Of The Month 🛍 | | | | | | | Please chip in today to help us oust radical Democrats and put a check on the Biden-Harris agenda. | | Stay in Touch 👇 | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Burchett for Congress**

subject: Election experts just named OH-13 one of the most competitive congressional race in Ohio

body:
I can't do this alone.
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69434650/426126174/-438463598?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMmIwMTJhYi04YTRlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lgHPrvQJ5IBQNyopiW6JkdB64EF_wRuvMqXQvqahoHk=) | Team,

Election experts at the _Cook Political Report_ just named the race for OH-13 a "toss-up," which means that I'm now running in **one of the most competitive districts in Ohio.**

Team: National Republicans named Ohio's 13th District one of their top targets last year — so it's no surprise that all eyes are on our race once again ahead of 2024.

And now that Republicans *officially* have their sights set on unseating me, we're gearing up to fight back against MILLIONS of dollars in attacks from national Republicans who will do, say, and spend whatever it takes to try and flip OH-13.

**I'm going to need all hands on deck if we're going to protect this seat so I can continue fighting for Ohioans in Congress.[Will you split a donation of $10, $20, or more, between my campaign and the Ohio Democratic Party to help us win one of Ohio’s most competitive races?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69434654/426126176/544176715?refcode=em23_230908_tandem_fndt_gq_act___ES_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230908_tandem_fndt_gq_act___ES_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=e2b012ab-8a4e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMmIwMTJhYi04YTRlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lgHPrvQJ5IBQNyopiW6JkdB64EF_wRuvMqXQvqahoHk=)**

I am proud to have spent my whole career delivering results for northeast Ohio. In my first year as the leader of the State House Democratic caucus, the percentage of bipartisan bills passed in the Ohio State Legislature increased by nearly **double** each of the previous four years combined.

Here's the bottom line: In 2022, our race was a nail-biter. And 2024 is shaping up to be just as intense — so we can't afford to lose this critical seat. I have a proven track record of tirelessly fighting for working families in our state, and I intend to do everything I can to fight to win in 2024. _That's why I'm reaching out to you today:_

[**I urgently need your support to ensure that I have the tools needed to continue fighting in Congress, where I'll continue to be a relentless advocate for the people of Ohio. Will you step up and split a donation between my campaign and the Ohio Democratic Party to help us win one of Ohio's most competitive congressional races?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69434656/426126181/544176715?refcode=em23_230908_tandem_fndt_gq_act___ES_ettx&utm_campaign=em23_230908_tandem_fndt_gq_act___ES_ettx&utm_medium=email&refcode2=e2b012ab-8a4e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTI0NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlMmIwMTJhYi04YTRlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=lgHPrvQJ5IBQNyopiW6JkdB64EF_wRuvMqXQvqahoHk=) name: Mark Lamb
subject: Add Your Name: Tell Biden to SHUT THE BORDER
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mark Lamb for Senate
body:
“US officials have inexplicably welded open 114 massive gates along the Arizona border to allow water to flow freely”
[Unsubscribe](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=8245f09fd71b4aa39493bbf1b4f23cdc&_t=yg9xs-_gEOi8x9KAxPHo7XROMMpmOsmdUbUue2JZ0U9so_fzl5MAwMiVKASMAIvheSCR9BGqV1KCIhVDRJgluEfavuoZeiMFNEftVuOxVjg%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_s=8245f09fd71b4aa39493bbf1b4f23cdc&_t=yg9xs-_gEOi8x9KAxPHo7XROMMpmOsmdUbUue2JZ0U9so_fzl5MAwMiVKASMAIvheSCR9BGqV1KCIhVDRJgluEfavuoZeiMFNEftVuOxVjg%3D)

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=8245f09fd71b4aa39493bbf1b4f23cdc&_e=AUWWyyDh6fmnJSFyqnXUtnGFfTWX2R7NUO3g8Lk1rIWErFYZlqWzVDX6R4T9_Ah9h_kyNQhct4wXIbsNEQZvJKo65yw3QYT4lY9Iv23xu1s5N6EyiM7MbC0OSGGqQRO-6khNXNtl9khzshfJjz6BOK7Mda-e025SwWgZMLsln0TN5zrBy4Q56u0K7fagEbHzOXOgKLq9oLbuNjokFdQBrYt3UP5Xa5Lhp2S_swHnRboGCx_dcPkvt8sjVaRrluEaePKjeGI6HIp_P8I_qBaLRJnRHRgqBSsEorVd6ZlSWKR8B5Sbv1VYYJXpijbIqT64I6WFmYOnNmB8k93TtY9hWg975k5Cqycbo5ElSsMbb43fcMuWaQfT-U6Vq5CjhSJqfskluZLTOaGOJltpg48R0g%3D%3D)
|
Fellow Conservative,

Are we going to continue to be a country of law and order, _**or are we fine becoming a borderless, anarchic society with no rules and even less order?**_

I have no idea what the Biden Administration is thinking most days, but how in the world did they think **WELDING OPEN** flood gates along the U.S.-Mexican border was a good idea?

_**“Each of the 114 gates in Arizona, which have been open for nearly two months, has 12-foot doors wide enough for a motorcycle to drive through. Smugglers drive busloads of migrants to the Mexican side of the border, where they get off and simply walk into the US.”**_
**We thought the agents were going to tell us something,** ” one Ecuadorean migrant said. “**But we just walked in,** ” according to the _New York Post._

**As someone who has personally pulled the dead bodies of immigrants out of ditches, I cannot express my dismay at Biden’s failure to secure the border. **

As a candidate for the U.S. Senate and a Sheriff in my own right, **[I’m putting together a petition to send to President Biden demanding action at the border.](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=8245f09fd71b4aa39493bbf1b4f23cdc&_e=AUWWyyDh6fmnJSFyqnXUtnGFfTWX2R7NUO3g8Lk1rIWErFYZlqWzVDX6R4T9_Ah9h_kyNQhct4wXIbsNEQZvJKo65yw3QYT4lY9Iv23xu1s5N6EyiM7MbC0OSGGqQRO-6khNXNtl9khzshfJjz6BOK7Mda-e025SwWgZMLsln0TN5zrBy4Q56u0K7fagEbHzOXOgKLq9oLbuNjokFdQBrYt3UP5Xa5Lhp2S_swHnRbqifJ46r0xRefm3gsxSgrSBTTR7x-l9h0EFfIqIkoEZbn-ETBBEyvbNeew_BFaJnusFquLME2k3BR69AFo136Qq7CqyRm7J1lfhNnv-YzX2-Gfo1EUQoJsLnRJuHGITKnHT8c9154BkYA8IhnE7y5fu8z3jz8936FDyleDs0P3ZeQ%3D%3D)

[[sign it now]](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=8245f09fd71b4aa39493bbf1b4f23cdc&_e=AUWWyyDh6fmnJSFyqnXUtnGFfTWX2R7NUO3g8Lk1rIWErFYZlqWzVDX6R4T9_Ah9h_kyNQhct4wXIbsNEQZvJKo65yw3QYT4lY9Iv23xu1s5N6EyiM7MbC0OSGGqQRO-6khNXNtl9khzshfJjz6BOK7Mda-e025SwWgZMLsln0TN5zrBy4Q56u0K7fagEbHzOXOgKLq9oLbuNjokFdQBrYt3UP5Xa5Lhp2S_swHnRbqcGt3dMesSM2FXSdJM0dNvVTWAw6LRv7L2bmu_hPYiaXNXqbd2JmJwndamqC9TvKjrOsgAbclnqyV9i3OKBLjngszhvywuM8Bn_2zzYqrbJlq3B9-NY8kcM95uyUb1gXh0DXO0deTcYNpw8HXIf28cTdhHE1Q-o26ZrUh9LbW-lA%3D%3D)**

Democrats have utterly failed us; I’m standing up today to say that _**ENOUGH IS ENOUGH**_.

**Meet Sheriff Lamb:** GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM.

Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity.

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year.

clean_body: “US officials have inexplicably welded open 114 massive gates along the Arizona border to allow water to flow freely” | | Fellow Conservative, Are we going to continue to be a country of law and order, or are we fine becoming a borderless, anarchic society with no rules and even less order? I have no idea what the Biden Administration is thinking most days, but how in the world did they think WELDING OPEN flood gates along the U.S.-Mexican border was a good idea? “Each of the 114 gates in Arizona, which have been open for nearly two months, has 12-foot doors wide enough for a motorcycle to drive through. Smugglers drive busloads of migrants to the Mexican side of the border, where they get off and simply walk into the US.” We thought the agents were going to tell us something, ” one Ecuadorean migrant said. “But we just walked in, ” according to the New York Post. As someone who has personally pulled the dead bodies of immigrants out of ditches, I cannot express my dismay at Biden’s failure to secure the border. As a candidate for the U.S. Senate and a Sheriff in my own right, [[sign it now]]() Democrats have utterly failed us; I’m standing up today to say that ENOUGH IS ENOUGH. Fellow Conservative, we must stop the invasion. It’s as simple as that. We do that by sending law enforcement officials, who know a thing or two about quelling unrest, to replace Democrats in the Senate who can’t seem to figure out how to do their damn jobs. Thanks for standing with me today. Sheriff Mark Lamb Republican for U.S. Senate Follow Sheriff Lamb On Social Media | | | ---|---|--- ../../../../../../Desktop/Desktop/Mark Lamb/Templates/April Pelosi/www.alekfororegon.com Meet Sheriff Lamb: GOD. **GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

body:
A very special day is coming up on September 14th and we want your help making sure Gov. DeSantis knows we're celebrating his leadership.
---
| | | | | | | | | | [](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=aeed5ec77560436284722856335e2563&_e=LHNQjwB0AaLeBVzIK8P-4gDg5wZguTmJfTidTQGKExIc4rT5InLUex1hdtVfDS_cJUC_b8cV9B_MNm4h5pCDpUuUr88OeahfCjG_hyvm15-PXbB0VvmZWJZUqHQ7Dlp50EMJLSRR-YHMSvk656FqTVs_2Eugp16X7zKVvCPt_ln4xGcOp70l9miFNX3Z1WIrLAKQ8jucZRRFDwxbI8tslJPwxMuEp13I0I7D_VdL0VWuZ5ZUiA_ehOp_oAOf1eINFYxvZRiEmDY0Jr-DQ2Yw0YMsb_sJzTU7f6OAyhRh1TbDF2gO042XFuj-jBRWd_iJkvN9CA0of-XKGtNB0thPajnE5OYmK01C2fauLllcZjHESSppGzsK1nSZ4a1Ws3f4-_aUWP9da_01EfE63PGkb68gea72b3uN0IWTXpKOUHx6uDrFSuAVIm6EHo5DeGVs)
---

Friend,

In just 2 weeks, we're celebrating Governor Ron DeSantis' birthday by giving him a card signed by his top supporters!
---
| [](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=aeed5ec77560436284722856335e2563&_e=LHNQjwB0AaLeBVzIK8P-4gDg5wZguTmJfTidTQGKExIc4rT5InLUex1hdtVfDS_cJUC_b8cV9B_MNm4h5pCDpUuUr88OeahfCjG_hyvm15-PXbB0VvmZWJZUqHQ7Dlp50EMJLSRR-YHMSvk656FqTVs_2Eugp16X7zKVvCPt_ln4xGcOp70l9miFNX3Z1WIrLAKQ8jucZRRFDwxbI8tslJPwxMuEp13I0I7D_VdL0VWuZ5ZUiA_ehOp_oAOf1eINFYxvZRiEmDY0Jr-DQ2Yw0cGj9b0xfSSdgdCM3j_dahquQtxi_LGXnhrUhh0JRWl2O-uvfdtKLUEuotWxgyXajg7deKrQpEOQ5Q5HXbyyy1_MGP2uGrSLkpuIknuM7teJM7VOyc6dHTbUdQVvGjeW9V4L6xKi8f0WviH0NCphFVhTYgQXntsuQgXItc2XkkNn)
---
Ron DeSantis is a true American patriot. Starting off as a blue-collar kid in Florida, going on to attend Yale University and Harvard Law School, then choosing to volunteer for the Navy after witnessing 9/11, he has since practiced his leadership as a Congressman and now Governor of Florida. He has a proven record of **never backing down** from fighting for the people he serves. Today, he feels a personal responsibility to step up to lead NOW when our nation needs it most. Ron DeSantis is running for President because he refuses to stand by while Joe Biden lets our nation fail. He knows that getting our country back on track can't wait another four years, so he is stepping up to make a change. He has _promised_ to rip up the policies that are failing and hurting average Americans. As a father himself, he knows that the children of this nation deserve to see a future of American greatness.
---
| [](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=aeed5ec77560436284722856335e2563&_e=LHNQjwB0AaLeBVzIK8P-4gDg5wZguTmJfTidTQGKExIc4rT5InLUex1hdtVfDS_cJUC_b8cV9B_MNm4h5pCDpUuUr88OeahfCjG_hyvm15-PXbB0VvmZWJZUqHQ7Dlp50EMJLSRR-YHMSvk656FqTVs_2Eugp16X7zKVvCPt_ln4xGcOp70l9miFNX3Z1WIrLAKQ8jucZRRFDwxbI8tslJPwxMuEp13I0I7D_VdL0VWuZ5ZUiA_ehOp_oAOf1eINFYxvZRiEmDY0Jr-DQ2Yw0Rz_z5Fc488Q2GCPA4Z8OIbhJ3qWSeHmQUqxUREoDMx3oqqJ6Og5RXfJYKG7b74LwWv6abYScIW4RvWyIufThVYmV120Lo4l2AFTkDab1oBhoZsyL8mgC8ps_D6lpBVhNr6j1wof7QQE1pnapzyJevi3yczNCncYmLsbaR3vB5OG)
---
Governor DeSantis believes that decline is choice, and he refuses to accept it. **_He is counting on us to choose success with him in 2024, and for his birthday, it would mean the world to him to know that you're fighting with him._** This year, we want to make sure we give him our greatest show of support yet.
---
| | [Sign Ron DeSantis' Birthday Card 🎂 ✍️ ](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=aeed5ec77560436284722856335e2563&_e=LHNQjwB0AaLeBVzIK8P-4gDg5wZguTmJfTidTQGKExIc4rT5InLUex1hdtVfDS_cJUC_b8cV9B_MNm4h5pCDpUuUr88OeahfCjG_hyvm15-PXbB0VvmZWJZUqHQ7Dlp50EMJLSRR-YHMSvk656FqTVs_2Eugp16X7zKVvCPt_ln4xGcOp70l9miFNX3Z1WIrLAKQ8jucZRRFDwxbI8tslJPwxMuEp13I0I7D_VdL0VWuZ5ZUiA_ehOp_oAOf1eINFYxvZRiEmDY0Jr-DQ2Yw0TGKkWcClJU-xTLmp0AyiDYCnkdut0PtM_YJ8XdfFu3R1jlfx46EGTniJMpan5TKkJ1LxELJC_WbNTZYiJVxsVQ9nnEz1dFc1QZrESybLs4YrUghDvrbRVbvXbG4aNRxgTnhTEu8ugEqbRXXHnMthloRmpHqJIcBI--WWPLlX_pG)
---
Will you sign his card and leave a personal message for this special day? **[To send him your note, we're asking you to donate just $5.](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=aeed5ec77560436284722856335e2563&_e=LHNQjwB0AaLeBVzIK8P-4gDg5wZguTmJfTidTQGKExIc4rT5InLUex1hdtVfDS_cJUC_b8cV9B_MNm4h5pCDpUuUr88OeahfCjG_hyvm15-PXbB0VvmZWJZUqHQ7Dlp50EMJLSRR-YHMSvk656FqTVs_2Eugp16X7zKVvCPt_ln4xGcOp70l9miFNX3Z1WIrLAKQ8jucZRRFDwxbI8tslJPwxMuEp13I0I7D_VdL0VWuZ5ZUiA_ehOp_oAOf1eINFYxvZRiEmDY0Jr-DQ2Yw0cDVR-Vi6rjLubswV8UmHylt5094jqnZNDMpy_7Gu5TUrkN1uoOCQO_fOkW5qHp7hyRrkzj1r7mO7HQXyrGSThaRDzZj6_huM4RYyQvCmIVBPluUJpsJ4tQyyOhSasHZ1MURi3XBP_1A_SkNsM26i5vW8mOggt5LquNax0qJoB2d)** We don't want this day to go by without him knowing all the patriots standing up with him. Your name and personal message belong on this special birthday card. Sign today, and we'll be sure he gets it! In Freedom,
Team DeSantis

---
|

**Meet Ron DeSantis**
---
| | | | [](http://links.right-gop.com/u/click?_t=2ba4f933732b46f5b6eae32741d1832c&_m=aeed5ec77560436284722856335e2563&_e=LHNQjwB0AaLeBVzIK8P-4gDg5wZguTmJfTidTQGKExIc4rT5InLUex1hdtVfDS_cJUC_b8cV9B_MNm4h5pCDpUuUr88OeahfCjG_hyvm15-PXbB0VvmZWJZUqHQ7Dlp50EMJLSRR-YHMSvk656FqTVs_2Eugp16X7zKVvCPt_ln4xGcOp70l9miFNX3Z1WIrLAKQ8jucZRRFDwxbI8tslJPwxMuEp13I0I7D_VdL0VWuZ5ZUiA_ehOp_oAOf1eINFYxvZRiEmDY0Jr-DQ2Yw0aDP0HSf4hD9V9v7HllveQWNgeglGNiex9F5rcRAxevjS1cdNorJ_aX1pdsaocNNeTxzYu3Nube1D3ht3vFFvQfUb2nyzATeugFawsQuBVDVqNokHGnqMJ4aejK--IA2nZ_fxXJAGOxCfGKe3BLEF8zpOBiHsQtYHzHdAsnuky6E)
---
| A native Floridian with blue-collar roots, Ron was raised in Dunedin by his mother, a nurse, and father, who installed cable boxes. He attended Dunedin High School and worked his way through Yale University, where he was the captain of the varsity baseball team. He also graduated with honors from Harvard Law School, where he earned a commission in the U.S. Navy as a JAG officer.

During his active-duty service, Ron deployed to Iraq in support of the SEAL mission in Fallujah, Ramadi and the rest of Al Anbar province. His military decorations include the Bronze Star Medal for Meritorious Service and the Iraq Campaign Medal.
---
Ron also served as a prosecutor in Florida, where he put child predators behind bars. He was elected to Congress in 2012 on a platform of government accountability, advocating for term limits and a balanced budget amendment.

In Congress, DeSantis spearheaded the fight to expose the weaponization of the IRS against conservatives. He also fought to hold accountable the rogue federal agencies involved in manufacturing the "Russia collusion" conspiracy theory. As a veteran, DeSantis was a champion for those who have served our country, pushing for reforms to the VA to better serve veterans and expand support for mental health.

In 2018, Ron DeSantis was elected the 46th Governor of Florida. As governor, he has fought for what's right and taken the arrows for the people he represents. During the darkest days of 2020, when the corrupt establishment, bureaucracy, and corporate media united to force lockdowns and mandates on Americans, DeSantis stood up for freedom - even when it wasn't popular.

Grounded in his unshakeable belief in America's founding principles, Governor DeSantis has enacted a bold agenda to transform Florida into a blueprint for the Nation's revival. Governor DeSantis has delivered win after win on conservative priorities:
* Saving livelihoods from job-killing lockdowns and vaccine mandates,

* Protecting citizens from the harmful impacts of Biden's border crisis by enacting E-Verify and other bold policies against illegal immigration, such as banning sanctuary cities,

* Defending parental rights and eliminating CRT,

* Defunding DEI bureaucracy in higher ed and holding tenured professors accountable,

* Waging war on woke power-grabs like ESG and central bank digital currency,

* Enacting the strongest medical freedom laws in the nation,

* Turning Florida into a model for election integrity,

* Protecting the unborn,

* Standing up for the 2nd Amendment by making Florida a constitutional carry state,

* Expanding education freedom,

* Prohibiting land purchases by the CCP and related individuals and entities,

* Lowering prescription drug costs,

* Holding woke corporations and school unions accountable,

* Creating a universal school choice program,

* Delivering record-breaking tax relief,

* Helping families achieve the American dream of homeownership,

* Supporting law enforcement and our veterans,

* Enacting tougher penalties for drug dealers and sex offenders,

* Appointing seven conservative justices to the Florida Supreme Court,

* ...and so much more.

After leading Florida with common sense and conviction throughout his first term, DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory of nearly 20 points in 2022. He earned his second term by the largest raw vote margin in state history, winning by more than 1.5 million votes.

But history didn't stop there:

Governor DeSantis flipped Miami-Dade County red, winning the majority-Hispanic urban county by double digits. Conventional wisdom assumed this was impossible for a Republican - as recently as 2016, Hillary Clinton won Miami-Dade County by nearly 30 points.

Governor DeSantis flipped several other blue counties red, including Palm Beach County. He won 62 out of 67 counties overall.

Compared to his first statewide election in 2018, Governor DeSantis was up +19% with Independents, up +30% with Hispanics, and up +9% with women.

Governor DeSantis delivered a record-setting victory with battle-tested leadership, a bold policy agenda, and never backing down to corporate media or special interests. As he said at his inauguration: "When the world lost its mind - when common sense suddenly became an uncommon virtue - Florida was a refuge of sanity, a citadel of freedom for our fellow Americans and even for people around the world. In captaining the ship of state, we choose to navigate the boisterous sea of liberty rather than cower in the calm docks of despotism."

Governor DeSantis has ensured that Florida is a free and safe place to raise a family. Thanks to the governor's leadership, Floridians enjoy a low tax burden, quality education opportunities, and a bulwark in place against the Biden Administration's overreach and various elite power grabs that seek to force people to adopt a particular ideology. Thanks to the governor's vision, this year's legislative session delivered the most ambitious conservative policy victories in Florida's history.

This year, Governor DeSantis signed:
* Record tax relief

* ESG prohibitions

* Measures counteracting the influence of the CCP

* The strongest medical freedom protections in the nation.

* Reforms reducing the costs of medications by delivering transparency

* Bold higher education reforms; defunding DEI

* Improvements to our state's infrastructure

* Tough-on-crime, law and order measures, including the death penalty for child rapists

* The strongest measures protecting Florida from Biden's border crisis

* Reforms for paycheck protection , holding accountable wayward school unions

* Prohibitions on centralized digital currencies in Florida

No leader has accomplished more for his state than Governor DeSantis. He is now sharing his bold vision with the country, leading a movement to deliver the Great American Comeback.

Ron is married to Casey DeSantis, an Emmy Award- winning television anchor. Together, they're the proud parents of their daughters, Madison and Mamie, and their son, Mason.
---
|
---
Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes. Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without "green cards"), federal government contractors, and national banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address, occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600 ($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary & $6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute $10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general). Contribution rules
* I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident (i.e., green card holder).
* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.
* I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued to another person.
* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.
---
| Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
---
| This email was sent by: Ron DeSantis for President
PO Box 3696
Tallahassee, FL 32315
