That’s why, here in Beaufort, South Carolina, we just kicked off our [**Lowcountry Listening Tour**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69435387/426128414/-1687802515?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ1ODUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2Q4NzQ2YzUtOGM0ZS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=g3XcijqAq3z_hG-ECKs_GZZvfbY06_HmxBSnFy-9FJg=&emci=f3801f5a-bf4d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=3d8746c5-8c4e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=14781535), an opportunity to listen to the working people I’m seeking to represent. [_**We’re meeting with as many people as possible – but until we can chat in person, please take our very quick Issues Survey and let us know what’s on your mind ahead of this critical election. Our team reads every single response!**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69435388/426128415/-79588095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ1ODUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2Q4NzQ2YzUtOGM0ZS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=g3XcijqAq3z_hG-ECKs_GZZvfbY06_HmxBSnFy-9FJg=&emci=f3801f5a-bf4d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=3d8746c5-8c4e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=14781535) _**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69435389/426128416/-79588095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ1ODUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2Q4NzQ2YzUtOGM0ZS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=g3XcijqAq3z_hG-ECKs_GZZvfbY06_HmxBSnFy-9FJg=&emci=f3801f5a-bf4d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=3d8746c5-8c4e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=14781535)**_[TAKE THE SURVEY](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69435390/426128417/-79588095?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDQ1ODUiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiM2Q4NzQ2YzUtOGM0ZS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=g3XcijqAq3z_hG-ECKs_GZZvfbY06_HmxBSnFy-9FJg=&emci=f3801f5a-bf4d-ee11-a3f1-00224832eb73&emdi=3d8746c5-8c4e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=14781535) For our Lowcountry Listening Tour kickoff, we gathered at the Gullah Geechee Visitor Center in Beaufort. (That’s me, by the way, in the bottom right corner, taking notes.) Our group included folks of all ages and walks of life, but we had so much in common. We discussed book bans, gun violence prevention, price gouging, the disgraceful attacks on our reproductive freedom and voting rights, and more. **I truly believe that the more we listen to working people – not just party leaders and big donors – the better chance we have to win this competitive district next year.** [_**Your survey responses are incredibly helpful as we build this people-powered, grassroots-funded campaign. Peter Willis —

Today is Bernie’s Sanders’ birthday! We wanted to get him the perfect gift, so we’ve set a super ambitious goal of raising $8,200 this weekend in honor of his 82nd birthday weekend. Sunday we’ll surprise him, and let him know we all chipped in to show our support for all he’s done for the progressive movement and Our Revolution.

We made a huge dent in the goal yesterday but we still have a ways to go. Can you chip in a few bucks and help us make sure Bernie knows we stand with him, just like he’s always stood with all of us? | | Peter,
---
| Our mission to protect our youth’s sports and spaces is ongoing. The success of our efforts hinge upon your voice and engagement in this fight to protect our children from the Radical Left agenda.

Mark your calendars for **Thursday, September 21st,** as we gather for the NEGOP 'Sports & Spaces' Roundtable. Senator Kathleen Kauth will lead the conversation, highlighting the importance of rallying our efforts for a second push behind [LB 575](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=17c6b8b2da&e=25844e23a8), – the Sports and Spaces Act.

During the roundtable, we'll delve into the critical need to safeguard our youth's spaces, including locker rooms, bathrooms, and sports teams. It's a discussion that's pivotal for the well-being of our children.

---
| [PURCHASE TICKETS HERE »](https://mcshanellc.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=1d82dcd2e67c4075340c26b37&id=0d58e93809&e=25844e23a8 "PURCHASE TICKETS HERE »")

[Dawn Liphardt](mailto:admin@ne.gop)

name: CaucusRoom
subject: Biden is Breaking the Law
body:
What you need to know today. No images? [Click here](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-e-ajrhjty-trhiujldw-g/) [](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ajrhjty-trhiujldw-r/)
## **Happy Friday! Trump says[ _he would debate Meghan Markle._](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ajrhjty-trhiujldw-y/)**
[Poll: Which Group Are You In?](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ajrhjty-trhiujldw-j/) **Judge Sides With Biden** A federal judge in Austin**[ordered Texas to remove river barriers assembled along a stretch of the U.S.-Mexico border](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ajrhjty-trhiujldw-t/) **to repel migrants, giving the Biden administration an early victory in its lawsuit against the buoys. **Biden is Breaking the Law** Sheer insanity! That's right. Sheer insanity! That's what Joe **[Biden has done by killing oil and gas drilling in Alaska](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ajrhjty-trhiujldw-i/)**. _Not to mention the jobs he's killing, too._ **Gates Bets Big on Bud Light Comeback** Bill Gates has **[purchased $1.7 million shares of Anheuser-Busch](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ajrhjty-trhiujldw-d/)** in an attempt to make a quick buck. _Yet another good reason to keep boycotting Bud Light_. **Trump Employee 4** Trump's IT director **[has struck a deal with Jack Smith](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ajrhjty-trhiujldw-h/)** and will avoid charges in the classified docs case.

**Your Safe isn't Safe** Some **[conservatives are calling for a popular safe company](https://caucusroom.cmail20.com/t/i-l-ajrhjty-trhiujldw-k/)** to get the full Bud Light treatment after willingly cooperating with federal authorities in accessing his firearms. Kendra is reaching across movements, and even factions of the Democratic Party that have been splintered for so long, to transform local government and get things done for working people. | | | Something extraordinary is happening in Philadelphia, Peter. **WFP’s Kendra Brooks, the first third-party councilmember in modern city history, is putting together a broad coalition to wrest control from local Republicans once and for all.** In the last week, she’s been endorsed by labor unions representing _more than_ _50,000_ _members_ across Philadelphia — including teachers and school support Kendra wants Philadelphia to lead the nation in local, transformative policy-making that supports youth, houses neighbors, empowers workers, and provides communities with all of the resources they need to thrive. And as we learned this week, she’s managed to forge a broad coalition of supporters on this vision. Her race, which could have major implications for third-party politics in the U.S., is one of the most closely watched this fall — but it’s going to take all of us, organizing across our differences, to ensure Kendra remains a powerful voice for working people in Philadelphia’s City Council. In solidarity, Working Families Party Source: 1\. , The Philadelphia Inquirer, Sep. 6, 2023 Thoughts? Feedback? We want to hear it. Reply directly to this email and let us know. This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If you received this email as a forward and want to get the latest updates from the Working Families Party directly, The Working Families Party is the party of the multiracial working class, fighting for a nation that cares for all of us. Wanna learn more? And if you need to update your contact information, Other political groups have corporate donors. But we can pool our resources too. Paid for by Working Families Party National PAC (77 Sands St. #6, Brooklyn, NY, 11201). | | Sent via . Will we see you in Harrisburg next weekend? Our commUNITY barbecue is just over a week away!

And, we have exciting updates to share. You already know that our event will include free food and live music, and we’re happy to announce the local musicians, restaurants, and community organizations that will be joining us!

[See below for details, and RSVP (for free) here.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69436077/426130962/-927390935?source=RC_EM_EV_WL_230908_1_1&refcode2=394179f4-904e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&contactdata=pUAJGx37JBZisrfcgCExWEe5RW9GJDabbj3q22oSkYM/TKegVmkLmXskKMcKSIqi&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODExOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTQxNzlmNC05MDRlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4TugY3_nSsZZ3iRmlLF7nvOv1Q8Wis9IuXdEcG3OR1M=&emci=204f9ea1-8e4e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&emdi=394179f4-904e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=24669367)
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69436078/426130963/-927390935?source=RC_EM_EV_WL_230908_1_1&refcode2=394179f4-904e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&contactdata=pUAJGx37JBZisrfcgCExWEe5RW9GJDabbj3q22oSkYM/TKegVmkLmXskKMcKSIqi&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85ODExOCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzOTQxNzlmNC05MDRlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4TugY3_nSsZZ3iRmlLF7nvOv1Q8Wis9IuXdEcG3OR1M=&emci=204f9ea1-8e4e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&emdi=394179f4-904e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=24669367)
I’m grateful for opportunities like this which allow me to connect with friends and neighbors across the district, and help to make our community stronger, healthier, and more engaged.

CommUNITY can help solve our most difficult public challenges. CommUNITY can help raise people out of poverty, reduce gun violence and crime, help the temporarily unhoused, help people facing mental illness and addiction, help everyone achieve family financial independence, and help all of us. CommUNITY can do all this if WE community members make it happen!

clean_body: | Will we see you in Harrisburg next weekend? Our commUNITY barbecue is just over a week away! And, we have exciting updates to share. You already know that our event will include free food and live music, and we’re happy to announce the local musicians, restaurants, and community organizations that will be joining us! I’m grateful for opportunities like this which allow me to connect with friends and neighbors across the district, and help to make our community stronger, healthier, and more engaged. CommUNITY can help solve our most difficult public challenges. CommUNITY can help raise people out of poverty, reduce gun violence and crime, help the temporarily unhoused, help people facing mental illness and addiction, help everyone achieve family financial independence, and help all of us. CommUNITY can do all this if WE community members make it happen! = | | = | = | = | = I’ve recently walked the streets of Allison Hill and others again. I’ve talked to people about their challenges and the skills, enthusiasm, determination, and optimism they bring. With the permission of local small business owners, I have posted flyers inviting everyone to our CommUNITY BBQ. EVERYONE is invited! I look forward to seeing you there. Thanks, Rick | | | | | | ---|---|--- Paid for by Friends of Rick Coplen | =

body:
Peter -- **in a moment, I'm going to ask you to chip in $5 to help me win in Ohio and keep the Senate blue.** But first, let me explain why this moment is so important.
Together, we're building a powerful grassroots movement to protect the Dignity of Work for all Americans. This movement is made up of thousands of folks just like you, giving $5, $25, or whatever they can because they know this fight matters.
But I'll be honest: We're in for a tough race. Right now, polls show me neck and neck with the GOP field, and Republicans are already launching attack ads to defeat me. With our entire Senate majority on the line, I'm counting on supporters like you to power this campaign to victory.
So please, will you split $5 between my campaign and Bob Casey’s so we can win this race? Here's a personalized link for you: **[https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230908-2](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20230908-2?refcode=em20230908-2)**
I truly appreciate your support. Thanks for being on my team.
Sherrod

clean_body: Peter -- in a moment, I'm going to ask you to chip in $5 to help me win in Ohio and keep the Senate blue. But first, let me explain why this moment is so important. Together, we're building a powerful grassroots movement to protect the Dignity of Work for all Americans. This movement is made up of thousands of folks just like you, giving $5, $25, or whatever they can because they know this fight matters. But I'll be honest: We're in for a tough race. Right now, polls show me neck and neck with the GOP field, and Republicans are already launching attack ads to defeat me. With our entire Senate majority on the line, I'm counting on supporters like you to power this campaign to victory. So please, will you split $5 between my campaign and Bob Casey’s so we can win this race? Here's a personalized link for you: I truly appreciate your support. Thanks for being on my team. Sherrod

| Quick update Peter,

Our FEC deadline comes up at the end of this month, and we want to make sure we’re in a good spot. Contributions from grassroots supporters like you can make or break a campaign. And in such a pivotal year, we want to ensure your donations are well worth the investment.

As the chair of BOLD PAC, the campaign arm of the Congressional Hispanic Caucus, I stand ready to elect Latino progressives who will fight back against regressive Republican policies and expand voting rights.

This isn’t a position I take for granted. Growing up in a working-class Latino family, access to the ballot was something we had to work to obtain. As Republican policies seek to push the Latino vote to the sideline, I will fight to ensure Latinos have a seat at the table.

[_**I can’t do it without you, Peter. clean_body: As Republican policies seek to push the Latino vote to the sideline, I will fight to ensure Latinos have a seat at the table. | = | Quick update Peter, Our FEC deadline comes up at the end of this month, and we want to make sure we’re in a good spot. Contributions from grassroots supporters like you can make or break a campaign. And in such a pivotal year, we want to ensure your donations are well worth the investment. As the chair of BOLD PAC, the campaign arm of the Congressional Hispanic Caucus, I stand ready to elect Latino progressives who will fight back against regressive Republican policies and expand voting rights. This isn’t a position I take for granted. Growing up in a working-class Latino family, access to the ballot was something we had to work to obtain. As Republican policies seek to push the Latino vote to the sideline, I will fight to ensure Latinos have a seat at the table. = | | | = | = | = | = | = | = I don’t take your support for granted, Peter. body:
I’ve always wanted to be a part of something bigger than myself | [Unsubscribe](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=7c359c38bef44583aae2d58734ab563c&_t=szm6bkpZPsOSXUz32QdHK2Gy7uE3hiSDeNUCcrHp5Nub31UF2m372uigryj0xGBCEEX6mj5pmOu6a-NWChZk6yacnoJRN_me2XhOM9vvrEI%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=7c359c38bef44583aae2d58734ab563c&_t=szm6bkpZPsOSXUz32QdHK2Gy7uE3hiSDeNUCcrHp5Nub31UF2m372uigryj0xGBCEEX6mj5pmOu6a-NWChZk6yacnoJRN_me2XhOM9vvrEI%3D)
---
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7c359c38bef44583aae2d58734ab563c&_e=MsVWop9F8qfnf41_ytA6TQhXCBykxd78w6lKwXTboPtC_Rhnpcqe4nT4T_2Zqtg-Ado4cA9ITgXOFca-36eJGxK9y1OJGhpyaUEDoXYKJqHm24aSndfW3y29Kb9hTD98vWzRArx5wsmXAfVBNU4WCWDVO-qRhb8nlAIOKKqR01jKMy6myye1os3WFW6sjAUMAe2UUOdB-ASt432eTlD7jS-G-2kigTl45LzF1UWbogUuRoOwFNgIsR_PpWxTni62v_PEVtl3rhL952fH3X1tMtdVmjvSAlyRiFWYdZJDY9yK6vDn_K8G5iNGzp-Z37wsjcCHw4D2tn0AUE8SuWww699jHxdJNVFaENn-dhLJopMxPiOuQa2CQ7K7Lc6snQUmiMzpVtrZNB7jBm1GEeiWiQ%3D%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

Service in government was once a noble calling. You didn’t run for office for a chance to get rich; it was a chance to serve your fellow Americans. I can’t speak for everyone, but from what I’ve seen coming out of Washington, D.C. we have too many career politicians running for office and not enough public servants – and the career politicians aren’t in it for the right reasons.

**_They run because they want to become famous._**

_**They run because they want power.**_****

Some run because they want to pad their resume on the road to becoming high-powered lobbyists, complete with a $1 million salary.

Not me.

I’m former Navy SEAL and current U.S. Senate candidate Tim Sheehy. From the time I was a kid, I knew I wanted to join the military – I knew I wanted to be a part of something bigger than myself. Serving other human beings is the highest calling of them all; a truth I’ve tried to live by my entire life.

I’ve been trying to get in touch with you since I launched my Senate campaign on June 27th, but I realize that it’s hard to get to know someone through words in an email. That’s why I’m including a link to my most recent TV AD – we’re calling it “ _**Mission**_ ” – for you to **[watch.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7c359c38bef44583aae2d58734ab563c&_e=MsVWop9F8qfnf41_ytA6TQhXCBykxd78w6lKwXTboPtC_Rhnpcqe4nT4T_2Zqtg-Ado4cA9ITgXOFca-36eJGxK9y1OJGhpyaUEDoXYKJqHm24aSndfW3y29Kb9hTD98vWzRArx5wsmXAfVBNU4WCWDVO-qRhb8nlAIOKKqR01jKMy6myye1os3WFW6sjAUMAe2UUOdB-ASt432eTlD7jS-G-2kigTl45LzF1UWbogUuRoOwFNgIsR_PpWxTni62DLz1HgsDpwmVS_SogOxxpJg_woNjvR7SIaCZL307-m86yZBAgV6f4nbEd511-SQdN6gzb4PjO6uaZnVX56iAf8StXNUpj2XwBUrYWZbP6-5icFBKpqA_MqaHQEnyChEpXqAu5w5eYNpiPNUmoj1gOg%3D%3D)**

I have asked – and I will continue to ask – for your time and your support. You might as well get to know me. **[Take a look now, it will only take 60 seconds.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7c359c38bef44583aae2d58734ab563c&_e=MsVWop9F8qfnf41_ytA6TQhXCBykxd78w6lKwXTboPtC_Rhnpcqe4nT4T_2Zqtg-Ado4cA9ITgXOFca-36eJGxK9y1OJGhpyaUEDoXYKJqHm24aSndfW3y29Kb9hTD98vWzRArx5wsmXAfVBNU4WCWDVO-qRhb8nlAIOKKqR01jKMy6myye1os3WFW6sjAUMAe2UUOdB-ASt432eTlD7jS-G-2kigTl45LzF1UWbogUuRoOwFNgIsR_PpWxTni623_bj1YX0fxwwrpqKII3aHnSUIjPUaR5xdULXhCzOcfhLuIQ4OrHZwQCTXQr8X3J4dKUCsCk-DmNCWoGTt8aCzrmB3UwkNFJznNiQ7drH8wzUSWQZgH-Cb3biLC7p13JRMPOo1rplPnp3MeASOZpExQ%3D%3D) **

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7c359c38bef44583aae2d58734ab563c&_e=MsVWop9F8qfnf41_ytA6TQhXCBykxd78w6lKwXTboPtC_Rhnpcqe4nT4T_2Zqtg-Ado4cA9ITgXOFca-36eJGxK9y1OJGhpyaUEDoXYKJqHm24aSndfW3y29Kb9hTD98vWzRArx5wsmXAfVBNU4WCWDVO-qRhb8nlAIOKKqR01jKMy6myye1os3WFW6sjAUMAe2UUOdB-ASt432eTlD7jS-G-2kigTl45LzF1UWbogUuRoOwFNgIsR_PpWxTni62i0_VISrl4BijcVJxTopzVU8KCUOFu5c8892hbubEhHa5wFUPohsLTSX9GOoOEBeDz0I1Z2g_Np-t8FbAyjqw8EHFppg8F-nRjACp1XvRTlfZiwI3gaXKMv8Cf5w6esAhpnrLnL5DfoRGuGJ4LnBKhQ%3D%3D)

[**GET TO KNOW ME ->
**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7c359c38bef44583aae2d58734ab563c&_e=MsVWop9F8qfnf41_ytA6TQhXCBykxd78w6lKwXTboPtC_Rhnpcqe4nT4T_2Zqtg-Ado4cA9ITgXOFca-36eJGxK9y1OJGhpyaUEDoXYKJqHm24aSndfW3y29Kb9hTD98vWzRArx5wsmXAfVBNU4WCWDVO-qRhb8nlAIOKKqR01jKMy6myye1os3WFW6sjAUMAe2UUOdB-ASt432eTlD7jS-G-2kigTl45LzF1UWbogUuRoOwFNgIsR_PpWxTni62BXFNpnhJxg96CMK5Sn9fzsvh24OUglNTPusjBQXR3TrvxW4LSN0_FI0JXBT3JnHR1C0iOETojkBhy2Pw5W9XZvbYDbFyezg9vltrnRL8JxS2p92ObqFKV4Eb8Tvmwe4-yAbThtipef_ZTkLXhTiAHw%3D%3D)

**From fighting wildfires in the American West to fighting on the battlefields of Iraq and Afghanistan** , I’ve come to understand the essence of what America is about. It’s individual responsibility, accountability, opportunity, and success.

**I want to remind Washington what it is to have service and sacrifice at the center of your mission. **

We need people in DC who understand what it means to serve their country and create a better future for our children.

We _**must**_ do better.

For our future,

Tim Sheehy
Former Navy SEAL
Republican for U.S. Senate

"I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL."

**Meet Bernie Moreno:** | Bernie Moreno fights for the American dream because he’s lived it. Bernie was born in Bogota, Colombia. At age five, his American dream began when he moved to the United States with his family. Bernie became an American citizen at age 18.

Through his relentless work ethic and untamable entrepreneurial spirit, he turned the first car dealership that he purchased in 2005 into one of the largest dealership groups in America.

In 2016, Bernie recognized the value and transformational potential of blockchain technology, before it received mainstream attention, and moved much of his volunteer time and investment dollars into the space. In 2018 he co-founded ChampTitles, which grew to be quite successful as Bernie served as Chairman of the Board.

After a long, successful career, Bernie sold most of his business to begin focusing on his calling: protecting the American dream for another generation.

Solving our country’s problems requires common sense. In Washington, Bernie will fight to shrink government, protect our freedoms, stop the Chinese Communist party from taking our data and land, and always put America First.

Ohioans are done with politicians who talk a big game and do nothing. Bernie wants to go to D.C. to get work done – just like he always has.

body:
This is why we need pro-science, pro-choice voices in office *everywhere* >> |

| | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/69437078/426134080/1714615580?sourceid=1051906&refcode=HPCButtons_v1&refcode2=WTEFE909&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjVmMGE1Mi05MzRlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iskwHuLH-A_tCzfdwv4LrGYmvIcuZj46v4FFCkbTDsU=) Republicans nationwide are attacking the civil rights of trans people. Make no mistake: this is yet another way the GOP is trying to destroy our bodily autonomy — and we won't stand for it.

**We can replace Republican bigots with Democratic pro-choice women nationwide. Please, donate today to help elect women who will PROTECT our rights:**

**[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/69437079/426134081/1714615580?sourceid=1051906&refcode=HPCButtons_v1&refcode2=WTEFE909&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNRUwvMS84NzA2OSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZjVmMGE1Mi05MzRlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=iskwHuLH-A_tCzfdwv4LrGYmvIcuZj46v4FFCkbTDsU=)** **Peter, we are appalled by the Republicans' recent attacks on our trans family and friends.**

Since the beginning of 2023 alone, at least __566 bills__ have been introduced across 49 states with the intent to block trans people from accessing health care, education, or legal recognition, and even from simply _existing_ in public spaces without fear. Of these nearly 600 pieces of legislation, 83 have been successfully passed and 358 remain active in their respective legislative chambers.

After years of calculated attacks on our reproductive freedom, it should come as no surprise that GOP lawmakers are using bigotry, inflammatory rhetoric, and dangerous (and baseless) fear tactics to justify anti-trans legislation. It's all the same agenda: to destroy our bodily autonomy.

So here's the good news, Peter: EMILYs List-endorsed women like Gov. **Gretchen Whitmer** in Michigan, Reps. **Jennifer McClellan (VA-04)** and **Jahana Hayes (CT-05)** , and Sens. **Mazie Hirono (HI)** and **Elizabeth Warren (MA)** are already fighting back. From enshrining trans civil rights to providing legal means to pursue protections from discrimination, Democratic pro-choice women _know_ how essential it is to protect choice and autonomy — and that's why we need their voices in office now more than ever.
****EMILYs List endorses Democratic pro-choice candidates who will fight for _all_ of us. Donate to help elect and reelect candidates who can stop vicious GOP extremism in its tracks:**

clean_body: This is why we need pro-science, pro-choice voices in office everywhere >> | | | = Republicans nationwide are attacking the civil rights of trans people. Make no mistake: this is yet another way the GOP is trying to destroy our bodily autonomy — and we won't stand for it. We can replace Republican bigots with Democratic pro-choice women nationwide. Please, donate today to help elect women who will PROTECT our rights: = Peter, we are appalled by the Republicans' recent attacks on our trans family and friends. Since the beginning of 2023 alone, at least 566 bills have been introduced across 49 states with the intent to block trans people from accessing health care, education, or legal recognition, and even from simply existing in public spaces without fear. Of these nearly 600 pieces of legislation, 83 have been successfully passed and 358 remain active in their respective legislative chambers. After years of calculated attacks on our reproductive freedom, it should come as no surprise that GOP lawmakers are using bigotry, inflammatory rhetoric, and dangerous (and baseless) fear tactics to justify anti-trans legislation. It's all the same agenda: to destroy our bodily autonomy. = If you have saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately. | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = So here's the good news, Peter: EMILYs List-endorsed women like Gov. Gretchen Whitmer in Michigan, Reps. Jennifer McClellan (VA-04) and Jahana Hayes (CT-05) , and Sens. Mazie Hirono (HI) and Elizabeth Warren (MA) are already fighting back. From enshrining trans civil rights to providing legal means to pursue protections from discrimination, Democratic pro-choice women know how essential it is to protect choice and autonomy — and that's why we need their voices in office now more than ever. **EMILYs List endorses Democratic pro-choice candidates who will fight for all of us. name: Laura Gillen
subject: Long Island Families Deserve Better
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Gillen for NY
body:
Hard-working families are struggling to afford their most basic needs due to the skyrocketing cost of housing, transportation, child care, and utilities.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69437238/426134787/616205613?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2E2Yzg3Mi05NDRlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=chJvdoZ8NMv6ASTfOEWUApNUgHAvGxCWThpANugJ3vk=&emci=f7a6c872-944e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&emdi=fca6c872-944e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=7377580)
---
Peter,

Hard-working families are struggling to afford their most basic needs due to the skyrocketing cost of housing, transportation, child care, and utilities.

**_Here are the most urgent affordability issues facing Long Islanders:_** **🏘️ **The median house price on Long Island increased by 66%, and in Nassau, median monthly rents increased from $1,407 to $1,940.

**🧒 **The cost of child care is at an all-time high on average, costing $15,000 per year for infants and $13,000 per year for toddlers in Nassau.

**🔧 **The costs for utilities hit a record high, with working families struggling to keep up with the increasing costs of water, gas, and electricity bills. As Town Supervisor, I cut costs and lowered taxes. I introduced a program that would’ve dramatically lowered energy costs for families. Anthony D’Esposito killed that program and is doing nothing in Washington to help our families trying to make ends meet. **Long Island families deserve better.** [_**Do you support a more affordable future on Long Island?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69437239/426134788/616205613?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2E2Yzg3Mi05NDRlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=chJvdoZ8NMv6ASTfOEWUApNUgHAvGxCWThpANugJ3vk=&emci=f7a6c872-944e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&emdi=fca6c872-944e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=7377580)
| [YES, I DO! ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69437240/426134789/616205613?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2E2Yzg3Mi05NDRlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=chJvdoZ8NMv6ASTfOEWUApNUgHAvGxCWThpANugJ3vk=&emci=f7a6c872-944e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&emdi=fca6c872-944e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=7377580)
---
In Congress, I will work to bring major investments to Long Island and make sure no working family is left behind in my fight for affordability. Unlike Anthony D’Espsito, who has a history of working to fill his own pockets and listen to special interests, I will do everything in my power to ensure Long Island is a place where families can live for generations.

But I need your support to flip this seat blue and fight for affordability on Long Island.

[_**That’s why I’m asking you to add your name to show your support for a more affordable Long Island today!**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69437241/426134790/616205613?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2E2Yzg3Mi05NDRlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=chJvdoZ8NMv6ASTfOEWUApNUgHAvGxCWThpANugJ3vk=&emci=f7a6c872-944e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&emdi=fca6c872-944e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=7377580)
| [ADD YOUR NAME ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69437242/426134791/616205613?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmY2E2Yzg3Mi05NDRlLWVlMTEtYTNmMS0wMDIyNDgzMmUxYmEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=chJvdoZ8NMv6ASTfOEWUApNUgHAvGxCWThpANugJ3vk=&emci=f7a6c872-944e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&emdi=fca6c872-944e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&ceid=7377580)

Let’s fight for an affordable future together,

Laura Gillen

name: Sen. Jon Tester
subject: Montana Poll Alert
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] Folks, did you see the most recent Montana Senate poll? [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
JON TESTER: 45%
GOP OPPONENT: 42%
This poll proves we have what it takes to win 2024’s most competitive race, but all of our momentum could come crashing down if we don’t have the resources to fend off the GOP’s attacks. If we want to win, we will have to fight like hell to make it happen.
Will you step up today and split a contribution between Kirsten Gillibrand and my campaign to help us stay in the lead no matter what national Republicans throw our way? It’s important we hit our end-of-month fundraising goal. [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_tester?amounts=5,25,50,100,250]
If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jon Tester and Kirsten Gillibrand will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_tester?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_tester?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_tester?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=50]
ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_tester?amounts=5,25,50,100,250]
Folks, we know the election seems far away, but the honest truth is that early resources are critical to building a campaign strong enough to win.
And with Mitch McConnell planning to unleash tens of millions in dark money so his hand-picked candidate can win, every dollar we raise counts. Your support today means we can reach more voters, mobilize more supporters, and fight back harder against the negative attacks that will come.
Your support is critical, especially now. Please chip in to help us build up as much small-dollar support as possible so we can take on whatever McConnell and other national Republicans throw our way. [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_tester?amounts=5,25,50,100,250]
It means so much to me to have folks like you on this team.
— Jon

name: Don Jr.
subject: This won’t take long
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRSC
body:
But it will make a huge difference | [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=3d6b97f260a043f5b56b0b2c5945cacc&_e=WKlk3YUIo5_p_U-AV-1hNYngI8wou6vd0ByfiLHYsEsCv8P1aTfgXxdRkbjrWYpGajVUq41dTjMSGLn483YaV6794MfrY5BmR7qAwqgg2jZ-VZPXlFDOfZpvqbB7Kp6XZMJs6D_fwww1nE9yDcpRmtH4qiZ5bL5N5euT70-kYR2ueNEdwWmfiOYDJMB4jGbnGmasUK6C9LXaPpTGhUSYxAwJ4Mdp1EIIS5LQjdLekPybt3W-yfX6UY5i5Mh8cL330txhTBrl8JLPMCd69KwCFbn3b_3RRbsiU8R_1wfNhi0aDLCgql3RuW8j60YYN-X7WuLpZoiaD1oTC8D6COISYta_UX5jRdPlY3kjIA-anJyS5oOHuXj2mQL95yZR8lyucJMeymgv7vPAVyk-9jbVmMrVCFmrvqnzbld2zCqn_k4GdUsR0fvCGQzaIOHoulJH)
Don Jr. here, Fellow American.

Some of my closest friends, including Chairman Steve Daines, asked if I would reach out to some of my father’s most loyal supporters **– so it’s no surprise you came up first.**

I know top America First VIPs like Kellyanne Conway, Senator Ted Cruz, and even my father, Donald J. Trump, have either texted or emailed you to take the [**NRSC Nationwide Census.**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=3d6b97f260a043f5b56b0b2c5945cacc&_e=WKlk3YUIo5_p_U-AV-1hNYngI8wou6vd0ByfiLHYsEsCv8P1aTfgXxdRkbjrWYpGajVUq41dTjMSGLn483YaV6794MfrY5BmR7qAwqgg2jZ-VZPXlFDOfZpvqbB7Kp6XZMJs6D_fwww1nE9yDcpRmtH4qiZ5bL5N5euT70-kYR2ueNEdwWmfiOYDJMB4jGbnGmasUK6C9LXaPpTGhUSYxAwJ4Mdp1EIIS5LQjdLekPybt3W-yfX6UY5i5Mh8cL330txhTBrl8JLPMCd69KwCFbn3b_3RRbsiU8R_1wfNhi2lW3wId6cHpx_UtElSgD5gzlN548xnZw0Kkpoa6SMY6p2f68xPDAg5CV4IkqdpKMSGI22GPT1P8ryA-ynkLrC7iHmt-hP92F2Ih7-a4NPWYWxjHR62IQXPCyFOO-l_Cx_e-4usnkXiQR_JFEMyvcqP)

name: Team Katie Porter
subject: We need YOU for our 58 County Campaign, Derek!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
Electing Katie Porter to the U.S. Senate from the most populous state in America is a big task.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=29544%2E3422442%2Epn3ymk)
Derek, electing Katie Porter to the U.S. Senate from the most populous state in America is a big task.
We’ve got a detailed plan to make sure we succeed, including our **58 County Campaign** to reach as many voters as we can! From rural voters to first-time voters and from Democrats to Republicans to independents, Katie’s working hard to reach _everyone._
Now here’s where you come in, Derek. We need to assign grassroots supporters to each of California’s 58 counties to ensure we can fund organizing, advertising, and events in every part of our state. See more details on the whiteboard below:
**Derek's Assignment: Ventura County, CA**
* There are 506,758 registered voters in Ventura County.
* We’re setting a goal to raise 50¢ per voter to help us mobilize volunteers, plan local events, and start advertising.
* Doing the math...that means we need to raise **$253,379.00** to reach every voter in Ventura County.

**What do you say, Derek? Will you donate to help Katie reach voters in Ventura County?** **⇢[Make a $10 donation to reach 20 voters in Ventura County.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230908-1?refcode=EMAL08_1_COU_20230908_V1_F&amount=10&county=&voters=&refcode2=29544_3422442_pn3ymk&akid=29544%2E3422442%2Epn3ymk)** **⇢[Make a $25 donation to reach 50 voters in Ventura County.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230908-1?refcode=EMAL08_1_COU_20230908_V1_F&amount=25&county=&voters=&refcode2=29544_3422442_pn3ymk&akid=29544%2E3422442%2Epn3ymk)** **⇢[Make a $50 donation to reach 100 voters in Ventura County.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230908-1?refcode=EMAL08_1_COU_20230908_V1_F&amount=50&county=&voters=&refcode2=29544_3422442_pn3ymk&akid=29544%2E3422442%2Epn3ymk)** **⇢[Make a $100 donation to reach 200 voters in Ventura County.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230908-1?refcode=EMAL08_1_COU_20230908_V1_F&amount=100&county=&voters=&refcode2=29544_3422442_pn3ymk&akid=29544%2E3422442%2Epn3ymk)**
---
We won’t lie to you--it’s _hard_ to win a statewide election in a place as big as California.
That’s in part because there are more voters here than anywhere else in the country— _21,980,768 to be exact._
On top of all that, Katie is the only candidate in the Senate race who doesn’t take a cent from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Banks, Big Pharma, or Big Oil. That means this campaign sinks or swims based on the success of our grassroots fundraising efforts.
**[That’s why we’re asking for your help in Ventura County. Will you chip in any amount to help reach our $253,379.00 goal?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20230908-1?refcode=EMAL08_1_COU_20230908_V1_F&county=&voters=&refcode2=29544_3422442_pn3ymk&akid=29544%2E3422442%2Epn3ymk)**
**We can win with _full grassroots participation_ in our 58 Counties Campaign. **
By refusing to write off any voter in any county, we’ll make sure Katie wins statewide in 2024.
Thank you for doing your part in Ventura County.
More soon,
Team Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=EMAL08_1_COU_20230908_V1_F&t=3&refcode2=29544_3422442_pn3ymk&akid=29544%2E3422442%2Epn3ymk)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=4&akid=29544%2E3422442%2Epn3ymk)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=5&akid=29544%2E3422442%2Epn3ymk)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616

clean_body: Electing Katie Porter to the U.S. Senate from the most populous state in America is a big task. Derek, electing Katie Porter to the U.S. Senate from the most populous state in America is a big task. We’ve got a detailed plan to make sure we succeed, including our 58 County Campaign to reach as many voters as we can! From rural voters to first-time voters and from Democrats to Republicans to independents, Katie’s working hard to reach everyone. Now here’s where you come in, Derek. We need to assign grassroots supporters to each of California’s 58 counties to ensure we can fund organizing, advertising, and events in every part of our state. See more details on the whiteboard below: Derek's Assignment: Ventura County, CA There are 506,758 registered voters in Ventura County. We’re setting a goal to raise 50¢ per voter to help us mobilize volunteers, plan local events, and start advertising. Doing the math...that means we need to raise $253,379.00 to reach every voter in Ventura County. What do you say, Derek? Will you donate to help Katie reach voters in Ventura County? ⇢ ⇢ ⇢ ⇢ We won’t lie to you--it’s hard to win a statewide election in a place as big as California. That’s in part because there are more voters here than anywhere else in the country— 21,980,768 to be exact. On top of all that, Katie is the only candidate in the Senate race who doesn’t take a cent from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Banks, Big Pharma, or Big Oil. That means this campaign sinks or swims based on the success of our grassroots fundraising efforts. We can win with full grassroots participation in our 58 Counties Campaign. By refusing to write off any voter in any county, we’ll make sure Katie wins statewide in 2024. Thank you for doing your part in Ventura County. More soon, Team Katie Porter Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma.

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: I got a few minutes
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
The only reason I am here...
#

Hey Peter -
It’s Friday and I’m winding down the week, and I had an extra few minutes. So I wanted to share a few thoughts with you.
Look, there are a number of you receiving this email who have been with me since before my first run for Congress.
There are a number of you who joined at some point in the last few elections.
And, if we’re being honest, there are a lot of folks reading this email simply because I am running against Kyrsten Sinema.
Here’s the truth:
No matter why you are reading this, I am thankful for you.
People like me don’t often make it to Congress.
I’m the son of Latino immigrants, who, with my three sisters, was raised by my single mother. I was the first in my family to attend college, cleaning the toilets of my classmates to make it work, and then I joined the Marine Corps and went to Iraq.
The only reason I am here is because of the support I’ve had along the way.
As a kid, the support from my family.
In combat, the support of my fellow Marines.
In these campaigns, support from people like you.
But now I have a new mission: replacing Kyrsten Sinema and voting to expand voting rights, protect abortion rights, take on drug companies and hedge fund managers and be a voice and a vote for working people in the Senate.
I need your help. So please:
[**Can you make a $3 contribution to my campaign? We’ve started this month off too slowly, and we’re heading into an extremely important FEC deadline at the end of this month. I need your help to get things back on track before it’s too late.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-sept23.a-3sdr&refcode=em230908-2-asp&t=1&akid=1171%2E734936%2EGasU7k)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=ruben-em-sept23.4uOuYS&amount=3&refcode=em230908-2-asp&t=2&akid=1171%2E734936%2EGasU7k)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE OTHER](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=ruben-em-sept23.4uOuYS&refcode=em230908-2-asp&t=3&akid=1171%2E734936%2EGasU7k)**
---
****
Thank you in advance for chipping in before this deadline ends. It means a lot.
\- Ruben

name: Team Nikki
subject: Nikki is breaking through the noise
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress**
body:
|
#
---
It's been quite the summer, friends. From late-night voting sessions in Washington to hosting community events in IL-13 to hear directly from folks about the issues that matter most to them, saying the last few months have been busy for Nikki would be an understatement. **But this should come as no surprise.** Nikki made a promise to work with anyone and everyone to get things done for working families across Central and Southern Illinois — and that’s exactly what she’s done since coming to Congress. Just this summer, she introduced four bipartisan bills, including the _Rebuild Rural America Act_ , to deliver critical funding and resources to address issues facing rural communities like limited access to health care, high-speed internet, and aging infrastructure. **And her work hasn’t stopped there**. When she wasn’t in Washington working with her colleagues to overcome partisan gridlock and make progress for the American people, she was back home in the district, hosting U.S. Transportation Secretary Pete Buttigieg and U.S. Agriculture Secretary Tom Vilsack — who both announced millions in funding that will go towards projects and grants to improve our district. From working as a labor activist to serving in Congress, Nikki has dedicated her career to improving the lives of working families everywhere, and she’s never backed down from a tough fight. While she’s busy fighting her heart out for the people of Central and Southern Illinois, it’s our job to fight just as hard to protect her seat — and trust us, with two right-wing opponents already in the race, we’ve got a long fight ahead. **[If the last few weeks have proven anything, it’s that families across our district need a leader who will break through the noise to get things done. name: Ruben Gallego
subject: I got a few minutes
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
The only reason I am here...
#

Hey Peter -
It’s Friday and I’m winding down the week, and I had an extra few minutes. So I wanted to share a few thoughts with you.
Look, there are a number of you receiving this email who have been with me since before my first run for Congress.
There are a number of you who joined at some point in the last few elections.
And, if we’re being honest, there are a lot of folks reading this email simply because I am running against Kyrsten Sinema.
Here’s the truth:
No matter why you are reading this, I am thankful for you.
People like me don’t often make it to Congress.
I’m the son of Latino immigrants, who, with my three sisters, was raised by my single mother. I was the first in my family to attend college, cleaning the toilets of my classmates to make it work, and then I joined the Marine Corps and went to Iraq.
The only reason I am here is because of the support I’ve had along the way.
As a kid, the support from my family.
In combat, the support of my fellow Marines.
In these campaigns, support from people like you.
But now I have a new mission: replacing Kyrsten Sinema and voting to expand voting rights, protect abortion rights, take on drug companies and hedge fund managers and be a voice and a vote for working people in the Senate.
I need your help. So please:
[**Can you make a $3 contribution to my campaign? We’ve started this month off too slowly, and we’re heading into an extremely important FEC deadline at the end of this month. I need your help to get things back on track before it’s too late.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-sept23.a-3sdr&refcode=em230908-2-d&t=1&akid=1169%2E734936%2E__v7xH)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:_
| | **[CONTRIBUTE $3](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=ruben-em-sept23.4uOuYS&amount=3&refcode=em230908-2-d&t=2&akid=1169%2E734936%2E__v7xH)**
---
****
| **[CONTRIBUTE OTHER](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1044?c0=ruben-em-sept23.4uOuYS&refcode=em230908-2-d&t=3&akid=1169%2E734936%2E__v7xH)**
---
****
Thank you in advance for chipping in before this deadline ends. It means a lot.
\- Ruben

Paid For By Gallego for Arizona

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Bill grew up in Baton Rouge, Louisiana, and is a proud LSU graduate. He worked in Louisiana’s charity hospital system for over 25 years, ensuring that the less fortunate in our state were able to receive quality health care. Later, Bill co-founded the Greater Baton Rouge Community Clinic, providing free dental and health care to working families without insurance. In the wake of Hurricane Katrina, Bill led a group of volunteers to convert an abandoned K-Mart building into an emergency healthcare facility.
As a conservative in the Senate, he focuses on the issues Louisiana families care about the most. Bill is working to lower the cost of health care, make flood insurance affordable, and save Social Security from a 24% cut if Washington fails to act.
Bill, and his wife, Laura, live in Baton Rouge and attend church at the Chapel on the Campus. They are blessed with three children and one grandchild.

| | I am disgusted by the hypocrisy, and today I am the first candidate in this race to call out David Schweikert for his hypocrisy on the IRA. Schweikert railed against the Inflation Reduction Act (IRA) as "ineffective" and "wasteful." **But had no problem celebrating the groundbreaking ceremony of the solar project at American Legion Post #58 in Fountain Hills – _a project funded entirely by the very legislation he voted against. _** On Twitter, Schweikert publicly shared his support for the solar project, stating, "The structure will use American-made steel and is expected to generate $400,000 of electricity in its lifetime service to future generations of veterans." Schweikert's stance on the IRA seems to have more flip-flops than a beachside souvenir shop. He voted against it in Congress but then sent his staff for the project photo-op. **It's quite a balancing act, but voters are on to his game.** **[Can you chip in today and help us tell voters exactly what David Schweikert is up to?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69438041/426137538/-475151067?refcode=2023-09-08-ira&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=35f2e36e-9b4e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc0NDIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzVmMmUzNmUtOWI0ZS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=96SHkFwVa_i00GeQ69iDeMSxZnVIAuXcJpyt-IqxVbY=)** [Chip in now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69438042/426137539/-475151067?refcode=2023-09-08-ira&recurring=0&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=35f2e36e-9b4e-ee11-a3f1-00224832e1ba&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc0NDIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzVmMmUzNmUtOWI0ZS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=96SHkFwVa_i00GeQ69iDeMSxZnVIAuXcJpyt-IqxVbY=) Signed into law last year by President Biden, the Inflation Reduction Act represents the largest investment in clean energy in U.S. history, providing access to hundreds of billions of dollars for a wide range of projects aimed at fostering sustainability and economic growth. The American Legion Post anticipates savings of nearly $200,000 over the 25-year lifespan of the solar panels. Without the IRA's support, the nonprofit would not have been able to harness solar power to achieve these substantial savings. The IRA is helping our community, and David Schweikert tried to stop that help from arriving. Our grassroots movement is about stopping Schweikert and electing a Congressman who says what he means and who serves _our __community_ , not a bunch of extremists in Washington. **[Can we count on name: Hilary Franz
subject: Bringing communities together
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Hilary Franz (D)
body:
As our next governor, I'll ensure our state invests in you, our hard-working people.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69438329/426138416/-165497492?refcode=BLU-HFFG-20230908-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDA1NzQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTZkYjdlOTItOWI0ZS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=2bni2Tre-1U_-GAcgcPteOZbah9wDDcCc7oM54srE4U=)
---
| Peter,

We spend way too much time in politics dividing people rather than _**communicating and collaborating to get results on the ground.**_

I know we need to come together across rural and urban divides, across economic divides, to solve our problems.

Over the last seven years, I've seen every county and every corner of this state. Our communities are struggling under the weight of the same challenges: our public schools need proper funding, and we're seeing a rise in homelessness and unemployment while climate change and the economy run rampant.

As commissioner of public lands, I've used Washington's Department of Natural Resources to generate funds for our most pressing challenges. As our next governor, I'll ensure our state invests in you, our hard-working people. [_**As we kick off our September fundraising, can I count on you to contribute $5 right now? We need to raise $5,000 before the weekend is out to keep up with our goal.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/69438330/426138417/-165497492?refcode=BLU-HFFG-20230908-1-EM&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDA1NzQiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZTZkYjdlOTItOWI0ZS1lZTExLWEzZjEtMDAyMjQ4MzJlMWJhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=2bni2Tre-1U_-GAcgcPteOZbah9wDDcCc7oM54srE4U=)

clean_body: As our next governor, I'll ensure our state invests in you, our hard-working people. | = | Peter, We spend way too much time in politics dividing people rather than communicating and collaborating to get results on the ground. I know we need to come together across rural and urban divides, across economic divides, to solve our problems. Over the last seven years, I've seen every county and every corner of this state. Our communities are struggling under the weight of the same challenges: our public schools need proper funding, and we're seeing a rise in homelessness and unemployment while climate change and the economy run rampant. As commissioner of public lands, I've used Washington's Department of Natural Resources to generate funds for our most pressing challenges. As our next governor, I'll ensure our state invests in you, our hard-working people. = | | | = | = | = | = | = Thank you for your support, Hilary * | | = Paid for by Friends of Hilary Franz (D) Friends of Hilary Franz (D) PO Box 9100 Seattle, WA 98109 United States | = Email is a critical way for our campaign to stay in touch with you. Fellow Conservative,

Are we going to continue to be a country of law and order, _**or are we fine becoming a borderless, anarchic society with no rules and even less order?**_

I have no idea what the Biden Administration is thinking most days, but how in the world did they think **WELDING OPEN** flood gates along the U.S.-Mexican border was a good idea?

_**“Each of the 114 gates in Arizona, which have been open for nearly two months, has 12-foot doors wide enough for a motorcycle to drive through. Smugglers drive busloads of migrants to the Mexican side of the border, where they get off and simply walk into the US.”**_
**We thought the agents were going to tell us something,** ” one Ecuadorean migrant said. “**But we just walked in,** ” according to the _New York Post._

**As someone who has personally pulled the dead bodies of immigrants out of ditches, I cannot express my dismay at Biden’s failure to secure the border. **

As a candidate for the U.S. Senate and a Sheriff in my own right, **[I’m putting together a petition to send to President Biden demanding action at the border.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f2065359b9e44fc0b58b707520529b80&_e=WVpn9TRO-fLMSFqHexvtp22j0Q-b9IgblfY1cMg9BpRpm2NnYX4MIg5BvyH7OSf4eu4TK0cTyJhRT76PYHcf-bYPYXjnK_bvMnwoFmrd-pIvybS1dfHUrUYu538IizYRMD-cpgUIrpcOAW2jZQ3zMy44Fnu8MoWSiaz_I8UV39EZVLPY5XJfrmq30k4pPXLRhHzUdmcaGmV1gB_ERMngDRNjqR64gXxl-wXmUSfOOLYHP1b2slieaCFaxjVAqg8v7Yegh2xlly2FH_1kwIneLRvtas6tKh21hdaec6qhdUbpYzn9LmMrcKiAjL5L8a4pLSW6wL5_IZsWbCoNt8hZHUCOT7Fonil5R0WQ5uvw8NrKUxX7YlfM2EBSNOXnSL5Xng-VCLx2eHJDFSUGodbEnA%3D%3D)

[[sign it now]](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f2065359b9e44fc0b58b707520529b80&_e=WVpn9TRO-fLMSFqHexvtp22j0Q-b9IgblfY1cMg9BpRpm2NnYX4MIg5BvyH7OSf4eu4TK0cTyJhRT76PYHcf-bYPYXjnK_bvMnwoFmrd-pIvybS1dfHUrUYu538IizYRMD-cpgUIrpcOAW2jZQ3zMy44Fnu8MoWSiaz_I8UV39EZVLPY5XJfrmq30k4pPXLRhHzUdmcaGmV1gB_ERMngDRNjqR64gXxl-wXmUSfOOLZFp6DEvn4EyNfuXp90Qnde5D8dFDkaDbS2VybuGJR5A6GNg_-r9qVxN7I0LkanGitqaEQ1UtkBzz_2D4g8_IvOQGRTSO5XT04lTM39rXZLH4e9inVjznv-CkgOkDnk-fkndozd60g9FQf5gQQBr64ODFyDpbtswfXNoZbR8gLVnA%3D%3D)**

Democrats have utterly failed us; I’m standing up today to say that _**ENOUGH IS ENOUGH**_.

**[My goal is to gather 1,000 signatures of Americans who are scared, bewildered, and just down-right angry that Joe Biden and Washington Democrats refuse to abide by our nation’s laws.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f2065359b9e44fc0b58b707520529b80&_e=WVpn9TRO-fLMSFqHexvtp22j0Q-b9IgblfY1cMg9BpRpm2NnYX4MIg5BvyH7OSf4eu4TK0cTyJhRT76PYHcf-bYPYXjnK_bvMnwoFmrd-pIvybS1dfHUrUYu538IizYRMD-cpgUIrpcOAW2jZQ3zMy44Fnu8MoWSiaz_I8UV39EZVLPY5XJfrmq30k4pPXLRhHzUdmcaGmV1gB_ERMngDRNjqR64gXxl-wXmUSfOOLaf7r1BcFAvxu2NtCW6mj2-tnU5INYTiT5O8Np3mZvsNXBmNTrIghDjqbyXMXbduFBDF0gazpPRg63Mbzj_o6dpiEYykLP5l0ybmmSDN_rJgkWPe5yRLeH3SLwOsnZOAq1kX77oCDrgxJQkmxTktW2x0wbhrVQO7uEhtjcNHFbbMA%3D%3D)**[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f2065359b9e44fc0b58b707520529b80&_e=WVpn9TRO-fLMSFqHexvtp22j0Q-b9IgblfY1cMg9BpRpm2NnYX4MIg5BvyH7OSf4eu4TK0cTyJhRT76PYHcf-bYPYXjnK_bvMnwoFmrd-pIvybS1dfHUrUYu538IizYRMD-cpgUIrpcOAW2jZQ3zMy44Fnu8MoWSiaz_I8UV39EZVLPY5XJfrmq30k4pPXLRhHzUdmcaGmV1gB_ERMngDRNjqR64gXxl-wXmUSfOOLbj5TtQHovI9sjB2KuUtC2qcrLQgS5OYOo__Hu4wj-kee8ajObWYFMGrU5DhgNFXTdFxRZArkP_uOG6TkQ_1Qe-WxTPSn4ktzTJrH4xdH4AUSaMaKTdUWoVr3kJAAKO8qo6dHnISI-7OkuVsik4IXrewMVDkPX08_vhIeK6qMBeSA%3D%3D)

STOP PUTTING OUR LIVES AT RISK->**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=f2065359b9e44fc0b58b707520529b80&_e=WVpn9TRO-fLMSFqHexvtp22j0Q-b9IgblfY1cMg9BpRpm2NnYX4MIg5BvyH7OSf4eu4TK0cTyJhRT76PYHcf-bYPYXjnK_bvMnwoFmrd-pIvybS1dfHUrUYu538IizYRMD-cpgUIrpcOAW2jZQ3zMy44Fnu8MoWSiaz_I8UV39EZVLPY5XJfrmq30k4pPXLRhHzUdmcaGmV1gB_ERMngDRNjqR64gXxl-wXmUSfOOLYtCUh_xJtBjSS9uJWb7IfHmNFbdl9NRballOU56-6fHfG9LMeGirZp6lDRp8e_6C_1cZfqCXbX7pMUH7NUKZya-9JPtggF7mtmPKdUjkSl2LaWSM-mHoz3KG6pBOLcgSCx2fnc1mRBgzaVjZvDvZ1RUNH4jIQ21wl8vYPSPvz5mw%3D%3D)

We do that by sending law enforcement officials, who know a thing or two about quelling unrest, to replace Democrats in the Senate who can’t seem to figure out how to do their damn jobs.

Thanks for standing with me today.

**Meet Sheriff Lamb:** GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM.

Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity.

Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year.

We do that by sending law enforcement officials, who know a thing or two about quelling unrest, to replace Democrats in the Senate who can’t seem to figure out how to do their damn jobs. Thanks for standing with me today. Sheriff Mark Lamb Republican for U.S. Senate Follow Sheriff Lamb On Social Media | | | ---|---|--- ../../../../../../Desktop/Desktop/Mark Lamb/Templates/April Pelosi/www.alekfororegon.com Meet Sheriff Lamb: GOD. FAMILY. FREEDOM. Sheriff Mark Lamb is a husband, father, grandfather, and God-fearing patriot. From Hawaii to Manila, Arizona, Mark Lamb's rich experirences inspired his life of service. As the 24th Sheriff of Pinal County, Arizona, he drives a powerful agenda to ensure community safety and prosperity. Sheriff Lamb trained with the Maricopa County Sheriff's Office Deputy Academy and was named Valedictorian of his class. He was hired by the Salt River Pima-Maricopa Indian Community, where he excelled as a police officer and was named Rookie of the Year. The following year, he received the Officer of the Year award. He was later promoted as a Detective to the Gang Enforcement Unit and in his first year was named Detective of the Year. | Paid for by Mark Lamb for Senate

body:
If we gather enough support between now and Election Day, we stand a chance at flipping the Virginia House and maintaining our Senate majority – but this won’t be an easy fight, and we’re running out of time. | | |
---
| | **Our Republican counterparts released a memo detailing their plan for a far-right takeover in Virginia.** The GOP is dead set on helping Virginia Republicans clutch onto their _razor-thin majority_ in the House of Delegates and chip away at _our_ Senate majority.
* They’re partnering with far-right Gov. Glenn Youngkin to push an ultra-conservative agenda on the Commonwealth – **banning abortion, restricting voting laws, and pushing for anti-LGBTQ+ policies.**
* They’re intensifying their spending – Republicans poured **$750,000 into Gov. Youngkin’s PAC** , Youngkin ended last quarter with over **$6 million cash on hand** , _and_ Virginia Republicans have spent **six figures on attack ads** in 12 key swing districts.
* **_And_** , they’re spewing lies about Democrats’ stance on crime, education, and the economy. We need to set the record straight.

clean_body: If we gather enough support between now and Election Day, we stand a chance at flipping the Virginia House and maintaining our Senate majority – but this won’t be an easy fight, and we’re running out of time. | | | | | Our Republican counterparts released a memo detailing their plan for a far-right takeover in Virginia. The GOP is dead set on helping Virginia Republicans clutch onto their razor-thin majority in the House of Delegates and chip away at our Senate majority. They’re partnering with far-right Gov. Glenn Youngkin to push an ultra-conservative agenda on the Commonwealth – banning abortion, restricting voting laws, and pushing for anti-LGBTQ+ policies. They’re intensifying their spending – Republicans poured $750,000 into Gov. Youngkin’s PAC , Youngkin ended last quarter with over $6 million cash on hand , and Virginia Republicans have spent six figures on attack ads in 12 key swing districts. And , they’re spewing lies about Democrats’ stance on crime, education, and the economy. We need to set the record straight. We can’t sit idly by while Republicans forge a path to power. With 60 days until Election Day, we can’t take our foot off the gas. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Here’s the thing: Republicans are hurling baseless accusations against Democrats, so their messaging won’t carry them far. BUT: MAGA millionaires are fired up and doubling down on their financial support of an extreme right-wing agenda. If we gather enough support between now and Election Day, we stand a fighting chance at flipping the Virginia House and defending our Senate majority – but this won’t be easy, and we’re running out of time. Reaching grassroots supporters directly is CRITICAL if we’re going to Save America from Joe Biden and the Left. But, in order to do that we need to provide supporters with the most up-to-date information on all of our efforts.

**TEXT TRUMP to 88022** to start receiving text messages from President Trump.

It’s because of the commitment and support from real Patriots, like YOU, that we will SAVE AMERICA! Thank you again for your generous support. If you'd like to change your subscription status [follow this link.](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_s=1cc36526a4ee4bba94bd781887f4c23d&_t=-_hVnIGDKAEP9gcGBFdizEixNeMoJJNSbh8e9lQ7sw99o1PzQFiICB0xHasJ-2H9nayqdUwoYEm1Gxrg5GlQpebEOFeJvofAnVslx4VqZA4%3D)

clean_body: President Trump is flying one lucky winner (and a guest) to Beverly Hills.| | | | | Patriot, People always say it’s an incredibly fun and surreal experience when they finally get to meet President Trump. And now that his mugshot has taken over the Internet, he may just be the most famous man in the world. Luckily, YOU have the chance to meet the man, the myth, the legend himself in Beverly Hills... President Trump is hosting a reception in Beverly Hills on September 29, and he’s flying one lucky winner (and a guest of your choice) to join him for the evening. He’ll cover your flight, your hotel, and you’ll even get to take a special photo with your favorite President. All that’s left to do is enter to WIN ... | | Thank you, Team Trump | | | | NO PURCHASE, PAYMENT, CONTRIBUTION, OR TEXT MESSAGE NECESSARY TO ENTER OR WIN. Contributing or sending a text message will not improve your chances of winning. Void where prohibited. You may enter by contributing to Save America JFC by clicking . Alternatively, you may enter without contributing by clicking or by texting "BEVERLYHILLS" to 88022 for one (1) entry. By sending a text message from your mobile phone, you are providing your written consent to receive calls and SMS/MMS messages, including autodialed and automated calls and texts, to that number from the Save America JFC. Text message and data rates may apply. Consent is not required as a condition of entry. Text STOP to 88022 to opt out. Entries must be received between September 7, 2023, at 12:00 a.m. Eastern Time, and ends on September 12, 2023, at 11:59 p.m. Eastern Time. Odds of winning depend on the number of eligible entries received. One (1) "Prize Winner" will receive a trip for two to a September 29, 2023 reception in Beverly Hills, California consisting of the following: (i) round-trip coach class airfare for the Prize Winner and one (1) guest to the event destination from the major U.S. airport nearest Prize Winner's residence within the 48 contiguous United States; (ii) two (2) tickets to the reception featuring President Donald J. Trump; (iii) two (2) day one (1) night first class hotel accommodations (1 room, double occupancy); (iv) one (1) photograph of the Prize Winner and guest with President Trump; approximate retail value ("ARV") of the Prize: $8,000. The Promotion is open only to U.S. citizens or lawful permanent U.S. residents who are legal residents (green card holders) of the 50 United States, Puerto Rico, and the District of Columbia and are at least 18 years of age (or the age of majority under applicable law). Winners must be 18 or older (or of majority under applicable law) and meet other requirements as described in the Official Rules. Promotion subject to Official Rules and additional restrictions on eligibility may apply. Visit for full details and Official Rules. Sponsor: Trump Save America, PO Box 13570, Arlington, VA 22219.
